papers.title: Normalizing Trajectory Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based models decompose sampling into many small Gaussian denoising steps -- an assumption that breaks down when generation is compressed to a few coarse transitions. Existing few-step methods address this through distillation, consistency training, or adversarial objectives, but sacrifice the likelihood framework in the process. We introduce Normalizing Trajectory Models (NTM), which models each reverse step as an expressive conditional normalizing flow with exact likelihood training. Architecturally, NTM combines shallow invertible blocks within each step with a deep parallel predictor across the trajectory, forming an end-to-end network trainable from scratch or initializable from pretrained flow-matching models. Its exact trajectory likelihood further enables self-distillation: a lightweight denoiser trained on the model's own score produces high-quality samples in four steps. On text-to-image benchmarks, NTM matches or outperforms strong image generation baselines in just four sampling steps while uniquely retaining exact likelihood over the generative trajectory.

analysis.tldr: NTM用可逆流建模扩散逆过程，四步生成高质量图像且保留精确似然。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型假设多步高斯去噪，但少步生成时该假设失效；现有少步方法通过蒸馏、一致性训练或对抗目标牺牲了似然框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在少步生成中同时实现高质量采样和精确似然训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型的多步高斯去噪假设在压缩到少数粗粒度转换时被打破。
analysis.method: 将每个逆步骤建模为条件归一化流，结合浅层可逆块和跨轨迹的深层并行预测器，支持端到端训练或从预训练流匹配模型初始化，并利用精确轨迹似然进行自蒸馏。
contributions: 提出NTM，将每个逆步骤建模为条件归一化流，实现精确似然训练。
设计结合浅层可逆块和深层并行预测器的架构，支持从零训练或预训练初始化。
利用精确轨迹似然进行自蒸馏，四步生成高质量样本。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像基准上，NTM在四步采样中匹配或超越强基线，同时唯一保留生成轨迹的精确似然。
limitations: 可能对更大规模或更高分辨率图像生成的计算开销较高。
自蒸馏过程可能依赖于初始模型质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTM用可逆流建模扩散逆过程，四步生成高质量图像且保留精确似然。

papers.title: EmambaIR: Efficient Visual State Space Model for Event-guided Image Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Recent event-based image reconstruction methods predominantly rely on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) to process complementary event information. However, these architectures face fundamental limitations: CNNs often fail to capture global feature correlations, whereas ViTs incur quadratic computational complexity (e.g., $O(n^2)$), hindering their application in high-resolution scenarios. To address these bottlenecks, we introduce EmambaIR, an Efficient visual State Space Model designed for image reconstruction using spatially sparse and temporally continuous event streams. Our framework introduces two key components: the cross-modal Top-k Sparse Attention Module (TSAM) and the Gated State-Space Module (GSSM). TSAM efficiently performs pixel-level top-k sparse attention to guide cross-modal interactions, yielding rich yet sparse fusion features. Subsequently, GSSM utilizes a nonlinear gated unit to enhance the temporal representation of vanilla linear-complexity ($O(n)$) SSMs, effectively capturing global contextual dependencies without the typical computational overhead. Extensive experiments on six datasets across three diverse image reconstruction tasks - motion deblurring, deraining, and High Dynamic Range (HDR) enhancement - demonstrate that EmambaIR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods while offering substantial reductions in memory consumption and computational cost. The source code and data are publicly available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出高效状态空间模型EmambaIR，用于事件引导的图像重建，在多个任务上超越SOTA且计算成本更低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于CNN和ViT的事件图像重建方法存在局限性：CNN难以捕获全局特征相关性，ViT计算复杂度高（O(n²)），限制了高分辨率场景的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效架构，既能利用事件流的时空稀疏性，又能以线性复杂度捕获全局上下文依赖，用于事件引导的图像重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EmambaIR框架，包含跨模态Top-k稀疏注意力模块（TSAM）和门控状态空间模块（GSSM）。TSAM实现像素级top-k稀疏注意力以引导跨模态交互；GSSM利用非线性门控单元增强线性复杂度SSM的时间表示能力。
contributions: 首次将状态空间模型（SSM）应用于事件引导的图像重建，实现线性复杂度。
提出TSAM和GSSM两个核心模块，分别高效处理跨模态融合和全局上下文依赖。
在运动去模糊、去雨、HDR增强三个任务上显著超越SOTA，同时降低内存和计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在六个数据集上进行了三个图像重建任务的实验，包括运动去模糊、去雨和HDR增强，结果表明EmambaIR显著优于现有方法，并降低了内存消耗和计算成本。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏事件数据的鲁棒性有待验证。
门控机制引入额外参数，可能增加训练难度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出高效状态空间模型EmambaIR，用于事件引导的图像重建，在多个任务上超越SOTA且计算成本更低。

papers.title: Proxy3D: Efficient 3D Representations for Vision-Language Models via Semantic Clustering and Alignment
papers.abstract: Spatial intelligence in vision-language models (VLMs) attracts research interest with the practical demand to reason in the 3D this http URL promising results, most existing methods follow the conventional 2D pipeline in VLMs and use pixel-aligned representations for the vision modality. However, correspondence-based models with implicit 3D scene understanding often fail to achieve spatial consistency, and representation-based models with 3D geometric priors lack efficiency in vision sequence serialization. To address this, we propose a Proxy3D method with compact yet comprehensive 3D proxy representations for the vision modality. Given only video frames as input, we employ semantic and geometric encoders to extract scene features and then perform their semantic-aware clustering to obtain a set of proxies in the 3D space. For representation alignment, we further curate the SpaceSpan dataset and apply multi-stage training to adopt the proposed 3D proxy representations with the VLM. When using shorter sequences for vision information, our method achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance in 3D visual question answering, visual grounding and general spatial intelligence benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Proxy3D方法，通过语义聚类和对齐为VLM生成紧凑3D代理表示，提升空间智能效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在3D空间推理中面临挑战：基于对应的方法隐式理解3D场景，空间一致性差；基于表示的方法依赖3D几何先验，视觉序列序列化效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何为VLM设计紧凑且全面的3D代理表示，以高效实现空间一致性和视觉序列压缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 仅输入视频帧，使用语义和几何编码器提取场景特征，通过语义感知聚类获得3D空间中的代理集；构建SpaceSpan数据集，采用多阶段训练将3D代理表示与VLM对齐。
contributions: 提出Proxy3D方法，利用语义聚类生成紧凑3D代理表示，替代传统像素对齐表示。
构建SpaceSpan数据集并设计多阶段训练策略，实现3D代理表示与VLM的有效对齐。
在3D VQA、视觉定位和通用空间智能基准上，使用更短序列取得竞争性或SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在3D视觉问答、视觉定位和通用空间智能基准上评估，使用更短序列取得竞争性或SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖视频帧输入的质量和数量。
语义聚类可能引入信息损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Proxy3D方法，通过语义聚类和对齐为VLM生成紧凑3D代理表示，提升空间智能效率。

papers.title: Flow-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Flow Matching Models
papers.abstract: Existing Flow Matching (FM) text-to-image models suffer from two critical bottlenecks under multi-task alignment: the reward sparsity induced by scalar-valued rewards, and the gradient interference arising from jointly optimizing heterogeneous objectives, which together give rise to a 'seesaw effect' of competing metrics and pervasive reward hacking. Inspired by the success of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) in the large language model community, we propose Flow-OPD, the first unified post-training framework that integrates on-policy distillation into Flow Matching models. Flow-OPD adopts a two-stage alignment strategy: it first cultivates domain-specialized teacher models via single-reward GRPO fine-tuning, allowing each expert to reach its performance ceiling in isolation; it then establishes a robust initial policy through a Flow-based Cold-Start scheme and seamlessly consolidates heterogeneous expertise into a single student via a three-step orchestration of on-policy sampling, task-routing labeling, and dense trajectory-level supervision. We further introduce Manifold Anchor Regularization (MAR), which leverages a task-agnostic teacher to provide full-data supervision that anchors generation to a high-quality manifold, effectively mitigating the aesthetic degradation commonly observed in purely RL-driven alignment. Built upon Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium, Flow-OPD raises the GenEval score from 63 to 92 and the OCR accuracy from 59 to 94, yielding an overall improvement of roughly 10 points over vanilla GRPO, while preserving image fidelity and human-preference alignment and exhibiting an emergent 'teacher-surpassing' effect. These results establish Flow-OPD as a scalable alignment paradigm for building generalist text-to-image models.

analysis.tldr: Flow-OPD 将在线策略蒸馏引入流匹配模型，通过两阶段对齐策略解决多任务对齐中的奖励稀疏和梯度干扰问题，显著提升文本到图像生成性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流匹配文本到图像模型在多任务对齐时面临奖励稀疏和梯度干扰导致的‘跷跷板效应’和奖励黑客问题，亟需统一的后训练框架。
analysis.problem: 如何解决流匹配模型在多任务对齐中因标量奖励稀疏和异构目标联合优化导致的性能竞争与奖励黑客问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多任务对齐下存在奖励稀疏和梯度干扰，导致竞争指标的‘跷跷板效应’和奖励黑客现象。
analysis.method: 提出 Flow-OPD，包含两阶段对齐策略：第一阶段通过单奖励 GRPO 微调培养领域专家教师；第二阶段通过基于流的冷启动方案建立初始策略，并通过在线策略采样、任务路由标注和密集轨迹级监督三步整合异构专家知识；同时引入流形锚点正则化（MAR）利用任务无关教师提供全数据监督，防止美学退化。
contributions: 首个将在线策略蒸馏统一集成到流匹配模型的后训练框架 Flow-OPD
提出两阶段对齐策略和流形锚点正则化（MAR），有效缓解多任务对齐中的跷跷板效应和奖励黑客问题
在 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium 上显著提升 GenEval 和 OCR 准确率，并展现‘超越教师’效应
analysis.experiments: 基于 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium，GenEval 分数从 63 提升至 92，OCR 准确率从 59% 提升至 94%，整体比 vanilla GRPO 提升约 10 个点，同时保持图像保真度和人类偏好对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基础模型（Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium），泛化性需验证
两阶段训练和在线策略采样可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flow-OPD 将在线策略蒸馏引入流匹配模型，通过两阶段对齐策略解决多任务对齐中的奖励稀疏和梯度干扰问题，显著提升文本到图像生成性能。

papers.title: 6D Pose Estimation via Keypoint Heatmap Regression with RGB-D Residual Neural Networks
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a modular framework for 6D pose estimation based on keypoint heatmap regression. Our approach combines YOLOv10m for object detection with a ResNet18-based network that predicts 2D heatmaps from RGB images. Keypoints extracted from these heatmaps are used to estimate the 6D object pose via the PnP RANSAC algorithm. We compare different keypoint selection strategies to assess their impact on pose accuracy. Additionally, we extend the baseline by incorporating depth data using a cross-fusion architecture, which enables interaction between RGB and depth features at multiple stages. We further explore general training improvements, such as experimenting with activation functions and learning rate scheduling strategies to improve model performance. Our best RGB-only model achieved a mean ADD-based accuracy of 84.50%, while the RGB-D fusion model reached 92.41% on the LINEMOD dataset. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于关键点热图回归的RGB-D融合框架，在LINEMOD上实现92.41%的6D姿态估计精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 6D姿态估计在机器人抓取、增强现实等领域至关重要，但现有方法在遮挡、纹理缺失等场景下精度不足，且RGB与深度数据的融合方式有待优化。
analysis.problem: 如何通过关键点热图回归结合RGB-D多模态特征，提升6D物体姿态估计的精度和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 模块化框架：YOLOv10m检测物体，ResNet18预测2D关键点热图，经PnP RANSAC求解6D姿态；并引入跨融合架构在多个阶段交互RGB与深度特征。
contributions: 提出基于关键点热图回归的RGB-D融合框架，在LINEMOD数据集上达到92.41%的ADD精度。
系统比较了不同关键点选择策略对姿态估计精度的影响。
探索了激活函数和学习率调度等训练改进策略。
analysis.experiments: 在LINEMOD数据集上评估，RGB-only模型平均ADD精度84.50%，RGB-D融合模型达92.41%。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集LINEMOD上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论对遮挡或对称物体的处理效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于关键点热图回归的RGB-D融合框架，在LINEMOD上实现92.41%的6D姿态估计精度。

papers.title: Towards Highly-Constrained Human Motion Generation with Retrieval-Guided Diffusion Noise Optimization
papers.abstract: Generating human motion that satisfies customized zero-shot goal functions, enabling applications such as controllable character animation and behavior synthesis for virtual agents, is a critical capability. While current approaches handle many unseen constraints, they fail on tasks with very challenging spatiotemporal restrictions, such as severe spatial obstacles or specified numbers of walking steps. To equip motion generators for these highly constrained tasks, we present a retrieval-guided method built on the training-free diffusion noise optimization framework. The key idea is to search within large motion datasets for guidance that can potentially satisfy difficult constraints. We introduce relational task parsing to group target constraints and identify the difficult ones to be handled by retrieved reference. A better initialization for diffusion noise is then obtained via a reward-guided mask that combines random noise with retrieved noise. By optimizing diffusion noise from this improved initialization, we successfully solve highly constrained generation tasks. By leveraging LLM for relational task parsing, the whole framework is further enabled to automatically reason for what to retrieve, improving the intelligence of moving agents under a training-free optimization scheme.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索引导的扩散噪声优化方法，解决高度约束的人体运动生成任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有运动生成方法难以处理具有严格时空约束的任务（如严重空间障碍或指定步数），需要一种无需重新训练就能处理高度约束的生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何生成满足高度定制化零样本目标函数的人体运动，特别是具有挑战性时空约束的任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前方法在简单约束下有效，但在高度约束任务（如严重空间障碍或指定步数）上失败。
analysis.method: 基于无训练扩散噪声优化框架，引入检索引导：通过关系任务解析将目标约束分组并识别困难约束，从大规模运动数据集中检索参考，利用奖励引导掩码将随机噪声与检索噪声结合得到更好的初始化，再优化扩散噪声。
contributions: 提出检索引导的扩散噪声优化方法，无需重新训练即可处理高度约束的运动生成。
引入关系任务解析和LLM自动推理，提升智能体在无训练优化方案下的自主性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖大规模运动数据集的质量和覆盖范围。
检索和优化过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索引导的扩散噪声优化方法，解决高度约束的人体运动生成任务。

papers.title: MoCoTalk: Multi-Conditional Diffusion with Adaptive Router for Controllable Talking Head Generation
papers.abstract: Talking-head generation requires joint modeling of identity, head pose, facial expression, and mouth dynamics. Existing methods typically address only a subset of these factors, and rely on fixed-weight or heuristic fusion when multiple conditions are involved. We present MoCoTalk, a multi-conditional video diffusion framework that unifies four complementary control signals: a reference image, facial keypoints, 3DMM-rendered shading meshes, and the corresponding speech audio. To resolve destructive interference among heterogeneous conditions, we introduce an Adaptive Multi-Condition Router that computes channel-wise, timestep-aware gating over the four condition streams, allowing the fusion strategy to vary with both feature subspace and noise level. To better capture speech-related facial dynamics, we design a Mouth-Augmented Shading Mesh, a 3DMM-based representation that decouples head motion, mouth motion, expression, and lighting. This design provides a temporally consistent geometric prior and allows flexible recombination of these attributes at inference. We further introduce a lip consistency loss to tighten audio-visual alignment. Extensive experiments show that MoCoTalk achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of structural, motion, and perceptual metrics, while offering attribute-level controllability that single-condition methods do not provide.

analysis.tldr: MoCoTalk 提出多条件视频扩散框架，通过自适应路由器和嘴部增强网格实现可控说话头生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有说话头生成方法通常只处理部分控制因素（如身份、姿态、表情、口型），且多条件融合时依赖固定权重或启发式策略，导致条件间干扰，限制了生成质量和可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何统一融合多个异构条件（参考图像、面部关键点、3DMM网格、语音音频）并避免条件间的破坏性干扰，同时实现属性级别的可控说话头生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多条件融合时存在破坏性干扰，固定权重或启发式融合策略无法适应不同特征子空间和噪声水平。
analysis.method: 提出 MoCoTalk 框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 自适应多条件路由器，计算通道级、时间步感知的门控权重动态融合四个条件流；2) 嘴部增强着色网格，基于3DMM解耦头部运动、嘴部运动、表情和光照，提供时间一致的几何先验并支持属性重组；3) 唇一致性损失，增强音视频对齐。
contributions: 提出自适应多条件路由器，实现通道级、时间步感知的动态条件融合，缓解异构条件间的干扰。
设计嘴部增强着色网格，解耦头部运动、嘴部运动、表情和光照，支持属性级可控生成。
引入唇一致性损失，提升音频-视觉对齐精度。
在多个指标上达到最先进性能，并实现单条件方法无法提供的属性级可控性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在结构、运动和感知指标上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖3DMM参数质量，对极端表情或遮挡鲁棒性有限。
自适应路由器的计算开销可能影响推理速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoCoTalk 提出多条件视频扩散框架，通过自适应路由器和嘴部增强网格实现可控说话头生成。

papers.title: SCOPE: Structured Decomposition and Conditional Skill Orchestration for Complex Image Generation
papers.abstract: While text-to-image models have made strong progress in visual fidelity, faithfully realizing complex visual intents remains challenging because many requirements must be tracked across grounding, generation, and verification. We refer to these requirements as semantic commitments and formalize their lifecycle discontinuity as the Conceptual Rift, where commitments may be locally resolved or checked but fail to remain identifiable as the same operational units throughout the generation lifecycle. To address this, we propose SCOPE, a specification-guided skill orchestration framework that maintains semantic commitments in an evolving structured specification and conditionally invokes retrieval, reasoning, and repair skills around unresolved or violated commitments. To evaluate commitment-level intent realization, we introduce Gen-Arena, a human-annotated benchmark with entity- and constraint-level specifications, together with Entity-Gated Intent Pass Rate (EGIP), a strict entity-first pass criterion. SCOPE substantially outperforms all evaluated baselines on Gen-Arena, achieving 0.60 EGIP, and further achieves strong results on WISE-V (0.907) and MindBench (0.61), demonstrating the effectiveness of persistent commitment tracking for complex image generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCOPE框架，通过结构化分解和条件技能编排解决复杂图像生成中的语义承诺跟踪问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在视觉保真度上取得进展，但实现复杂视觉意图仍困难，因为许多需求在生成过程中难以持续跟踪和验证。
analysis.problem: 复杂图像生成中语义承诺的生命周期不连续性，即概念鸿沟，导致承诺在生成过程中无法作为可识别的操作单元被跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出语义承诺在生成过程中可能被局部解决或检查，但无法作为同一操作单元在整个生命周期中保持可识别性。
analysis.method: SCOPE是一个规范引导的技能编排框架，维护演化的结构化规范，并条件性地调用检索、推理和修复技能来处理未解决或违反的承诺。
contributions: 提出SCOPE框架，通过结构化分解和条件技能编排实现复杂图像生成中的语义承诺跟踪。
引入Gen-Arena基准和Entity-Gated Intent Pass Rate (EGIP)评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 在Gen-Arena上SCOPE达到0.60 EGIP，在WISE-V上0.907，在MindBench上0.61，显著优于所有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的结构化规范初始定义。
技能编排的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCOPE框架，通过结构化分解和条件技能编排解决复杂图像生成中的语义承诺跟踪问题。

papers.title: Object Hallucination-Free Reinforcement Unlearning for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) raise growing concerns about privacy, copyright, and bias, motivating machine unlearning to remove sensitive knowledge. However, existing methods primarily fine-tune the language decoder, leading to superficial forgetting that fails to erase underlying visual representations and often introduces object hallucination. We propose HFRU, a reinforcement unlearning framework that operates on the vision encoder for deep semantic removal. Our two-stage approach combines alignment disruption with GRPO-based optimization using a composite reward, including an abstraction reward that encourages semantically valid substitutions and mitigates hallucinations. Experiments on object recognition and face identity tasks show that HFRU achieves over 98% forgetting and retention performance, while introducing negligible object hallucination, significantly outperforming prior this http URL code and implementation details are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出HFRU框架，通过强化学习对视觉编码器进行反学习，实现深度语义移除并避免物体幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM反学习方法主要微调语言解码器，导致遗忘表面化且易引入物体幻觉，需要更彻底的视觉表征移除方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入物体幻觉的前提下，从VLM中深度移除视觉相关的敏感知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法仅微调语言解码器导致遗忘不彻底，且容易产生物体幻觉。
analysis.method: 两阶段强化反学习框架：先进行对齐破坏，再结合GRPO优化和复合奖励（包括抽象奖励）来鼓励语义有效替换并抑制幻觉。
contributions: 提出首个针对视觉编码器的反学习框架HFRU，实现深度语义移除。
设计复合奖励机制，有效抑制物体幻觉，保持模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在物体识别和人脸身份任务上，HFRU实现超过98%的遗忘和保留性能，且物体幻觉可忽略不计，显著优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的视觉知识移除。
GRPO优化可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HFRU框架，通过强化学习对视觉编码器进行反学习，实现深度语义移除并避免物体幻觉。

papers.title: PET-Adapter: Test-Time Domain Adaptation for Full and Limited-Angle PET Image Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Positron Emission Tomography (PET) image reconstruction is inherently challenged by Poisson noise and physical degradation factors, which are further exacerbated in limited-angle acquisitions. While deep learning methods demonstrate promising performance, their generalization to unseen clinical data distributions remains limited without extensive retraining. We propose PET-Adapter, a test-time domain adaptation framework for generative PET reconstruction models pretrained solely on phantom data. Our method enables adaptation to clinical datasets with varying anatomies, tracers, and scanner configurations without requiring paired ground truth. PET-Adapter introduces layer-wise low-rank anatomical conditioning during adaptation and Ordered Subset Expectation Maximization-based warm-starting that initializes the generation from physics-informed reconstructions, reducing diffusion steps from 50 to 2 without compromising quality. Experiments across multiple clinical datasets demonstrate superior 3D reconstruction performance in both full-angle and limited-angle settings, highlighting the clinical feasibility and computational efficiency of the proposed approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出PET-Adapter，一种测试时域适应框架，使仅用体模数据预训练的生成模型适应临床PET重建，仅需2步扩散即可达到高质量。
analysis.research_motivation: PET图像重建受泊松噪声和物理退化影响，尤其在有限角度采集下更严重；深度学习方法在未见临床数据上泛化差，需要大量重训练。
analysis.problem: 如何使仅用体模数据预训练的生成式PET重建模型适应不同解剖结构、示踪剂和扫描配置的临床数据集，且无需配对真值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PET-Adapter，包含层式低秩解剖条件注入和基于有序子集期望最大化的热启动，将扩散步数从50减少到2。
contributions: 提出测试时域适应框架，使体模预训练模型适应临床PET数据，无需配对真值。
引入层式低秩解剖条件和OSEM热启动，显著减少扩散步数（50→2）而不损失质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个临床数据集上进行了全角度和有限角度3D重建实验，展示了优越性能和计算效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练生成模型架构。
低秩条件注入的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PET-Adapter，一种测试时域适应框架，使仅用体模数据预训练的生成模型适应临床PET重建，仅需2步扩散即可达到高质量。

papers.title: STARFlow2: Bridging Language Models and Normalizing Flows for Unified Multimodal Generation
papers.abstract: Deep generative models have advanced rapidly across text and vision, motivating unified multimodal systems that can understand, reason over, and generate interleaved text-image sequences. Most existing approaches combine autoregressive language modeling with diffusion-based image generators, inheriting a structural mismatch between causal text generation and iterative visual denoising. We observe that autoregressive normalizing flows are autoregressive Transformers--sharing the same causal mask, KV-cache mechanism, and left-to-right structure as LLMs--making them the most natural paradigm for true unified multimodal generation. We present STARFlow2, built on the Pretzel architecture that vertically interleaves a pretrained VLM stream with a TarFlow stream via residual skip connections, both operating under the same causal mask. Combined with a deep-shallow flow design and a unified FAE latent space, STARFlow2 enables cache-friendly interleaved generation where both text and visual outputs directly enter the KV-cache without re-encoding. Experiments demonstrate strong performance across image generation and multimodal understanding benchmarks, validating autoregressive flows as a viable foundation for unified multimodal modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出STARFlow2，利用自回归归一化流统一多模态生成，消除因果文本生成与迭代视觉去噪的结构不匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态系统结合自回归语言模型与扩散图像生成器，存在因果文本生成与迭代视觉去噪的结构不匹配，导致效率与一致性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种真正统一的多模态生成框架，使文本与视觉生成共享相同的因果结构和缓存机制，避免结构不匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到自回归归一化流与LLM共享因果掩码、KV-cache和从左到右结构，是统一多模态生成的自然范式。
analysis.method: 基于Pretzel架构，通过残差跳跃连接垂直交错预训练VLM流与TarFlow流，采用深浅流设计和统一FAE潜空间，实现缓存友好的交错生成。
contributions: 提出STARFlow2，利用自回归归一化流统一多模态生成，消除结构不匹配。
设计Pretzel架构，通过残差连接交错VLM与TarFlow流，实现高效交错生成。
引入深浅流设计和统一FAE潜空间，使文本与视觉输出直接进入KV-cache。
analysis.experiments: 在图像生成和多模态理解基准上展示了强性能，验证了自回归流作为统一多模态建模基础的可行性。
limitations: 摘要未提及与其他统一模型（如扩散+LLM）的详细计算效率对比。
可能对长序列交错生成的扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STARFlow2，利用自回归归一化流统一多模态生成，消除因果文本生成与迭代视觉去噪的结构不匹配。

papers.title: TRAS: An Interactive Software for Tracing Tree Ring Cross Sections
papers.abstract: Tree ring marking remains a key step in dendrometry and dendrochronology, but it is often performed manually, making the process time-consuming, subjective, and difficult to scale to large image datasets. We present the Tree Ring Analyzer Suite (TRAS), an open-source graphical software for automatic delineation, manual correction, and measurement of tree rings in wood cross-sectional images. TRAS integrates three complementary detection algorithms: the classical image-processing method CS-TRD and two deep-learning approaches, DeepCS-TRD and INBD. The interface allows users to refine automatic detections, remove false positives, and manually add missing rings. It also computes dendrochronological metrics such as earlywood and latewood areas, ring perimeter, equivalent ring width, and custom path-based ring-width measurements. TRAS was evaluated on 18 expertly annotated Pinus taeda L. cross-section images. DeepCS-TRD achieved the best automatic detection performance, with an F-score of 81.0% and precision of 86.4%. Automatic detection reduced the required manual correction effort to approximately 20% of ring boundaries. For one-dimensional ring-width measurements, TRAS showed excellent agreement with CooRecorder ($r > 0.99$). Common detection errors, such as jump propagation or false positives near knots, were easily corrected through the postprocessing interface. TRAS provides a flexible and reproducible solution for tree-ring analysis on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Code is available at the this https URL .

analysis.tldr: TRAS 是一款开源交互式软件，集成经典图像处理与深度学习方法，实现树木年轮自动分割与手动校正。
analysis.research_motivation: 树木年轮标记是树木测量学与树木年代学的关键步骤，但传统手动标记耗时、主观且难以规模化处理大量图像数据集。
analysis.problem: 开发一个集成自动检测与手动校正功能的开源软件，以高效、准确地从木材横截面图像中提取年轮并计算年轮学指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TRAS 集成三种互补检测算法：经典图像处理方法 CS-TRD 和两种深度学习方法 DeepCS-TRD 与 INBD；提供图形界面支持自动检测结果的手动校正、假阳性去除和缺失年轮添加；计算早材/晚材面积、年轮周长、等效年轮宽度及自定义路径宽度等指标。
contributions: 开发了开源交互式软件 TRAS，集成多种年轮检测算法并支持手动校正。
在 18 张专家标注的火炬松横截面图像上评估，DeepCS-TRD 达到 81.0% F-score 和 86.4% 精确度，自动检测减少约 80% 的手动校正工作量。
analysis.experiments: 在 18 张专家标注的火炬松横截面图像上评估，DeepCS-TRD 取得最佳自动检测性能（F-score 81.0%，精确度 86.4%），自动检测将手动校正工作量降至约 20% 的年轮边界；一维年轮宽度测量与 CooRecorder 高度一致（r > 0.99）。
limitations: 仅针对火炬松一种树种进行评估，泛化性未知。
深度学习方法依赖训练数据，可能对罕见年轮模式检测不佳。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRAS 是一款开源交互式软件，集成经典图像处理与深度学习方法，实现树木年轮自动分割与手动校正。

papers.title: SphereVAD: Training-Free Video Anomaly Detection via Geodesic Inference on the Unit Hypersphere
papers.abstract: Video anomaly detection (VAD) aims to automatically identify events that deviate from normal patterns in untrimmed surveillance videos. Existing methods universally depend on large-scale annotations or task-specific training procedures, severely limiting their rapid deployment to novel scenes. We observe that intermediate-layer features of pre-trained multimodal large language models (MLLMs) already encode rich anomaly semantics, yet existing approaches rely on the language output pathway and fail to exploit the geometric discriminability latent in these representations. Based on this finding, we propose SphereVAD, a fully training-free, zero-shot VAD framework that recasts anomaly discrimination as von Mises-Fisher (vMF) likelihood-ratio geodesic inference on the unit hypersphere, unleashing latent discriminability through principled geometric reasoning rather than learning new representations. Specifically, SphereVAD first applies Frechet mean centering to unfold feature distributions and eliminate domain biases, then employs Holistic Scene Attention (HSA) to reinforce feature consistency using cross-video priors, and finally performs vMF-guided Spherical Geodesic Pulling (SGP) to align ambiguous segments with directional prototypes on the spherical manifold. This training-free pipeline requires only minimal synthetic images for calibration. SphereVAD establishes new state-of-the-art results among training-free approaches on three major benchmarks and remains competitive with fully supervised baselines. Code will be available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: SphereVAD 通过单位超球面上的测地线推理实现无需训练的视频异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法普遍依赖大规模标注或任务特定训练，难以快速部署到新场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行任何训练的情况下，利用预训练多模态大语言模型的中间层特征进行零样本视频异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练 MLLM 的中间层特征已编码丰富的异常语义，但现有方法仅利用语言输出路径，未能挖掘这些表征中的几何判别性。
analysis.method: SphereVAD 将异常判别重构为 von Mises-Fisher 似然比测地线推理，包括 Frechet 均值中心化、整体场景注意力和 vMF 引导的球面测地线拉取。
contributions: 提出首个完全无需训练、零样本的视频异常检测框架 SphereVAD。
将异常检测转化为单位超球面上的 vMF 似然比测地线推理，释放潜在判别性。
在三个主流基准上达到训练无关方法的最优结果，并与全监督基线竞争。
analysis.experiments: 在三个主流基准上评估，SphereVAD 在训练无关方法中达到新 SOTA，并与全监督基线竞争。
limitations: 需要少量合成图像进行校准。
可能对极端异常场景的泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SphereVAD 通过单位超球面上的测地线推理实现无需训练的视频异常检测。

papers.title: Rethinking Dense Optical Flow without Test-Time Scaling
papers.abstract: Recent progress in dense optical flow has been driven by increasingly complex architectures and multi-step refinement for test-time scaling. While these approaches achieve strong benchmark performance, they also require substantial computation during inference. This raises a fundamental question: Is scaling test-time computation the only way to improve dense optical flow accuracy? We argue that it is not. Instead, powerful visual semantic and geometric priors encoded in modern foundation models can reduce, if not overcome, the need for computationally expensive iterative refinement at test-time. In this paper, we present a framework that estimates dense optical flow in a single forward pass, leveraging pretrained foundation representations, while avoiding iterative refinement and additional inference-time computation, thus offering an alternative to test-time scaling. Our method extracts visual semantic features from a frozen DINO-v2 backbone and combines them with geometric cues from a monocular depth foundation model. We fuse these complementary priors into a unified representation and apply a global matching formulation to estimate dense correspondences without recurrent updates or test-time optimization. Despite avoiding iterative refinement, our approach achieves strong cross-dataset generalization across challenging benchmarks. On Sintel Final, we obtain 2.81 EPE without refinement, significantly improving over state-of-the-art (SOTA) SEA-RAFT under comparable training conditions and outperforming RAFT, GMFlow (without refinement), and recent FlowSeek in the same setting. These results suggest that strong foundation priors can substitute for test-time scaling, offering a computationally efficient alternative to refinement-heavy pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 利用基础模型先验，单次前向传播即可实现高精度密集光流估计，无需测试时缩放。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有密集光流方法依赖复杂架构和多步细化进行测试时缩放，导致推理计算量大，亟需更高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用测试时迭代细化和额外计算的情况下，实现高精度的密集光流估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个单次前向传播框架，利用冻结的DINO-v2骨干提取视觉语义特征，结合单目深度基础模型的几何线索，融合为统一表示，并通过全局匹配公式估计密集对应，避免循环更新或测试时优化。
contributions: 证明了基础模型中的视觉语义和几何先验可以替代测试时缩放，实现高效密集光流估计。
提出了一种无需迭代细化的单次前向传播光流方法，在多个基准上取得强跨数据集泛化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Sintel Final上达到2.81 EPE，显著优于SEA-RAFT、RAFT、GMFlow（无细化）和FlowSeek等。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基础模型（DINO-v2和深度模型），泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论在极端运动或遮挡场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用基础模型先验，单次前向传播即可实现高精度密集光流估计，无需测试时缩放。

papers.title: Seeing Across Skies and Streets: Feedforward 3D Reconstruction from Satellite, Drone, and Ground Images
papers.abstract: Cross-view localization classically asks: where does this ground image lie on the satellite tile? Existing methods are typically limited to 3-DoF estimates -- an $(x,y)$ position and a yaw angle -- because nadir satellite imagery provides no direct cues for roll, pitch, or altitude, forcing a reliance on planar-motion and zero-tilt assumptions. These assumptions break on real terrain with slopes, ramps, and tilted camera mounts. To overcome this, we introduce a single UAV image as an intermediate viewpoint: it reveals the 3D structure invisible from nadir, supplies the cues for roll, pitch, and altitude that the satellite alone cannot provide, and needs only spatial overlap with the ground camera -- no known relative pose is required. Building on this insight, we propose **Cross3R**, a flexible feed-forward model that ingests a satellite tile together with a UAV image, a ground image, or both, and, in a single forward pass, recovers a cross-view 3D point cloud, the 6-DoF poses of every input camera, and the on-tile $(x,y)$ position and yaw of each perspective camera. For training and evaluation, we also construct **CrossGeo**, a 278K-image tri-view dataset spanning 85 scenes across every continent except Antarctica. On CrossGeo, Cross3R consistently outperforms feed-forward 3D baselines in point-cloud reconstruction, 6-DoF camera-pose estimation, and cross-view localization. On KITTI, it outperforms dedicated cross-view methods trained on KITTI on most metrics, despite having no KITTI training itself.

analysis.tldr: 提出Cross3R，利用无人机图像作为中间视角，实现从卫星、无人机和地面图像的前馈3D重建与6自由度位姿估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨视角定位通常只能估计3自由度位姿，因为卫星图像缺乏滚转、俯仰和高度信息，而真实地形中的斜坡、坡道和倾斜相机支架会破坏平面运动假设。
analysis.problem: 如何从卫星、无人机和地面图像中恢复6自由度相机位姿和3D点云，克服卫星图像缺乏3D结构线索的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Cross3R，一种前馈模型，输入卫星图像与无人机图像、地面图像或两者，单次前向传播恢复跨视角3D点云、所有输入相机的6自由度位姿以及每个透视相机的平面位置和偏航角。
contributions: 提出Cross3R，首个利用无人机图像作为中间视角实现前馈跨视角3D重建和6自由度位姿估计的方法。
构建CrossGeo，一个包含278K图像的三视角数据集，覆盖除南极洲外的所有大洲85个场景。
analysis.experiments: 在CrossGeo上，Cross3R在点云重建、6自由度相机位姿估计和跨视角定位方面一致优于前馈3D基线；在KITTI上，尽管未使用KITTI训练，仍在大多数指标上优于专门针对KITTI训练的跨视角方法。
limitations: 依赖无人机图像作为中间视角，可能限制在无无人机数据场景下的应用。
摘要未提及对极端天气或光照条件的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Cross3R，利用无人机图像作为中间视角，实现从卫星、无人机和地面图像的前馈3D重建与6自由度位姿估计。

papers.title: HEART: Hyperspherical Embedding Alignment via Kent-Representation Traversal in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models can generate visually stunning images, yet, controlling what appears and how it appears, remains surprisingly difficult, especially when operating solely within the constraints of the text-conditioning space. For example, changing a subject or adjusting an attribute often leads to unintended side effects, such as altered backgrounds or distorted details. This is because most existing text-based control methods treat the embedding space as Euclidean and apply simple linear transformations, which do not reflect how semantic concepts are actually organized. In this work, we take a step back and ask: what is the true geometry of these embeddings? We find that text encoder representations lie on a hypersphere, where concepts are not linear directions but structured, anisotropic distributions better captured by Kent distributions. Building on this insight, we propose HEART, a training-free framework that performs Kent-aware geodesic transformations directly on the hypersphere. By respecting the underlying geometry, HEART enables intuitive and precise edits, such as consistent subject replacement and fine-grained attribute control, while preserving the original scene. Importantly, HEART requires no finetuning, inversion, or optimization, and generalizes across diffusion model architectures. Our results show that a simple shift in perspective, from linear to spherical, can unlock fast, and controllable image generation.

analysis.tldr: 通过Kent分布在超球面上对齐文本嵌入，实现无需训练的扩散模型可控图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型的控制方法将嵌入空间视为欧几里得空间并应用线性变换，导致编辑时出现意外副作用（如背景改变），原因是忽略了语义概念的真实几何结构。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文本编码器嵌入的真实几何结构（超球面），实现无需微调、反转或优化的精确可控图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本编码器表示位于超球面上，概念不是线性方向，而是各向异性的分布，更适合用Kent分布建模。
analysis.method: 提出HEART框架，在超球面上执行Kent感知的测地线变换，无需训练，直接操作嵌入空间。
contributions: 发现文本编码器嵌入位于超球面且概念分布各向异性，适合Kent分布建模。
提出HEART，一种无需训练、基于Kent分布测地线变换的可控图像编辑方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖文本编码器的质量。
可能对复杂场景的编辑效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过Kent分布在超球面上对齐文本嵌入，实现无需训练的扩散模型可控图像编辑。

papers.title: DVD: Discrete Voxel Diffusion for 3D Generation and Editing
papers.abstract: We introduce Discrete Voxel Diffusion (DVD), a discrete diffusion framework to generate, assess, and edit sparse voxels for SLat (Structured LATent) based 3D generative pipelines. Although discrete diffusion has not generally displaced continuous diffusion in image-like generation, we show that it can be an effective first-stage prior for sparse voxel scaffolds. By treating voxel occupancy as a native discrete variable, DVD avoids continuous-to-discrete thresholding and provides a simple framework for voxel generation, uncertainty estimation, and editing. Beyond quality gains, DVD provides more interpretable generation dynamics through explicit categorical modeling. Furthermore, we leverage the predictive entropy as a robust uncertainty metric to identify ambiguous voxel regions and complicated samples, facilitating tasks such as data filtering and quality assessment. Finally, we propose a lightweight fine-tuning strategy using block-structured perturbation patterns. This approach empowers the model to inpaint and edit voxels within a single sampling round, requiring negligible auxiliary computation and no additional model evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出离散体素扩散模型DVD，用于3D生成与编辑，避免连续-离散阈值化，支持不确定性估计和高效编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D生成方法多依赖连续扩散，但体素占用是离散变量，连续-离散转换引入误差且缺乏可解释性；离散扩散在图像生成中未占主导，但在稀疏体素场景中可能有效。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个离散扩散框架，用于稀疏体素的生成、质量评估和编辑，同时避免连续-离散阈值化并支持不确定性估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出离散体素扩散（DVD），将体素占用视为离散变量，使用离散扩散作为第一阶段的先验；利用预测熵作为不确定性度量；提出块结构扰动微调策略，实现单轮采样内的修复和编辑。
contributions: 首次将离散扩散有效应用于稀疏体素生成，避免连续-离散阈值化。
提出基于预测熵的不确定性度量，用于数据过滤和质量评估。
提出块结构扰动微调策略，实现高效的单轮采样体素编辑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于稀疏体素场景，对密集体素或连续表示效果未知。
离散扩散的采样效率可能低于连续扩散。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出离散体素扩散模型DVD，用于3D生成与编辑，避免连续-离散阈值化，支持不确定性估计和高效编辑。

papers.title: TimeLesSeg: Unified Contrast-Agnostic Cross-Sectional and Longitudinal MS Lesion Segmentation via a Stochastic Generative Model
papers.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) expresses substantial clinical and radiological heterogeneity, which poses significant challenges for automatic lesion segmentation. The current deep learning-based SOTA is highly susceptible to changes in both distribution, e.g., changes in scanner; as well as the structure of inputs, evident in the current divide between cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches. We introduce TimeLesSeg, a unified contrast-agnostic framework designed to segment MS lesions regardless of the presence of a temporal dimension in its inputs, with a single convolutional neural network. Our approach models pathological priors through lesion masks, which are processed together with the current scan. Cross-sectional processing is enabled by exposing the model to training cases where no prior information is available, which are modeled with an empty mask, allowing it to operate seamlessly in both scenarios. To overcome the scarcity and inconsistency of longitudinal datasets, we propose a novel generative pipeline in which patterns of lesion evolution are simulated by stochastically deforming each individual lesion with morphological operations, producing realistic prior timepoints. In parallel, we achieve contrast agnosticism through Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization, enabling the network to experience a wide spectrum of intensity profiles. Results on three publicly available and two in-house datasets show that TimeLesSeg outperforms the contrast-agnostic state of the art on single-modality inputs across overlap- and distance-based metrics. In longitudinal processing, our method outperforms SAMSEG, and captures lesion load dynamics more accurately than both the former and LST-AI. All source code related to the development of TimeLesSeg is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: TimeLesSeg 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架，通过随机生成模型模拟病灶演变，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多发性硬化（MS）病灶分割面临临床和影像异质性挑战，现有深度学习方法对输入分布（如扫描仪变化）和结构（横断面 vs 纵向）敏感，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的对比无关的框架，既能处理横断面输入（单时间点）又能处理纵向输入（多时间点），且对扫描仪等分布变化鲁棒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用单一卷积神经网络，通过病灶掩模建模病理先验；横断面处理使用空掩模；纵向处理通过随机形态学操作变形单个病灶模拟演变；对比无关性通过高斯混合模型域随机化实现。
contributions: 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架 TimeLesSeg。
设计基于随机形态学操作的生成式管道，模拟病灶演变以克服纵向数据稀缺和不一致性。
采用高斯混合模型域随机化实现对比无关性，在多个数据集上取得优于现有方法的结果。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集和两个内部数据集上评估，TimeLesSeg 在单模态输入上超越对比无关的 SOTA，在纵向处理上优于 SAMSEG 和 LST-AI。
limitations: 可能依赖病灶掩模的可用性，在无先验场景下性能未知。
生成式模拟可能无法完全覆盖真实病灶演变模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TimeLesSeg 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架，通过随机生成模型模拟病灶演变，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Rebalancing gradient to improve self-supervised co-training of depth, odometry and optical flow predictions
papers.abstract: We present CoopNet, an approach that improves the cooperation of co-trained networks by dynamically adapting the apportionment of gradient, to ensure equitable learning progress. It is applied to motion-aware self-supervised prediction of depth maps, by introducing a new hybrid loss, based on a distribution model of photo-metric reconstruction errors made by, on the one hand the depth + odometry paired networks, and on the other hand the optical flow network. This model essentially assumes that the pixels from moving objects (that must be discarded for training depth and odometry), correspond to those where the two reconstructions strongly disagree. We justify this model by theoretical considerations and experimental evidences. A comparative evaluation on KITTI and CityScapes datasets shows that CoopNet improves or is comparable to the state-of-the-art in depth, odometry and optical flow predictions.

analysis.tldr: 通过动态梯度重分配平衡自监督联合训练中深度、里程计和光流网络的学习进度，提升多任务预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督联合训练深度、里程计和光流网络时，不同任务的学习进度不一致，导致整体性能受限。现有方法缺乏有效的梯度分配机制来平衡各网络的学习。
analysis.problem: 如何动态调整梯度分配，使联合训练中的多个网络（深度、里程计、光流）实现均衡学习，并处理运动物体对深度和里程计训练的干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 运动物体像素在深度+里程计重建与光流重建之间存在较大分歧，可据此识别并排除运动物体对深度和里程计训练的负面影响。
analysis.method: 提出CoopNet，引入基于光度重建误差分布模型的混合损失，动态调整梯度分配，使深度+里程计网络与光流网络的学习进度均衡。
contributions: 提出动态梯度重分配方法CoopNet，平衡联合训练中多个网络的学习进度。
设计基于光度重建误差分布模型的混合损失，有效处理运动物体干扰。
在KITTI和CityScapes数据集上达到或超越深度、里程计和光流预测的当前最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI和CityScapes数据集上进行评估，与现有方法比较，CoopNet在深度、里程计和光流预测上表现更优或相当。
limitations: 依赖光度重建误差分布假设，可能不适用于所有场景。
未讨论动态梯度分配的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过动态梯度重分配平衡自监督联合训练中深度、里程计和光流网络的学习进度，提升多任务预测性能。

papers.title: Delta-Adapter: Scalable Exemplar-Based Image Editing with Single-Pair Supervision
papers.abstract: Exemplar-based image editing applies a transformation defined by a source-target image pair to a new query image. Existing methods rely on a pair-of-pairs supervision paradigm, requiring two image pairs sharing the same edit semantics to learn the target transformation. This constraint makes training data difficult to curate at scale and limits generalization across diverse edit types. We propose Delta-Adapter, a method that learns transferable editing semantics under single-pair supervision, requiring no textual guidance. Rather than directly exposing the exemplar pair to the model, we leverage a pre-trained vision encoder to extract a semantic delta that encodes the visual transformation between the two images. This semantic delta is injected into a pre-trained image editing model via a Perceiver-based adapter. Since the target image is never directly visible to the model, it can serve as the prediction target, enabling single-pair supervision without requiring additional exemplar pairs. This formulation allows us to leverage existing large-scale editing datasets for training. To further promote faithful transformation transfer, we introduce a semantic delta consistency loss that aligns the semantic change of the generated output with the ground-truth semantic delta extracted from the exemplar pair. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta-Adapter consistently improves both editing accuracy and content consistency over four strong baselines on seen editing tasks, while also generalizing more effectively to unseen editing tasks. Code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出Delta-Adapter，仅需单对图像监督即可学习可迁移的编辑语义，无需文本指导。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于范例的图像编辑方法依赖成对监督，需要两对图像共享相同编辑语义，导致训练数据难以大规模收集且泛化性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅有一对源-目标图像监督的条件下，学习可迁移的编辑变换并应用于新查询图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用预训练视觉编码器提取源-目标图像间的语义增量，通过基于Perceiver的适配器注入预训练编辑模型；目标图像不直接可见，可作为预测目标实现单对监督；引入语义增量一致性损失对齐生成结果与真实语义增量。
contributions: 提出Delta-Adapter，首个在单对监督下学习可迁移编辑语义的方法，无需文本指导。
设计语义增量一致性损失，提升变换迁移的保真度。
在多个基准上显著提升编辑精度和内容一致性，并有效泛化到未见编辑任务。
analysis.experiments: 在四个强基线上进行实验，Delta-Adapter在已知编辑任务上一致提升编辑精度和内容一致性，并更有效地泛化到未知编辑任务。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉编码器的质量。
单对监督可能对复杂编辑变换的表示能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Delta-Adapter，仅需单对图像监督即可学习可迁移的编辑语义，无需文本指导。

papers.title: One Token Per Frame: Reconsidering Visual Bandwidth in World Models for VLA Policy
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly rely on auxiliary world modules to plan over long horizons, yet how such modules should be parameterized on top of a pretrained VLA remains an open design question. Existing world-model-augmented VLAs typically pass the per-frame visual stream into the world module at high visual bandwidth and treat its rollout as a side product of action prediction; under a constrained adaptation budget on a frozen backbone, this leaves both the per-frame representation and the latent action coupling under-examined. We introduce OneWM-VLA, which compresses each view into a single semantic token per frame through an Adaptive Attention Pooling, and produces the resulting latent stream and the action trajectory under a single flow-matching objective rather than connecting them through a separate decoder. Empirically, we find that per-frame visual bandwidth can be reduced to a single token without compromising long-horizon performance under our setup. Trained with 14.71M LoRA parameters on a $\pi_0$ (2B) backbone, OneWM-VLA improves the average success rate from 47.9% to 61.3% on MetaWorld~MT50, reaches 95.6% on LIBERO-Long (vs.85.2% for $\pi_0$), and reaches 60.0% on the long-horizon deformable task Fold Cloth on a real Piper arm (vs.20.0% for $\pi_0$).

analysis.tldr: 将每帧视觉压缩为单token，在冻结VLA骨干上以流匹配目标联合学习世界模型与动作策略，显著提升长程任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型增强的VLA通常以高视觉带宽传递每帧视觉流，并将世界模型展开视为动作预测的副产品，在冻结骨干的有限适配预算下，每帧表示与潜在动作耦合未得到充分研究。
analysis.problem: 如何在冻结的VLA骨干上，以极低视觉带宽参数化世界模型，同时保持长程规划性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现，在提出的设置下，每帧视觉带宽可压缩至单个token而不损害长程性能。
analysis.method: 提出OneWM-VLA，通过自适应注意力池化将每帧压缩为单个语义token，并在单一流匹配目标下联合生成潜在流和动作轨迹，无需单独的解码器。
contributions: 提出OneWM-VLA，将每帧视觉压缩为单token，显著降低视觉带宽。
在冻结VLA骨干上以流匹配目标联合学习世界模型与动作策略，提升长程任务成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在MetaWorld MT50上平均成功率从47.9%提升至61.3%，在LIBERO-Long上达到95.6%（基线85.2%），在真实Piper臂的变形任务Fold Cloth上达到60.0%（基线20.0%）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VLA骨干（如π0）。
单token压缩可能丢失细粒度视觉信息，在需要精细感知的任务上可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将每帧视觉压缩为单token，在冻结VLA骨干上以流匹配目标联合学习世界模型与动作策略，显著提升长程任务成功率。

papers.title: MedVIGIL: Evaluating Trustworthy Medical VLMs Under Broken Visual Evidence
papers.abstract: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) are usually evaluated on intact image--question pairs, but trustworthy clinical use requires a stronger property: a model must recognise when the evidential basis for an answer has failed. We study this through silent failures under perturbed evidence, where a vision-required medical question is paired with a false premise, wording perturbation, knowledge-only rewrite, or ROI-corrupted image, yet the model returns a fluent non-refusal answer. We introduce medvigil, a 300-case evaluation suite drawn from four public medical VQA sources, supervised end to end by four board-certified radiologists: every gold answer, refusal option, candidate-answer set, paraphrase, false-premise trap, ROI box, and clinical risk tier is clinician-authored. Two attending radiologists annotate every case in parallel, a senior radiologist consolidates the released manifest, and a separate fourth radiologist independent of construction answers every probe to provide the human reference baseline. The release contains 2{,}556 MCQ probes, 240 counterfactual triplets, physician-adjudicated risk-tier and answerability flags, ROI boxes, and a paired open-ended variant. We report seven correctness-conditioned audit metrics that summarise into the medvigil Composite Score (MCS), and audit 16 vision-capable models plus two text-only baselines. The independent radiologist scores MCS 83.3 at silent-failure rate 5.8%, leaving a 14.1-point composite headroom above the strongest audited model (Claude Opus 4.7 at 69.2). The benchmark and evaluation harness are publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedVIGIL基准，评估医学VLM在视觉证据受损时的可信度，发现最强模型与人类专家仍有显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学VLM评估通常基于完整图像-问题对，但临床可信使用要求模型能识别证据基础失效的情况，而当前缺乏对此类静默失败的评估。
analysis.problem: 医学VLM在视觉证据受损（如错误前提、措辞扰动、仅知识改写或ROI损坏图像）时，可能返回流畅的非拒绝回答，需要系统评估其可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含300个案例的评估套件MedVIGIL，每个案例由四位认证放射科医生监督，包含多项临床标注（如金标准答案、拒绝选项、错误前提陷阱等），并设计7个正确性条件审计指标汇总为MedVIGIL复合分数（MCS）。
contributions: 提出MedVIGIL基准，系统评估医学VLM在视觉证据受损下的可信度。
发布包含2556个MCQ探针、240个反事实三元组等丰富标注的数据集。
审计16个视觉模型和2个纯文本基线，揭示最强模型与人类专家的显著差距。
analysis.experiments: 审计16个视觉模型和2个纯文本基线，独立放射科医生MCS为83.3（静默失败率5.8%），最强模型Claude Opus 4.7得69.2，存在14.1分差距。
limitations: 仅基于四个公开医学VQA来源，可能不覆盖所有临床场景。
评估指标主要针对静默失败，未全面覆盖其他可信度维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedVIGIL基准，评估医学VLM在视觉证据受损时的可信度，发现最强模型与人类专家仍有显著差距。

papers.title: What Matters for Diffusion-Friendly Latent Manifold? Prior-Aligned Autoencoders for Latent Diffusion
papers.abstract: Tokenizers are a crucial component of latent diffusion models, as they define the latent space in which diffusion models operate. However, existing tokenizers are primarily designed to improve reconstruction fidelity or inherit pretrained representations, leaving unclear what kind of latent space is truly friendly for generative modeling. In this paper, we study this question from the perspective of latent manifold organization. By constructing controlled tokenizer variants, we identify three key properties of a diffusion-friendly latent manifold: coherent spatial structure, local manifold continuity, and global manifold semantics. We find that these properties are more consistent with downstream generation quality than reconstruction fidelity. Motivated by this finding, we propose the Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE), which explicitly shapes the latent manifold instead of leaving diffusion-friendly manifold to emerge indirectly from reconstruction or inheritance. Specifically, PAE leverages refined priors derived from VFMs and perturbation-based regularization to turn spatial structure, local continuity, and global semantics into explicit training objectives. On ImageNet 256x256, PAE improves both training efficiency and generation quality over existing tokenizers, reaching performance comparable to RAE with up to 13x faster convergence under the same training setup and achieving a new state-of-the-art gFID of 1.03. These results highlight the importance of organizing the latent manifold for latent diffusion models.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式塑造潜空间的连贯空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义，使潜空间更有利于扩散模型生成，在ImageNet 256x256上实现gFID 1.03且收敛速度提升13倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有tokenizer主要关注重建保真度或继承预训练表示，但什么样的潜空间对生成建模真正友好尚不明确，缺乏对潜流形组织的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计tokenizer以构建对扩散模型友好的潜流形，即具备连贯空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义的潜空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过构造受控tokenizer变体，发现扩散友好潜流形的三个关键属性（连贯空间结构、局部连续性、全局语义）比重建保真度更与下游生成质量一致。
analysis.method: Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)：利用来自VFMs的精炼先验和基于扰动的正则化，将空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义作为显式训练目标来塑造潜流形。
contributions: 识别出扩散友好潜流形的三个关键属性：连贯空间结构、局部连续性、全局语义，并证明它们比重建保真度更影响生成质量。
提出Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式优化这些属性来构建更有利于扩散模型的潜空间。
在ImageNet 256x256上，PAE达到gFID 1.03的新SOTA，且与RAE相比收敛速度提升13倍。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上评估，PAE在相同训练设置下比现有tokenizer提升训练效率和生成质量，达到gFID 1.03，收敛速度比RAE快13倍。
limitations: 实验仅在ImageNet 256x256上进行，未验证在其他数据集或更高分辨率上的泛化性。
PAE依赖VFMs的先验，可能引入额外计算开销或对先验质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式塑造潜空间的连贯空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义，使潜空间更有利于扩散模型生成，在ImageNet 256x256上实现gFID 1.03且收敛速度提升13倍。

papers.title: One World, Dual Timeline: Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic scenes from Vehicle-to-Infrastructure Cooperative Autonomous Driving (VICAD) data is fundamentally complicated by temporal asynchrony: vehicle and infrastructure cameras operate on independent clocks, capturing the same dynamic agent such as cars and pedestrians at different physical times. Existing Gaussian Scene Graph methods implicitly assume synchronized observations and assign a single pose per agent per frame, which is an assumption that breaks in cooperative settings, where the resulting gradient conflicts cause severe ghosting on dynamic agents. We identify this as a representation-level failure, not an optimization artifact: we prove that any single-timeline formulation incurs an irreducible photometric loss scaling quadratically with agent velocity and cross-source time offset. To resolve this, we propose Dust (DecoUpled Spatio-Temporal) Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction. DUST Gaussian Scene Graph shares a canonical Gaussian set per agent for appearance consistency, while maintaining decouple pose trajectories aligned to each source's true capture timestamps. We prove that this decoupling enables the pose-gradient kernel block-diagonal, eliminating cross-source interference entirely. To make Dust practical, we further introduce a static anchor-based pose correction pipeline that corrects spatio misalignment between vehicle and infrastructure annotations, and a pose-regularized joint optimization scheme that prevents trajectory jitter and drift during early training. On 26 sequences from V2X-Seq, DUST achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving dynamic-area PSNR by 3.2 dB over the strongest baseline and reducing Fréchet Video Distance by 37.7%, with keeping robustness under larger temporal asynchrony. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦时空高斯场景图，解决车路协同自动驾驶中相机异步导致的动态物体重影问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 车路协同自动驾驶数据中，车辆和路侧相机独立时钟导致同一动态物体被不同时间捕获，现有高斯场景图假设同步观测，在协同场景下产生梯度冲突和重影。
analysis.problem: 解决VICAD数据中因时间异步导致的动态场景重建重影问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 证明单时间线公式会产生与物体速度和跨源时间偏移二次方相关的不可约光度损失，且梯度冲突导致动态物体严重重影。
analysis.method: 提出DUST高斯场景图，每个动态物体共享规范高斯集保证外观一致性，但为每个源维护解耦的位姿轨迹对齐真实时间戳，使位姿梯度核块对角化消除跨源干扰；并引入静态锚点位姿校正和位姿正则化联合优化。
contributions: 理论证明单时间线公式在协同设置下存在不可约光度损失，并提出解耦双时间线方案消除跨源干扰。
提出DUST高斯场景图，实现4D协同驾驶重建，在V2X-Seq上动态区域PSNR提升3.2 dB，FVD降低37.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在V2X-Seq的26个序列上评估，动态区域PSNR比最强基线高3.2 dB，Fréchet Video Distance降低37.7%，且在更大时间异步下保持鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖静态锚点进行位姿校正，可能对完全动态场景适应性有限。
仅验证了V2X-Seq数据集，泛化性需更多场景测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦时空高斯场景图，解决车路协同自动驾驶中相机异步导致的动态物体重影问题。

papers.title: Semantic-Aware Adaptive Visual Memory for Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Online streaming video understanding requires models to process continuous visual inputs and respond to user queries in real time, where the unbounded stream and unpredictable query timing turn memory management into a central challenge. Existing methods typically compress visual tokens via visual similarity heuristics, or augment compression with KV-cache-level retrieval. However, compression decisions rarely incorporate semantic signals, and retrieval is often added after compression is finalized, making the two stages hard to coordinate. We present SAVEMem, a training-free dual-stage framework that brings semantic awareness into memory generation and lets the retrieval scope adapt per query. In Stage~1, SAVEMem builds a three-tier streaming memory online under a constant memory budget. A fixed pseudo-question bank provides a lightweight semantic prior, so that long-term retention is shaped by semantic salience rather than visual similarity alone. In Stage~2, SAVEMem performs query-aware retrieval over this memory. An anchor-conditioned recency gate adapts the retrieval scope from short-term to mid- and long-term memory based on whether the query targets the present or the distant past. Within this scope, late interaction between query and memory tokens selects candidate frames for answering. Applied to Qwen2.5-VL without training, SAVEMem improves the OVO-Bench overall score from 52.27 to 62.69 and yields consistent gains on StreamingBench and ODV-Bench, while reducing peak GPU memory by 48\% at 128 frames over the backbone.

analysis.tldr: SAVEMem通过语义感知的双阶段记忆框架，无需训练即可显著提升流式视频理解性能并降低显存占用。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线流式视频理解中，模型需处理连续输入并实时响应用户查询，但无界流和不可预测的查询时机使内存管理成为核心挑战。现有方法依赖视觉相似性启发式压缩或KV缓存检索，但压缩决策缺乏语义信号，且检索常在压缩后添加，两阶段难以协调。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，为流式视频理解设计一种语义感知的自适应视觉记忆框架，以协调压缩与检索，在恒定内存预算下实现高效且准确的查询响应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SAVEMem是一个无需训练的双阶段框架。第一阶段构建三层流式内存，利用固定伪问题库提供轻量级语义先验，使长期保留由语义显著性而非视觉相似性决定；第二阶段执行查询感知检索，通过锚定条件的时间门自适应调整检索范围，并在该范围内通过查询与记忆令牌的后期交互选择候选帧。
contributions: 提出语义感知的双阶段流式内存框架SAVEMem，无需训练即可提升流式视频理解性能。
设计固定伪问题库提供语义先验，使内存压缩基于语义显著性。
引入锚定条件的时间门，实现查询感知的自适应检索范围调整。
analysis.experiments: 在OVO-Bench上，SAVEMem将整体分数从52.27提升至62.69；在StreamingBench和ODV-Bench上取得一致增益；在128帧时，相比骨干网络峰值GPU内存降低48%。
limitations: 伪问题库的固定性可能限制对未知查询类型的适应性。
方法在更长视频流或更复杂场景下的扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAVEMem通过语义感知的双阶段记忆框架，无需训练即可显著提升流式视频理解性能并降低显存占用。

papers.title: Video Understanding Reward Modeling: A Robust Benchmark and Performant Reward Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal reward models have advanced substantially in text and image domains, yet progress in video understanding reward modeling remains severely limited by the lack of robust evaluation benchmarks and high-quality preference data. To address this, we propose a unified framework spanning benchmark design, data construction, and reward model training. We introduce Video Understanding Reward Bench (VURB), a benchmark featuring 2,100 preference pairs with long chain-of-thought reasoning traces (averaging 1,143 tokens) and majority voting evaluation across general, long, and reasoning-oriented video tasks. We further construct Video Understanding Preference Dataset (VUP-35K) via a fully automated pipeline, providing large-scale high-quality supervision for video reward training. Building on the data, we train VideoDRM and VideoGRM, a discriminative and a generative reward model, both achieving state-of-the-art performance on VURB and VideoRewardBench. Further analysis confirms that VUP-35K enhances both reward performance and model reasoning capability, while VideoDRM and VideoGRM yield significant gains under best-of-$N$ test-time scaling.

analysis.tldr: 提出视频理解奖励模型基准VURB和数据集VUP-35K，训练出SOTA的判别式与生成式奖励模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态奖励模型在文本和图像领域进展显著，但视频理解奖励建模因缺乏鲁棒评估基准和高质偏好数据而严重受限。
analysis.problem: 视频理解奖励建模缺乏统一的基准设计、数据构建和模型训练框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，包括基准VURB（2100偏好对，长思维链推理，多数投票评估）、自动化构建的数据集VUP-35K，以及基于此训练的判别式奖励模型VideoDRM和生成式奖励模型VideoGRM。
contributions: 提出视频理解奖励基准VURB，包含2100偏好对和长思维链推理。
构建大规模高质量视频偏好数据集VUP-35K。
训练出判别式VideoDRM和生成式VideoGRM奖励模型，在VURB和VideoRewardBench上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在VURB和VideoRewardBench上评估，VideoDRM和VideoGRM取得SOTA性能；VUP-35K提升奖励性能和推理能力；best-of-N测试时扩展带来显著增益。
limitations: 可能依赖自动化数据构建的质量。
基准覆盖的任务类型有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视频理解奖励模型基准VURB和数据集VUP-35K，训练出SOTA的判别式与生成式奖励模型。

papers.title: From Synthetic to Real: Toward Identity-Consistent Makeup Transfer with Synthetic and Real Data
papers.abstract: Makeup transfer aims to apply the makeup style of a reference portrait to a source portrait while preserving identity and background. Early methods formulate this task as unsupervised image-to-image translation, relying on surrogate objectives and often yielding limited performance. Recent diffusion- and flow-based approaches instead exploit synthetic data for supervised training, leading to significant improvements. However, these methods still face two critical challenges: synthetic supervision frequently fails to faithfully preserve identity, and the domain gap between synthetic and real data limits generalization, resulting in degraded performance in complex real-world scenarios. To address these issues, this paper first proposes ConsistentBeauty, a novel data curation pipeline that ensures makeup fidelity and strict identity consistency within the synthesized data. Second, we propose RealBeauty, a synthetic-to-real post-training framework. Beyond supervised learning on curated synthetic data, we further adapt the model to real-world scenarios through reinforcement learning and design novel verifiable rewards tailored to the makeup transfer task. It allows the model to further benefit from real makeup patterns beyond synthetic supervision. In addition, we establish a new diverse benchmark for makeup transfer, covering a wide range of skin tones, ages, genders, poses, and makeup styles, thereby enabling a more comprehensive evaluation of model performance under diverse real-world conditions. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks and demonstrates clear advantages in identity preservation and performance on complex real-world cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出合成到真实的两阶段框架，通过数据筛选和强化学习实现身份一致的妆容迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有妆容迁移方法在合成数据上训练时难以保持身份一致性，且合成与真实数据间的域差距限制了泛化能力，导致复杂真实场景性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决合成数据监督下身份保持失败和合成-真实域差距导致的泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成监督常无法忠实保持身份，合成与真实数据间的域差距导致模型在复杂真实场景中性能退化。
analysis.method: 提出ConsistentBeauty数据筛选流程确保合成数据中妆容保真和身份一致，以及RealBeauty合成到真实后训练框架，通过强化学习和可验证奖励函数适应真实场景。
contributions: 提出ConsistentBeauty数据筛选流程，保证合成数据中妆容和身份一致性。
提出RealBeauty后训练框架，利用强化学习和可验证奖励函数弥合合成-真实域差距。
建立多样化妆容迁移基准，覆盖多种肤色、年龄、性别、姿态和妆容风格。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，在身份保持和复杂真实场景中表现优越。
limitations: 依赖合成数据质量，数据筛选可能增加预处理成本。
强化学习训练可能对奖励函数设计敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出合成到真实的两阶段框架，通过数据筛选和强化学习实现身份一致的妆容迁移。

papers.title: EyeCue: Driver Cognitive Distraction Detection via Gaze-Empowered Egocentric Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Driver cognitive distraction is a major cause of road collisions and remains difficult to detect. Unlike manual or visual distraction, cognitive distraction is diverted by thoughts unrelated to driving, even when the driver appears visually attentive and exhibits no explicit physical movements. In this work, we propose EyeCue, a gaze-empowered egocentric video understanding framework, to detect driver cognitive distraction. A key insight is that cognitive distraction manifests in the interaction between eye gaze and visual context. To capture this interaction, EyeCue integrates eye gaze with egocentric video to enable context-aware modeling of the driver's attention over time. Furthermore, to tackle the limited scale and diversity of existing datasets, we introduce CogDrive, a comprehensive multi-scenario dataset that augments four existing driving datasets with cognitive distraction annotations. Through extensive evaluations on CogDrive, we show that EyeCue achieves the highest accuracy of 74.38%, outperforming 11 baselines from 6 model families by over 7%. Notably, EyeCue can achieve an accuracy of over 70% across various driving scenarios (different road types, times of day, and weather conditions) with strong generalizability. These results highlight the importance of modeling gaze-context interactions and the effectiveness of cross-modal interaction modeling for multimodal cognitive distraction detection. Our codes and CogDrive dataset resources are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: EyeCue通过融合眼动与第一人称视频的跨模态交互建模，在认知分心检测任务上超越11个基线模型，并开源了多场景数据集CogDrive。
analysis.research_motivation: 驾驶员认知分心是导致交通事故的主要原因，但难以检测，因为分心时驾驶员外表看似专注且无显性物理动作，现有方法缺乏对眼动与视觉上下文交互的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何利用眼动与第一人称视频的交互来准确检测驾驶员的认知分心状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 认知分心体现在眼动与视觉上下文的交互中，即使驾驶员视觉上看似专注，其注意力模式也会因分心而改变。
analysis.method: 提出EyeCue框架，融合眼动数据与第一人称视频，通过跨模态交互建模捕获驾驶员注意力随时间变化的上下文信息。
contributions: 提出EyeCue，一种基于眼动增强的第一人称视频理解框架，用于检测驾驶员认知分心。
构建CogDrive，一个多场景认知分心标注数据集，扩充了四个现有驾驶数据集。
实验表明EyeCue在CogDrive上达到74.38%准确率，超越11个基线模型超过7%，并在多种驾驶场景下保持70%以上准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在CogDrive数据集上评估，EyeCue准确率74.38%，超越11个基线模型（来自6个模型家族）超过7%，并在不同道路类型、时段和天气条件下准确率超过70%。
limitations: 准确率仍有提升空间（74.38%），可能受限于数据集规模和多样性。
方法依赖眼动追踪设备，实际部署可能受硬件限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EyeCue通过融合眼动与第一人称视频的跨模态交互建模，在认知分心检测任务上超越11个基线模型，并开源了多场景数据集CogDrive。

papers.title: BRIDGE: Background Routing and Isolated Discrete Gating for Coarse-Mask Local Editing
papers.abstract: Coarse-mask local image editing asks a model to modify a user-indicated region while preserving the surrounding scene. In practice, however, rough masks often become unintended shape priors: instead of serving as flexible edit support, the mask can pull the generated object toward its accidental boundary. We study this failure as mask-shape bias and frame the task through a Two-Zone Constraint, where the background should remain stable while the editable region should follow the instruction without being forced to inherit the mask contour. BRIDGE addresses this setting by keeping masks outside the DiT backbone for support construction and blending, avoiding DiT-internal mask injection and copied control branches. It uses BridgePath generation, where a Main Path preserves background context and a Subject Path generates editable content from independent noise. Motivated by a diagnostic Qwen-Image experiment showing that positional embeddings and attention connectivity regulate which image context visual tokens reuse, BRIDGE introduces a learnable Discrete Geometric Gate for token-level positional-embedding routing. This gate lets subject tokens borrow background-anchored coordinates near fusion regions or keep subject-centric coordinates for geometric freedom. We evaluate BRIDGE on BRIDGE-Bench, MagicBrush, and ICE-Bench. On BRIDGE-Bench, BRIDGE improves Local SigLIP2-T from 0.262 with FLUX.1-Fill and 0.390 with ACE++ to 0.503, with parallel gains in local DINO and DreamSim. Zero-shot results on MagicBrush and ICE-Bench further indicate competitive alignment and source preservation beyond the curated benchmark, while the added routing module remains compact at 13.31M parameters compared with ControlNet-style copied branches.

analysis.tldr: BRIDGE通过离散几何门控路由和双路径生成，解决了粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 粗掩码局部图像编辑中，用户提供的粗糙掩码常被模型当作形状先验，导致生成对象被掩码边界束缚，而非灵活遵循编辑指令。现有方法如DiT内部掩码注入或复制控制分支存在局限，需要更有效的解耦机制。
analysis.problem: 解决粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题，使编辑区域能自由生成内容而不继承掩码轮廓，同时保持背景稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过Qwen-Image诊断实验观察到，位置嵌入和注意力连接调节视觉标记重用的上下文，这启发了离散几何门控的设计。
analysis.method: BRIDGE将掩码保持在DiT主干外部用于支持构建和混合，避免内部掩码注入；采用双路径生成（主路径保持背景，主题路径从独立噪声生成可编辑内容）；引入可学习的离散几何门控，在标记级别路由位置嵌入，使主题标记在融合区域借用背景锚定坐标或保持主题中心坐标以获得几何自由度。
contributions: 提出BRIDGE框架，通过外部掩码支持和双路径生成解决掩码形状偏差。
引入离散几何门控，实现标记级位置嵌入路由，在紧凑参数（13.31M）下提升编辑灵活性。
在BRIDGE-Bench、MagicBrush和ICE-Bench上取得SOTA或竞争性结果，Local SigLIP2-T从0.262/0.390提升至0.503。
analysis.experiments: 在BRIDGE-Bench上，BRIDGE将Local SigLIP2-T从FLUX.1-Fill的0.262和ACE++的0.390提升至0.503，并在Local DINO和DreamSim上取得并行提升。在MagicBrush和ICE-Bench上的零样本结果展示了竞争性的对齐和源保留。
limitations: 可能依赖特定DiT架构，泛化到其他生成模型需验证。
离散几何门控的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BRIDGE通过离散几何门控路由和双路径生成，解决了粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题。

papers.title: Explainable Part-Based Vehicle Classifier with Spatial Awareness
authors: Patrick Flaig (2) ((1) Competence Center for Intelligent Sensors and Networks
Lucerne University of Applied Science and Art (2) SICK AG)
papers.abstract: In the area of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), fine-grained vehicle classification systems play an essential role. Recently, the authors have presented a novel vision-based classification approach in which standard end-to-end Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been decomposed into 1) a CNN-based detector for semantically strong vehicle parts, followed by 2) feature construction and 3) final classification by a decision tree. In contrast to conventional CNNs, this allows both easy extensibility to new vehicle categories - without the need to fully retrain the part detector - and an important step towards the interpretability of the model, removing partially the black-box nature inherent to CNNs. Here we present an important extension of this approach that now incorporates spatial awareness of the vehicle parts: while the feature construction 2) of the previous approach used a binary decision for each feature (present vs. absent), now a full spatial probability map is constructed to condition the presence of each individual part with respect to a given vehicle category. The classification is performed using a softmax regression approach for the overall vehicle probabilities. This method shows a considerably improved robustness against false (part-)detections, a point that is crucial for practical application. Comparative analyses with a state-of-the-art end-to-end CNN indicate that our part-based methods achieve comparable accuracy, effectively challenging the presumed trade-off between accuracy and explainability. This research represents a significant advance in vehicle classification for ITS and forms the basis for systems that combine high accuracy with intuitive interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种具有空间感知能力的可解释部件级车辆分类器，在保持可解释性的同时达到与端到端CNN相当的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能交通系统中需要高精度且可解释的车辆分类方法，但传统端到端CNN是黑箱模型，难以解释且不易扩展至新类别。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既保持高精度又具有可解释性的车辆分类方法，并提升对错误部件检测的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将标准CNN分解为部件检测器、特征构建和分类器三部分，特征构建中使用空间概率图代替二元决策，分类采用softmax回归。
contributions: 提出空间感知的部件级车辆分类方法，利用空间概率图提升鲁棒性
实验表明该方法在精度上与端到端CNN相当，挑战了精度与可解释性之间的权衡
analysis.experiments: 与端到端CNN的对比分析表明部件方法达到相当精度，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的部件检测器
空间概率图的构建可能增加计算复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种具有空间感知能力的可解释部件级车辆分类器，在保持可解释性的同时达到与端到端CNN相当的精度。

papers.title: Divide and Conquer: Object Co-occurrence Helps Mitigate Simplicity Bias in OOD Detection
papers.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is crucial for ensuring the reliability of deep learning models. Existing methods mostly focus on regular entangled representations to discriminate in-distribution (ID) and OOD data, neglecting the rich contextual information within images. This issue is particularly challenging for detecting near-OOD, as models with simplicity bias struggle to learn discriminative features in disentangled representations. The human visual system can use the co-occurrence of objects in the natural environment to facilitate scene understanding. Inspired by this, we propose an Object-Centric OOD detection framework that learns to capture Object CO-occurrence (OCO) patterns within images. The proposed method introduces a new OOD detection paradigm that understands object co-occurrence within an image by predicting disentangled representations for the test sample, then adaptively divides patterns into three scenarios based on object co-occurrence patterns observed in ID training data, and finally performs OOD detection in a divide-and-conquer manner. By doing so, OCO can distinguish near-OOD by considering the semantic contextual relationships present in their images, avoiding the tendency to focus solely on simple, easily learnable regions. We evaluate OCO through experiments across challenging and full-spectrum OOD settings, demonstrating competitive results and confirming its ability to address both semantic and covariate shifts. Code is released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 利用物体共现模式，通过分治策略提升OOD检测对近分布外样本的区分能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测方法多关注正则化纠缠表示，忽略了图像中丰富的上下文信息，导致对近分布外样本检测困难；人类视觉系统利用物体共现辅助场景理解，启发本文探索类似机制。
analysis.problem: 解决模型因简单性偏差而难以从解耦表示中学习判别性特征，导致近分布外检测性能差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型存在简单性偏差，倾向于关注简单、易学习的区域，而忽略物体共现等上下文关系，这限制了近分布外检测能力。
analysis.method: 提出Object-Centric OOD检测框架（OCO），学习图像中的物体共现模式：先预测测试样本的解耦表示，然后根据训练数据中的共现模式将样本自适应划分为三种场景，最后以分治策略进行OOD检测。
contributions: 提出基于物体共现的OOD检测新范式，利用上下文语义关系区分近分布外样本。
设计分治策略，根据共现模式自适应划分场景并分别检测，缓解简单性偏差。
analysis.experiments: 在挑战性和全频谱OOD设置下进行实验，展示了竞争性结果，并确认了方法处理语义偏移和协变量偏移的能力。
limitations: 可能依赖训练数据中物体共现模式的完备性，对未见共现模式泛化能力未知。
解耦表示预测的准确性可能影响后续场景划分和检测性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用物体共现模式，通过分治策略提升OOD检测对近分布外样本的区分能力。

papers.title: GazeVLM: Active Vision via Internal Attention Control for Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Human visual reasoning is governed by active vision, a process where metacognitive control drives top-down goal-directed attention, dynamically routing foveal focus toward task-relevant details while maintaining peripheral awareness of the global scene. In contrast, modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process visual information passively, relying on the static accumulation of massive token contexts that dilute spatial reasoning and induce linguistic hallucinations. Here we propose the following paradigm shift: GazeVLM, a multimodal architecture that internalizes this metacognitive oversight over its deployment of attention resources directly into the reasoning loop. By empowering the VLM to autonomously generate gaze tokens ($\texttt{<LOOK>}$), GazeVLM establishes a top-down control mechanism over its own causal attention mask. The model dynamically dictates its focal intent, triggering a continuous suppression bias that dampens irrelevant visual features, implementing spatial selective attention and simulating foveal fixation. Once local reasoning concludes, the bias lifts, seamlessly restoring the global view. This architecture enables the model to fluidly transition between global spatial awareness and localized focal reasoning without relying on external agentic contraptions like cropping tools, or inflating the context window with additional visual tokens derived from localized visual patches. Trained with a bespoke Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) procedure that rewards valid grounding, our 4B-parameter GazeVLM delivers strong high-resolution multimodal reasoning performance, surpassing state-of-the-art VLMs in its parameter class by nearly 4% and agentic multimodal pipelines built around thinking with images by more than 5% on HRBench-4k and HRBench-8k.

analysis.tldr: GazeVLM通过内部注意力控制实现主动视觉，提升多模态推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM被动处理视觉信息，依赖静态大量token，稀释空间推理并导致语言幻觉，缺乏类似人类主动视觉的元认知注意力控制。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在推理过程中自主控制注意力资源，实现动态的全局-局部视觉聚焦，而不依赖外部裁剪工具或增加token数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GazeVLM架构，通过生成注视token（<LOOK>）建立自上而下的因果注意力掩码控制，动态抑制无关视觉特征，模拟空间选择性注意和中央凹注视，并在局部推理结束后恢复全局视图。训练采用定制的GRPO过程奖励有效定位。
contributions: 提出GazeVLM，将元认知注意力控制内化到VLM推理循环中，实现主动视觉。
通过注视token和注意力掩码机制，无需外部工具或额外视觉token即可实现动态全局-局部视觉转换。
在HRBench-4k和HRBench-8k上，4B参数模型超越同参数级SOTA VLM近4%，超越基于图像思考的智能体多模态流程超5%。
analysis.experiments: 在HRBench-4k和HRBench-8k基准上评估，GazeVLM（4B参数）超越同参数级SOTA VLM近4%，超越基于图像思考的智能体多模态流程超5%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于高分辨率多模态推理场景，泛化性待验证。
GRPO训练过程可能对奖励设计敏感，需要精细调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GazeVLM通过内部注意力控制实现主动视觉，提升多模态推理性能。

papers.title: ICDAR 2026 Competition on Writer Identification and Pen Classification from Hand-Drawn Circles
papers.abstract: This paper presents CircleID, a large-scale ICDAR 2026 competition on writer identification and pen classification from scanned hand-drawn circles. The primary objective is to investigate how biometric writer characteristics and physical pen features naturally entangle within minimal, static traces. CircleID comprises two distinct tasks: (1) open-set writer identification, requiring models to recognize known writers while explicitly rejecting unknown ones, and (2) cross-writer pen classification, evaluated across both seen and unseen writers. Participants were provided with a new, controlled dataset of 46,155 tightly cropped circle images, digitized at 400 DPI and annotated for writer identity and pen type. The dataset comprises samples from 50 known and 16 unknown writers using eight different pens. Hosted on Kaggle as two separate tracks with public and private leaderboards, the competition provided participants with a ResNet baseline. In total, 389 teams (436 participants) made 3,185 submissions for the pen classification task, and 113 teams (141 participants) made 1,737 submissions for the writer identification track. The best-performing private leaderboard submissions achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 64.801% for writer identification and 92.726% for pen classification. This paper details the dataset, evaluates the winning methodologies, and analyzes the impact of out-of-distribution writers on model generalization and feature disentanglement. In this large-scale competition, CircleID establishes a new baseline for minimal-trace analysis.

analysis.tldr: 通过手绘圆圈图像的大规模竞赛，探索笔迹生物特征与笔具物理特征的纠缠，并建立最小痕迹分析基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 手写分析中，生物特征（作者身份）与物理特征（笔类型）在静态痕迹中自然纠缠，现有方法难以分离；缺乏大规模、受控的基准数据集来研究这种纠缠。
analysis.problem: 从扫描的手绘圆圈图像中同时进行开放集作者识别和跨作者笔分类，并分析分布外作者对模型泛化和特征解耦的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含46,155张高分辨率圆圈图像的数据集，标注作者身份和笔类型；组织Kaggle竞赛，提供ResNet基线，分为开放集作者识别和笔分类两个任务。
contributions: 提出了CircleID竞赛，包含大规模、受控的手绘圆圈数据集，用于作者识别和笔分类。
通过竞赛结果建立了最小痕迹分析的新基线，最佳Top-1准确率分别为64.801%（作者识别）和92.726%（笔分类）。
analysis.experiments: 在Kaggle平台上进行竞赛，389个团队参与笔分类任务（3,185次提交），113个团队参与作者识别任务（1,737次提交），最佳私有排行榜结果如上。
limitations: 数据集仅包含手绘圆圈，可能无法泛化到其他手写痕迹。
开放集作者识别准确率较低（64.801%），表明模型对未知作者泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过手绘圆圈图像的大规模竞赛，探索笔迹生物特征与笔具物理特征的纠缠，并建立最小痕迹分析基准。

papers.title: Text-to-CAD Evaluation with CADTests
papers.abstract: Text-to-CAD has recently emerged as an important task with the potential to substantially accelerate design workflows. Despite its significance, there has been surprisingly little work on Text-to-CAD evaluation, and assessing CAD model generation performance remains a considerable challenge. In this work, we introduce a new evaluation perspective for Text-to-CAD based on automated testing.
