We propose CADTestBench, the first test-based benchmark for Text-to-CAD, based on CADTests, executable software tests that verify whether a generated CAD model satisfies the geometric and topological requirements of the input prompt. Using CADTestBench, we conduct comprehensive benchmarking of recent Text-to-CAD methods and further demonstrate that CADTests can also guide CAD model generation, yielding simple baselines that surpass performance of current methods. CADTestBench code and data are available at GitHub and Hugging Face dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于自动化测试的Text-to-CAD评估基准CADTestBench，通过可执行软件测试验证生成CAD模型的几何与拓扑正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: Text-to-CAD任务能显著加速设计流程，但缺乏有效的评估方法，现有评估难以衡量生成模型的几何与拓扑准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何系统、自动地评估Text-to-CAD生成的CAD模型是否满足输入提示的几何和拓扑要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CADTestBench，基于CADTests（可执行软件测试）构建基准，通过自动化测试验证生成模型的几何与拓扑属性；并利用CADTests指导生成过程，形成简单基线。
contributions: 提出首个基于自动化测试的Text-to-CAD评估基准CADTestBench。
通过CADTests指导生成，得到超越现有方法的简单基线。
analysis.experiments: 对近期Text-to-CAD方法进行了全面基准测试，并展示了CADTests引导生成的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能仅覆盖有限的几何和拓扑要求。
引导生成的方法可能依赖测试设计，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于自动化测试的Text-to-CAD评估基准CADTestBench，通过可执行软件测试验证生成CAD模型的几何与拓扑正确性。

papers.title: SARA: Semantically Adaptive Relational Alignment for Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Recent video diffusion models (VDMs) synthesize visually convincing clips, yet still drop entities, mis-bind attributes, and weaken the interactions specified in the prompt. Representation-alignment objectives such as VideoREPA and MoAlign improve fine-grained text following by distilling spatio-temporal token relations from a frozen visual foundation model, but their pairwise supervision budget is allocated by visual or motion cues rather than by how relevant each pair is to the prompt. We present SARA, Semantically Adaptive Relational Alignment, which keeps token-relation distillation (TRD) on a frozen VFM target and adds a text-conditioned saliency that decides which token pairs carry supervision. A lightweight Stage 1 aligner is trained with per-entity SAM 3.1 mask supervision and an InfoNCE regulariser, and its continuous saliency is fused into TRD through a pair-routing operator that assigns each token pair a weight whenever either of its two endpoints is salient, thereby routing supervision toward subject-subject and subject-background pairs and away from background-background ones. In the Wan2.2 continual-training setting, SARA improves both text alignment and motion quality over SFT, VideoREPA, and MoAlign on a 13-dimension VLM rubric, on the public VBench benchmarks, and in a blind user study.

analysis.tldr: SARA 通过文本条件显著性引导的 token 关系蒸馏，提升视频扩散模型的文本对齐与运动质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在生成时仍会出现实体丢失、属性错绑、交互弱化等问题，而表示对齐方法（如 VideoREPA、MoAlign）的监督分配基于视觉或运动线索，忽略了与提示的相关性，导致对齐效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何根据文本提示的语义相关性自适应地分配 token 对监督，以提升视频扩散模型的细粒度文本跟随能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SARA 包含一个轻量级 Stage 1 对齐器，使用逐实体 SAM 3.1 掩码监督和 InfoNCE 正则化训练，生成文本条件显著性；然后通过 pair-routing 算子将显著性融合到 token 关系蒸馏中，为每个 token 对分配权重，优先监督主体-主体和主体-背景对，减少背景-背景对的监督。
contributions: 提出语义自适应关系对齐方法 SARA，利用文本条件显著性引导 token 关系蒸馏的监督分配。
在 Wan2.2 持续训练设置下，SARA 在 13 维 VLM 评估、VBench 基准和盲用户研究中均优于 SFT、VideoREPA 和 MoAlign。
analysis.experiments: 在 Wan2.2 持续训练设置下，使用 13 维 VLM 评估、VBench 基准和盲用户研究进行评测，SARA 在文本对齐和运动质量上均优于 SFT、VideoREPA 和 MoAlign。
limitations: 依赖 SAM 3.1 的掩码监督，可能受限于分割质量。
仅验证了 Wan2.2 模型，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SARA 通过文本条件显著性引导的 token 关系蒸馏，提升视频扩散模型的文本对齐与运动质量。

papers.title: APEX: Assumption-free Projection-based Embedding eXamination Metric for Image Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: As generative models achieve unprecedented visual quality, the gold standard for image evaluation remains traditional feature-distribution metrics (e.g., FID). However, these metrics are provably hindered by the closed-vocabulary bottleneck of outdated features and the assumptive bias of rigid parametric formulations. Recent alternatives exploit modern backbones to solve the feature bottleneck, yet continue to suffer from parametric limitations. To close this gap, we introduce APEX (Assumption-free Projection-based Embedding eXamination), a novel evaluation framework leveraging the Sliced Wasserstein Distance as a mathematically grounded, assumption-free similarity measure. APEX inherits effective scalability to high-dimensional spaces, as we prove with theoretical and empirical evidences. Moreover, APEX is embedding-agnostic and uses two open-vocabulary foundation models, CLIP and DINOv2, as feature extractors. Benchmarking APEX against established baselines reveals superior robustness to visual degradations. Additionally, we show that APEX metrics exhibit intra- and cross-dataset stability, ensuring highly stable evaluations on out-of-domain datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无假设的投影嵌入检验指标APEX，用于图像质量评估，克服了传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数化偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像质量评估指标如FID受限于过时特征的封闭词汇瓶颈和刚性参数化假设，而基于现代骨干网络的新方法仍存在参数化限制，亟需一种无假设、可扩展的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种无假设、嵌入无关的图像质量评估指标，以克服传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数化偏差，并保证高维空间的可扩展性和评估稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出APEX框架，利用切片Wasserstein距离作为无假设的相似性度量，并采用CLIP和DINOv2两种开放词汇基础模型作为特征提取器。
contributions: 提出APEX，一种基于切片Wasserstein距离的无假设图像质量评估框架。
理论证明APEX在高维空间的有效可扩展性，并通过实验验证。
APEX嵌入无关，使用开放词汇基础模型，对视觉退化具有鲁棒性，且具有跨数据集稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上对比APEX与现有指标，显示其对视觉退化的优越鲁棒性，并证明其具有数据集内和跨数据集稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖所选基础模型（CLIP和DINOv2）的质量。
切片Wasserstein距离的计算效率在高维大规模数据上可能仍需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无假设的投影嵌入检验指标APEX，用于图像质量评估，克服了传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数化偏差。

papers.title: Radiologist-Guided Causal Concept Bottleneck Models for Chest X-Ray Interpretation
papers.abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) in medical imaging aim to improve model interpretability by predicting intermediate clinical concepts before final diagnoses. However, most existing CBMs treat concepts as discriminative predictors of pathology labels, without explicitly modelling the underlying clinical generative process where diseases produce observable radiographic findings. We propose XpertCausal, a radiologist-guided causal CBM for chest X-ray interpretation which models pathology-to-concept relationships using a probabilistic noisy-OR framework. This generative model is then inverted via Bayesian inference to estimate pathology probabilities from predicted concepts. Radiologist-curated concept-pathology associations are used to constrain model structure to radiologist-defined clinically plausible reasoning pathways. We evaluate XpertCausal on MIMIC-CXR across pathology classification performance, calibration, explanation quality, and alignment with radiologist-defined reasoning pathways. Compared with both a non-causal CBM baseline and a causal ablation with unconstrained learned associations, XpertCausal achieves improved AUROC, calibration, and clinically relevant explanation quality, while learning concept-pathology relationships that more closely align with expert knowledge. These results demonstrate that incorporating clinically motivated causal structure and expert domain knowledge into CBMs can lead to more accurate, interpretable, and clinically aligned models for CXR interpretation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，通过噪声OR框架建模病理-影像发现关系，提升胸部X光片解释的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型将概念视为病理标签的判别预测器，未建模疾病产生影像发现的临床生成过程，导致可解释性不足且与临床推理不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何将临床生成过程（疾病→影像发现）显式建模到概念瓶颈模型中，以提升病理分类性能、校准性和解释质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出XpertCausal，使用概率噪声OR框架建模病理-概念关系，通过贝叶斯推断从预测概念估计病理概率，并用放射科医生定义的病理-概念关联约束模型结构。
contributions: 提出放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，显式建模病理到影像发现的生成过程。
在MIMIC-CXR上验证模型在分类性能、校准、解释质量和临床对齐方面的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上评估病理分类性能、校准、解释质量以及与放射科医生定义推理路径的对齐程度。
limitations: 依赖放射科医生定义的概念-病理关联，可能引入主观偏差。
噪声OR框架假设条件独立性，可能简化真实临床关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，通过噪声OR框架建模病理-影像发现关系，提升胸部X光片解释的准确性和可解释性。

papers.title: Differentiable Ray Tracing with Gaussians for Unified Radio Propagation Simulation and View Synthesis
papers.abstract: Explicit neural representations such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enable high-fidelity and real-time novel view synthesis, yet optimize for alpha-composited optical appearance rather than ray-intersectable geometry. In contrast, radio-frequency (RF) digital twins require deterministic multi-bounce paths, where the geometry dictates trajectories and their associated attenuation and delay. We introduce a framework enabling differentiable RF propagation simulation directly within visually reconstructed neural scenes, allowing point-to-point path computation between arbitrary 3D locations while preserving high-quality visual rendering. Unlike conventional RF simulation pipelines that rely on manually constructed meshes, we embed Gaussian primitives into a hardware-accelerated ray tracing structure as the underlying spatial representation. By extracting physically meaningful channel impulse responses from visual-only reconstructions, we provide cross-modal evidence that neural reconstructions can serve as unified spatial representations for both electromagnetic propagation simulation and photorealistic view synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 将3D高斯泼溅嵌入可微分光线追踪结构，实现统一射频传播模拟与视觉渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有射频数字孪生依赖人工构建的网格模型，而神经渲染（如3DGS）虽能实现高质量视觉重建，但缺乏可射线相交的几何表示，无法直接用于电磁传播模拟。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉重建的神经场景（如3DGS）同时支持可微分的射频传播模拟和高质量视觉渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将高斯基元嵌入硬件加速的光线追踪结构作为底层空间表示，实现任意3D位置间的点对点路径计算，并提取物理意义的信道冲激响应。
contributions: 提出一种在视觉重建神经场景中直接进行可微分射频传播模拟的框架。
证明神经重建可作为电磁传播模拟与逼真视图合成的统一空间表示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖3DGS重建质量，对复杂场景的射频模拟精度有限。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将3D高斯泼溅嵌入可微分光线追踪结构，实现统一射频传播模拟与视觉渲染。

papers.title: SIMI: Self-information Mining Network for Low-light Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Poor lighting conditions significantly impact image quality, posing substantial challenges for image editing and visualization. Many existing enhancement methods aim at proposing complex models while neglecting the intrinsic information contained within low-light images. In this work, we propose the Self-Information Mining (SIMI) network, an innovative unsupervised framework that decomposes low-light images into multiple components based on bit-plane decomposition. Our approach allows mining intrinsic information without relying on external data. This not only accelerates model convergence but also improves performance and reduces computational overhead. The unsupervised nature of our method facilitates real-world applicability. Experiments conducted on standard benchmarks demonstrate that SIMI achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于位平面分解的自信息挖掘无监督低光图像增强网络，无需外部数据即可提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光照条件严重影响图像质量，现有方法多关注复杂模型而忽略低光图像自身的内在信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部数据的情况下，利用低光图像自身信息实现高效、高性能的低光图像增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自信息挖掘网络，基于位平面分解将低光图像分解为多个分量，挖掘内在信息，实现无监督学习。
contributions: 提出无监督的低光图像增强框架，无需外部配对数据。
利用位平面分解挖掘图像内在信息，加速收敛、提升性能并降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准数据集上达到最先进性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。

papers.title: Head Similarity: Modeling Structured Whole-Head Appearance Beyond Face Recognition
papers.abstract: Many vision applications require identity consistency beyond strict biometric recognition, especially under non-frontal views or when facial cues are missing. However, conventional face recognition models enforce intra-identity invariance, collapsing appearance variations such as hairstyle or styling changes into a single representation, limiting their use in appearance-sensitive scenarios. To address this limitation, we introduce Head Similarity, a new formulation that extends identity-centric recognition to structured whole-head similarity modeling. Our approach explicitly captures intra-identity appearance variation and enforces hierarchical similarity ordering across identity and appearance states, enabling meaningful comparison even under occlusion or rear-view conditions. We construct a large-scale benchmark from long-form videos with weakly-supervised appearance states, covering diverse poses, occlusions, and temporal changes. As a first step, we develop a simple yet effective framework that jointly models identity discrimination and appearance-sensitive similarity through hierarchical supervision and identity-aware distillation. Experiments show that conventional face recognition models fail to capture appearance-dependent similarity, while our approach demonstrates the feasibility of structured whole-head similarity modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出头部相似度概念，通过层次化监督和身份感知蒸馏建模结构化全头外观相似性，超越传统人脸识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统人脸识别模型强制身份不变性，导致发型、造型等外观变化被压缩为单一表征，无法处理非正面视角或面部遮挡等外观敏感场景。
analysis.problem: 如何建模结构化全头外观相似性，在保持身份一致性的同时捕捉外观变化，实现遮挡或后视图下的有意义比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统人脸识别模型无法捕捉外观依赖的相似性，在非正面视角或面部线索缺失时失效。
analysis.method: 构建大规模弱监督外观状态基准，提出层次化监督和身份感知蒸馏框架，联合建模身份判别和外观敏感相似性。
contributions: 提出头部相似度新问题，将身份中心识别扩展为结构化全头外观建模。
构建大规模弱监督外观状态基准，覆盖多样姿态、遮挡和时间变化。
开发简单有效的框架，通过层次化监督和身份感知蒸馏实现外观敏感相似性建模。

limitations: 弱监督外观状态可能引入噪声。

papers.title: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Renal Lesion Stratification in CT
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of open-source medical foundation models (FMs) raises a practical question: how well do their pre-trained representations transfer to clinically relevant but data-scarce classification tasks? Particularly in CT-based renal lesion classification, a push toward greater generalizability would be meaningful, as the field is constrained by inherently limited training data. We addressed this through a benchmark of three medical FMs on this specific task. This six-class problem spans common entities like cysts and clear cell renal cell carcinoma, alongside rare subtypes. Using a frozen feature-probing protocol, we compared FM embeddings against a handcrafted radiomics classifier and a 3D ResNet-50 trained from scratch. Models were trained on a composite dataset of 2,854 lesions and evaluated on an external test set of 234 lesions from The Cancer Imaging Archive. Our results reveal two key findings. First, FM performance (AUC 0.70-0.77) matched the from-scratch ResNet (AUC 0.72) while drastically reducing hardware demand, requiring only seconds on a CPU after feature extraction. However, the conventional radiomics baseline significantly outperformed all deep learning approaches, achieving an AUC of 0.88 (all p $\leq$ 0.002). This suggests that current generalist FM embeddings do not yet capture the fine-grained texture and shape heterogeneity driving histological subtype discrimination. Despite their potential in data-scarce settings, medical FMs did not surpass established models for renal lesion stratification, leaving radiomics as the current state-of-the-art.

analysis.tldr: 医学基础模型在CT肾病变分类中表现不如传统影像组学方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 开源医学基础模型（FMs）的预训练表示在数据稀缺的临床分类任务中的迁移能力尚不清楚，尤其是CT肾病变分类受限于训练数据不足，亟需评估其泛化性。
analysis.problem: 评估医学基础模型在CT肾病变六分类任务中的表现，并与传统影像组学及从头训练的3D ResNet-50进行比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基础模型（AUC 0.70-0.77）与从头训练的ResNet（AUC 0.72）性能相当，但均显著低于传统影像组学基线（AUC 0.88），表明当前通用基础模型嵌入未能捕捉组织学亚型区分所需的细粒度纹理和形状异质性。
analysis.method: 采用冻结特征探测协议，比较三种医学基础模型、手工影像组学分类器和从头训练的3D ResNet-50在2854个病变的复合数据集上的表现，并在234个病变的外部测试集上评估。
contributions: 系统评估了医学基础模型在CT肾病变分类任务中的迁移性能
发现传统影像组学方法仍优于当前基础模型，揭示了基础模型在细粒度医学分类中的局限性
analysis.experiments: 在2854个病变的复合数据集上训练，并在234个病变的外部测试集（来自The Cancer Imaging Archive）上评估，报告了AUC指标。
limitations: 仅评估了冻结特征协议，未探索微调策略
基础模型种类有限，可能不涵盖所有最新模型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: LAMES: A Large-Scale and Artisanal Mining Environmental Segmentation Dataset
papers.abstract: Mining operations are of utmost importance to the economy of some nations. However, such operations result in land-use change, very high energy consumption, and negative impacts on the environment, including soil erosion and deforestation. The mining process can impact an area much larger than the mining site itself. Adding to the negative externalities linked to mining is the fact that, in addition to government-sanctioned legal mining operations, illegal mining is widespread, including in various countries of Africa. The ability to monitor remote mining site activities can be useful, e.g., for the detection of illegal artisanal mining activities and their environmental impacts. An important outcome of such monitoring could include a better understanding of the interrelationship between mine facility attributes (e.g., mining types, processing methods, commodities, etc.) and their impact on the natural environment. In this work, we present a data set that contains 150 Large Scale Mining (LSM) sites and 870km^2 annotated area of Artisanal Small-scale Mining (ASM) sites. The metadata includes nine eminent LSM sections and 27 mining site attributes for each LSM site. We also discuss the data set's possible contribution to the research community, social and environmental consequences, and researchers' responsibilities from an ethics perspective.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个包含150个大型矿场和870km²手工小规模矿场标注区域的环境分割数据集LAMES。

papers.title: OphEdit: Training-Free Text-Guided Editing of Ophthalmic Surgical Videos
papers.abstract: High-fidelity surgical video generation can greatly improve medical training and the development of AI, adapting these generative models for precise video editing remains a formidable challenge. Modifying surgical attributes, such as instrument tissue interactions or procedural phases is challenging due to the strict anatomical and temporal constraints. In this paper, we propose OphEdit, a novel training-free framework for the text-guided editing of ophthalmic surgical videos. Our approach leverages a deterministic second-order ODE inversion pipeline to capture Attention Value (V) tensors from the original video. By selectively injecting these stored tensors into the conditional Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) branch during the denoising phase, OphEdit rigorously preserves the intricate anatomical geometry of the eye while seamlessly mapping text-driven semantic modifications onto the video stream. Clinical evaluations demonstrates that OphEdit effectively handles complex surgical transformations, such as instrument swaps and procedural variations, with superior structural fidelity and temporal consistency compared to natural-domain video editors. Our work represents the first application of training-free video editing in the ophthalmic surgical domain, offering a scalable solution for generating diverse, annotated medical datasets without the need for exhaustive manual recording or costly model fine-tuning. The code and prompts can be accessed at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的眼科手术视频编辑框架OphEdit，通过ODE反演和注意力值注入实现文本引导编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量手术视频生成可提升医学训练和AI开发，但现有生成模型难以实现精确视频编辑，尤其是手术属性修改受严格解剖和时间约束。
analysis.problem: 实现无需训练的文本引导眼科手术视频编辑，保持解剖结构完整性和时间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Towards Billion-scale Multi-modal Biometric Search
papers.abstract: Searching a multi-biometric database of a billion records for a country-level identity system requires pushing the limits of all aspects of a biometric system, including acquisition, preprocessing, feature extraction, accuracy, matching speed, presentation attack detection, and handling of special cases (e.g., missing finger digits). This is the first paper that gives insights into such a large-scale multimodal biometric search system, called Bharat ABIS, based on open-source architectures. The end-to-end pipeline of Bharat ABIS processes fingerprint, face and iris modalities through modality-specific stages of preprocessing (segmentation), quality assessment, presentation attack detection, and learning an embedding (feature extraction), producing a concatenated template of 13.5KB per person. We present a detailed analysis of the modalities and how they are integrated to create an efficient and effective solution for 1:N search (de-duplication). Evaluations on a demographically stratified gallery of 220 million identities, randomly sampled from 1.55 billion records in India's Aadhaar database, yield an FNIR of 0.3% at an FPIR of 0.5%, for adult probes (over 18 years). We also compare the performance of Bharat ABIS against three state-of-the-art COTS systems on a 20M gallery. Our system achieves a throughput of 100 searches per second on a gallery of 40M on a single server (8xNvidia H100 GPUs, 2TB RAM).

analysis.tldr: 首个面向十亿级多模态生物特征搜索的开源系统Bharat ABIS，在2.2亿身份库上实现0.3% FNIR@0.5% FPIR。
analysis.research_motivation: 国家级身份系统需要处理十亿级记录的多模态生物特征搜索，现有系统在规模、速度和准确性上存在瓶颈，且缺乏开源方案。
analysis.problem: 构建一个端到端的大规模多模态生物特征搜索系统，支持指纹、人脸和虹膜，实现高效1:N去重搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于开源架构，对指纹、人脸和虹膜分别进行预处理（分割）、质量评估、呈现攻击检测和特征嵌入学习，生成13.5KB/人的拼接模板，并集成多模态进行1:N搜索。
contributions: 首次公开十亿级多模态生物特征搜索系统的设计与实现细节。

papers.title: Aquatic Neuromorphic Optical Flow
papers.abstract: Underwater environments impose severe constraints on conventional imaging systems and demand solutions that balance high-quality sensing with strict resource efficiency. While emerging event cameras offer a promising alternative, their potential in aquatic scenarios remains largely unexplored. Through the lens of neuromorphic vision, this work pioneers the investigation of motion fields that serve as key media for agile underwater perception. Built upon spiking neural networks, we introduce a self-supervised framework to estimate per-pixel optical flow from asynchronous event streams, elegantly bypassing the long-standing bottleneck of underwater data scarcity. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves competitive visual and quantitative results against leading techniques while operating with superior computational efficiency. By bridging neuromorphic sensing and aquatic intelligence, this work opens new frontiers for lightweight, real-time, and low-cost perception on resource-constrained underwater edge platforms.

analysis.tldr: 首个利用脉冲神经网络从事件相机数据中自监督估计水下光流的框架，兼具高精度与低计算成本。

analysis.problem: 从异步事件流中逐像素估计水下光流，同时解决数据稀缺和计算效率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 首次将神经形态视觉与水下光流估计结合，开辟新方向。
提出自监督脉冲神经网络框架，绕过水下数据稀缺瓶颈。
在保持竞争性视觉与定量结果的同时，实现优越的计算效率。

papers.title: Breaking Spatial Uniformity: Prior-Guided Mamba with Radial Serialization for Lens Flare Removal
papers.abstract: Lens flares, caused by complex optical aberrations, severely degrade image quality especially in nighttime photography. Although recent restoration methods have made remarkable progress, most still rely on spatially uniform processing. They are failing to handle the region-dependent restoration demands of flare scenes, where saturated light sources should be preserved, flare artifacts removed, and background details recovered. To address this challenge, we propose DeflareMambav2, a prior-guided Mamba framework for lens flare removal. Specifically, we introduce a Flare Prior Network (FPN) to estimate flare priors and guide adaptive restoration. Besides, a novel radial serialization strategy breaks spatially homogeneous processing by performing flare-aware targeted sampling, and better supports long-range modeling in State Space Models (SSMs). Based on these priors, the backbone adopts a dual-level adaptive scheme. It explicitly preserves light-source regions to avoid over-processing, and applies curriculum-based restoration to the remaining contaminated areas while calibrating restoration intensity at the pixel level. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeflareMambav2 achieves state-of-the-art performance with reduced parameter burden. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出先验引导的Mamba框架DeflareMambav2，通过径向序列化打破空间均匀性，实现透镜眩光去除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像恢复方法多采用空间均匀处理，无法满足透镜眩光场景中区域依赖的恢复需求（如保留光源、去除伪影、恢复背景细节）。
analysis.problem: 透镜眩光去除中，如何实现区域自适应的恢复，避免均匀处理导致的光源过处理或伪影残留。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出均匀处理在眩光场景中失效：饱和光源需保留，眩光伪影需去除，背景需恢复，三者需求冲突。
analysis.method: 提出DeflareMambav2，包含Flare Prior Network (FPN)估计先验，径向序列化策略实现眩光感知采样，双层级自适应方案（显式保留光源区域+课程式恢复污染区域并像素级校准强度）。
contributions: 提出先验引导的Mamba框架，利用FPN估计眩光先验指导自适应恢复。
设计径向序列化策略，打破空间均匀性，支持SSM长程建模。
双层级自适应方案，显式保护光源并课程式恢复污染区域。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到SOTA性能且参数更少。
limitations: 可能依赖先验估计的准确性，复杂场景下先验可能不鲁棒。
径向序列化策略在非径向分布伪影上可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出先验引导的Mamba框架DeflareMambav2，通过径向序列化打破空间均匀性，实现透镜眩光去除。

papers.title: Operating Within the Operational Design Domain: Zero-Shot Perception with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Over the last few years, research on autonomous systems has matured to such a degree that the field is increasingly well-positioned to translate research into practical, stakeholder-driven use cases across well-defined domains. However, for a wide-scale practical adoption of autonomous systems, adherence to safety regulations is crucial. Many regulations are influenced by the Operational Design Domain (ODD), which defines the specific conditions in which an autonomous agent can function. This is especially relevant for Automated Driving Systems (ADS), as a dependable perception of ODD elements is essential for safe implementation and auditing. Vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual recognition and language reasoning, functioning without task-specific training data, which makes them suitable for adaptable ODD perception. To assess whether VLMs can function as zero-shot "ODD sensors" that adapt to evolving definitions, we contribute (i) an empirical study of zero-shot ODD classification and detection using four VLMs on a custom dataset and Mapillary Vistas, along with failure analyses; (ii) an ablation of zero-shot optimization strategies with a cost-performance overview; and (iii) a suite of reusable prompting templates with guidance for adaptation. Our findings indicate that definition-anchored chain-of-thought prompting with persona decomposition performs best, while other methods may result in reduced recall. Overall, our results pave the way for transparent and effective ODD-based perception in safety-critical applications.

analysis.tldr: 探索视觉-语言模型在自动驾驶系统运行设计域中作为零样本感知传感器的可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶系统的大规模实际部署需要遵守安全法规，而运行设计域（ODD）定义了自主代理可运行的具体条件，对ODD元素的可靠感知是安全实现和审计的关键。传统方法依赖任务特定训练数据，缺乏适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉-语言模型（VLM）在零样本设置下实现ODD元素的分类与检测，以适应不断变化的ODD定义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 定义锚定的链式思维提示结合角色分解表现最佳，而其他方法可能导致召回率下降。
analysis.method: 提出一套可复用的提示模板，结合定义锚定的链式思维提示和角色分解策略，在自定义数据集和Mapillary Vistas上评估四种VLM的零样本ODD分类与检测性能，并进行失败分析和零样本优化策略的消融实验。
contributions: 对四种VLM在零样本ODD分类和检测上的实证研究，包括失败分析
零样本优化策略的消融实验及成本-性能概览
一套可复用的提示模板及适应指南
analysis.experiments: 在自定义数据集和Mapillary Vistas上评估四种VLM，进行了零样本ODD分类和检测实验，以及优化策略的消融实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了四种VLM，可能不覆盖所有模型
零样本性能可能受提示设计影响，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索视觉-语言模型在自动驾驶系统运行设计域中作为零样本感知传感器的可行性。

papers.title: EggHand: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Egocentric Hand Pose Forecasting
papers.abstract: Forecasting future 3D hand pose sequences from egocentric video is essential for understanding human intention and enabling embodied applications such as AR/VR assistance and human-robot interaction. However, this task remains a highly challenging problem because egocentric hand motion is driven by complex human intent, exhibits highly dexterous articulations, and is observed under drastic viewpoint shifts induced by ego-motion. In this work, we introduce EggHand, a foundation-model-based framework for egocentric hand pose forecasting that unifies multimodal semantic reasoning with dynamic motion modeling. Our approach couples an action decoder from a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model, which captures the structured temporal dynamics of hand motion, with an egocentric video-text encoder that provides viewpoint-aware contextual information learned from large-scale first-person video. Together, these components overcome the brittleness of generic visual encoders under ego-motion and enable joint reasoning over motion, context, and high-level intent-without relying on body pose or external tracking. Experiments on the EgoExo4D dataset show that EggHand sets a new state of the art in forecasting accuracy, remains robust under severe ego-motion, and further enables controllable prediction via language-based task prompts. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: EggHand 是一个基于 VLA 模型的多模态基础模型，用于从第一人称视频预测未来手部姿态序列。
analysis.research_motivation: 从第一人称视频预测手部姿态对于理解人类意图和 AR/VR 等具身应用至关重要，但现有方法难以处理复杂意图、高自由度关节运动和剧烈视角变化。
analysis.problem: 如何从第一人称视频中准确预测未来 3D 手部姿态序列，同时应对 ego-motion 带来的视角变化和复杂人类意图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用视觉编码器在 ego-motion 下表现脆弱，难以处理视角变化；手部运动受复杂意图驱动且高度灵活。
analysis.method: 将 VLA 模型的动作解码器与第一人称视频-文本编码器结合，实现运动、上下文和高级意图的联合推理。
contributions: 提出 EggHand，一个统一多模态语义推理和动态运动建模的基础模型框架。
在 EgoExo4D 数据集上达到新 SOTA，对严重 ego-motion 保持鲁棒，并支持基于语言的任务提示控制预测。
analysis.experiments: 在 EgoExo4D 数据集上评估，EggHand 在预测准确性上达到新 SOTA，在严重 ego-motion 下保持鲁棒，并支持语言控制预测。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模第一人称视频数据，数据获取成本高。
未提及对未见过的任务或场景的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EggHand 是一个基于 VLA 模型的多模态基础模型，用于从第一人称视频预测未来手部姿态序列。

papers.title: LithoBench: Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Remote-Sensing Lithology Interpretation
papers.abstract: Remote sensing lithology interpretation is fundamental to geological surveys, mineral exploration, and regional geological mapping. Unlike general land-cover recognition, lithology interpretation is a knowledge-intensive task that requires experts to infer rock types from various features, e.g., subtle visual, spectral, textural, geomorphological, and contextual cues, making reliable automated interpretation highly challenging. Geological knowledge-guided large multimodal models offer new opportunities, yet their evaluation remains constrained by the lack of benchmarks that capture lithological annotations, multi-level geological semantics, and expert-informed assessment. Here, we propose LithoBench, a multi-level benchmark for evaluating geological semantic understanding in remote sensing lithology interpretation. LithoBench contains 10,000 expert-annotated interpretation instances across 12 representative lithological categories, including 4,000 multiple-choice and 6,000 open-ended tasks organized into five cognitive levels: Identification and Description, Comparative Analysis, Mechanism Explanation, Practical Application, and Comprehensive Reasoning. We further develop an expert-in-the-loop, knowledge-grounded semi-automated construction pipeline, coupling multi sub-processes, e.g., structured geological image descriptions, to enhance geological validity and evaluation reliability. Experiments with multiple large vision-language models eveal substantial limitations in geological semantic understanding, particularly on higher-order explanation, application, and reasoning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出遥感岩性解释多级基准LithoBench，评估大视觉语言模型的地质语义理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感岩性解释是地质调查和矿产勘探的基础，但现有基准缺乏岩性标注、多级地质语义和专家评估，限制了地质知识引导的大多模态模型评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含岩性标注、多级地质语义和专家评估的基准来评估大视觉语言模型在遥感岩性解释中的地质语义理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，多个大视觉语言模型在地质语义理解上存在显著局限，尤其是在高阶解释、应用和推理任务上。
analysis.method: 构建包含10,000个专家标注实例的多级基准，涵盖12个岩性类别，包括4,000个多项选择和6,000个开放任务，分为五个认知层次；并开发专家在环、知识引导的半自动构建流程。
contributions: 提出LithoBench，首个多级遥感岩性解释基准，包含专家标注和五个认知层次的任务。
开发专家在环、知识引导的半自动构建流程，增强地质有效性和评估可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 使用多个大视觉语言模型进行实验，揭示了地质语义理解的显著局限，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅涵盖12个岩性类别，可能无法代表所有岩性类型。
半自动构建流程可能仍存在标注偏差或遗漏。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出遥感岩性解释多级基准LithoBench，评估大视觉语言模型的地质语义理解能力。

papers.title: FS-I2P:A Hierarchical Focus-Sweep Registration Network with Dynamically Allocated Depth
papers.abstract: Image-to-point cloud registration is often challenged by viewpoint changes, cross-modal discrepancies, and repetitive textures, which induce scale ambiguity and consequently lead to erroneous correspondences. Recent detection-free methods alleviate this issue by leveraging multi-scale features and transformer-based interactions. However, they still suffer from attention drift across layers and intra-scale inconsistencies, hindering precise registration. Inspired by human behavior, we propose a ``Focus--Sweep'' paradigm and develop a Hierarchical Focus--Sweep Interaction Module within an SSM-based framework to enhance multi-level cross-modal feature association. In addition, we introduce a Dynamic Layer Allocation Strategy that adaptively determines the iteration depth to better exploit geometric constraints and improve matching robustness. Extensive experiments and ablations on two benchmarks, RGB-D Scenes V2 and 7-Scenes, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层聚焦扫描网络，通过动态分配深度实现图像到点云的鲁棒配准。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像到点云配准常受视角变化、跨模态差异和重复纹理影响，导致尺度模糊和错误对应，现有无检测方法虽利用多尺度特征和Transformer交互，但仍存在层间注意力漂移和尺度内不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 解决图像到点云配准中的尺度模糊、跨层注意力漂移和尺度内不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有无检测方法存在注意力漂移和尺度内不一致，阻碍精确配准。
analysis.method: 提出基于SSM的分层聚焦扫描交互模块，模拟人类行为实现多级跨模态特征关联；并引入动态层分配策略自适应确定迭代深度以利用几何约束。
contributions: 提出Focus-Sweep范式及分层交互模块，增强多级跨模态特征关联
提出动态层分配策略，自适应调整迭代深度以提升匹配鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在RGB-D Scenes V2和7-Scenes两个基准上进行了大量实验和消融，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖SSM框架的特定设计，泛化性需验证
动态层分配策略的计算开销未在摘要中说明
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层聚焦扫描网络，通过动态分配深度实现图像到点云的鲁棒配准。

papers.title: SAM 3D Animal: Promptable Animal 3D Reconstruction from Images in the Wild
papers.abstract: 3D animal reconstruction in the wild remains challenging due to large species variation, frequent occlusions, and the prevalence of multi-animal scenes, while existing methods predominantly focus on single-animal settings. We present SAM 3D Animal, the first promptable framework for multi-animal 3D reconstruction from a single image. Built on the SMAL+ parametric animal model, our method jointly reconstructs multiple instances and supports flexible prompts in the form of keypoints and masks which enable more reliable disambiguation in crowded and occluded scenes. To train such a model, we further introduce Herd3D, a multi-animal 3D dataset containing over 5K images, designed to increase diversity in species, interactions, and occlusion patterns. Experiments on the Animal3D, APTv2, and Animal Kingdom datasets show that our framework achieves state-of-the-art results over both existing model-based and model-free methods, demonstrating a scalable and effective solution for prompt-driven animal 3D reconstruction in the wild.

analysis.tldr: 首个支持提示的多动物3D重建框架，结合SMAL+模型和新数据集Herd3D，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 野外动物3D重建因物种多样、遮挡频繁和多动物场景普遍而极具挑战，现有方法主要针对单动物场景，缺乏灵活的多实例重建方案。
analysis.problem: 从单张野外图像中实现多动物3D重建，并支持关键点和掩码等灵活提示以处理遮挡和拥挤场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于SMAL+参数化动物模型，构建提示式框架，联合重建多个实例；同时引入包含5000+图像的多动物3D数据集Herd3D以增加物种、交互和遮挡模式的多样性。
contributions: 提出首个提示式多动物3D重建框架SAM 3D Animal，支持关键点和掩码提示。
构建多动物3D数据集Herd3D，包含5000+图像，提升物种和遮挡多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在Animal3D、APTv2和Animal Kingdom数据集上，该方法在基于模型和无模型方法中均达到SOTA。
limitations: 依赖SMAL+参数模型，可能无法覆盖所有动物形态。
数据集规模有限，泛化到极端物种或场景可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个支持提示的多动物3D重建框架，结合SMAL+模型和新数据集Herd3D，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: TraceAV-Bench: Benchmarking Multi-Hop Trajectory Reasoning over Long Audio-Visual Videos
papers.abstract: Real-world audio-visual understanding requires chaining evidence that is sparse, temporally dispersed, and split across the visual and auditory streams, whereas existing benchmarks largely fail to evaluate this capability. They restrict videos to short clips, isolate modalities, or reduce questions to one-hop perception. We introduce TraceAV-Bench, the first benchmark to jointly evaluate multi-hop reasoning over long audio-visual trajectories and multimodal hallucination robustness. TraceAV-Bench comprises 2,200 rigorously validated multiple-choice questions over 578 long videos, totaling 339.5 hours, spanning 4 evaluation dimensions and 15 sub-tasks. Each question is grounded in an explicit reasoning chain that averages 3.68 hops across a 15.1-minute temporal span. The dataset is built by a three-step semi-automated pipeline followed by a strict quality assurance process. Evaluation of multiple representative OmniLLMs on TraceAV-Bench reveals that the benchmark poses a persistent challenge across all models, with the strongest closed-source model (Gemini 3.1 Pro) reaching only 68.29% on general tasks, and the best open-source model (Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0) reaching 51.70%, leaving substantial headroom. Moreover, we find that robustness to multimodal hallucination is largely decoupled from general multimodal reasoning performance. We anticipate that TraceAV-Bench will stimulate further research toward OmniLLMs that can reason coherently and faithfully over long-form audio-visual content.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估长音频-视觉视频多跳轨迹推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准局限于短视频、单模态或单跳感知，无法评估真实世界中需要跨模态、长时域证据链的推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏同时评估长音频-视觉视频多跳推理和幻觉鲁棒性的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最强闭源模型在通用任务上仅达68.29%，开源模型仅51.70%，且多模态幻觉鲁棒性与通用推理性能基本解耦。
analysis.method: 构建包含2200道选择题、578个长视频（总时长339.5小时）的基准，通过三步半自动流水线和严格质量保证生成，每个问题平均3.68跳推理链、跨15.1分钟时间跨度。
contributions: 首个联合评估长音频-视觉视频多跳推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准
揭示现有OmniLLM在该任务上的显著不足及幻觉鲁棒性与推理性能的解耦现象
analysis.experiments: 在多个代表性OmniLLM上评估，最强闭源模型Gemini 3.1 Pro通用任务准确率68.29%，最佳开源模型Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0准确率51.70%。
limitations: 基准仅包含英文视频和选择题格式，可能限制泛化性
未提供模型在幻觉鲁棒性上的具体指标
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估长音频-视觉视频多跳轨迹推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。

papers.title: Beyond Defenses: Manifold-Aligned Regularization for Intrinsic 3D Point Cloud Robustness
papers.abstract: Despite extensive progress in point cloud robustness, existing methods primarily improve performance through augmentation or defense mechanisms, while overlooking the geometric root cause of adversarial fragility. We hypothesize that adversarial vulnerability in 3D networks arises from a manifold misalignment between the latent geometry learned by the model and the intrinsic geometry of the underlying surface. Small, geometry-preserving perturbations along the input manifold often induce disproportionate distortions in feature space, revealing a misalignment between latent and intrinsic geometries. We formalize this phenomenon by developing a geometric interpretation of 3D robustness that links classical adversarial theory to the intrinsic structure of point clouds. Motivated by this analysis, we introduce Manifold-Aligned Point Recognition (MAPR), a framework that regularizes the latent geometry by aligning predictions across intrinsic perturbations. MAPR augments each point cloud with intrinsic features capturing local curvature and diffusion structure, and applies a consistency loss that preserves invariance to intrinsic, geometry-preserving perturbations. Without relying on adversarial training or additional data, MAPR consistently improves robustness across multiple adversarial attacks on both the ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN datasets, achieving average robustness gains of +20.02% and +8.58% on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 通过流形对齐正则化提升3D点云网络的内在鲁棒性，无需对抗训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D点云鲁棒性方法主要依赖数据增强或防御机制，忽略了对抗脆弱性的几何根源，即模型学习的潜在几何与底层表面的内在几何之间的流形错位。
analysis.problem: 解决3D点云网络对几何保持扰动的对抗脆弱性问题，即输入流形上的微小扰动在特征空间引起不成比例的扭曲。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到3D网络的对抗脆弱性源于潜在几何与内在几何的流形错位：沿输入流形的几何保持扰动导致特征空间中的大扭曲。
analysis.method: 提出流形对齐点识别（MAPR）框架，通过内在扰动正则化潜在几何：为每个点云提取内在特征（局部曲率和扩散结构），并应用一致性损失保持对几何保持扰动的不变性。
contributions: 形式化了3D鲁棒性的几何解释，将经典对抗理论与点云内在结构联系起来。
提出MAPR框架，无需对抗训练或额外数据即可持续提升鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在ModelNet40和ScanObjectNN数据集上，针对多种对抗攻击，MAPR分别实现了平均+20.02%和+8.58%的鲁棒性提升。
limitations: 可能对非几何保持的对抗攻击效果有限。
内在特征提取的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过流形对齐正则化提升3D点云网络的内在鲁棒性，无需对抗训练。

papers.title: Response-G1: Explicit Scene Graph Modeling for Proactive Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Proactive streaming video understanding requires Video-LLMs to decide when to respond as a video unfolds, a task where existing methods often fall short due to their implicit, query-agnostic modeling of visual evidence. We introduce Response-G1, a novel framework that establishes explicit, structured alignment between the accumulated video evidence and the query's expected response conditions via scene graphs. The framework operates in three fine-tuning-free stages: (1) online query-guided scene graph generation from streaming clips; (2) memory-based retrieval of the most semantically relevant historical scene graphs; and (3) retrieval-augmented trigger prompting for per-frame "silence/response" this http URL grounding both evidence and conditions in a shared graph representation, Response-G1 achieves more interpretable and accurate response timing decisions. Experimental results on established benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our method in both proactive and reactive tasks, validating the advantage of explicit scene graph modeling and retrieval in streaming video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出显式场景图建模框架Response-G1，实现流式视频理解中的主动响应决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流式视频理解方法依赖隐式、查询无关的视觉证据建模，难以在视频播放过程中准确判断何时响应。
analysis.problem: 流式视频理解中，Video-LLM需要决定何时响应，但现有方法缺乏显式、结构化的证据与查询条件对齐机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段免微调框架：在线查询引导的场景图生成、基于记忆的历史场景图检索、检索增强的触发提示，实现逐帧静默/响应决策。
contributions: 提出显式场景图建模方法，实现证据与查询条件的结构化对齐。
设计免微调的三阶段框架，提升流式视频理解中响应决策的可解释性和准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在已有基准上，方法在主动和被动任务中均表现优越。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖场景图生成质量，可能受限于复杂场景。
记忆检索机制可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出显式场景图建模框架Response-G1，实现流式视频理解中的主动响应决策。

papers.title: PolarVLM: Bridging the Semantic-Physical Gap in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Mainstream vision-language models (VLMs) fundamentally struggle with severe optical ambiguities, such as reflections and transparent objects, due to the inherent limitations of standard RGB inputs. While polarization imaging captures polarimetric physical parameters that resolve these ambiguities, existing methods are constrained by fixed-format outputs and remain isolated from open-ended reasoning. To bridge this semantic-physical gap, we introduce PolarVLM, the first multimodal framework integrating polarimetric physical parameters into VLMs. By employing a dual-stream architecture and a progressive two-stage training strategy, PolarVLM effectively prevents physical misinterpretations while preserving general visual abilities. Complementing our architecture, we construct PolarVQA, the first benchmark for polarization-aware VQA, featuring 75K physics-grounded instruction-tuning pairs targeting reflective and transparent scenes. Experiments show that PolarVLM surpasses the RGB baseline by 25.4% overall across five evaluation tasks, with remarkable gains of 26.6% in reflection recognition and 34.0% in glass counting, successfully unlocking physics-aware semantic understanding.

analysis.tldr: 将偏振物理参数融入VLM，通过双流架构和两阶段训练弥合语义-物理鸿沟，在反射/透明场景中显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准RGB输入存在严重光学歧义（如反射、透明物体），而偏振成像虽能解决但未与开放推理结合，现有方法受限于固定格式输出。
analysis.problem: 如何将偏振物理参数有效集成到VLM中，实现物理感知的开放语义理解，同时避免物理参数被错误解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准VLM在反射和透明场景中表现差，偏振参数可解决歧义但直接集成会导致物理误解。
analysis.method: 提出双流架构（偏振物理参数流+RGB视觉流）和渐进式两阶段训练策略，并构建首个偏振感知VQA基准PolarVQA（75K指令对）。
contributions: 首个将偏振物理参数集成到VLM的多模态框架PolarVLM
构建偏振感知VQA基准PolarVQA，含75K物理引导的指令微调对
analysis.experiments: 在五个评估任务上，PolarVLM整体超越RGB基线25.4%，反射识别提升26.6%，玻璃计数提升34.0%。
limitations: 仅针对反射和透明场景，泛化性未知
依赖偏振相机硬件，部署成本较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将偏振物理参数融入VLM，通过双流架构和两阶段训练弥合语义-物理鸿沟，在反射/透明场景中显著提升性能。

papers.title: Tracing the Arrow of Time: Diagnosing Temporal Information Flow in Video-LLMs
papers.abstract: The Arrow-of-Time (AoT) task, determining whether a video plays forward or backward by recognizing temporal irreversibility, is one humans solve with near-perfect accuracy, yet frontier Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) perform only modestly above chance. This gap raises a key question: do visual backbones fail to encode temporal information, or does information bottleneck lie elsewhere in the Video-LLM architecture? We address this question by isolating the vision encoder from the Video-LLM and tracing temporal information across the encoder, projector, and LLM. We find that video-centric encoders with explicit temporal modeling encode strong temporal signals, whereas frame-centric encoders do not. However, when video-centric representations are passed through a standard Video-LLM architecture, performance often collapses, revealing a bottleneck of temporal information flow. We identify projector design as a key factor: Q-Former disrupts temporal information, while a time-preserved MLP projection substantially improves the LLM's access to such information. Our layer-wise analysis further shows temporal representation dynamics across encoder layers. Guided by these findings, we build a Video-LLM with temporal-aware video-centric encoder, time-preserved projector, and AoT supervision, surpassing human performance on AoT$_{PPB}$ with 98.1\% accuracy, and improving broader temporal reasoning tasks by up to 6.0 points on VITATECS-Direction and 1.3 points on TVBench. Our results show that temporal reasoning in Video-LLMs requires both effective temporal encoding and reliable transfer of this information to the LLM.

analysis.tldr: 视频-LLM在时间箭头任务上表现不佳，瓶颈在于投影器设计而非视觉编码器。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类几乎能完美判断视频是否正放或倒放，但前沿视频-LLM仅略高于随机水平，揭示出时间推理能力的显著差距，亟需诊断信息流瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 确定视频-LLM中时间信息流瓶颈的位置：是视觉编码器未能编码时间信息，还是信息在编码器、投影器或LLM其他部分丢失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：视频中心编码器（含显式时间建模）能编码强时间信号，但通过标准视频-LLM架构后性能下降；帧中心编码器则无法编码时间信号。投影器设计是关键：Q-Former破坏时间信息，而时间保持的MLP投影器改善LLM对时间信息的访问。
analysis.method: 隔离视觉编码器，追踪时间信息在编码器、投影器和LLM中的流动；基于诊断发现构建视频-LLM，包含时间感知视频中心编码器、时间保持投影器和AoT监督。
contributions: 诊断出视频-LLM中时间信息流瓶颈在于投影器设计，而非视觉编码器。
提出时间保持的MLP投影器替代Q-Former，显著提升时间信息传递。
构建的视频-LLM在AoT任务上超越人类（98.1%准确率），并提升其他时间推理任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在AoT_PPB、VITATECS-Direction和TVBench上评估，AoT_PPB准确率98.1%超越人类，VITATECS-Direction提升6.0点，TVBench提升1.3点。
limitations: 仅针对时间箭头任务诊断，可能不适用于其他时间推理任务。
投影器设计改进可能依赖特定编码器架构，泛化性需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视频-LLM在时间箭头任务上表现不佳，瓶颈在于投影器设计而非视觉编码器。

papers.title: Beyond GSD-as-Token: Continuous Scale Conditioning for Remote Sensing VLMs
papers.abstract: Remote sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs) face a fundamental mismatch with natural-image counterparts: the same geographic object exhibits radically different visual evidence across ground sampling distances (GSDs) spanning multiple orders of magnitude. Yet existing RS-VLMs often discard GSD or inject it as a discrete text token, forcing a single static parameter set to absorb the entire scale spectrum. We introduce ScaleEarth, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework built on Qwen3-VL that treats GSD as a continuous conditioning variable governing the model's computation path. At its core, CS-HLoRA (Continuous Scale-Conditioned Hyper-LoRA) modulates the LoRA low-rank subspace through a GSD-driven gate, enabling the model to dynamically route computation by physical scale. To remove reliance on sensor metadata at deployment, we pair CS-HLoRA with SSE-U, a lightweight heteroscedastic sub-head that predicts GSD and its uncertainty from visual features. To provide matching supervision, we construct GeoScale-VQA, a 1.5M-sample scale-layered RS-VQA corpus whose question-answer generation is conditioned on the same physical scalar that drives CS-HLoRA, forming a closed method-data loop. Trained with QLoRA on an 8B backbone, ScaleEarth achieves state-of-the-art results on remote-sensing benchmarks covering diverse Earth-system tasks, including XLRS-Bench and OmniEarth-Bench.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续尺度条件框架ScaleEarth，将地面采样距离作为连续条件变量注入遥感VLM，实现尺度自适应计算。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中同一地物在不同地面采样距离（GSD）下视觉差异巨大，现有RS-VLM要么丢弃GSD信息，要么将其作为离散文本标记注入，导致模型无法有效处理多尺度场景。
analysis.problem: 如何将GSD作为连续条件变量融入遥感VLM，使其能够根据物理尺度动态调整计算路径，并消除部署时对传感器元数据的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ScaleEarth框架，包含CS-HLoRA（连续尺度条件超LoRA）通过GSD驱动的门控调制LoRA低秩子空间，以及SSE-U（异方差子头）从视觉特征预测GSD及其不确定性；同时构建GeoScale-VQA数据集形成闭环。
contributions: 提出CS-HLoRA，将GSD作为连续条件变量动态路由计算路径。
提出SSE-U，从视觉特征预测GSD及其不确定性，消除部署时对元数据的依赖。
构建GeoScale-VQA，1.5M样本的尺度分层遥感VQA语料库。
analysis.experiments: 在XLRS-Bench和OmniEarth-Bench等遥感基准上达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定骨干网络Qwen3-VL，泛化性需验证。
SSE-U的预测精度可能受视觉特征质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续尺度条件框架ScaleEarth，将地面采样距离作为连续条件变量注入遥感VLM，实现尺度自适应计算。

papers.title: Multimodal Stepwise Clinically-Guided Attention Learning for Pathological Complete Response Prediction in Breast Cancer
papers.abstract: Pathological complete response (pCR) is a key prognostic factor in breast cancer patients undergoing neoadjuvant therapy, strongly associated with long-term survival and treatment personalization. However, accurate pre-treatment pCR prediction remains challenging due to severe class imbalance and limited generalizability across diverse clinical settings. In this work, we propose a multimodal stepwise clinically-guided attention learning framework for pCR prediction from breast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), designed to address these limitations through medically grounded spatial guidance and multimodal integration. The approach follows a stepwise training strategy inspired by physician reasoning: the model first learns global discriminative imaging patterns, then attention mechanisms are introduced to constrain the network toward tumor regions, and finally clinical variables are integrated to refine decision-making. This guidance strategy encourages prioritization of task-relevant features, improving identification of responders despite their limited representation in the dataset. Moreover, grounding attention in anatomically consistent tumor regions reduces reliance on dataset-specific patterns, thereby enhancing cross-institutional generalization. The framework is evaluated through external validation across heterogeneous MRI cohorts. Compared to non-guided single-stage baselines, the proposed approach improves sensitivity while maintaining competitive specificity, and produces anatomically coherent attention maps that support interpretation of the model's predictions. These findings highlight the potential of clinically-guided multimodal attention learning for robust and generalizable pCR prediction in breast cancer.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态逐步临床引导注意力学习框架，提升乳腺癌病理完全缓解预测的准确性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理完全缓解（pCR）是乳腺癌新辅助治疗的关键预后因素，但术前准确预测面临严重类别不平衡和跨机构泛化性差的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态MRI和临床变量，在类别不平衡下准确预测pCR并提升跨机构泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出逐步训练策略：先学习全局判别影像模式，再引入注意力机制约束网络关注肿瘤区域，最后整合临床变量优化决策。
contributions: 提出多模态逐步临床引导注意力学习框架，通过医学空间引导和多模态集成提升pCR预测性能。
通过外部验证证明该方法在异质性MRI队列中提高了敏感性，同时保持特异性，并产生解剖一致的注意力图。
analysis.experiments: 在异质性MRI队列上进行外部验证，与无引导单阶段基线相比，提高了敏感性并保持了竞争性特异性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量肿瘤区域标注。
外部验证队列的异质性可能影响结论的普适性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态逐步临床引导注意力学习框架，提升乳腺癌病理完全缓解预测的准确性和泛化性。

papers.title: Dynamic Mode Decomposition along Depth in Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that contiguous vision transformer (ViT) blocks (a) can be replaced by a linear map and (b) organize into recurrent phases of computation. We ask whether these observations coincide: does ViT depth implement approximately \textit{autonomous linear} dynamics, admitting a single operator $K$ applied recurrently across a contiguous span? We test this using Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD), which fits $K$ from selected, consecutive hidden-state pairs and predicts $p$ steps ahead via $K^p$. On four pretrained DINO ViTs, we study the regularization, rank, and calibration budget required for stable fitting. For short spans ($p \leq 4$), $K^p$ tracks an unconstrained endpoint map to within $0.02$ cosine similarity on DINOv3-H/16+, while also recovering intermediate activations at each skipped block. At early cut starts, the fitted operators compress to rank $\ll d$ with minimal calibration data, and across tokens, \texttt{cls} is most amenable to linearization; both properties decay monotonically with depth. Yet this local fidelity does not transfer downstream. At the final hidden state, after propagating through the remaining blocks, an identity baseline becomes competitive.

analysis.tldr: ViT深度中存在局部自治线性动力学，但下游任务中恒等映射基线即可匹敌。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前工作发现ViT块可被线性映射替代并呈现循环计算阶段，但两者是否一致尚不清楚，探索深度方向是否实现自治线性动力学有助于理解ViT内部机制。
analysis.problem: 验证ViT深度方向是否实现近似自治线性动力学，即是否存在单一算子K可递归应用于连续跨度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 短跨度（p≤4）下K^p能高精度跟踪无约束端点映射（余弦相似度0.02内），且恢复中间激活；早期切分处算子压缩至低秩，cls令牌最易线性化，但这些性质随深度单调衰减；局部保真度不传递至下游任务，最终隐藏状态处恒等映射基线具有竞争力。
analysis.method: 使用动态模式分解（DMD）从选定的连续隐藏状态对拟合算子K，并通过K^p预测p步。
contributions: 发现ViT深度在短跨度内存在局部自治线性动力学，且算子可低秩压缩
揭示局部线性保真度不传递至下游任务，恒等映射基线在下游具有竞争力
analysis.experiments: 在四个预训练DINO ViT上研究正则化、秩和校准预算对稳定拟合的影响。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对DINO ViT系列，可能不泛化至其他ViT变体
未深入分析下游任务中恒等映射基线为何具有竞争力
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViT深度中存在局部自治线性动力学，但下游任务中恒等映射基线即可匹敌。

papers.title: VIMCAN: Visual-Inertial 3D Human Pose Estimation with Hybrid Mamba-Cross-Attention Network
papers.abstract: The rapid advances in deep learning have significantly enhanced the accuracy of multimodal 3D human pose estimation (HPE). However, the state-of-the-art (SOTA) HPE pipelines still rely on Transformers, whose quadratic complexity makes real-time processing for long sequences impractical. Mamba addresses this issue through selective state-space modeling, enabling efficient sequence processing without sacrificing representational power. Nevertheless, it struggles to capture complex spatial dependencies in multimodal settings. To bridge this gap, we propose VIMCAN, a hybrid architecture that combines the efficient sequence modeling of Mamba with the spatial reasoning of Cross-Attention, and performs robust visual-inertial fusion and human pose estimation between RGB keypoints and wearable IMU data. By leveraging Mamba's dynamic parameterization for temporal modeling and Attention for spatial dependency extraction, VIMCAN achieves superior accuracy, with mean per-joint position errors (MPJPE) of 17.2 mm on TotalCapture and 45.3 mm on 3DPW. VIMCAN outperforms prior Transformer-based and other SOTA approaches while supporting real-time inference at over 60 frames per second on consumer-grade hardware. The source code is available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合Mamba-交叉注意力网络VIMCAN，实现高效实时的多模态3D人体姿态估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Transformer的3D人体姿态估计方法在处理长序列时计算复杂度高，难以实现实时处理；而纯Mamba模型在捕捉多模态空间依赖方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能高效处理长序列又能充分捕捉多模态空间依赖的3D人体姿态估计架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Mamba在时序建模上高效但空间依赖捕捉弱，Transformer空间推理强但计算复杂度高。
analysis.method: 提出VIMCAN混合架构，结合Mamba的时序建模与交叉注意力的空间推理，融合RGB关键点和IMU数据进行姿态估计。
contributions: 提出VIMCAN混合架构，融合Mamba和交叉注意力实现高效多模态3D人体姿态估计。
在TotalCapture和3DPW数据集上达到SOTA精度，并支持消费级硬件上60 FPS以上的实时推理。
analysis.experiments: 在TotalCapture和3DPW数据集上评估，MPJPE分别为17.2 mm和45.3 mm，优于先前基于Transformer和其他SOTA方法，并实现实时推理。
limitations: 可能对IMU数据质量敏感。
未在更多样化的场景或极端姿态下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合Mamba-交叉注意力网络VIMCAN，实现高效实时的多模态3D人体姿态估计。

papers.title: Mind the Gap: Geometrically Accurate Generative Reconstruction from Disjoint Views
papers.abstract: 3D vision systems are fundamentally constrained by their reliance on visual overlap: reconstruction methods require it for geometric alignment, while generative models use it to enforce multi-view consistency. This limitation is particularly acute in real-world scenarios such as distributed swarm robotics or crowd-sourced data collection, where capturing overlapping perspectives, both in terms of spatial and appearance overlap, is often impossible. We introduce Generative Reconstruction from Disjoint Views as a new paradigm, establish a comprehensive dataset, and propose specialized evaluation metrics for zero-overlap scenarios. Our benchmarking demonstrates that existing state-of-the-art methods fail catastrophically on this task, producing disconnected geometries or semantically incoherent reconstructions. To address these limitations, we propose GLADOS, a general, modular framework that operates through three stages: (1) Generative Bridging, where foundation models synthesize intermediate perspectives to connect disjoint inputs; (2) Robust Coarse 3D Reconstruction, that establish coarse geometric scaffold via global alignment which absorbs local contradictions from generative process; and (3) Iterative Context Expansion and Consistency Optimization to fill missing regions and unify the reconstruction. As an architectureagnostic framework, GLADOS enables seamless integration of future advances in generation, reconstruction, and inpainting. The source code is available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出无重叠视角下的生成式三维重建新范式，通过生成中间视角连接不连续输入，实现几何精确重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D视觉方法依赖视觉重叠进行几何对齐或多视图一致性，但在分布式机器人或众包数据采集等真实场景中，获取重叠视角往往不可行，限制了应用范围。
analysis.problem: 解决从无重叠（零重叠）的多个视角图像进行几何精确的三维重建问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有最先进方法在无重叠视角任务上完全失败，产生不连续的几何结构或语义不一致的重建。
analysis.method: 提出GLADOS框架，包含三个阶段：1) 生成式桥接：利用基础模型合成中间视角连接不连续输入；2) 鲁棒粗3D重建：通过全局对齐建立粗几何骨架，吸收生成过程中的局部矛盾；3) 迭代上下文扩展与一致性优化：填充缺失区域并统一重建。
contributions: 提出无重叠视角生成式重建的新范式，并建立综合数据集和专用评估指标。
提出GLADOS框架，模块化且与架构无关，可集成未来生成、重建和修复的进展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及基准测试显示现有方法失败，GLADOS有效。
limitations: 依赖基础模型的生成质量，可能引入伪影。
迭代优化阶段计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无重叠视角下的生成式三维重建新范式，通过生成中间视角连接不连续输入，实现几何精确重建。

papers.title: Probabilistic Object Detection with Conformal Prediction
papers.abstract: Conformal Prediction (CP) is a distribution-free method for constructing prediction sets with marginal finite-sample coverage guarantees, making it a suitable framework for reliable uncertainty quantification in safety-critical object detection. However, object detection introduces structured multi-output predictions, complicating the application of classical CP theory developed for single outputs. In addition, standard, unscaled CP produces fixed-width prediction intervals across inputs, leading to unnecessary width for low-uncertainty predictions. While scaled CP addresses this by adapting the interval width to an input-dependent uncertainty estimate, prior work has neither systematically compared unscaled and scaled CP for multi-class object detection, nor integrated CP with a complementary uncertainty quantification method in this setting. We fill this gap by: (i) applying CP coordinate-wise to bounding box corners with a Bonferroni correction for box-level guarantees; (ii) scaling the resulting intervals using per-prediction aleatoric uncertainty estimates derived from a probabilistic object detector trained with loss attenuation, evaluated in uncalibrated and two calibrated variants; (iii) extending to a two-step pipeline that constructs prediction sets for the class using RAPS and conditions the conformalized bounding boxes on the predicted class set. Across three autonomous driving datasets (KITTI, BDD, CODA), including a cross-domain setting under distribution shift, scaled CP consistently improves interval sharpness over unscaled CP, achieving up to 19% higher IoU and 39% lower interval scores, without sacrificing coverage. Class-wise calibration further improves coverage for both variants with a negligible effect on sharpness. Together, these improvements yield more actionable uncertainty estimates for real-time, real-world object detection.

analysis.tldr: 将保形预测与概率目标检测结合，通过缩放预测区间和两步流水线实现更锐利的不确定性量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全关键的目标检测需要可靠的 uncertainty 量化，但经典保形预测（CP）针对单输出设计，难以直接应用于结构化多输出目标检测，且标准 CP 产生固定宽度区间，对低不确定性预测不必要地宽。
analysis.problem: 如何将保形预测适配到多类目标检测，并利用概率检测器的 aleatoric 不确定性估计来缩放区间，同时保持覆盖保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准 CP 产生固定宽度区间，缩放 CP 可适应输入依赖的不确定性，但先前工作未系统比较两者在多类目标检测中的表现，也未与互补的不确定性量化方法集成。
analysis.method: 对边界框坐标逐坐标应用 CP 并用 Bonferroni 校正；利用概率检测器的 aleatoric 不确定性估计缩放区间；扩展为两步流水线：先用 RAPS 构建类别预测集，再对边界框进行条件化 CP。
contributions: 系统比较了未缩放和缩放 CP 在多类目标检测中的表现，并集成了概率检测器的不确定性估计。
提出了两步流水线，结合类别集预测和条件化边界框 CP，提升了区间锐利度。
analysis.experiments: 在 KITTI、BDD、CODA 三个自动驾驶数据集上评估，包括跨域分布偏移场景，缩放 CP 相比未缩放 CP 实现高达 19% 的 IoU 提升和 39% 的区间分数降低，且不牺牲覆盖率。
limitations: 方法依赖于概率检测器提供的 aleatoric 不确定性估计，可能受检测器质量影响。
Bonferroni 校正可能过于保守，导致区间偏宽。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将保形预测与概率目标检测结合，通过缩放预测区间和两步流水线实现更锐利的不确定性量化。

papers.title: Implicit Preference Alignment for Human Image Animation
papers.abstract: Human image animation has witnessed significant advancements, yet generating high-fidelity hand motions remains a persistent challenge due to their high degrees of freedom and motion complexity. While reinforcement learning from human feedback, particularly direct preference optimization, offers a potential solution, it necessitates the construction of strict preference pairs. However, curating such pairs for dynamic hand regions is prohibitively expensive and often impractical due to frame-wise inconsistencies. In this paper, we propose Implicit Preference Alignment (IPA), a data-efficient post-training framework that eliminates the need for paired preference data. Theoretically grounded in implicit reward maximization, IPA aligns the model by maximizing the likelihood of self-generated high-quality samples while penalizing deviations from the pretrained prior. Furthermore, we introduce a Hand-Aware Local Optimization mechanism to explicitly steer the alignment process toward hand regions. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves effective preference optimization to enhance hand generation quality, while significantly lowering the barrier for constructing preference data. Codes are released at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出隐式偏好对齐框架，无需配对偏好数据即可提升人体图像动画中手部生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 人体图像动画中手部运动生成因自由度大、复杂度高而质量不佳，现有偏好对齐方法需要构建严格的偏好对，但手部区域帧级不一致导致数据构建成本极高且不实用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖配对偏好数据的情况下，通过偏好对齐提升人体图像动画中手部区域的生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 手部运动具有高自由度和复杂性，导致生成高保真手部运动困难；构建手部区域的严格偏好对因帧级不一致而成本高昂且不切实际。
analysis.method: 提出隐式偏好对齐（IPA）框架，基于隐式奖励最大化理论，通过最大化自生成高质量样本的似然并惩罚偏离预训练先验来实现对齐，并引入手部感知局部优化机制显式引导对齐过程聚焦于手部区域。
contributions: 提出数据高效的隐式偏好对齐框架，无需配对偏好数据即可实现偏好优化。
引入手部感知局部优化机制，显式提升手部区域生成质量。
理论证明方法基于隐式奖励最大化，实验验证有效降低偏好数据构建门槛并提升手部生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在手部区域验证，其他身体部位效果未知。
隐式奖励最大化的理论假设可能在某些场景下不成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出隐式偏好对齐框架，无需配对偏好数据即可提升人体图像动画中手部生成质量。

papers.title: Hierarchical Dual-Subspace Decoupling for Continual Learning in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Class-incremental learning aims to continuously acquire new knowledge while preserving previously learned information, thereby mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods primarily restrict parameter updates but often overlook their structural properties in high-dimensional spaces. From a subspace perspective, updates induced by different tasks tend to lie in multiple overlapping low-rank subspaces, leading to cross-task subspace interference and severe forgetting. To address this issue, we propose HDSD, a Hierarchical Dual-Subspace Decoupling framework for continual learning in vision-language models. Specifically, we introduce a lightweight Feature Modulation Module (FMM) that explicitly decomposes the parameter space into general and task-specific subspaces. Building on this design, we develop two complementary components. First, a General Fusion Module (GFM) evaluates relative parameter changes across tasks and uses an adaptive threshold to capture stable and transferable knowledge. Second, a Hierarchical Learning Module (HLM) performs structured parameter decomposition via Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) and uses a scaling mechanism to constrain updates within distinct subspace scales. Together, these designs reduce subspace interference and parameter drift. Extensive experiments on conventional benchmarks show that HDSD achieves state-of-the-art results.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化双子空间解耦框架HDSD，通过分解参数空间为通用与任务特定子空间来缓解视觉-语言模型类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有类增量学习方法主要限制参数更新，但忽略了高维空间中参数的结构特性，导致跨任务子空间干扰和严重遗忘。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉-语言模型在类增量学习中因跨任务子空间干扰导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同任务引起的参数更新倾向于位于多个重叠的低秩子空间中，导致跨任务子空间干扰和严重遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出HDSD框架，包含特征调制模块（FMM）将参数空间分解为通用和任务特定子空间，通用融合模块（GFM）通过自适应阈值捕获稳定可迁移知识，层次学习模块（HLM）通过SVD进行结构化参数分解并利用缩放机制约束更新。
contributions: 提出层次化双子空间解耦框架，显式分解参数空间为通用和任务特定子空间以减少干扰。
设计通用融合模块和层次学习模块，分别实现稳定知识捕获和结构化参数更新约束。
analysis.experiments: 在传统基准上进行了大量实验，HDSD达到了最先进的结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉-语言模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
SVD分解和自适应阈值可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化双子空间解耦框架HDSD，通过分解参数空间为通用与任务特定子空间来缓解视觉-语言模型类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: InterLV-Search: Benchmarking Interleaved Multimodal Agentic Search
papers.abstract: Existing benchmarks for multimodal agentic search evaluate multimodal search and visual browsing, but visual evidence is either confined to the input or treated as an answer endpoint rather than part of an interleaved search trajectory. We introduce \textbf{InterLV-Search}, a benchmark for Interleaved Language-Vision Agentic Search, in which textual and visual evidence is repeatedly used to condition later search. It contains 2,061 examples across three levels: active visual evidence seeking, controlled offline interleaved multimodal search, and open-web interleaved multimodal search. Beyond existing benchmarks, it also includes multimodal multi-branch samples that involve comparison between multiple entities during the evidence search. We construct Level 1 and Level 2 with automated pipelines and Level 3 with a machine-led, human-supervised open-web pipeline. We further provide InterLV-Agent for standardized tool use, trajectory logging, and evaluation. Experiments on proprietary and open-source multimodal agents show that current systems remain far from solving interleaved multimodal search, with the best model below 50% overall accuracy, highlighting challenges in visual evidence seeking, search control, and multimodal evidence integration. We release the benchmark data and evaluation code at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出 InterLV-Search 基准，评估多模态智能体在交错语言-视觉搜索中的表现，发现现有模型准确率低于 50%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态智能体搜索基准将视觉证据局限于输入或作为答案终点，未考虑交错搜索轨迹中文本和视觉证据的反复利用，缺乏对复杂搜索能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个包含多层级、多分支交错搜索场景的基准，以评估多模态智能体在主动视觉证据寻求、离线/在线交错搜索中的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 InterLV-Search 基准，包含三个层级（主动视觉证据寻求、受控离线交错搜索、开放网页交错搜索）和 2,061 个样本，并设计自动化流水线生成数据，提供标准化工具 InterLV-Agent 用于评估。
contributions: 提出 InterLV-Search 基准，覆盖多层级交错多模态搜索任务，包含多分支比较样本。
提供自动化数据构建流水线和标准化评估工具 InterLV-Agent。
实验揭示现有多模态智能体在交错搜索任务上表现不足，最佳模型准确率低于 50%。
analysis.experiments: 在闭源和开源多模态智能体上进行实验，最佳模型整体准确率低于 50%。
limitations: 基准规模有限（2,061 样本），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
自动构建的流水线可能引入噪声或偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 InterLV-Search 基准，评估多模态智能体在交错语言-视觉搜索中的表现，发现现有模型准确率低于 50%。

papers.title: Diffusion-APO: Trajectory-Aware Direct Preference Alignment for Video Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Efficiently aligning large-scale video diffusion models with human intent requires a scalable and trajectory-aware pathway that bridges the inherent discrepancy between training noise distributions and practical inference trajectories. While existing paradigms such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) attempt to address this, they are often hindered by either reliance on bias-prone, complex reward models or suboptimal timestep sampling. In this paper, we propose Diffusion-APO (Aligned Preference Optimization), a trajectory-aware algorithm that resolves this misalignment by synchronizing training noise with inference-time denoising paths to maximize gradient signal efficacy. To translate this algorithmic innovation into a practical solution, we introduce a unified and modular RLHF framework that integrates online ranking, half-online anchoring, offline refinement, and distillation-aware drift correction. This framework enables flexible, multi-stage preference alignment across diverse data and computational constraints without relying on scalar-reward-based policy gradients. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that Diffusion-APO consistently outperforms standard baselines in visual quality and instruction following, while effectively preserving generative fidelity during model acceleration, providing a robust, end-to-end pathway for scalable video diffusion alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出轨迹感知的偏好对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，通过同步训练噪声与推理去噪路径，提升视频扩散模型的视觉质量和指令遵循能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型对齐方法（如DPO、GRPO）受限于有偏的奖励模型或次优的时间步采样，难以高效对齐人类意图。
analysis.problem: 训练噪声分布与推理轨迹之间的固有差异导致对齐效率低下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出轨迹感知的偏好对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，通过同步训练噪声与推理去噪路径最大化梯度信号效能，并构建统一模块化RLHF框架（在线排序、半在线锚定、离线精炼、蒸馏感知漂移校正）。
contributions: 提出轨迹感知的对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，解决训练与推理噪声分布不匹配问题。
设计模块化RLHF框架，无需标量奖励策略梯度即可实现多阶段偏好对齐。
analysis.experiments: 通过大量实验证明，Diffusion-APO 在视觉质量和指令遵循上持续优于标准基线，并在模型加速时有效保持生成保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频扩散模型架构（如DiT），泛化性需验证。
多阶段框架的复杂度可能增加训练开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轨迹感知的偏好对齐算法 Diffusion-APO，通过同步训练噪声与推理去噪路径，提升视频扩散模型的视觉质量和指令遵循能力。

papers.title: Cloud-top infrared observations reveal the four-dimensional precipitation structure
papers.abstract: Accurate four-dimensional (4D) precipitation information is essential for understanding the Earth's energy and water cycles, yet remains observationally unresolved at global scales. Conventional theory holds that geostationary infrared observations primarily sense cloud-top properties, with limited sensitivity to sub-cloud precipitation. Here we show that cloud-top infrared measurements nevertheless encode sufficient information to recover the four-dimensional structure of precipitation, revealing a previously unexploited observability of sub-cloud processes. We introduce a physically constrained deep learning framework, 4DPrecipNet, in which a moisture-first constraint requires the latent representation to recover precipitable water vapour, anchoring the model in thermodynamic consistency. By integrating multi-channel infrared radiances with these constraints and radar-derived precipitation profiles, we reconstruct the vertical and temporal evolution of precipitation systems from geostationary orbit. The framework captures deep convective structures and their evolution, with robust performance across large samples and independent radar comparisons. These results demonstrate that sub-cloud precipitation is physically encoded in cloud-top infrared observations, establishing a new pathway for continuous global monitoring of precipitation structure.

analysis.tldr: 云顶红外观测可解码降水四维结构，4DPrecipNet 实现全球连续监测。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球尺度上缺乏高分辨率四维降水观测，传统理论认为云顶红外数据对云下降水不敏感，但实际应用中需要更精确的降水结构信息。
analysis.problem: 如何从静止卫星云顶红外观测中恢复降水的四维（空间+时间）结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 云顶红外测量编码了足够信息以恢复云下降水过程，揭示了此前未开发的子云过程可观测性。
analysis.method: 提出物理约束的深度学习框架 4DPrecipNet，引入水分优先约束迫使潜在表示恢复可降水汽，整合多通道红外辐射、约束条件和雷达降水廓线，从静止轨道重建降水系统的垂直和时间演化。
contributions: 发现云顶红外观测可编码子云降水信息，建立新的全球降水监测途径。
提出 4DPrecipNet 框架，通过物理约束实现四维降水结构重建。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖雷达降水廓线作为训练目标，可能受雷达覆盖范围限制。
物理约束的普适性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 云顶红外观测可解码降水四维结构，4DPrecipNet 实现全球连续监测。

papers.title: Lightweight Unpaired Smartphone ISP Transfer with Semantic Pseudo-Pairing
papers.abstract: Unpaired smartphone ISP is a challenging problem due to the lack of scene and color alignment between RAW and target RGB images. Many existing methods either require paired data or rely heavily on adversarial training, which can become unstable in the unpaired setting. In this work, we present a simple and effective approach developed for the NTIRE 2026 Learned Smartphone ISP Challenge with Unpaired Data. Our method first reconstructs larger images from training patches to recover global context. Then, we extract semantic embeddings with DINOv2, and use fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW) optimal transport to build pseudo pairs between RAW and RGB images at both image and patch levels. This semantic matching allows us to partially alleviate the unpairedness of the data and build these pseudo input-target pairs. Based on these pseudo pairs, we train a lightweight CNN with only 7K parameters for color rendering. The network is designed to be compact and focus on color transformation rather than structural change, which helps reduce artifacts and improve training stability. Our challenge submission achieves 22.569 PSNR, 0.675 SSIM, and 8.067 $\Delta E$ on the final hidden test set, significantly improving over the baseline and achieving the 3rd best SSIM and $\Delta E$ among all challenge entries. Our code is available at this http URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级无配对智能手机ISP转换方法，通过语义伪配对和最优传输实现高效色彩渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 无配对智能手机ISP转换因RAW与RGB图像缺乏场景和颜色对齐而极具挑战，现有方法依赖配对数据或对抗训练，不稳定且效果有限。
analysis.problem: 解决无配对RAW与RGB图像之间的色彩渲染问题，实现轻量级且稳定的ISP转换。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先重建大图恢复全局上下文，再用DINOv2提取语义嵌入，通过融合Gromov-Wasserstein最优传输在图像和块级别构建伪配对，最后训练仅7K参数的轻量CNN进行色彩渲染。
contributions: 提出基于语义伪配对的无配对ISP转换框架，利用FGW最优传输缓解数据未配对问题。
设计超轻量CNN（7K参数）专注于色彩变换，减少伪影并提升训练稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026挑战隐藏测试集上达到22.569 PSNR、0.675 SSIM和8.067 ΔE，SSIM和ΔE排名第三。
limitations: 方法依赖DINOv2语义特征，可能受限于预训练模型领域差异。
仅针对智能手机ISP场景，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级无配对智能手机ISP转换方法，通过语义伪配对和最优传输实现高效色彩渲染。

papers.title: DIMoE-Adapters: Dynamic Expert Evolution for Continual Learning in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Continual learning enables vision-language models to accumulate knowledge and adapt to evolving tasks without retraining from scratch. However, in multi-domain task-incremental learning, large domain shifts intensify the stability-plasticity dilemma. Most existing methods rely on fixed architectures with statically allocated parameters, which limits adaptation to new domains and aggravates catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we propose DIMoE-Adapters, a Dynamic Incremental Mixture-of-Experts Adapters framework that introduces a dynamic expert evolution paradigm to balance stability and plasticity. This paradigm is implemented through two collaborative components: Self-Calibrated Expert Evolution (SCEE) and Prototype-Guided Expert Selection (PGES). SCEE constructs and evolves a sparse expert pool through expert optimization dynamics, improving plasticity while reducing redundant capacity. PGES controls expert utilization based on the pool shaped by SCEE, improving stability across both previously encountered and unseen tasks. Extensive experiments show that DIMoE-Adapters outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods across various settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态专家演化框架DIMoE-Adapters，通过自校准专家演化和原型引导专家选择缓解视觉-语言模型持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型在多领域任务增量学习中面临大领域偏移导致的稳定性-可塑性困境，现有方法依赖固定架构和静态参数分配，限制了新领域适应并加剧灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 如何设计动态专家演化机制，在持续学习中平衡稳定性与可塑性，同时避免冗余容量和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DIMoE-Adapters框架，包含两个协作组件：自校准专家演化（SCEE）通过专家优化动力学构建和演化稀疏专家池，提升可塑性并减少冗余容量；原型引导专家选择（PGES）基于SCEE形成的专家池控制专家利用，提升对已见和未见任务的稳定性。
contributions: 提出动态增量专家适配器框架DIMoE-Adapters，引入动态专家演化范式平衡稳定性与可塑性。
设计自校准专家演化（SCEE）和原型引导专家选择（PGES）两个协作组件，分别提升可塑性和稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种设置下的广泛实验表明，DIMoE-Adapters优于先前最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定专家初始化策略，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态演化机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态专家演化框架DIMoE-Adapters，通过自校准专家演化和原型引导专家选择缓解视觉-语言模型持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性困境。

papers.title: How Far Is Document Parsing from Solved? PureDocBench: A Source-TraceableBenchmark across Clean, Degraded, and Real-World Settings
papers.abstract: The past year has seen over 20 open-source document parsing models, yet thefield still benchmarks almost exclusively on OmniDocBench, a 1,355-pagemanually annotated dataset whose top scores have saturated above 90%. Athree-stage audit pipeline we run on OmniDocBench screens its 21,353evaluator-scored blocks and confirms 2,580 errors (12.08%); combined with overa year of public availability, both annotation quality and contamination riskcall its rankings into question. To address these issues, we presentPureDocBench, a programmatically generated, source-traceable benchmark thatrenders document images from HTML/CSS and produces verifiable annotations fromthe same source, covering 10 domains, 66 subcategories, and 1,475 pages, eachin three versions: clean, digitally degraded, and real-degraded (4,425 imagestotal). Evaluating 40 models spanning pipeline specialists, end-to-endspecialists, and general-purpose VLMs, we find: (i) document parsing is farfrom solved: the best model scores only ~74 out of 100, with a 44.6-point gapbetween the strongest and weakest models; (ii) specialist parsers with <=4Bparameters rival or surpass general VLMs that are 5-100x larger, yet formularecognition remains a shared bottleneck where no model exceeds 67% whenaveraging the formula metric across all three tracks; (iii) general VLMs loseonly 0.99/8.52 Overall points under digital/real degradation versus 4.90/14.21for pipeline specialists, producing ranking reversals that make clean-onlyevaluation misleading for deployment. All data, code, and artifacts arepublicly released.

analysis.tldr: 现有文档解析基准存在标注质量与污染风险，PureDocBench 通过程序化生成和源可追溯设计，揭示了当前模型在干净、退化及真实场景下远未解决的性能瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 文档解析领域虽涌现大量开源模型，但现有基准 OmniDocBench 存在标注错误率高（12.08%）和长期公开导致的污染风险，其饱和的分数无法反映真实能力，亟需更可靠、可追溯的评测基准。
analysis.problem: 构建一个干净、退化及真实场景下、源可追溯的文档解析基准，以准确评估模型性能并揭示现有方法的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：最佳模型仅得约74分，最强与最弱模型差距达44.6分；小参数专用解析器可匹敌大参数通用VLM，但公式识别是共同瓶颈（最高67%）；通用VLM在退化场景下性能下降更小，导致排名反转，仅用干净数据评测会误导部署决策。
analysis.method: PureDocBench：从HTML/CSS程序化生成文档图像，并自动产生可验证的标注，覆盖10个领域、66个子类、1475页，每页包含干净、数字退化、真实退化三个版本（共4425张图像）。
contributions: 提出PureDocBench，一个程序化生成、源可追溯的文档解析基准，包含干净、数字退化和真实退化三种设置，共4425张图像。
系统评估40个模型，揭示文档解析远未解决，最佳模型仅约74分，公式识别是共同瓶颈。
