发现通用VLM在退化场景下鲁棒性优于专用解析器，导致排名反转，强调多场景评测的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在PureDocBench上评估40个模型，包括流水线专用、端到端专用和通用VLM，报告了总体分数、公式识别分数及退化场景下的性能变化。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖10个领域，可能未涵盖所有文档类型。
程序化生成可能无法完全模拟真实文档的复杂布局和噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现有文档解析基准存在标注质量与污染风险，PureDocBench 通过程序化生成和源可追溯设计，揭示了当前模型在干净、退化及真实场景下远未解决的性能瓶颈。

papers.title: Implicit Multi-Camera System Calibration Using Gaussian Processes
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel framework for implicit multi-camera system calibration utilizing Gaussian Process (GP) regression. Conventional explicit calibration methods are constrained by rigid mathematical models and struggle with complex, non-linear distortions from unconventional optics, while existing neural network-based implicit approaches are typically data-hungry and lack inherent uncertainty quantification (UQ). Our GP-based model directly learns the complex, non-linear mapping from 2D image coordinates across all cameras to a 3D world coordinate, completely bypassing time-consuming estimation of explicit intrinsic and extrinsic parameters. Moreover, the inherent UQ is critical for transforming a simple 3D point prediction into a verifiable 3D measurement, complete with statistically-sound confidence bounds. To further enhance data efficiency and practical deployment, we integrate Active Learning (AL), which intelligently leverages the GP's predictive uncertainty to strategically guide the acquisition of new calibration data. This approach results in a robust, data-efficient, and reliable calibration solution, proving particularly effective in practical scenarios where collecting extensive calibration data is a dominant constraint. Our experiments show that the uncertainty for the 3D predictions is higher closer to the cameras. The data points in $uv$-coordinate space are more sparse in that region, even though they are not in 3D space. This work is relevant for anyone who is tasked with the calibration of complex multi-camera systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于高斯过程的隐式多相机系统标定方法，利用主动学习提升数据效率并输出不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统显式标定方法受限于刚性数学模型，难以处理复杂非线性畸变；现有基于神经网络的隐式方法数据需求大且缺乏不确定性量化。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、鲁棒地标定多相机系统，同时提供具有统计置信度的3D预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到靠近相机的区域3D预测不确定性更高，因为uv坐标空间的数据点更稀疏，尽管3D空间并不稀疏。
analysis.method: 使用高斯过程回归直接学习从所有相机的2D图像坐标到3D世界坐标的非线性映射，结合主动学习利用预测不确定性指导数据采集。
contributions: 提出基于GP的隐式多相机标定框架，无需显式估计内外参。
利用GP固有的不确定性量化将3D点预测转化为可验证的测量。
集成主动学习提升数据效率，适用于标定数据采集受限的场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对大规模相机系统计算开销较大。
主动学习策略的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于高斯过程的隐式多相机系统标定方法，利用主动学习提升数据效率并输出不确定性。

papers.title: AudioFace: Language-Assisted Speech-Driven Facial Animation with Multimodal Language Models
papers.abstract: Speech-driven facial animation requires accurate correspondence between acoustic signals and facial motion, especially for articulation-related mouth movements. However, directly mapping speech audio to facial coefficients often overlooks the linguistic and phonetic structure underlying speech production. In this paper, we propose AudioFace, a language-assisted framework for speech-driven blendshape generation that treats mouth-related facial coefficient prediction as a structured generation problem guided by linguistic and articulatory information. Instead of relying solely on acoustic features, our method leverages the prior knowledge of multimodal large language models and introduces transcript- and phoneme-level cues to bridge speech signals with interpretable facial actions. Extensive experiments show that AudioFace achieves superior performance across multiple evaluation metrics, validating the effectiveness of language-assisted and multimodal-prior-guided speech-driven facial animation.

analysis.tldr: 利用多模态大语言模型的语言先验知识，将语音驱动面部动画中的嘴部系数预测转化为结构化生成问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 语音驱动面部动画需要精确的声学-面部运动对应，但直接映射常忽略语音的语音学和音系学结构，导致嘴部动作不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语言和发音信息辅助语音到面部系数的预测，提升嘴部动画的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AudioFace框架，利用多模态大语言模型的先验知识，引入文本和音素级线索，将嘴部系数预测作为结构化生成问题。
contributions: 提出语言辅助的语音驱动面部动画框架AudioFace，利用多模态大语言模型先验知识。
引入文本和音素级线索，将嘴部系数预测转化为结构化生成问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本和音素标注。
多模态大语言模型的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多模态大语言模型的语言先验知识，将语音驱动面部动画中的嘴部系数预测转化为结构化生成问题。

papers.title: ReasonEdit: Towards Interpretable Image Editing Evaluation via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have achieved remarkable progress, however, many edited results still suffer from artifacts, unintended modifications, and suboptimal aesthetics. Although several benchmarks and evaluation methods have been proposed, most existing approaches rely on scalar scores and lack interpretability. This limitation largely stems from the absence of high-quality interpretation datasets for TIE and effective reward models to train interpretable evaluators. To address these challenges, we introduce ReasonEdit-22K, the first dataset that combines 22K edited images with 113K Chain-of-Thought (CoT) samples, along with 1.3M human judgments assessing these interpretations in terms of logicality, accuracy, and usefulness. Building upon this dataset, we propose RE-Reward, a multimodal large language model (MLLM)-based reward model designed to provide human-aligned feedback for evaluating interpretable reasoning in image editing. Furthermore, we develop ReasonEdit, which is trained using reward signals derived from RE-Reward and the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm to learn an interpretable evaluation model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReasonEdit achieves superior alignment with human preferences and exhibits strong generalization across public benchmarks. In addition, it is capable of generating high-quality interpretable evaluation text, enabling more transparent and trustworthy assessment for image editing. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出首个结合编辑图像与思维链解释的数据集及基于强化学习的可解释图像编辑评估模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑评估方法多依赖标量分数，缺乏可解释性，且缺少高质量的解释数据集和有效的奖励模型来训练可解释评估器。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可解释的图像编辑评估模型，使其能够生成符合人类偏好的推理过程并评估编辑质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建ReasonEdit-22K数据集（22K编辑图像+113K思维链样本+1.3M人类判断），提出RE-Reward多模态大模型奖励模型，并利用GRPO算法训练ReasonEdit可解释评估模型。
contributions: 首个结合编辑图像与思维链解释的数据集ReasonEdit-22K，包含大量人类判断标注。
提出RE-Reward奖励模型和ReasonEdit评估模型，通过强化学习实现可解释的图像编辑评估。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明ReasonEdit与人类偏好高度对齐，在公开基准上表现强泛化能力，并能生成高质量可解释评估文本。
limitations: 数据集规模可能限制模型泛化到更多编辑类型。
依赖思维链标注，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个结合编辑图像与思维链解释的数据集及基于强化学习的可解释图像编辑评估模型。

papers.title: ForgeVLA: Federated Vision-Language-Action Learning without Language Annotations
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models hold great promise for general-purpose robotic intelligence, yet scaling up such models is severely bottlenecked by the high cost of acquiring annotated training data. Fortunately, vision-equipped robots deployed across various domains already produce abundant vision-action pairs that can be leveraged to scale up VLA training more efficiently. However, these raw data cannot be centrally aggregated due to various constraints and also exhibit severe heterogeneity. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose ForgeVLA, a federated VLA training framework that learns VLA models from distributed vision-action pairs without centralizing raw data or requiring manual annotations. Specifically, each client in ForgeVLA is equipped with an embodied instruction classifier that maps vision-action pairs to a predefined instruction set, recovering the missing language modality and forming complete vision-language-action triplets. Beyond triplet construction, we also identify vision-language feature collapse as a critical challenge that has been largely overlooked in prior federated VLA research. To mitigate this issue, ForgeVLA combines a client-side contrastive planning loss with a server-side adaptive aggregation strategy to learn task-discriminative representations efficiently. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that ForgeVLA significantly outperforms other baselines, and ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component.

analysis.tldr: 提出联邦VLA训练框架ForgeVLA，无需语言标注即可从分布式视觉-动作对中学习，并解决视觉-语言特征坍缩问题。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型扩展受限于标注数据的高成本，而分布式机器人数据因隐私和异构性无法集中使用，且缺乏语言标注。
analysis.problem: 如何在不集中原始数据且无需人工标注的条件下，从分布式异构视觉-动作对中学习VLA模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉-语言特征坍缩是联邦VLA中未被充分关注的关键挑战。
analysis.method: 每个客户端使用具身指令分类器将视觉-动作对映射到预定义指令集，恢复语言模态；结合客户端对比规划损失和服务器端自适应聚合策略学习任务判别性表征。
contributions: 提出ForgeVLA，首个无需语言标注的联邦VLA训练框架
识别并缓解了联邦VLA中的视觉-语言特征坍缩问题
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上显著优于其他基线，消融实验验证了各组件贡献。
limitations: 依赖预定义指令集，可能限制泛化性
未讨论客户端异构性对分类器的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联邦VLA训练框架ForgeVLA，无需语言标注即可从分布式视觉-动作对中学习，并解决视觉-语言特征坍缩问题。

papers.title: A Unified Framework for the Detection and Classification of Fatty Pancreas in Ultrasound Images
papers.abstract: Non-alcoholic fatty pancreas disease (NAFPD) is an underdiagnosed condition associated with metabolic syndrome, insulin resistance, and increased risk of pancreatic cancer. Diagnosis typically relies on subjective visual assessment of ultrasound images by clinicians. We propose an end-to-end framework for automatically classifying normal versus fatty pancreas from abdominal ultrasound images. Our method employs a TransUNet-based segmentation architecture with a ResNet encoder and transformer bottleneck to delineate the pancreas and the splenic vein, followed by anatomically-guided patch extraction and patient-level classification through pairwise texture comparison. The feature engineering mimics clinical reasoning by comparing the echogenicity of peri-venous fat to the pancreatic parenchyma, providing an interpretable signal for classification. The segmentation models are initialized via domain-specific transfer learning from a liver segmentation task. We validate the full pipeline on a clinical dataset of 214 abdominal ultrasound images with 107 expert-labeled cases using 5-fold cross-validation. SVM with RBF kernel achieves a mean cross-validated accuracy of 89.7\%\,$\pm$\,1.8\% and F1 of 0.898\,$\pm$\,0.019, while the unsupervised K-Means baseline reaches 87.8\% accuracy, demonstrating that the proposed features capture the relevant clinical signal even without labeled training data. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end automated framework for fatty pancreas classification from ultrasound using segmentation-guided texture analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个端到端超声图像脂肪胰检测框架，通过分割引导的纹理分析实现高精度分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 非酒精性脂肪胰病（NAFPD）与代谢综合征、胰岛素抵抗及胰腺癌风险相关，但临床诊断依赖主观视觉评估，缺乏自动化工具。
analysis.problem: 从腹部超声图像中自动分类正常与脂肪胰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用TransUNet（ResNet编码器+Transformer瓶颈）分割胰腺和脾静脉，基于解剖引导的补丁提取和成对纹理比较进行患者级分类，特征工程模拟临床推理（比较静脉周围脂肪与胰腺实质的回声性），并通过领域特定迁移学习初始化分割模型。
contributions: 首个端到端超声图像脂肪胰自动分类框架，结合分割引导的纹理分析。
提出解剖引导的补丁提取和成对纹理比较方法，模拟临床推理，提供可解释信号。
在临床数据集上验证，SVM达到89.7%准确率，无监督K-Means基线达87.8%准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在214张腹部超声图像（107张专家标注）上使用5折交叉验证，SVM（RBF核）平均准确率89.7%±1.8%，F1为0.898±0.019；无监督K-Means基线准确率87.8%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（214张图像），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对超声图像，未验证其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个端到端超声图像脂肪胰检测框架，通过分割引导的纹理分析实现高精度分类。

papers.title: EditRefiner: A Human-Aligned Agentic Framework for Image Editing Refinement
papers.abstract: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have made remarkable progress, yet edited images still frequently suffer from fine-grained issues such as unnatural objects, lighting mismatch, and unexpected changes. Existing refinement approaches either rely on costly iterative regeneration or employ vision-language models (VLMs) with weak spatial grounding, often resulting in semantic drift and unreliable local corrections. To address these limitations, we first construct EditFHF-15K, a dataset of fine-grained human feedback for edited images, comprising (1) 15K images from 12 TIE models spanning 43 editing tasks, (2) 60K annotated artifact regions and 80K editing failure regions, each accompanied by textual reasoning, and (3) 45K mean opinion scores (MOSs) assessing perceptual quality, instruction following, and visual consistency. Based on EditFHF-15K, we propose EditRefiner, a hierarchical, interpretable, and human-aligned agentic framework that reformulates post-editing correction as a human-like perception-reasoning-action-evaluation loop. Specifically, we introduce: (1) a perception agent that detects contextual saliency maps of artifacts and editing failures, (2) a reasoning agent that interprets these perceptual cues to perform human-aligned diagnostic inference, (3) an action agent that uses the reasoning output to plan and execute localized re-editing, and (4) an evaluation agent that assesses the re-edited image and guides the action agent on whether further refinements are required. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EditRefiner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in distortion localization, diagnose accuracy and human perception alignment, establishing a new paradigm for self-corrective and perceptually reliable image editing. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于人类反馈数据集和分层智能体框架的图像编辑后处理修正方法，显著提升局部修正的准确性和感知对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑模型虽进步显著，但编辑结果常存在物体不自然、光照不匹配、意外变化等细粒度问题，而现有修正方法要么依赖昂贵的迭代重生成，要么使用空间定位能力弱的视觉语言模型，导致语义漂移和不可靠的局部修正。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、准确地检测和修正编辑图像中的细粒度瑕疵，同时保持与人类感知对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含15K图像、60K标注瑕疵区域和80K编辑失败区域的细粒度人类反馈数据集EditFHF-15K，并提出分层智能体框架EditRefiner，包含感知、推理、行动和评估四个智能体，模拟人类感知-推理-行动-评估循环进行局部修正。
contributions: 构建了EditFHF-15K数据集，包含大量细粒度人类反馈标注和评分。
提出EditRefiner框架，实现可解释、分层、与人类对齐的自动图像编辑修正。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，EditRefiner在失真定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖数据集的质量和覆盖范围。
框架复杂度较高，推理成本可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于人类反馈数据集和分层智能体框架的图像编辑后处理修正方法，显著提升局部修正的准确性和感知对齐。

papers.title: EditTransfer++: Toward Faithful and Efficient Visual-Prompt-Guided Image Editing
papers.abstract: Visual-prompt-guided edit transfer aims to learn image transformations directly from example pairs, offering more precise and controllable editing than purely text-driven approaches. However, existing diffusion transformer-based methods often fail to faithfully reproduce the demonstrated edits due to structural mismatches between the task and the backbone, including a pretrained bias toward textual conditioning and inherent stochastic instability during sampling. To bridge this gap, we present EditTransfer++, a framework that combines progressively structured training with an efficient conditioning scheme to improve both visual prompt faithfulness and inference efficiency. We first mitigate textual dominance with a text-decoupled training strategy that removes text conditioning during fine-tuning, compelling the model to infer transformations solely from visual evidence while still supporting optional text guidance at inference. On top of this visually grounded model, a best-worst contrastive refinement mechanism reshapes the denoising trajectories to suppress unfaithful generations and improve consistency across random seeds. To alleviate the computational bottleneck of high-resolution in-context editing, we further introduce a condition compression and reuse strategy that reduces token redundancy and enables efficient generation of images with a 1024-pixel long edge. Extensive experiments on existing benchmarks and the proposed EditTransfer-Bench show that EditTransfer++ achieves state-of-the-art visual prompt faithfulness with substantially faster inference than prior methods, suggesting a promising direction for scalable prompt-guided image editing and broader visual in-context learning.

analysis.tldr: EditTransfer++ 通过文本解耦训练和对比优化，实现高效、高保真的视觉提示引导图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散 Transformer 的方法在视觉提示引导编辑中常因文本偏置和采样不稳定导致编辑不忠实，且高分辨率编辑计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何提升视觉提示引导编辑的忠实度和推理效率，克服结构不匹配和随机性带来的不忠实生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：现有方法存在预训练文本偏置和采样随机性导致的编辑不忠实问题。
analysis.method: 提出 EditTransfer++，包含文本解耦训练（微调时移除文本条件）、最佳-最差对比优化（重塑去噪轨迹）以及条件压缩与重用策略（减少 token 冗余，支持 1024 像素长边高效生成）。
contributions: 提出文本解耦训练策略，消除文本偏置，使模型仅从视觉证据推断变换。
引入最佳-最差对比优化机制，提高生成一致性和忠实度。
设计条件压缩与重用策略，显著降低高分辨率编辑的计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在现有基准和提出的 EditTransfer-Bench 上，EditTransfer++ 在视觉提示忠实度上达到 SOTA，且推理速度显著快于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量示例对，泛化到复杂编辑场景有限。
对比优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EditTransfer++ 通过文本解耦训练和对比优化，实现高效、高保真的视觉提示引导图像编辑。

papers.title: Sparse Autoencoders as Plug-and-Play Firewalls for Adversarial Attack Detection in VLMs
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, especially with the rise of agent-based systems. However, their safety has received relatively limited attention. Even the latest proprietary and open-weight VLMs remain highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks, leaving downstream applications exposed to significant risks. In this work, we propose a novel and lightweight adversarial attack detection framework based on sparse autoencoders (SAEs), termed SAEgis. By inserting an SAE module into a pretrained VLM and training it with standard reconstruction objectives, we find that the learned sparse latent features naturally capture attack-relevant signals. These features enable reliable classification of whether an input image has been adversarially perturbed, even for previously unseen samples. Extensive experiments show that SAEgis achieves strong performance across in-domain, cross-domain, and cross-attack settings, with particularly large improvements in cross-domain generalization compared to existing baselines. In addition, combining signals from multiple layers further improves robustness and stability. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore SAE as a plug-and-play mechanism for adversarial attack detection in VLMs. Our method requires no additional adversarial training, introduces minimal overhead, and provides a practical approach for improving the safety of real-world VLM systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于稀疏自编码器的即插即用防火墙SAEgis，用于检测VLM中的对抗攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在现实应用中部署日益增多，但安全性研究不足，现有模型易受对抗攻击，缺乏轻量有效的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖对抗训练的情况下，高效检测VLM输入图像是否被对抗扰动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏自编码器学习到的稀疏潜在特征自然捕捉了攻击相关信号，可用于可靠分类。
analysis.method: 在预训练VLM中插入稀疏自编码器模块，仅用标准重建目标训练，利用其稀疏特征进行攻击检测。
contributions: 首次探索SAE作为VLM对抗攻击检测的即插即用机制
无需对抗训练，开销小，在域内、跨域和跨攻击设置下均表现优异
analysis.experiments: 在域内、跨域和跨攻击设置下进行实验，相比基线在跨域泛化上有大幅提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构
未讨论对多种攻击类型的覆盖范围
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于稀疏自编码器的即插即用防火墙SAEgis，用于检测VLM中的对抗攻击。

papers.title: Towards Photorealistic and Efficient Bokeh Rendering via Diffusion Framework
papers.abstract: Existing mobile devices are constrained by compact optical designs, such as small apertures, which make it difficult to produce natural, optically realistic bokeh effects. Although recent learning-based methods have shown promising results, they still struggle with photos captured under high digital zoom levels, which often suffer from reduced resolution and loss of fine details. A naive solution is to enhance image quality before applying bokeh rendering, yet this two-stage pipeline reduces efficiency and introduces unnecessary error accumulation. To overcome these limitations, we propose MagicBokeh, a unified diffusion-based framework designed for high-quality and efficient bokeh rendering. Through an alternative training strategy and a focus-aware masked attention mechanism, our method jointly optimizes bokeh rendering and super-resolution, substantially improving both controllability and visual fidelity. Furthermore, we introduce degradation-aware depth module to enable more accurate depth estimation from low-quality inputs. Experimental results demonstrate that MagicBokeh efficiently produces photorealistic bokeh effects, particularly on real-world low-resolution images, paving the way for future advancements in bokeh rendering. Our code and models are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出MagicBokeh，一个统一扩散框架，联合优化散景渲染与超分辨率，实现高效逼真的散景效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动设备受限于紧凑光学设计（如小光圈），难以产生自然逼真的散景效果；现有学习方法在高数字变焦下处理低分辨率图像时效果不佳，且两阶段流水线效率低、误差累积。
analysis.problem: 如何在低分辨率、细节丢失的输入图像上高效生成高质量、逼真的散景效果，同时避免两阶段流水线的效率低下和误差累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MagicBokeh，一个基于扩散的统一框架，通过替代训练策略和焦点感知掩码注意力机制，联合优化散景渲染和超分辨率；并引入退化感知深度模块，从低质量输入中更准确地估计深度。
contributions: 提出MagicBokeh，首个统一扩散框架，联合优化散景渲染和超分辨率，提升效率和视觉保真度。
引入焦点感知掩码注意力机制和退化感知深度模块，增强可控性和深度估计准确性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明MagicBokeh能高效生成逼真散景效果，尤其在真实低分辨率图像上表现优异。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对高分辨率图像或极端退化场景的泛化能力有限。
扩散模型的推理速度可能仍受限于计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MagicBokeh，一个统一扩散框架，联合优化散景渲染与超分辨率，实现高效逼真的散景效果。

papers.title: Learning Image-Adaptive Scale Fields for Metric Depth Recovery
papers.abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) typically produces depth estimations that are defined up to an unknown scale or shift. When only sparse metric anchors are available, recovering accurate metric depth becomes challenging yet necessary for practical applications. We address this problem by formulating metric depth recovery as image-adaptive scale field modeling. Instead of directly correcting the depth, we reformulate the correction as a low-dimensional linear combination of image-adaptive basis maps. These maps are derived from semantic and geometric cues encoded in the MDE estimations and intermediate representations. The weights of basis maps are efficiently determined from sparse metric anchors via a least-squares problem. This formulation yields improved metric depth accuracy, strong robustness under extreme anchor sparsity, and an interpretable decomposition of spatial scale variations. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets and representative MDE models demonstrate the effectiveness and general applicability of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出图像自适应尺度场，从稀疏度量锚点恢复精确度量深度。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目深度估计通常输出未知尺度的深度，实际应用中需要度量深度，但仅靠稀疏度量锚点恢复准确度量深度具有挑战性。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏度量锚点恢复精确的度量深度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将度量深度恢复建模为图像自适应尺度场，通过语义和几何线索编码的低维线性组合表示尺度场，权重由稀疏度量锚点通过最小二乘求解。
contributions: 提出图像自适应尺度场模型用于度量深度恢复
利用MDE估计和中间表示的语义几何线索构建基图
通过最小二乘高效确定基图权重，实现鲁棒且可解释的尺度校正
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和代表性MDE模型上验证了有效性和通用性。
limitations: 依赖MDE模型的中间表示质量
可能对极端稀疏锚点敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图像自适应尺度场，从稀疏度量锚点恢复精确度量深度。

papers.title: ChartREG++: Towards Benchmarking and Improving Chart Referring Expression Grounding under Diverse referring clues and Multi-Target Referring
papers.abstract: Referring expression grounding is a core problem in visual grounding and is widely used as a diagnostic of spatial grounding and reasoning in vision and language models, yet most prior work focuses on natural images. In contrast, existing chart referring expression grounding-related benchmarks remain limited: (1) they largely adopt bounding boxes, constraining localization precision for fine chart elements (2) they mostly assume a single and two referred target instances, failing to handle multi-instance target references; (3) the language expressions over-rely on textual cues or data-rank clues (4) they cover only a narrow range of chart types. To address these issues, we introduce a chart referring expression grounding benchmark that systematically supports multiple localization forms, multiple referred targets, diverse grounding cues and diverse chart types. Results across representative multimodal large models reveal a significant performance gap. We further introduce a code-driven synthesis pipeline that exploits the inherent alignment between plotting programs and rendered chart primitives to derive pixel accurate instance masks across chart element types and granularities. We train an instance segmentation model with the synthesized masks and integrate it into a general-purpose multimodal grounding framework. The resulting system consistently outperforms baselines on our benchmark and generalizes well to a ChartQA-derived real-chart grounding benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出ChartREG++基准和代码驱动合成方法，提升图表指代表达定位性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图表指代表达定位基准存在定位精度低、目标数量有限、语言线索单一、图表类型覆盖窄等问题，限制了多模态大模型在图表上的空间定位与推理能力评估。
analysis.problem: 构建一个支持多种定位形式、多目标、多样化线索和多种图表类型的图表指代表达定位基准，并提升模型在该任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态大模型在图表指代表达定位上存在显著性能差距，现有基准的局限性导致模型能力评估不全面。
analysis.method: 提出代码驱动合成管道，利用绘图程序与渲染图元的内在对齐生成像素级精确实例掩码，训练实例分割模型并集成到通用多模态定位框架中。
contributions: 构建了系统支持多种定位形式、多目标、多样化线索和多种图表类型的图表指代表达定位基准。
提出代码驱动合成管道，生成像素级精确掩码，训练实例分割模型并集成到通用定位框架，显著提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在提出的基准和ChartQA导出的真实图表定位基准上，所提系统持续优于基线。
limitations: 合成数据与真实图表之间可能存在域差异。
方法依赖绘图程序代码，可能不适用于所有图表类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ChartREG++基准和代码驱动合成方法，提升图表指代表达定位性能。

papers.title: InsHuman: Towards Natural and Identity-Preserving Human Insertion
papers.abstract: Human insertion aims to naturally place specific individuals into a target background. Although existing image editing models may have such ability, they often produce failure cases, including inappropriate human pose in new background, inconsistent number of people, and modified facial identity. Moreover, publicly available human datasets often lack full-body portraits and realistic physical interaction between humans and their background. To address these challenges, we propose InsHuman for natural and identity-preserving human insertion. Specifically, we propose Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF), which detects foreground humans to obtain a binary mask and applies region-aware weighting to align the human regions between predicted and ground-truth latents, ensuring the person's pose, count, and overall appearance are coherently adapted to the target this http URL further propose Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP), which detects and matches faces between the generated image and the source image in terms of face recognition features to enforce identity consistency for each this http URL addition, we propose Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) strategy to construct BDP-InsHuman, a high-quality dataset with realistic human-background interactions. Experiments demonstrate that InsHuman achieves significant improvements in generating plausible images while keeping human identity unchanged.

analysis.tldr: 提出 InsHuman 框架，通过自适应融合和身份保持模块实现自然且保真的人像插入。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑模型在将特定人物插入新背景时，常出现姿态不当、人数不一致、面部身份改变等问题，且公开数据集缺乏全身肖像和真实的人-背景物理交互。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自然且身份保持的人像插入，即在不改变人物身份的前提下，使人物姿态、数量和外观与目标背景协调一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型在人像插入任务中失败模式包括：人物姿态与背景不协调、人数不一致、面部身份被修改。
analysis.method: 提出 InsHuman 框架，包含三个组件：Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF) 通过前景检测和区域感知加权对齐人物区域；Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP) 通过人脸识别特征匹配强制身份一致性；Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) 构建高质量数据集 BDP-InsHuman。
contributions: 提出 InsHuman 框架，实现自然且身份保持的人像插入。
提出 HBAF 和 FFIP 模块分别解决姿态/数量一致性和身份保持问题。
提出 BDP 策略构建高质量人像插入数据集 BDP-InsHuman。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明 InsHuman 在生成合理图像的同时保持人物身份不变，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖人脸检测和匹配的准确性。
数据集构建策略可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 InsHuman 框架，通过自适应融合和身份保持模块实现自然且保真的人像插入。

papers.title: GPO-V: Jailbreak Diffusion Vision Language Model by Global Probability Optimization
papers.abstract: Diffusion Vision-Language Models (dVLMs), built upon the non-causal foundations of Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs), have demonstrated remarkable efficacy in multimodal tasks by departing from the traditional autoregressive generation paradigm. While dVLMs appear inherently robust against conventional jailbreak tactics, which we categorize as Fixed Prefix Optimization (FPO) (e.g., anchoring responses with "Sure, here is"), this perceived resilience is deceptive. Our investigation into the safety landscape of dVLMs reveals a unique refusal pattern: Immediate Refusal and Progressive Refusal. We find that while FPO-based attacks often fail by triggering the latter, the progressive refinement process itself uncovers a novel, latent attack surface. To exploit this vulnerability, we propose Global Probability Optimization (GPO), a general jailbreak paradigm designed specifically for the denoising trajectory of masked diffusion models. Unlike prefix-based methods, GPO manipulates the global generative dynamics to bypass guardrails in diffusion language models. Building on this, we introduce GPO-V, the first visual-modality jailbreak framework tailored for dVLMs. Empirical results demonstrate that GPO-V produces stealthy perturbations with exceptional cross-model transferability, revealing a critical security gap in non-sequential generative architectures. Our findings underscore the critical urgency of addressing safety alignment in dVLMs. These results necessitate an immediate and fundamental re-evaluation of current defense paradigms to mitigate the unique risks of diffusion-based generation. Our code is available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 针对扩散视觉语言模型，提出全局概率优化（GPO）越狱范式，利用渐进拒绝机制中的潜在攻击面生成可迁移的视觉扰动。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散视觉语言模型（dVLMs）基于非因果扩散大语言模型，在传统越狱攻击（如固定前缀优化）下看似鲁棒，但这种感知具有欺骗性，实际存在独特的安全漏洞，亟需揭示并防御。
analysis.problem: 如何利用dVLMs的渐进拒绝模式中的潜在攻击面，设计针对其去噪轨迹的视觉模态越狱方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到dVLMs存在独特的拒绝模式：即时拒绝和渐进拒绝；固定前缀优化攻击常因触发渐进拒绝而失败，但渐进精炼过程本身暴露了新的潜在攻击面。
analysis.method: 提出全局概率优化（GPO）越狱范式，通过操纵掩码扩散模型的全局生成动态绕过安全护栏；并基于此设计GPO-V，首个针对dVLMs的视觉模态越狱框架。
contributions: 揭示了扩散视觉语言模型（dVLMs）中独特的拒绝模式（即时拒绝和渐进拒绝）及其潜在攻击面。
提出全局概率优化（GPO）范式，利用去噪轨迹进行越狱，并实现首个视觉模态越狱框架GPO-V。
实验证明GPO-V能生成具有出色跨模型迁移性的隐蔽扰动，暴露非自回归生成架构的关键安全缺口。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的扩散视觉语言模型有效。
跨模型迁移性可能受限于模型架构相似性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对扩散视觉语言模型，提出全局概率优化（GPO）越狱范式，利用渐进拒绝机制中的潜在攻击面生成可迁移的视觉扰动。

papers.title: Exposing and Mitigating Temporal Attack in Deepfake Video Detection
papers.abstract: While spatiotemporal deepfake detectors achieve high AUC, our experiments reveal their susceptibility to evasion attacks. These models tend to overfit on fragile temporal spectrum cues, rather than learning robust semantic causality. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose SpInShield, a temporal spectral-invariant defense framework explicitly designed to decouple semantic motion from manipulatable spectral artifacts. We propose a learnable spectral adversary that dynamically synthesizes severe spectral deformations, simulating extreme attack scenarios. By employing a shortcut suppression optimization strategy, SpInShield compels the encoder to extract reliable forensic cues while purging unstable spectral statistics from the latent space. Experiments show that SpInShield obtains competitive performance on widely used datasets and outperforms the strongest baseline by 21.30 percentage points in AUC under simulated amplitude spectral attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpInShield防御框架，通过解耦语义运动与频谱伪影来提升深度伪造视频检测的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时空深度伪造检测器虽在标准测试中表现良好，但易受对抗攻击，因为它们过度依赖脆弱的时域频谱线索而非鲁棒的语义因果性。
analysis.problem: 深度伪造视频检测模型对频谱级对抗攻击的脆弱性，以及如何强制模型学习鲁棒的语义特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型倾向于过拟合脆弱的时域频谱线索，而非学习鲁棒的语义因果关系，导致在频谱攻击下性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出SpInShield，一种时域频谱不变性防御框架，包含可学习的频谱对抗器动态合成严重频谱变形，并通过捷径抑制优化策略迫使编码器提取可靠取证线索并清除不稳定频谱统计。
contributions: 揭示了深度伪造检测器对时域频谱攻击的脆弱性，并分析了其过拟合频谱线索的现象。
提出了SpInShield防御框架，通过频谱对抗训练和捷径抑制有效提升模型鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛使用的数据集上取得有竞争力的性能，在模拟幅度频谱攻击下AUC比最强基线高21.30个百分点。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的频谱攻击有效，对其他攻击形式泛化性未知。
防御框架的额外计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpInShield防御框架，通过解耦语义运动与频谱伪影来提升深度伪造视频检测的鲁棒性。

papers.title: BalCapRL: A Balanced Framework for RL-Based MLLM Image Captioning
papers.abstract: Image captioning is one of the most fundamental tasks in computer vision. Owing to its open-ended nature, it has received significant attention in the era of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). In pursuit of ever more detailed and accurate captions, recent work has increasingly turned to reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing captioning-RL methods and evaluation metrics often emphasize a narrow notion of caption quality, inducing trade-offs across core dimensions of captioning. For example, utility-oriented objectives can encourage noisy, hallucinated, or overlong captions that improve downstream question answering while harming fluency, whereas arena-style objectives can favor fluent but generic descriptions with limited usefulness. To address this, we propose a more balanced RL framework that jointly optimizes utility-aware correctness, reference coverage, and linguistic quality. In order to effectively optimize the resulting continuous multi-objective reward formulation, we apply GDPO-style reward-decoupled normalization to continuous-valued captioning rewards and show that it improves performance over vanilla GRPO. Additionally, we introduce length-conditional reward masking, yielding a more suitable length penalty for captioning. Across LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen2.5-VL 3B and 7B base models, our method consistently improves caption quality, with peak gains of +13.6 DCScore, +9.0 CaptionQA, and +29.0 CapArena across different models.

analysis.tldr: 提出BalCapRL框架，通过多目标强化学习平衡MLLM图像描述的准确性、覆盖率和语言质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于强化学习的图像描述方法常偏重单一指标（如下游问答或流畅性），导致描述出现幻觉、冗长或过于泛化等问题，缺乏对核心维度的平衡优化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个强化学习框架，同时优化图像描述的实用性、参考覆盖率和语言质量，避免单一目标带来的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：面向实用性的目标会导致噪声、幻觉或过长描述，损害流畅性；而竞技场式目标则偏好流畅但泛化的描述，实用性有限。
analysis.method: 提出BalCapRL框架，联合优化实用性正确性、参考覆盖率和语言质量三个奖励项；采用GDPO风格的奖励解耦归一化处理连续值奖励，并引入长度条件奖励掩码以施加更合适的长度惩罚。
contributions: 提出一个平衡的多目标强化学习框架，联合优化图像描述的实用性、覆盖率和语言质量。
将GDPO风格的奖励解耦归一化应用于连续值描述奖励，并引入长度条件奖励掩码，提升训练效果。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B、Qwen2.5-VL 3B和7B基模型上验证，DCScore提升+13.6，CaptionQA提升+9.0，CapArena提升+29.0。
limitations: 可能依赖特定奖励函数设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论多目标权重调整的敏感性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BalCapRL框架，通过多目标强化学习平衡MLLM图像描述的准确性、覆盖率和语言质量。

papers.title: ST-Gen4D: Embedding 4D Spatiotemporal Cognition into World Model for 4D Generation
papers.abstract: Generative models have achieved success in producing apparently coherent 2D videos, but remain challenging in the physical world due to lack of 4D spatiotemporal scale. Typically, existing 4D generative models directly embed macro scale constraints to enhance overall spatiotemporal consistency. However, these methods only ensure global appearance coherence and fail to reveal the local dynamics of the physical world. Our insight is that global appearance structure and local dynamic topology empower 4D spatiotemporal cognition, thereby enabling 4D generation with spatiotemporal regularities. In this work, we propose ST-Gen4D, a 4D generation framework with 4D spatiotemporal cognition-based world model. Our model is guided by four key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal representation. We encode various modalities into multiple representations as a feature basis. 2) Spatiotemporal cognition. We sculpture these representations into global appearance graph and local dynamic graph, and fuse them via semantic-bridged spatiotemporal fusion to obtain a 4D cognition graph. 3) Spatiotemporal reasoning. We utilize a world model to derive future state based on the 4D cognition. 4) Spatiotemporal generation. We leverage the derived cognition as condition to guide latent diffusion for 4D Gaussian generation. By deeply integrating 4D intrinsic cognition with generative priors, our model guarantees the structural rationality and topological consistency of 4D generation. Moreover, we propose ST-4D datasets by aggregating public 4D datasets and self-built subset. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our ST-Gen4D across 3D and 4D generation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，通过嵌入4D时空认知的世界模型实现结构合理且拓扑一致的4D生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D生成模型仅保证全局外观一致性，无法揭示物理世界的局部动态，缺乏对4D时空尺度的认知。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有时空规律性、结构合理性和拓扑一致性的4D内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法仅关注全局外观一致性，忽略了局部动态拓扑，导致生成结果缺乏物理世界的局部动态。
analysis.method: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，包含四个关键设计：1) 时空表示：将多种模态编码为多表示特征基；2) 时空认知：构建全局外观图和局部动态图，通过语义桥接融合为4D认知图；3) 时空推理：利用世界模型基于4D认知推导未来状态；4) 时空生成：以推导的认知为条件引导潜在扩散进行4D高斯生成。
contributions: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，首次将4D时空认知嵌入世界模型用于4D生成。
构建ST-4D数据集，整合公开4D数据集和自建子集。
analysis.experiments: 在3D和4D生成任务上进行了大量实验，证明了ST-Gen4D的优越性。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模4D数据，数据获取成本高。
世界模型的推理效率可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，通过嵌入4D时空认知的世界模型实现结构合理且拓扑一致的4D生成。

papers.title: A Marine Debris Detection Framework for Ocean Robots via Self-Attention Enhancement and Feature Interaction Optimization
papers.abstract: Marine debris detection for ocean robot is crucial for ecological protection, yet performance is often degraded by low-quality images with blur, complex backgrounds, and small targets. To address these challenges, we propose YOLO-MD, an enhanced YOLO-based detection framework. A Dual-Branch Convolutional Enhanced Self-Attention (DB-CASA) module is designed to strengthen spatial-channel interactions, improving feature representation in degraded images. Additionally, a lightweight shift-based operation is introduced to enhance fine-grained feature extraction for objects of varying scales while maintaining parameter efficiency. We further propose SFG-Loss to mitigate class imbalance and optimization instability via dynamic sample reweighting. Experiments on the UODM dataset demonstrate that YOLO-MD achieves 0.875 precision, 0.822 F1-score, and 0.849 mAP50, outperforming the latest state-of-the-art methods. The effectiveness of this method has also been verified through real-world robotic edge deployment experiments.

analysis.tldr: 提出YOLO-MD框架，通过自注意力增强和特征交互优化提升海洋机器人垃圾检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 海洋机器人垃圾检测对生态保护至关重要，但低质量图像（模糊、复杂背景、小目标）导致性能下降，现有方法难以应对这些挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决海洋垃圾检测中图像质量退化、背景复杂和小目标检测困难的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出YOLO-MD框架，包含双分支卷积增强自注意力模块（DB-CASA）增强空间-通道交互，轻量级移位操作提升多尺度细粒度特征提取，以及SFG-Loss通过动态样本重加权缓解类别不平衡和优化不稳定。
contributions: 提出DB-CASA模块增强退化图像的特征表示
设计轻量级移位操作提升多尺度目标特征提取效率
提出SFG-Loss缓解类别不平衡和优化不稳定
analysis.experiments: 在UODM数据集上，YOLO-MD达到0.875精度、0.822 F1-score和0.849 mAP50，优于最新方法，并通过真实机器人边缘部署实验验证有效性。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定海洋场景，泛化性需进一步验证
轻量级设计可能在高精度任务中仍有性能瓶颈
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出YOLO-MD框架，通过自注意力增强和特征交互优化提升海洋机器人垃圾检测性能。

papers.title: RELO: Reinforcement Learning to Localize for Visual Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Conventional visual object trackers localize targets using handcrafted spatial priors, often in the form of heatmaps. Such priors provide only surrogate supervision and are poorly aligned with tracking optimization and evaluation metrics, such as intersection over union (IoU) and area under the success curve (AUC). Here, we introduce RELO, a REinforcement-learning-to-LOcalize method for visual object tracking that formulates target localization as a Markov decision process. Specifically, RELO replaces handcrafted spatial priors with a localization policy learned over spatial positions via reinforcement learning, with rewards combining frame-level IoU and sequence-level AUC. We additionally introduce layer-aligned temporal token propagation to improve semantic consistency across frames, with negligible computational overhead. Across multiple benchmarks, RELO achieves superior results, attaining 57.5% AUC on LaSOText without template updates. This confirms that reward-driven localization provides an effective alternative to prior-driven localization for visual object tracking.

analysis.tldr: RELO 用强化学习替代手工空间先验，以 IoU 和 AUC 为奖励直接优化目标定位，在 LaSOText 上达到 57.5% AUC。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视觉目标跟踪器依赖手工设计的空间先验（如热图）进行定位，这种代理监督与跟踪优化和评估指标（如 IoU、AUC）不一致，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何用强化学习直接优化目标定位策略，使其与跟踪评估指标对齐，替代手工空间先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出手工空间先验仅提供代理监督，与 IoU 和 AUC 等指标对齐差，限制了跟踪性能。
analysis.method: 将目标定位建模为马尔可夫决策过程，通过强化学习学习空间位置上的定位策略，奖励结合帧级 IoU 和序列级 AUC；并引入层对齐时间令牌传播以增强语义一致性。
contributions: 提出 RELO，首个用强化学习替代手工空间先验进行视觉目标定位的跟踪方法。
设计结合帧级 IoU 和序列级 AUC 的奖励函数，直接优化跟踪指标。
引入层对齐时间令牌传播，提升跨帧语义一致性且计算开销可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上取得优异结果，在 LaSOText 上无需模板更新达到 57.5% AUC。
limitations: 可能依赖强化学习训练稳定性，需进一步验证泛化性。
未讨论在极端遮挡或快速运动场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RELO 用强化学习替代手工空间先验，以 IoU 和 AUC 为奖励直接优化目标定位，在 LaSOText 上达到 57.5% AUC。

papers.title: UniISP: A Unified ISP Framework for Both Human and Machine Vision
papers.abstract: Compared to RGB images, raw sensor data provides a richer representation of information, which is crucial for accurate recognition, particularly under challenging conditions such as low-light environments. The traditional Image Signal Processing (ISP) pipeline generates visually pleasing RGB images for human perception through a series of steps, but some of these operations may adversely impact the information integrity by introducing compression and loss. Furthermore, in computer vision tasks that directly utilize raw camera data, most existing methods integrate minimal ISP processing with downstream networks, yet the resulting images are often difficult to visualize or do not align with human aesthetic preferences. This paper proposes UniISP, a novel ISP framework designed to simultaneously meet the requirements of both human visual perception and computer vision applications. By incorporating a carefully designed Hybrid Attention Module (HAM) and employing supervised learning, the proposed method ensures that the generated images are visually appealing. Additionally, a Feature Adapter module is introduced to effectively propagate informative features from the ISP stage to subsequent downstream networks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across various scenarios and multiple datasets, proving its generalizability and effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一ISP框架UniISP，同时满足人眼视觉和机器视觉需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统ISP流程为人类视觉优化，但可能损害信息完整性；现有机器视觉方法直接处理raw数据，但生成图像难以可视化或不符合审美。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个ISP框架，既能生成视觉美观的图像，又能为下游计算机视觉任务保留有效特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统ISP步骤引入压缩和损失，影响信息完整性；现有机器视觉方法集成最小ISP处理，但图像可视化效果差。
analysis.method: 提出UniISP框架，包含混合注意力模块（HAM）和特征适配器模块，通过监督学习同时优化视觉质量和特征传播。
contributions: 提出UniISP，首个同时满足人眼和机器视觉的统一ISP框架。
设计混合注意力模块（HAM）提升视觉质量，特征适配器模块有效传播信息特征到下游网络。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和场景下达到SOTA性能，证明泛化性和有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定下游任务进行特征适配。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一ISP框架UniISP，同时满足人眼视觉和机器视觉需求。

papers.title: UniD-Shift: Towards Unified Semantic Segmentation via Interpretable Share-Private Multimodal Decomposition
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation of large-scale 3D point clouds is crucial for applications such as autonomous driving and urban digital twins. However, the sparse sampling pattern of LiDAR and the view-dependent geometric distortion in image observations complicate cross-modal alignment and hinder stable fusion. Inspired by the fact that 2D images captured by cameras are representations of the 3D world, we recognize that the features learned from 2D and 3D segmentation share some common semantics, while other aspects remain modality-specific. This insight motivates a unified multimodal framework for joint 2D-3D semantic segmentation. We combine a SAM-based vision encoder with a SPTNet-based geometric encoder to extract complementary semantic and geometric representations. The resulting features from both modalities are explicitly decomposed into shared and private subspaces, where the shared components summarize semantic factors common to both domains, and the private components preserve properties that are unique to each modality. A lightweight attention-based fusion module aggregates the shared features into a consistent cross-modal representation, and a regularized training objective ensures both semantic alignment and subspace independence. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in segmentation accuracy over representative multimodal baselines, accompanied by competitive computational efficiency. Cross-domain evaluation on nuScenes USA-Singapore shows stable performance under distribution shifts, demonstrating strong generalization. The implementation code is publicly available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可解释的共享-私有多模态分解方法，实现2D-3D联合语义分割，在多个基准上提升精度并保持效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D点云语义分割在自动驾驶和数字孪生中至关重要，但LiDAR稀疏采样与图像几何畸变导致跨模态对齐困难，现有融合方法不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合2D图像和3D点云特征，实现统一且鲁棒的语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D和3D特征共享部分语义，同时存在模态特有信息。
analysis.method: 结合SAM视觉编码器和SPTNet几何编码器提取互补特征，显式分解为共享和私有子空间，通过轻量注意力融合模块聚合共享特征，并采用正则化训练目标保证语义对齐和子空间独立性。
contributions: 提出可解释的共享-私有多模态分解框架，实现2D-3D统一语义分割。
在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes上取得一致改进，并在跨域场景下展现强泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes基准上评估，与代表性多模态基线相比，分割精度一致提升，计算效率有竞争力；跨域评估（nuScenes USA-Singapore）显示分布偏移下性能稳定。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM和SPTNet的预训练质量。
跨模态分解的泛化性可能受限于特定传感器配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可解释的共享-私有多模态分解方法，实现2D-3D联合语义分割，在多个基准上提升精度并保持效率。

papers.title: TTF: Temporal Token Fusion for Efficient Video-Language Model
papers.abstract: Video-language models (VLMs) face rapid inference costs as visual token counts scale with video length. For example, 32 frames at $448{\times}448$ resolution already yield >8,000 visual tokens in Qwen3-VL, making LLM prefill the dominant throughput bottleneck. Existing methods often rely on global similarity or attention-guided compression, incurring offsets to their gains. We propose \textbf{Temporal Token Fusion (TTF)}, a training-free, plug-and-play pre-LLM token compression framework that exploits structured temporal redundancy in video. TTF automatically selects an anchor frame, then for each subsequent frame, performs a local window similarity search (e.g.,$3\times 3$), fusing tokens that exceed a threshold. The compressed sequence maintains positional consistency across both prefill and decoding through coordinate realignment, enabling seamless integration with existing VLM pipelines. On Qwen3-VL-8B with threshold t=0.70, TTF removes about 67\% of visual tokens while retaining 99.5\% of the baseline accuracy and introducing only ${\approx}0.16$\,GFLOPs of matching overhead. Overall, TTF offers a practical, efficient solution for video understanding. The code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的时序令牌融合（TTF）方法，通过局部窗口相似度搜索压缩视频视觉令牌，在Qwen3-VL-8B上减少67%令牌并保持99.5%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频语言模型（VLM）随着视频长度增加，视觉令牌数量急剧增长，导致推理成本高昂，现有压缩方法依赖全局相似性或注意力引导，带来额外开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练、不增加显著计算开销的前提下，高效压缩视频VLM中的冗余视觉令牌，以加速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频帧间存在结构化时序冗余，相邻帧的局部区域高度相似，可通过局部窗口相似度搜索有效识别并融合冗余令牌。
analysis.method: 提出Temporal Token Fusion (TTF)：自动选择锚定帧，对后续帧进行局部窗口（如3×3）相似度搜索，融合超过阈值的令牌，并通过坐标重对齐保持位置一致性，实现即插即用。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的视频令牌压缩框架TTF，利用时序冗余高效减少视觉令牌。
在Qwen3-VL-8B上验证，TTF去除约67%令牌，保留99.5%基线准确率，仅引入约0.16 GFLOPs匹配开销。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 阈值t需要手动设定，可能影响不同视频的压缩效果。
局部窗口大小固定，可能无法适应所有运动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的时序令牌融合（TTF）方法，通过局部窗口相似度搜索压缩视频视觉令牌，在Qwen3-VL-8B上减少67%令牌并保持99.5%准确率。

papers.title: Disambiguating 2D-3D Correspondences in Gaussian Splatting-based Feature Fields for Visual Localization
papers.abstract: While Gaussian Splatting-based Feature Fields (GSFFs) have shown promise for visual localization, this paper highlights that photometrically optimized GSFFs are inherently ill-suited for 2D-3D matching. The volumetric extent of each Gaussian induces many-to-one pixel-to-point mappings that destabilize PnP-based pose estimation, while photometric optimization gives rise to superfluous Gaussians devoid of multi-view consistency. To address these issues, we propose SplitGS-Loc, a localization-specialized GSFFs construction framework that disambiguates 2D-3D correspondences by exploiting Gaussian attributes. Our key design, Mixture-of-Gaussians-based splitting, decomposes each Gaussian into smaller Gaussians, replacing ambiguous many-to-one with precise one-to-one correspondences. In parallel, we exploit composition weights from GS rasterization to select Gaussians that significantly and consistently contribute across multiple views and aggregate discriminative features through strong pixel-Gaussian associations, enforcing multi-view consistency. The resulting compact yet discriminative feature fields enable stable PnP convergence, achieving state-of-the-art performance on localization benchmarks. Extensive experiments validate that SplitGS-Loc extends the utility of photometric GSFFs to accurate and efficient localization by exploiting Gaussian attributes, without per-scene training or iterative pose refinement.

analysis.tldr: SplitGS-Loc通过高斯分裂和权重选择解决GSFFs中2D-3D对应模糊问题，实现高精度视觉定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于高斯泼溅的特征场（GSFFs）在视觉定位中具有潜力，但光度优化导致的多对一映射和多余高斯体破坏了PnP姿态估计的稳定性，限制了其定位精度。
analysis.problem: GSFFs中2D-3D对应关系模糊（多对一映射）以及缺乏多视图一致性的问题，导致PnP姿态估计不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出光度优化的GSFFs天生不适合2D-3D匹配：每个高斯的体积范围导致像素到点的多对一映射，破坏PnP稳定性；光度优化产生缺乏多视图一致性的多余高斯体。
analysis.method: 提出SplitGS-Loc框架，核心是混合高斯分裂（Mixture-of-Gaussians-based splitting），将每个高斯分解为更小的高斯，将模糊的多对一对应替换为精确的一对一对应；同时利用GS光栅化中的组合权重选择在多视图中显著且一致贡献的高斯，并通过强像素-高斯关联聚合判别性特征，增强多视图一致性。
contributions: 揭示了光度优化的GSFFs在2D-3D匹配中的固有缺陷（多对一映射和多余高斯体）。
提出了SplitGS-Loc框架，通过高斯分裂和权重选择实现精确的一对一对应和多视图一致性。
在定位基准上达到最先进性能，无需每场景训练或迭代姿态优化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个定位基准上进行了实验，验证了SplitGS-Loc的有效性，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高斯分裂的粒度选择，过细或过粗可能影响性能。
未讨论在动态场景或光照变化下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SplitGS-Loc通过高斯分裂和权重选择解决GSFFs中2D-3D对应模糊问题，实现高精度视觉定位。

papers.title: SoLAR: Error-Resilient Streamable Long-Horizon Free-Viewpoint Video Reconstruction with Anchor Activation and Latent Recalibration
papers.abstract: Free-Viewpoint Video (FVV) has emerged as a cornerstone of next-generation immersive media systems and attracted widespread attention. Previous methods primarily focus on short video sequences and suffer from significant performance degradation when processing long-horizon free-viewpoint video (LFVV). Motivated by bit allocation theory, we analyze dynamic-anchor-based volumetric video representation within a rate-distortion optimization framework and propose \textbf{SoLAR}, which is the first error-resilient streamable FVV framework that maintains stable reconstruction quality on long sequences without requiring group-of-pictures partitioning. We propose the Anchor Activation Dynamics (AAD), which enables dynamic anchors to model non-rigid transformations by dynamically activating informative anchors and suppressing redundant ones. Furthermore, we introduce Latent Discrepancy Aware Recalibration (LaDAR), which is a mechanism to identify discrepancies between latent representations and recalibrate the correspondences encoded in the network, effectively mitigating error propagation in LFVV without compromising real-time performance or storage compactness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textbf{SoLAR} achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance while maintaining minimum storage overhead, which provides a new direction for LFVV reconstruction and advances the practical deployment of immersive systems. Demo free-viewpoint videos are provided in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个抗误差可流式长时自由视点视频重建框架SoLAR，通过锚点激活动态与潜在重校准实现稳定高质量重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自由视点视频方法主要针对短序列，处理长时视频时性能显著下降，且缺乏抗误差和可流式能力，限制了沉浸式系统的实际部署。
analysis.problem: 长时自由视点视频重建中的误差累积、存储开销大以及无法流式处理的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于比特分配理论分析，发现基于动态锚点的体视频表示在长序列中存在冗余锚点导致性能下降和误差传播。
analysis.method: 提出SoLAR框架，包含锚点激活动态（AAD）动态激活信息性锚点并抑制冗余，以及潜在差异感知重校准（LaDAR）识别潜在表示差异并重校准网络编码的对应关系，从而缓解误差传播。
contributions: 首个抗误差可流式长时自由视点视频重建框架，无需分组划分即可保持稳定质量。
提出锚点激活动态（AAD）和潜在差异感知重校准（LaDAR）两种机制，分别优化锚点表示和抑制误差传播。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动态锚点表示，泛化性需进一步验证。
实时性能与存储紧凑性在极端长序列下的表现未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个抗误差可流式长时自由视点视频重建框架SoLAR，通过锚点激活动态与潜在重校准实现稳定高质量重建。

papers.title: ShellfishNet: A Domain-Specific Benchmark for Visual Recognition of Marine Molluscs
papers.abstract: The decline of global shellfish biodiversity poses a severe threat to coastal ecosystems. Although artificial intelligence (AI) technologies show potential for automated ecological monitoring, existing marine benthic datasets often lack adaptation to the complexities of real underwater environments (e.g., variable lighting conditions and diverse species postures), posing challenges for the robust generalization of vision models in practical ecological monitoring. To address this problem, we construct ShellfishNet, a comprehensive image benchmark dataset designed specifically for real-world ecological monitoring constraints. Comprising 8,691 images across 32 taxa, this dataset includes a curated subset annotated with descriptive captions. It is constructed through field photography and web scraping, encompassing samples from complex real-world environments. Based on this benchmark, we systematically evaluate 80 representative neural network models, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs), State Space Models (SSMs), and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods. Furthermore, we evaluate the performance of fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) models and investigate the image captioning capabilities of several mainstream multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Meanwhile, we introduce image corruption benchmark tests to simulate common underwater degradation scenarios (turbidity, severe weather) and assess the robustness of vision models, enabling trustworthy decisions on ecological protection in the wild. ShellfishNet is dedicated to providing a data foundation and a model-evaluation benchmark for the intelligent monitoring of benthic organisms.

analysis.tldr: ShellfishNet 是一个面向海洋软体动物视觉识别的领域专用基准数据集，评估了80种模型并引入图像损坏测试以模拟水下退化场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球贝类生物多样性下降威胁沿海生态系统，AI 有潜力用于自动化生态监测，但现有海洋底栖数据集缺乏对真实水下环境复杂性的适应（如可变光照和多样姿态），导致视觉模型在生态监测中泛化困难。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个专门针对真实水下环境约束的海洋软体动物视觉识别基准数据集，以评估和提升视觉模型的鲁棒泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 ShellfishNet 数据集，包含 8,691 张图像、32 个分类单元，并带有描述性标注子集；系统评估 80 种神经网络模型（CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL），以及细粒度分类模型和多模态大模型的图像描述能力；引入图像损坏基准测试模拟水下退化场景（浑浊、恶劣天气）以评估鲁棒性。
contributions: 构建了 ShellfishNet，一个专为真实水下生态监测约束设计的海洋软体动物视觉识别基准数据集。
系统评估了 80 种代表性视觉模型，并引入图像损坏测试以模拟水下退化场景，为生态保护中的可信决策提供支持。
analysis.experiments: 在 ShellfishNet 上评估了 80 种神经网络模型（包括 CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL）、细粒度分类模型以及多模态大模型的图像描述能力，并进行了图像损坏鲁棒性测试。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖 32 个分类单元，可能不足以代表全部海洋软体动物多样性。
图像损坏测试仅模拟了浑浊和恶劣天气，未涵盖其他水下退化因素（如生物附着、运动模糊）。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ShellfishNet 是一个面向海洋软体动物视觉识别的领域专用基准数据集，评估了80种模型并引入图像损坏测试以模拟水下退化场景。

papers.title: RCoT-Seg: Reinforced Chain-of-Thought for Video Reasoning and Segmentation
papers.abstract: Video Reasoning Segmentation (VRS) aims to segment target objects in videos based on implicit instructions that convey human intent and temporal logic. Existing MLLM-based methods predict masks with a [SEG] token after selecting frames via simple sampling or an auxiliary MLLM, where limited supervision and frame-language similarity rules often yield narrow-scope keyframe choices that weaken holistic temporal understanding and lead to brittle localization in complex multi-object scenes. To address these issues, we introduce RCoT-Seg, a video-of-thought framework that factorizes VRS into temporal video reasoning (TVR) and keyframe target perception (KTP), explicitly separating temporal reasoning from spatial perception. Specifically, in the TVR stage, an agentic keyframe selection module, initialized with a curated CoT-start corpus and refined by GRPO under task-aligned rewards, is proposed to generate and reselect the keyframe through self-evaluation, strengthening moment localization and temporal reasoning. In the KTP stage, RCoT-Seg performs high-resolution segmentation on the selected frame and propagates masks with SAM2-based methods across the sequence, replacing heuristic sampling and external selectors while improving spatial precision and inter-frame consistency. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RCoT-Seg achieves favorable performance against the state-of-the-art methods. The code and models will be publicly released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: RCoT-Seg 通过强化链式思维将视频推理分割分解为时间推理和空间感知，提升关键帧选择和分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频推理分割方法依赖简单采样或辅助MLLM选择关键帧，监督有限且帧-语言相似性规则导致关键帧选择范围窄，削弱了整体时间理解，在复杂多目标场景中定位脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何将视频推理分割中的时间推理与空间感知显式分离，并实现鲁棒的关键帧选择和精确分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法的关键帧选择受限于简单采样或辅助MLLM，监督不足且规则单一，导致时间理解不足和定位脆弱。
analysis.method: 提出RCoT-Seg框架，包含时间视频推理（TVR）和关键帧目标感知（KTP）两阶段。TVR阶段使用基于GRPO的智能体关键帧选择模块，通过自评估生成和重新选择关键帧；KTP阶段对选定帧进行高分辨率分割，并利用SAM2方法传播掩码。
contributions: 提出视频推理分割的分解框架，显式分离时间推理与空间感知。
设计基于GRPO的智能体关键帧选择模块，通过自评估提升时间定位和推理能力。
在KTP阶段实现高分辨率分割和跨帧掩码传播，提高空间精度和帧间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频推理分割基准上，RCoT-Seg达到优于现有方法的性能。代码和模型将公开。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM2的传播质量，在长视频或大运动场景中可能累积误差。
GRPO训练需要精心设计的奖励函数，可能对任务泛化性有影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RCoT-Seg 通过强化链式思维将视频推理分割分解为时间推理和空间感知，提升关键帧选择和分割精度。

papers.title: GC-ART: Global Learnable Second-Order Rational Tone Curves for Illumination Robustness
papers.abstract: We introduce GC-ART (Global Curve Adaptive Rational Tone-mapping), a lightweight differentiable pre-processing module for robust image classification. GC-ART predicts an endpoint-pinned rational tone curve from per-channel soft histograms using a 643-parameter MLP, then applies the curve pointwise before the classifier. The module is trained end-to-end with cross-entropy and a soft monotonicity penalty. On CIFAR-10 with a CIFAR-style ResNet-18, GC-ART matches clean accuracy with the unenhanced baseline and other learned enhancers, improves over the baseline on multiplicative darkening, and achieves the best learned-method result on contrast corruption (48.45% vs. 46.27% for the baseline and 47.13% for Zero-DCE++). These results suggest that histogram-conditioned rational curves can learn useful global tone corrections, including contrast-expanding behavior, while preserving edge locations by construction through pointwise mapping. GC-ART also uses substantially fewer FLOPs than convolutional learned enhancers at 32 x 32. The current hyperparameters are untuned, leaving room for systematic improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级可微分预处理模块GC-ART，通过全局有理色调曲线提升图像分类的照明鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像分类在光照变化下性能下降，现有色调映射方法或计算量大、或不可微分、或无法端到端训练。
analysis.problem: 设计一个轻量、可微分、端到端训练的预处理模块，提升分类器对光照变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GC-ART模块：从每通道软直方图通过643参数MLP预测端点固定的有理色调曲线，逐点应用曲线后输入分类器；端到端训练，损失函数为交叉熵加软单调性惩罚。
contributions: 提出基于直方图条件的有理色调曲线的轻量级可微分预处理模块
在CIFAR-10上验证了该方法在乘性变暗和对比度损坏上的改进，且计算量远小于卷积增强方法
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10上使用CIFAR风格的ResNet-18，与未增强基线和其他学习型增强器对比，在乘性变暗上优于基线，在对比度损坏上达到最佳学习型方法结果（48.45% vs 基线46.27%和Zero-DCE++ 47.13%），且FLOPs显著更低。
limitations: 当前超参数未调优，性能有提升空间
仅在CIFAR-10上验证，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级可微分预处理模块GC-ART，通过全局有理色调曲线提升图像分类的照明鲁棒性。

papers.title: Teacher-Feature Drifting: One-Step Diffusion Distillation with Pretrained Diffusion Representations
papers.abstract: Sampling from pretrained diffusion and flow-matching models typically requires many forward passes to generate diverse and high-fidelity images. Existing distillation methods often rely on multiple auxiliary networks, carefully designed training stages, or complex optimization pipelines. In this work, we revisit the recently proposed Drifting Model objective and show that a single drifting loss can be directly used to simplify one step distillation. A key observation is that the pretrained diffusion teacher itself already provides a strong representation space. Unlike the original Drifting Model, which relies on an additional pretrained feature extractor, we use intermediate hidden states of the pretrained teacher model as the feature representation. This removes the need for training or introducing an extra representation network while preserving a semantically meaningful feature geometry for drifting. Furthermore, we introduce a lightweight mode coverage loss to mitigate mode collapse during distillation and encourage the student generator to cover diverse teacher-supported regions. Extensive experiments on ImageNet and SDXL demonstrate that our method achieves efficient one step generation with competitive image quality and diversity, achieving FID scores of 1.58 on ImageNet-64$\times$64 and 18.4 on SDXL, while substantially simplifying the overall distillation framework.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练扩散模型的中间隐藏状态作为特征空间，简化一步蒸馏流程，无需额外特征提取网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型蒸馏方法通常依赖多个辅助网络、精心设计的训练阶段或复杂的优化流程，导致实现复杂且成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外特征提取网络的前提下，简化一步扩散蒸馏并保持生成质量和多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练扩散教师模型本身已提供强表征空间，其中间隐藏状态具有语义有意义的特征几何结构，可直接用于漂移损失。
analysis.method: 使用预训练教师模型的中间隐藏状态作为特征表示，结合轻量级模式覆盖损失，实现一步蒸馏。
contributions: 提出利用预训练教师模型中间隐藏状态作为特征空间，无需额外特征提取网络。
引入轻量级模式覆盖损失缓解模式坍塌，提升生成多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-64×64上FID为1.58，在SDXL上FID为18.4，生成质量和多样性具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能对教师模型中间层选择敏感。
模式覆盖损失可能增加少量计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练扩散模型的中间隐藏状态作为特征空间，简化一步蒸馏流程，无需额外特征提取网络。

papers.title: GEM: Generating LiDAR World Model via Deformable Mamba
papers.abstract: World models, which simulate environmental dynamics and generate sensor observations, are gaining increasing attention in autonomous driving. However, progress in LiDAR-based world models has lagged behind those built on camera videos or occupancy data, primarily due to two core challenges: the inherent disorder of LiDAR point clouds and the difficulty of distinguishing dynamic objects from static structures. To address these issues, we propose GEM: a Generative LiDAR world model that leverages deformable mamba architecture, significantly improving fidelity and imaginative capability. Specifically, leveraging the structural similarity between sequential laser scanning and Mamba's processing mechanism, we first tokenize LiDAR sweeps into compact representations via a custom LiDAR scene tokenizer. After unsupervised disentanglement of tokenized features via a dynamic-static separator, a tri-path deformable Mamba is introduced to perform selective scanning and adaptive gating fusion over the disentangled features, leading to enhanced spatial-temporal understanding of the world evolution. Optionally, a planner and a BEV layout controller can be integrated to explore the model's capability for autonomous rollout and its potential to generate ``what-if" scenarios. Extensive experiments show that GEM achieves state-of-the-art performances across diverse benchmarks and evaluation settings, demonstrating its superiority and effectiveness. Project page: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于可变形Mamba的LiDAR世界模型GEM，通过动态-静态分离和三路径扫描提升点云序列生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: LiDAR世界模型在自动驾驶中具有重要价值，但现有方法因点云无序性和动态物体与静态结构难以区分而进展缓慢。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高保真、具有想象力的LiDAR点云序列，并有效建模环境动态演化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LiDAR点云的无序性以及动态与静态物体区分困难是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出GEM模型：先通过LiDAR场景分词器将扫描序列压缩为紧凑表示，再经动态-静态分离器无监督解耦特征，最后用三路径可变形Mamba进行选择性扫描和自适应门控融合，可选集成规划器和BEV布局控制器。
contributions: 提出首个基于可变形Mamba的LiDAR世界模型，解决点云无序性和动态-静态区分难题。
设计LiDAR场景分词器和动态-静态分离器，实现高效特征解耦。
引入三路径可变形Mamba架构，增强时空理解。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和评估设置上达到最先进性能，具体结果摘要未详细说明。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LiDAR扫描模式，泛化性需验证。
可变形Mamba的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于可变形Mamba的LiDAR世界模型GEM，通过动态-静态分离和三路径扫描提升点云序列生成质量。

papers.title: Amortized-Precision Quantization for Early-Exit Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance across vision tasks, yet their deployment with low-precision early exiting remains fragile. Existing quantization methods assume static full-depth execution, making them unstable when exit decisions are perturbed by quantization noise, which can amplify errors along dynamic inference paths. In this paper, we introduce Amortized-Precision Quantization (APQ), a utilization-aware formulation that accounts for layer-wise stochastic exposure to quantization noise and reveals depth-precision trade-offs. Building on APQ, we propose Mutual Adaptive Quantization with Early Exiting (MAQEE), a bi-level framework that jointly optimizes exit thresholds and bit-widths under explicit risk control to improve inference stability. MAQEE establishes a superior Pareto frontier in the accuracy-efficiency trade-off, reducing BOPs by up to 95% while maintaining accuracy and outperforming strong baselines by up to 20\% across classification, detection, and segmentation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出摊销精度量化方法，联合优化退出阈值与位宽，在早期退出ViT中实现精度-效率帕累托最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有量化方法假设静态全深度执行，在早期退出ViT中因量化噪声扰动退出决策导致不稳定，需要一种感知利用率的方法来平衡深度与精度。
analysis.problem: 早期退出ViT在低精度量化下推理不稳定，量化噪声沿动态路径放大误差，需联合优化退出阈值和位宽。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出量化噪声会扰动退出决策，沿动态推理路径放大误差，且存在深度-精度权衡。
analysis.method: 提出摊销精度量化（APQ）公式化层间随机量化噪声暴露，并设计MAQEE双层框架联合优化退出阈值和位宽，显式控制风险。
contributions: 提出APQ，一种利用率感知的量化公式，揭示深度-精度权衡。
提出MAQEE，双层框架联合优化退出阈值和位宽，实现精度-效率帕累托最优。
analysis.experiments: 在分类、检测和分割任务上，MAQEE减少高达95%的BOPs，同时保持精度，比强基线提升高达20%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于ViT架构，未验证其他Transformer变体。
双层优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出摊销精度量化方法，联合优化退出阈值与位宽，在早期退出ViT中实现精度-效率帕累托最优。

papers.title: EgoPro-Bench: Benchmarking Personalized Proactive Interaction in Egocentric Video Streams
papers.abstract: Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) remain primarily reactive, failing to continuously perceive environments or proactively assist users. While emerging benchmarks address proactivity, they are largely confined to alert scenarios, neglect personalized context, and fail to evaluate the precise timing of human-machine interactions (HMI).In this paper, we introduce EgoPro-Bench, a novel benchmark for training and evaluating proactive interaction capabilities based on streaming egocentric videos; it comprises 2,400 videos in the evaluation set and over 12,000 videos in the training this http URL previous works, EgoPro-Bench leverages simulated user profiles to generate diverse user intentions and to construct high-fidelity HMI data across 12 distinct this http URL , we propose a specialized evaluation protocol and metrics, train proactive interaction models designed for efficient reasoning and low-latency interaction on streaming video data, and conduct comprehensive this http URL , we introduce an interaction principle termed "short thinking, better interaction", which allocates a limited token budget prior to intent recognition, thereby enhancing interaction this http URL experiments demonstrate that EgoPro-Bench substantially enhances the intention understanding capabilities of MLLMs and enables accurate identification of appropriate timings for HMI, thereby laying a solid foundation for next-generation user-centric proactive interactive agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于第一人称视频流的个性化主动交互基准EgoPro-Bench，包含2400个评测视频和12000个训练视频，并验证了“短思考、更好交互”原则的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM主要被动响应，缺乏持续感知和主动辅助能力；已有主动交互基准局限于警报场景，忽略个性化上下文，且无法评估交互时机。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能评估和训练MLLM在流式第一人称视频中实现个性化主动交互（包括意图理解和时机选择）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建EgoPro-Bench基准：利用模拟用户画像生成多样化用户意图，构建12种场景的高保真人机交互数据；提出“短思考、更好交互”原则，在意图识别前分配有限token预算以提升交互效率。
contributions: 提出首个面向流式第一人称视频的个性化主动交互基准EgoPro-Bench，包含大规模训练和评测数据。
设计专门的评测协议和指标，并训练了适用于流式视频的低延迟主动交互模型。
引入“短思考、更好交互”原则，通过限制意图识别前的token预算提升交互效率。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明EgoPro-Bench显著增强MLLM的意图理解能力，并使其能准确识别人机交互的合适时机。
limitations: 模拟用户画像可能无法完全覆盖真实用户的多样性。
基准场景数量有限（12种），可能无法涵盖所有主动交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于第一人称视频流的个性化主动交互基准EgoPro-Bench，包含2400个评测视频和12000个训练视频，并验证了“短思考、更好交互”原则的有效性。

papers.title: Sword: Style-Robust World Models as Simulators via Dynamic Latent Bootstrapping for VLA Policy Post-Training
papers.abstract: The integration of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with World Models has gained increasing attention. One representative approach treats learned World Models as generative simulators, enabling policy optimization entirely within "imagination." However, when deployed as simulators for specific environments such as the LIBERO benchmark, existing World Models often suffer from poor generalization and long-horizon error accumulation. During closed-loop rollouts, these models are highly sensitive to initial-state perturbations; minor changes in color, illumination, and other visual factors can trigger cascading hallucinations, leading to severe blurriness or overexposure. Moreover, long-horizon error accumulation further degrades the quality and fidelity of predicted future states. These issues limit the reliability of World Models as simulators. To mitigate these problems, we propose Sword, a robust World Model framework. Our method introduces Structure-Guided Style Augmentation to disentangle the visual textures of interactive environments from task-relevant dynamics, thereby improving generalization. We further propose Dynamic Latent Bootstrapping, which maintains consistency between training and inference while keeping memory consumption low. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that our method significantly outperforms the baseline WoVR in terms of generalization, generation quality, robustness, fidelity, and the success rate of reinforcement-learning post-training for VLA models.

analysis.tldr: 提出Sword框架，通过结构引导风格增强和动态潜在引导提升世界模型作为VLA策略后训练模拟器的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型作为模拟器时泛化性差、长程误差累积严重，对初始状态扰动敏感，限制了其在VLA策略后训练中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 世界模型在闭环推演中对视觉变化（颜色、光照等）鲁棒性不足，且长程预测误差累积导致生成质量下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有世界模型在LIBERO基准中，初始状态微小扰动（如颜色、光照变化）会引发级联幻觉，导致严重模糊或过曝；长程误差累积进一步降低预测状态的质量和保真度。
analysis.method: 提出Sword框架，包含结构引导风格增强（解耦视觉纹理与任务相关动态）和动态潜在引导（保持训练与推理一致性，降低内存消耗）。
contributions: 提出结构引导风格增强，提升世界模型对视觉变化的泛化能力
提出动态潜在引导，维持训练与推理一致性并降低内存消耗
在LIBERO基准上显著优于基线WoVR，在泛化、生成质量、鲁棒性、保真度和VLA强化学习后训练成功率方面均有提升
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO基准上进行了实验，与基线WoVR比较，在泛化、生成质量、鲁棒性、保真度和VLA后训练成功率方面表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在LIBERO基准上验证，泛化到其他环境需进一步测试
动态潜在引导的长期一致性可能仍有局限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Sword框架，通过结构引导风格增强和动态潜在引导提升世界模型作为VLA策略后训练模拟器的鲁棒性。

papers.title: SplatWeaver: Learning to Allocate Gaussian Primitives for Generalizable Novel View Synthesis
papers.abstract: Generalizable novel view synthesis aims to render unseen views from uncalibrated input images without requiring per-scene optimization. Recent feed-forward approaches based on 3D Gaussian Splatting have achieved promising efficiency and rendering quality. However, most of them assign a fixed number of Gaussians to each pixel or voxel, ignoring the spatially varying complexity of real-world scenes. Such uniform allocation often wastes Gaussian primitives in smooth regions while providing insufficient capacity for fine structures, complex geometry, and high-frequency details. This motivates us to predict region-dependent primitive cardinalities rather than impose a fixed primitive budget everywhere, enabling a more expressive yet compact 3D scene representation. Therefore, we propose SplatWeaver, a generalizable novel view synthesis framework that is able to dynamically allocate Gaussian primitives over different regions in a feed-forward manner. Specifically, SplatWeaver introduces cardinality Gaussian experts and a pixel-level routing scheme, wherein each expert specializes in producing a specific number of primitives from 0 to M, and the routing scheme coordinates these experts to adaptively determine how many Gaussian primitives should be allocated to each spatial location. Moreover, SplatWeaver incorporates a high-frequency prior with attendant guidance module and routing regularization to stabilize expert selection and promote complexity-aware allocation. By leveraging high-frequency structural cues, the routing process is encouraged to assign more Gaussian primitives to fine structures, complex geometry, and textured regions, while suppressing redundant primitives in smooth areas. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios show that SplatWeaver consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, delivering more faithful novel-view renderings with fewer Gaussian primitives.

analysis.tldr: SplatWeaver通过动态分配高斯原语数量，实现更高效、更高质量的可泛化新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅的前馈方法为每个像素或体素分配固定数量的高斯原语，忽略了真实场景的空间复杂度变化，导致平滑区域浪费原语而精细结构容量不足。
analysis.problem: 如何根据区域复杂度自适应地分配高斯原语数量，以实现更紧凑且表达能力更强的3D场景表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 均匀分配高斯原语在平滑区域造成冗余，在精细结构、复杂几何和高频细节区域容量不足。
analysis.method: 提出SplatWeaver框架，包含基数高斯专家和像素级路由方案，每个专家生成0到M个原语，路由协调专家自适应决定每个位置的原语数量；并引入高频先验、引导模块和路由正则化以稳定专家选择并促进复杂度感知分配。
contributions: 提出动态分配高斯原语数量的可泛化新视角合成框架SplatWeaver。
设计基数高斯专家和像素级路由机制，实现区域自适应的原语分配。
引入高频先验和路由正则化，提升精细结构的渲染质量并减少冗余。
analysis.experiments: 在多种场景下进行实验，SplatWeaver一致优于现有方法，用更少的高斯原语生成更忠实的新视角渲染。
limitations: 可能依赖高频先验的准确性，在无纹理区域可能效果有限。
路由机制可能增加计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SplatWeaver通过动态分配高斯原语数量，实现更高效、更高质量的可泛化新视角合成。

papers.title: From Clouds to Hallucinations: Atmospheric Retrieval Hijacking in Remote Sensing Vision-Language RAG
papers.abstract: Multimodal RAG systems increasingly rely on vision-language retrievers to ground visual queries in external textual evidence. Existing adversarial studies on RAG mainly manipulate the retrieval corpus or memory, while attacks on vision-language and remote sensing models typically target end-task predictions. Input-space threats to the evidence retrieval stage of remote sensing multimodal RAG remain underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CloudWeb, an atmospheric retrieval hijacking attack that modifies only the input image while keeping the retriever, generator, and knowledge base fixed at deployment. CloudWeb overlays parameterized cloud- and haze-like patterns on remote sensing images and optimizes them with a retrieval-oriented objective that pulls adversarial image embeddings toward target atmospheric evidence, suppresses source-scene evidence, enforces rank separation, and regularizes naturalness and coverage. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study of retrieval-stage atmospheric evidence hijacking in remote sensing multimodal RAG. We evaluate CloudWeb on a seven-dataset remote sensing RAG benchmark with five CLIP-style retrievers, including GeoRSCLIP, RemoteCLIP, OpenAI CLIP, and OpenCLIP, together with downstream vision-language generators. Across retrievers, CloudWeb consistently outperforms clean retrieval, handcrafted atmospheric baselines, random cloud perturbations, and fixed variants in injecting weather-related evidence into top-ranked results. On GeoRSCLIP ViT-B/32, Weather@5 increases from 0.71\% to 43.29\%. Downstream generation further shows measurable weather hallucination and semantic shift, indicating that retrieval-stage hijacking can propagate to the final RAG response. These findings reveal a practical failure mode: natural-looking atmospheric changes can compromise evidence retrieval before generation begins.

analysis.tldr: 提出CloudWeb攻击，通过添加云/雾状扰动即可劫持遥感多模态RAG系统的检索阶段，使检索结果偏向目标天气证据，并传播至最终生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG对抗攻击主要操纵检索语料库或记忆，而针对视觉-语言和遥感模型的攻击通常针对最终任务预测，输入空间对遥感多模态RAG证据检索阶段的威胁尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 研究遥感多模态RAG系统中，仅修改输入图像即可劫持证据检索阶段，使检索结果偏向目标大气证据（如天气相关文本）的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CloudWeb攻击：在遥感图像上叠加参数化的云/雾状图案，通过检索导向的目标优化（拉近对抗嵌入与目标大气证据、抑制源场景证据、强制排名分离、正则化自然度和覆盖率）来优化扰动。
contributions: 首次研究遥感多模态RAG中检索阶段的大气证据劫持攻击。
提出CloudWeb攻击方法，在多个检索器和数据集上有效注入天气相关证据，并导致下游生成出现可测量的天气幻觉和语义偏移。
analysis.experiments: 在包含七个数据集的遥感RAG基准上，使用五种CLIP风格检索器（GeoRSCLIP、RemoteCLIP、OpenAI CLIP、OpenCLIP）及下游视觉-语言生成器进行评估。CloudWeb在注入天气相关证据方面一致优于干净检索、手工大气基线、随机云扰动和固定变体。在GeoRSCLIP ViT-B/32上，Weather@5从0.71%提升至43.29%。
limitations: 攻击仅针对遥感图像中的大气模式，可能不适用于其他领域或扰动类型。
未探讨防御机制或对更复杂RAG架构的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CloudWeb攻击，通过添加云/雾状扰动即可劫持遥感多模态RAG系统的检索阶段，使检索结果偏向目标天气证据，并传播至最终生成。

papers.title: Sat3R: Satellite DSM Reconstruction via RPC-Aware Depth Fine-tuning
papers.abstract: Accurate Digital Surface Model (DSM) reconstruction from satellite imagery is critical for applications such as disaster response, urban planning, and large-scale geographic mapping. Existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off: optimization-based methods achieve strong accuracy but require hours of per-scene computation, while generalizable geometry foundation models offer near-instant inference but fail to generalize to satellite imagery due to the domain gap introduced by the Rational Polynomial Camera (RPC) model and mismatched depth scale distributions. We present Sat3R, a feed-forward framework that bridges this gap via RPC-aware metric depth fine-tuning of Depth Anything V2 using the Scale-Invariant Logarithmic (SiLog) loss. By constructing physically consistent pseudo depth supervision from RPC geometry, Sat3R adapts a monocular depth foundation model to the satellite domain without per-scene optimization. Experiments on the DFC2019 benchmark demonstrate that Sat3R reduces MAE by 38% over zero-shot feed-forward baselines and achieves competitive accuracy against optimization-based methods, while delivering over 300x speedup.
