Sat3R demonstrates that feed-forward models, when properly adapted to the satellite domain, can match optimization-based accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost, paving the way for practical large-scale satellite DSM reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 通过RPC感知深度微调，将单目深度基础模型适配到卫星域，实现快速高精度DSM重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星图像DSM重建在灾害响应、城市规划等应用中至关重要，但现有方法在精度和速度之间存在权衡：优化方法精度高但计算慢，通用几何基础模型推理快但无法泛化到卫星图像。
analysis.problem: 解决通用几何基础模型因RPC模型和深度尺度分布差异导致的卫星图像域泛化失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用几何基础模型（如Depth Anything V2）在卫星图像上表现不佳，主要由于RPC模型引入的域差异和深度尺度分布不匹配。
analysis.method: 基于RPC感知的度量深度微调：使用Scale-Invariant Logarithmic (SiLog)损失对Depth Anything V2进行微调，并从RPC几何构造物理一致的伪深度监督。
contributions: 提出Sat3R，一种前馈框架，通过RPC感知深度微调将单目深度基础模型适配到卫星域，无需逐场景优化。
在DFC2019基准上，MAE降低38%，速度提升300倍以上，精度与优化方法相当。
analysis.experiments: 在DFC2019基准上评估，与零样本前馈基线和优化方法对比，报告了MAE和速度指标。
limitations: 可能依赖RPC几何的准确性，若RPC参数不精确可能影响性能。
仅针对卫星图像，未验证对其他遥感数据（如航空图像）的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过RPC感知深度微调，将单目深度基础模型适配到卫星域，实现快速高精度DSM重建。

papers.title: Adaptive Subspace Projection for Generative Personalization
papers.abstract: Generative personalization often suffers from the semantic collapsing problem (SCP), where a learned personalized concept overpowers the rest of the text prompt, causing the model to ignore important contextual details. To address this, we first analyze the underlying cause, revealing that the semantic drift responsible for SCP is not random but is concentrated within a specific low-dimensional subspace. We also discover that the personalization process perturbs the embedding of the original base concept, making it an unstable reference point. Based on these insights, we introduce Test-time Embedding Adjustment with Adaptive Subspace Projection (AdaptSP), a training-free method that uses the stable, pre-trained embedding as an anchor. AdaptSP isolates the semantic drift and projects it onto the identified subspace, performing a precise adjustment that mitigates SCP while maintaining the subject identity. Our experiments show that this targeted approach significantly improves prompt fidelity and contextual alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出AdaptSP方法，通过自适应子空间投影解决生成个性化中的语义崩溃问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成个性化中，学习到的概念会压制文本提示的其他部分，导致忽略重要上下文细节，即语义崩溃问题（SCP）。
analysis.problem: 解决生成个性化中的语义崩溃问题，即个性化概念主导生成，忽略提示中的其他上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义漂移并非随机，而是集中在特定低维子空间；个性化过程扰动原始基础概念的嵌入，使其成为不稳定的参考点。
analysis.method: 提出测试时嵌入调整方法AdaptSP，利用稳定的预训练嵌入作为锚点，隔离语义漂移并将其投影到识别出的子空间，进行精确调整。
contributions: 揭示了语义崩溃问题中语义漂移集中在低维子空间的现象
提出无需训练的AdaptSP方法，有效缓解语义崩溃并保持主体身份
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练嵌入的稳定性
子空间识别方法可能需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AdaptSP方法，通过自适应子空间投影解决生成个性化中的语义崩溃问题。

papers.title: TAS-LoRA: Transformer Architecture Search with Mixture-of-LoRA Experts
papers.abstract: Transformer architecture search (TAS) discovers optimal vision transformer (ViT) architectures automatically, reducing human effort to manually design ViTs. However, existing TAS methods suffer from the feature collapse problem, where subnets within a supernet fail to learn subnet-specific features, mainly due to the shared weights in a supernet, limiting the performance of individual subnets. To address this, we propose TAS-LoRA, a novel method that introduces parameter-efficient low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to enable subnet-specific feature learning, while maintaining computational efficiency. TAS-LoRA incorporates a Mixture-of-LoRAExperts (MoLE) strategy, where a lightweight router dynamically assigns LoRA experts based on subnet architectures, and introduces a group-wise router initialization technique to encourage diverse feature learning across experts early in training. Extensive experiments on ImageNet and several transfer learning benchmarks, including CIFAR-10/100, Flowers, CARS, and INAT-19, demonstrate that TAS-LoRA mitigates feature collapse effectively, improving performance over state-of-the-art TAS methods significantly.

analysis.tldr: TAS-LoRA通过混合LoRA专家和动态路由解决视觉Transformer架构搜索中的特征坍缩问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Transformer架构搜索方法因超网中共享权重导致子网特征坍缩，限制了子网性能，亟需一种既能学习子网特定特征又保持计算效率的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决TAS中特征坍缩问题，使子网能学习到子网特定的特征表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出特征坍缩源于超网中的权重共享，导致子网无法学习独特特征。
analysis.method: 提出TAS-LoRA，引入参数高效的低秩适应（LoRA）实现子网特定特征学习，并采用混合LoRA专家（MoLE）策略，通过轻量路由器根据子网架构动态分配LoRA专家，同时引入分组路由器初始化技术促进早期专家多样性。
contributions: 首次将LoRA引入Transformer架构搜索以缓解特征坍缩。
提出MoLE策略和分组路由器初始化，实现高效且多样化的子网特征学习。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet及CIFAR-10/100、Flowers、CARS、INAT-19等多个迁移学习基准上实验，结果表明TAS-LoRA有效缓解特征坍缩，显著优于现有TAS方法。
limitations: 可能增加路由器的额外计算开销。
LoRA专家的数量与性能之间的权衡需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TAS-LoRA通过混合LoRA专家和动态路由解决视觉Transformer架构搜索中的特征坍缩问题。

papers.title: High-Fidelity Surface Splatting-Based 3D Reconstruction from Multi-View Images
papers.abstract: Multi-view mesh reconstruction remains a core challenge in computer graphics and vision, especially for recovering high-frequency geometry from sparse observations. Recent methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) rely on post-processing for mesh extraction, thereby limiting joint optimization of geometry and appearance. Implicit Moving Least Squares (IMLS) instead enables direct conversion of point clouds into signed distance and texture fields, supporting end-to-end reconstruction and rendering. However, existing IMLS formulations use exponential kernels that struggle with high-frequency detail. We introduce a compact polynomial kernel with local support and greater flexibility, allowing better control over frequency content and improved geometric fidelity. To further enhance fine details, we incorporate stochastic regularization with Laplacian filtering. Together, these improve the preservation of high-frequency structure while maintaining stable optimization. Experiments show state-of-the-art performance in both surface reconstruction and rendering, yielding more accurate geometry and sharper visuals from multi-view data.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于多项式核的隐式移动最小二乘法，用于从多视图图像进行高保真表面重建和渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 多视图网格重建是计算机图形学和视觉的核心挑战，现有方法如3DGS和NeRF依赖后处理提取网格，限制了几何与外观的联合优化；而IMLS方法使用指数核难以恢复高频细节。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏多视图观测中联合优化几何与外观，并恢复高频几何细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有IMLS方法使用指数核，难以处理高频细节。
analysis.method: 引入紧凑的局部支持多项式核替代指数核，并结合拉普拉斯滤波的随机正则化，以更好地控制频率内容并提高几何保真度。
contributions: 提出一种紧凑多项式核的IMLS公式，具有局部支持和更高灵活性，改善高频细节恢复。
引入随机正则化与拉普拉斯滤波，增强高频结构保持并维持稳定优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对噪声或异常值敏感，需要进一步验证鲁棒性。
计算复杂度可能高于传统方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于多项式核的隐式移动最小二乘法，用于从多视图图像进行高保真表面重建和渲染。

papers.title: LENS: Low-Frequency Eigen Noise Shaping for Efficient Diffusion Sampling
papers.abstract: Distilled diffusion models accelerate image generation by reducing the number of denoising steps, but often suffer from degraded image quality. To mitigate this trade-off, test-time optimization methods improve quality, yet their iterative nature incurs substantial computational overhead and leads to slow inference, limiting practical usability. Recent hypernetwork-based approaches amortize this process during training, but still require costly noise modulation in high-dimensional latent spaces. In this work, we propose LENS (Low-frequency Eigen Noise Shaping), an efficient noise modulation framework that operates in a low-dimensional subspace. Our approach is motivated by the observation that low-frequency components of the noise largely determine the global structure and visual fidelity of generated images. Based on this observation, we provide a theoretical justification for restricting modulation to the low-frequency subspace and derive a principled training objective. Building on this, LENS employs a lightweight, standalone network to selectively modulate these components, enabling efficient and targeted noise modulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LENS achieves competitive image quality while reducing FLOPs by 400-700$\times$, model parameters by 25-75$\times$, and inference-time overhead by 10-20$\times$ compared to prior methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出LENS，在低维子空间调制噪声低频成分，实现高效扩散采样。
analysis.research_motivation: 蒸馏扩散模型虽加速生成但图像质量下降，现有测试时优化方法计算开销大，超网络方法仍需高维噪声调制，效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持图像质量的同时，高效地调制噪声以提升蒸馏扩散模型的采样效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到噪声的低频成分主要决定生成图像的全局结构和视觉保真度。
analysis.method: LENS：基于理论证明将噪声调制限制在低频子空间，使用轻量独立网络选择性调制低频成分。
contributions: 发现噪声低频成分主导图像全局结构和视觉保真度，并提供理论证明。
提出LENS框架，在低维子空间进行高效噪声调制，大幅降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在图像生成任务上，LENS相比先前方法FLOPs减少400-700倍，参数量减少25-75倍，推理时间开销减少10-20倍，同时达到有竞争力的图像质量。
limitations: 可能依赖特定噪声分布假设。
低频子空间的选择可能需针对不同模型调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LENS，在低维子空间调制噪声低频成分，实现高效扩散采样。

papers.title: Hard to Read, Easy to Jailbreak: How Visual Degradation Bypasses MLLM Safety Alignment
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in visual context compression enable MLLMs to process ultra-long contexts efficiently by rendering text into images. However, we identify a critical vulnerability inherent to this paradigm: lowering image resolution inadvertently catalyzes jailbreaking. Our experiments reveal that the safety defenses of SOTA models deteriorate sharply as resolution degrades, surprisingly persisting even when text remains legible. We attribute this to ``Cognitive Overload'', hypothesizing that the effort required to decipher degraded inputs diverts attentional resources from safety auditing. This phenomenon is consistent across various visual perturbations, including noise and geometric distortion. To address this, we propose a simple ``Structured Cognitive Offloading'' strategy that mitigates these risks by enforcing a serialized pipeline to decouple visual transcription from safety assessment. Our work exposes a significant risk in vision-based compression and provides critical insights for the secure design of future MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 视觉退化（如低分辨率）会绕过MLLM的安全对齐，导致越狱攻击，提出结构化认知卸载策略缓解风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉上下文压缩技术使MLLM能处理超长上下文，但引入了新的安全漏洞，现有研究未充分关注视觉退化对安全对齐的影响。
analysis.problem: 视觉退化（低分辨率、噪声、几何畸变）如何绕过MLLM的安全对齐机制，以及如何防御此类攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，随着图像分辨率降低，SOTA模型的安全防御急剧下降，即使文本仍可读；该现象在多种视觉扰动（噪声、几何畸变）下一致，归因于“认知过载”——解码退化输入消耗注意力资源，削弱安全审计。
analysis.method: 提出“结构化认知卸载”策略，通过强制序列化流水线将视觉转录与安全评估解耦，从而缓解风险。
contributions: 首次揭示视觉退化（如低分辨率）可绕过MLLM安全对齐，导致越狱攻击。
提出“认知过载”假说解释该现象，并设计结构化认知卸载策略进行防御。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 策略可能增加计算开销或延迟。
未验证对更复杂视觉扰动（如对抗性攻击）的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉退化（如低分辨率）会绕过MLLM的安全对齐，导致越狱攻击，提出结构化认知卸载策略缓解风险。

papers.title: Towards multi-modal forgery representation learning for AI-generated video detection and localization
papers.abstract: Recent advances in generative AI have democratized video creation at scale. AI-generated videos, including partially manipulated clips across visual and audio channels, pose escalating risks of semantic distortion and misuse, which motivates the need for reliable detection tools. Most existing AI-generated video detectors remain limited by single- or partial-modality of data modeling and the lack of fine-grained temporal forgery localization. To address these challenges, our primary novelty introduces a core architecture that jointly integrates an LMM semantic branch with a spatio-temporal (ST) visual branch and a multi-scale partial-spoof (PS) audio branch. This multi-modal approach enables simultaneous detection and fine-grained temporal localization of partially manipulated AI-generated video forgeries. Extensive experiments show that this approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态伪造表征学习框架，联合视觉、音频和语义分支，实现AI生成视频的检测与细粒度时间定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成视频检测方法多依赖单模态或部分模态，且缺乏细粒度时间伪造定位能力，难以应对跨视觉和音频通道的部分篡改视频带来的语义扭曲和滥用风险。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多模态AI生成视频的联合检测与细粒度时间伪造定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个核心架构，联合集成LMM语义分支、时空视觉分支和多尺度部分伪造音频分支，实现多模态伪造表征学习。
contributions: 首次提出联合LMM语义、时空视觉和多尺度音频的多模态架构用于AI生成视频检测与定位。
实现同时检测和细粒度时间定位部分篡改的AI生成视频伪造。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多模态数据，实际场景中数据获取困难。
计算复杂度较高，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态伪造表征学习框架，联合视觉、音频和语义分支，实现AI生成视频的检测与细粒度时间定位。

papers.title: CASCADE: Context-Aware Relaxation for Speculative Image Decoding
papers.abstract: Autoregressive generation is a powerful approach for high-fidelity image synthesis, but it remains computationally demanding and slow even on the most advanced accelerators. While speculative decoding has been explored to mitigate this bottleneck, existing approaches fail to achieve efficiency gains comparable to those observed in text generation. A key limitation is the target model's high uncertainty during image generation, which leads to high draft token rejection rates. In this work, we identify previously overlooked patterns in the target model's behavior that emerge naturally in tree-based speculative decoding. Specifically, we formalize two properties, semantic interchangeability and convergence, arising from the redundancies in the target model's hidden state representations. By capturing these redundancies across the depth and breadth of the predicted token tree, our method identifies principled opportunities for acceptance relaxation without requiring additional training. Additionally, we enhance standalone drafter performance by injecting the redundancy signals from the target model into drafter training with minimal modification. We evaluate our approach across multiple text-to-image models and drafter architectures. Results show that CASCADE achieves state-of-the-art speedups for drafter-based speculative decoding, with up to 3.6x acceleration, while maintaining image quality and text-prompt fidelity.

analysis.tldr: CASCADE通过利用目标模型隐藏状态的冗余性，在树状推测解码中实现无训练接受松弛，达到最高3.6倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归图像生成计算成本高、速度慢，现有推测解码方法在图像生成中效率提升有限，主要原因是目标模型的高不确定性导致草稿令牌拒绝率高。
analysis.problem: 如何降低推测解码中草稿令牌的拒绝率，实现图像生成的高效加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现目标模型在树状推测解码中表现出语义可互换性和收敛性两种冗余模式，这些模式源于隐藏状态表示的冗余。
analysis.method: 提出CASCADE方法，通过形式化语义可互换性和收敛性两种属性，在树状预测中捕捉冗余，实现无训练的接受松弛；同时将目标模型的冗余信号注入草稿模型训练中，提升草稿模型性能。
contributions: 识别并形式化了树状推测解码中目标模型隐藏状态的两种冗余属性：语义可互换性和收敛性。
提出无需额外训练的接受松弛方法，利用冗余性降低拒绝率。
通过注入冗余信号改进草稿模型训练，进一步提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个文本到图像模型和草稿架构上评估，CASCADE实现了最高3.6倍加速，同时保持图像质量和文本提示保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定树状解码结构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论对非自回归生成模型的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CASCADE通过利用目标模型隐藏状态的冗余性，在树状推测解码中实现无训练接受松弛，达到最高3.6倍加速。

papers.title: DINO-MVR: Multi-View Readout of Frozen DINOv3 for Annotation-Efficient Medical Segmentation
papers.abstract: Adapting foundation models to medical segmentation typically requires either backbone fine-tuning or high-capacity task-specific decoders, both of which are difficult to fit reliably when annotations are scarce. We show that frozen DINOv3 features already contain useful structural and boundary cues for medical segmentation, and that the main bottleneck lies in how these features are read out. We propose DINO-MVR, a Multi-View Readout framework for annotation-efficient medical segmentation. DINO-MVR trains only lightweight MLP probes on features from the final three transformer blocks of a frozen DINOv3 backbone, without updating the backbone itself. At inference, each input is interpreted through complementary resolutions and test-time augmentations, whose probability maps are combined by entropy-weighted fusion and refined with simple spatial regularization. For volumetric inputs, Gaussian z-axis smoothing further improves inter-slice consistency. Under fixed evaluation protocols on endoscopy, dermoscopy, and MRI benchmarks, DINO-MVR achieves strong readout-only performance, including 0.895 Dice on Kvasir-SEG, 0.897 Dice on ISIC 2018, and 0.908 Dice on BraTS FLAIR whole-tumor segmentation. With only five annotated BraTS patients, it recovers 98.4% of the performance obtained by the 40-patient BraTS reference run. These results suggest that frozen self-supervised vision backbones can support accurate medical segmentation when paired with an effective multi-view readout.

analysis.tldr: 冻结DINOv3特征配合多视图读出即可高效实现医学分割，无需微调骨干网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学分割中标注数据稀缺，现有方法依赖骨干微调或高容量解码器，难以在少标注场景下可靠适配。
analysis.problem: 如何在标注稀缺条件下，利用冻结的预训练视觉特征实现准确的医学分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 冻结的DINOv3特征已包含结构性和边界线索，主要瓶颈在于特征的读出方式。
analysis.method: 提出DINO-MVR，仅训练轻量MLP探针读取冻结DINOv3最后三个Transformer块的特征，推理时通过互补分辨率、测试时增强、熵加权融合和空间正则化组合概率图，对体积输入使用高斯z轴平滑。
contributions: 证明冻结DINOv3特征可用于医学分割，且读出方式是关键瓶颈。
提出多视图读出框架，仅需轻量MLP探针，无需微调骨干。
在多个医学分割基准上取得强性能，尤其在极低标注下接近全标注性能。
analysis.experiments: 在内镜、皮肤镜和MRI基准上评估，Kvasir-SEG Dice 0.895，ISIC 2018 Dice 0.897，BraTS FLAIR全肿瘤分割Dice 0.908；仅用5个BraTS患者标注恢复40患者参考运行的98.4%性能。
limitations: 仅验证了DINOv3，其他自监督骨干可能不适用。
多视图融合增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 冻结DINOv3特征配合多视图读出即可高效实现医学分割，无需微调骨干网络。

papers.title: LoHGNet: Infrared Small Target Detection through Lorentz Geometric Encoding with High-Order Relation Learning
papers.abstract: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) remains challenging due to the scarcity of useful target cues and the presence of severe background clutter. Most current methods rely on conventional feature learning and local interaction modeling, where features are represented in Euclidean space. However, such designs may still be limited in describing the subtle differences of weak targets and the contextual relations between targets and backgrounds. To address these limitations, we propose LoHGNet, an IRSTD network that integrates Lorentz geometric encoding with high-order relation learning. By introducing Lorentz manifold based feature learning, LoHGNet offers a different feature representation from conventional IRSTD methods and provides new discriminative cues for IRSTD. Specifically, a Lorentz encoding branch is constructed with the Geometric Attention Guided Lorentz Residual Convolution Module (GA-LRCM) to perform feature modeling under hyperbolic geometric constraints and enhance the hierarchical geometric representation capability of weak targets. Subsequently, the hyperbolic features are mapped into the Euclidean tangent space through logarithmic mapping, and a High-Order Relation Learning Module (HORL) is designed to model the high-order contextual dependencies between targets and backgrounds via hypergraph construction, thereby improving target discrimination in complex backgrounds. Experimental results on three datasets demonstrate that the proposed LoHGNet achieves competitive performance in both detection accuracy and adaptability to complex scenes. The code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: LoHGNet通过洛伦兹几何编码和高阶关系学习提升红外小目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外小目标检测因目标线索稀缺和背景杂波严重而极具挑战，现有方法在欧氏空间中的特征表示难以描述弱目标的细微差异及目标与背景的上下文关系。
analysis.problem: 如何利用非欧几何（洛伦兹流形）的特征表示和高阶关系建模来增强红外小目标检测的判别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LoHGNet，包含几何注意力引导的洛伦兹残差卷积模块（GA-LRCM）进行双曲几何约束下的特征建模，以及高阶关系学习模块（HORL）通过超图构建建模目标与背景的高阶上下文依赖。
contributions: 首次将洛伦兹几何编码引入红外小目标检测，提供新的判别特征表示。
设计GA-LRCM和HORL模块，分别增强弱目标的层次几何表示能力和复杂背景下的目标判别能力。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集上实验，检测精度和复杂场景适应性均取得竞争性能。
limitations: 可能对超参数（如曲率）敏感。
计算复杂度可能高于传统欧氏方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoHGNet通过洛伦兹几何编码和高阶关系学习提升红外小目标检测性能。

papers.title: From Pixels to Primitives: Scene Change Detection in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Scene change detection methods built on Gaussian splatting universally follow a render-then-compare paradigm: the pre-change scene is rendered into 2D and compared against post-change images via pixel or feature residuals. This change detection problem with Gaussian Splatting has been treated as a question about pixels; we treat it as a question about primitives. We provide direct evidence that native primitive attributes alone -- position, anisotropic covariance, and color -- carry sufficient signal for scene change detection. What makes primitive-space comparison hard is the under-constrained nature of Gaussian splatting representation: independent optimizations yield primitive solutions whose count, positions, shapes, and colors differ even where nothing has changed. We address this challenge with anisotropic models of geometric and photometric drift, complemented by a per-primitive observability term that reflects the extent to which each Gaussian is constrained by the camera geometry. Operating directly on primitives gives our method, GD-DIFF, two properties that distinguish it from render-then-compare methods. First, change maps are multi-view consistent by construction, where prior work had to learn this through an additional optimization objective. Second, geometric and appearance changes are scored separately, identifying not just where but what kind of change occurred, distinguishing structural changes (e.g., an added object) from surface-level ones (e.g., a color change) without supervision or external model dependencies. On real-world benchmarks, GS-DIFF surpasses the prior state-of-the-art approach by approximatelt 17% in mean Intersection over Union.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接在3D高斯原语空间进行场景变化检测的方法，无需渲染到2D，实现多视图一致性和变化类型区分。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于高斯泼溅的场景变化检测方法遵循渲染-比较范式，将问题视为像素级任务，但渲染过程引入信息损失且难以保持多视图一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何直接在3D高斯原语空间中进行场景变化检测，克服原语表示因独立优化导致的非唯一性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高斯泼溅表示的原语（位置、各向异性协方差、颜色）本身包含足够的变化信号，但独立优化导致原语数量、位置、形状和颜色在未变化区域也存在差异。
analysis.method: 提出GS-DIFF方法，通过各向异性几何和光度漂移模型以及每个原语的可观测性项，直接比较原语属性进行变化检测。
contributions: 首次证明仅凭高斯原语属性即可进行场景变化检测，无需渲染到2D。
提出GS-DIFF方法，实现多视图一致的变化图，并区分几何变化（如物体添加）和外观变化（如颜色改变）。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界基准上，GS-DIFF的平均交并比（mIoU）比先前最先进方法提高约17%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的高斯泼溅重建。
未讨论大规模场景或动态场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出直接在3D高斯原语空间进行场景变化检测的方法，无需渲染到2D，实现多视图一致性和变化类型区分。

papers.title: See Tomorrow, Act Today: Foresight-Driven Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving planners are fundamentally reactive: they condition on historical and present observations to predict future actions. We argue that autonomous agents should instead imagine future scenes before deciding, just as human drivers mentally simulate ``what will happen next" before acting. We introduce ForeSight, a foundation world model centric planning framework that reframes autonomous driving as anticipatory decision-making. Rather than treating world models as auxiliary components, ForeSight makes future scene imagination the primary driver of action prediction. Our approach operates in two stages: (1) generating plausible future visual worlds via a pretrained world model, and (2) planning actions conditioned on these imagined futures. This paradigm shift from ``what should I do now?" to ``what will happen, and how should I respond?" enables genuinely anticipatory rather than reactive planning. By grounding decisions in anticipated contexts rather than present observations alone, ForeSight navigates dynamic, interactive scenarios more effectively. Extensive experiments on NAVSIM and nuScenes demonstrate that explicit future imagination significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art alternatives, validating our foresight-driven approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种以未来场景想象为核心的自动驾驶规划框架，将规划从反应式转变为预期式。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶规划器本质上是反应式的，仅依赖历史和当前观测预测未来动作，缺乏人类驾驶员那种先想象再决策的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让自动驾驶代理在决策前主动想象未来场景，实现预期式而非反应式的规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：1) 使用预训练世界模型生成合理的未来视觉场景；2) 基于这些想象未来进行动作规划。
contributions: 提出以世界模型为中心的预期式规划框架 ForeSight，将未来场景想象作为动作预测的主要驱动力。
在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 上验证了显式未来想象显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 数据集上进行实验，结果显示显式未来想象显著优于先前最先进方法。
limitations: 依赖预训练世界模型的质量和泛化能力。
可能面临计算开销和实时性挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种以未来场景想象为核心的自动驾驶规划框架，将规划从反应式转变为预期式。

papers.title: Closed-Form Linear-Probe Dataset Distillation for Pre-trained Vision Models
papers.abstract: Dataset distillation compresses a large training set into a small synthetic set that preserves downstream training utility. While most existing methods target training networks from scratch, modern visual transfer learning often uses frozen pre-trained encoders followed by lightweight linear probing. Existing distillation methods for this setting either unroll iterative linear-probe updates with trajectory-based gradient matching, or rely on closed-form formulations originally designed for from-scratch training with neural-tangent-kernel (NTK) approximations. Neither route exploits the fact that frozen-feature linear probing admits a closed-form solution determined directly by the pre-trained features themselves, with no infinite-width approximation and no inner-loop trajectory. We propose Closed-Form Linear-Probe Dataset Distillation (CLP-DD), a bilevel formulation that computes the linear probe induced by the synthetic set with a sample-space kernel ridge solver. The synthetic images are then updated by evaluating this induced classifier on real features through a temperature-scaled softmax cross-entropy, where the classifier columns act as learned class anchors in feature space. We further show that the choice of outer objective is decisive: pairing the closed-form inner solver with a standard MSE outer loss substantially underperforms trajectory-based methods, while the discriminative outer loss closes most of the gap. On ImageNet-100 with four pre-trained backbones, CLP-DD substantially improves over LGM without DSA and approaches LGM with DSA at a fraction of the computational cost. On ImageNet-1K, CLP-DD matches or surpasses LGM with DSA on three of four backbones while running roughly $14\times$ faster and using less than one-eighth of the GPU memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种闭式线性探针数据集蒸馏方法，利用预训练特征直接求解线性分类器，显著提升效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法多针对从头训练，而迁移学习中常用冻结预训练编码器加线性探针，但现有蒸馏方法未利用线性探针的闭式解，导致计算成本高或依赖近似。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地为预训练视觉模型生成合成数据集，使其在冻结特征线性探针设置下保持下游训练效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CLP-DD，一种双层优化方法：内层通过样本空间核岭回归求解合成集诱导的线性探针闭式解，外层使用温度缩放softmax交叉熵损失评估该分类器在真实特征上的表现，并更新合成图像。
contributions: 首次利用冻结特征线性探针的闭式解进行数据集蒸馏，无需无限宽度近似或内循环轨迹。
发现外层损失函数的关键作用：判别性损失（softmax交叉熵）显著优于MSE损失，缩小了与轨迹方法的差距。
在ImageNet-100和ImageNet-1K上，CLP-DD在多个预训练骨干上达到或超越现有方法，同时计算速度提升约14倍，GPU内存减少超过7/8。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-100上使用四个预训练骨干，CLP-DD显著优于LGM without DSA，接近LGM with DSA；在ImageNet-1K上，CLP-DD在四个骨干中的三个上匹配或超越LGM with DSA，速度提升约14倍，内存减少超过7/8。
limitations: 可能仅适用于线性探针设置，对微调整个网络的任务不直接适用。
外层损失函数的选择对性能影响大，需要进一步探索其他损失函数。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种闭式线性探针数据集蒸馏方法，利用预训练特征直接求解线性分类器，显著提升效率。

papers.title: AsyncEvGS: Asynchronous Event-Assisted Gaussian Splatting for Handheld Motion-Blurred Scenes
papers.abstract: 3D reconstruction methods such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve impressive photorealism but fail when input images suffer from severe motion blur. While event cameras provide high-temporal-resolution motion cues, existing event-assisted approaches rely on low-resolution sensors and strict synchronization, limiting their practicality for handheld 3D capture on common devices, such as smartphones. We introduce a flexible, high-resolution asynchronous RGB-Event dual-camera system and a corresponding reconstruction framework. Our approach first reconstructs sharp images from the event data and then employs a cross-domain pose estimation module based on the Visual Geometry Transformer (VGGT) to obtain robust initialization for 3DGS. During optimization, we employ a structure-driven event loss and view-specific consistency regularizers to mitigate the ill-posed behavior of traditional event losses and deblurring losses, ensuring both stable and high-fidelity reconstruction. We further contribute AsyncEv-Deblur, a new high-resolution RGB-Event dataset captured with our asynchronous system. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both our challenging dataset and existing benchmarks, substantially improving reconstruction robustness under severe motion blur. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出异步事件辅助的高斯泼溅方法，解决手持运动模糊场景的3D重建问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3DGS和NeRF在输入图像存在严重运动模糊时重建失败；事件相机虽能提供高时间分辨率运动线索，但现有方法依赖低分辨率传感器和严格同步，限制了在智能手机等常见设备上的实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用异步、高分辨率RGB-事件双相机系统实现手持运动模糊场景的鲁棒3D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统事件损失和去模糊损失在优化中存在病态行为，导致重建不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出异步高分辨率RGB-事件双相机系统及重建框架：先从事件数据重建清晰图像，再基于VGGT的跨域位姿估计模块获得鲁棒初始化，优化中采用结构驱动的事件损失和视图一致性正则化。
contributions: 提出灵活的高分辨率异步RGB-事件双相机系统及相应重建框架
贡献AsyncEv-Deblur数据集，包含异步系统捕获的高分辨率RGB-事件数据
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集和现有基准上达到最先进性能，显著提升严重运动模糊下的重建鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖事件相机硬件，可能增加设备成本
异步系统校准精度可能影响重建质量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异步事件辅助的高斯泼溅方法，解决手持运动模糊场景的3D重建问题。

papers.title: Attention Transfer Is Not Universally Effective for Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: A recent work shows that Attention Transfer, which transfers only the attention patterns from a pre-trained teacher Vision Transformer (ViT) to a randomly initialized standard student ViT, is sufficient to recover the full benefit of the teacher's pre-trained weights. We revisit this finding on a comprehensive benchmark of 20 teachers from 11 well-known ViT families and reveal that Attention Transfer is not universally effective. While 7 families transfer successfully, 4 consistently fail, falling up to 5.1\% below the from-scratch no-transfer baseline. Further results demonstrate that this failure is family-consistent across model sizes, and persists under extended training durations, different transfer datasets, and out-of-distribution evaluations. Controlled analyses then consistently localize the problem to the attention-routing channel, indicating that the key issue is not whether the student can match the teacher's attention patterns, but whether the matched patterns remain functional for the student. Crucially, we identify architectural mismatch between the pre-trained teacher and the standard student as the primary mechanism. By adding only the teacher's native architectural components to the student in a randomly initialized state, we completely reverse the failure for all 4 families. Notably, these components alone do not improve from-scratch training, confirming that they specifically unlock the usability of the teacher's attention. We further systematically show that this failure is not explained by the inadequate choice of transfer loss or by differences in pre-training recipes. Our findings refine the prevailing understanding of attention in ViT representations: attention is sufficient \textit{only} when the student architecture matches the teacher.

analysis.tldr: 注意力迁移并非对所有视觉Transformer都有效，失败源于师生架构不匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究表明注意力迁移足以恢复预训练教师ViT的全部性能，但该结论是否普遍适用尚不清楚，需要系统验证其边界条件。
analysis.problem: 探究注意力迁移在多种ViT家族中的有效性，并揭示其失败的根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在20个教师模型（来自11个ViT家族）的基准测试中，7个家族迁移成功，4个家族持续失败，性能比从头训练基线低5.1%。失败具有家族一致性，且不受模型大小、训练时长、迁移数据集和分布外评估的影响。
analysis.method: 通过控制实验定位问题在注意力路由通道，并发现架构不匹配是主要机制；通过在学生中添加教师原生架构组件（随机初始化）可完全逆转失败。
contributions: 系统揭示了注意力迁移并非普遍有效，识别出4个失败家族。
定位失败原因为师生架构不匹配，并通过添加教师组件完全修复。
analysis.experiments: 在20个教师模型、11个ViT家族上进行综合实验，包括不同模型大小、训练时长、迁移数据集和分布外评估。
limitations: 仅针对标准ViT架构，未涉及其他视觉骨干网络。
未深入分析架构不匹配的具体机制细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 注意力迁移并非对所有视觉Transformer都有效，失败源于师生架构不匹配。

papers.title: PicoEyes: Unified Gaze Estimation Framework for Mixed Reality with a Large-Scale Multi-View Dataset
papers.abstract: We present PicoEyes, a unified gaze estimation framework that directly predicts all key attributes of gaze, including 3D eye parameters, eye-region segmentation, optical axis, visual axis, and depth maps, from either monocular or binocular inputs. The framework simultaneously addresses calibration, gaze forecasting, and varying device postures, while also supporting 3D eye reconstruction via joint estimation of eye parameters and depth maps in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we introduce a large-scale multi-view near-eye dataset containing comprehensive 2D and 3D annotations under diverse conditions, including train, test, rewear-test, and calibration sessions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PicoEyes achieves state-ofthe-art performance, consistently outperforming both academic and industrial gaze tracking methods across nocalibration, calibration, rewear-after-calibration, and forecasting settings. This work establishes a practical, end-toend paradigm for robust and generalizable gaze estimation in mixed reality (MR) applications.

analysis.tldr: PicoEyes 是一个统一的视线估计框架，可直接从单目或双目输入预测所有关键视线属性，并配套大规模多视角近眼数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合现实应用中需要鲁棒且泛化的视线估计，但现有方法通常分别处理不同视线属性，且缺乏大规模多视角标注数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的端到端框架，同时预测3D眼部参数、分割、光轴、视轴和深度图，并支持校准、预测和不同设备姿态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PicoEyes框架，通过联合估计眼部参数和深度图，端到端地预测所有关键视线属性，支持单目或双目输入，并统一处理校准、预测和姿态变化。
contributions: 提出统一的视线估计框架PicoEyes，直接预测所有关键视线属性。
构建大规模多视角近眼数据集，包含全面的2D和3D标注及多种会话类型。
在无校准、校准、重戴后校准和预测设置下均达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集上进行了广泛实验，在无校准、校准、重戴后校准和预测设置下均优于学术和工业方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件或近眼相机配置。
数据集规模虽大但可能未覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PicoEyes 是一个统一的视线估计框架，可直接从单目或双目输入预测所有关键视线属性，并配套大规模多视角近眼数据集。

papers.title: SatSurfGS: Generalizable 2D Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Satellite Surface Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Sparse-view satellite image surface reconstruction remains highly challenging, fundamentally because the reliability of multi-view matching under satellite imaging conditions is strongly spatially heterogeneous. Affected by large photometric differences, weak textures, and repetitive textures, multi-view geometric constraints are often sparse, unevenly distributed, and locally unreliable. Although 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) is more suitable than 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for the explicit representation of continuous surfaces, research on generalizable feed-forward 2DGS frameworks for sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction is still lacking. To address this issue, we propose SatSurfGS, a generalizable sparse-view surface reconstruction method for satellite imagery based on 2DGS. The proposed method builds a coarse-to-fine Gaussian attribute prediction framework and explicitly models local geometric reliability at three levels: feature learning, Gaussian parameter estimation, and training optimization. Specifically, we propose a confidence-aware monocular multi-view feature fusion module to adaptively integrate monocular priors and multi-view matching features according to local confidence; a cross-stage self-consistency residual guidance module to stabilize stage-wise Gaussian parameter refinement using the residual between the rendered height map from the previous stage and the current-stage MVS height map, together with confidence information; and a confidence bidirectional routing loss to achieve differentiated allocation of geometric and appearance supervision. Experiments on satellite datasets show that the proposed method achieves improved rendering quality, surface reconstruction accuracy, cross-dataset generalization, and inference efficiency compared with representative generalizable baselines and competitive per-scene optimization methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于2D高斯泼溅的卫星表面重建方法，通过粗到细的属性预测和局部几何可靠性建模，实现稀疏视图下的高效重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏视图卫星图像表面重建极具挑战性，因为卫星成像条件下多视图匹配的可靠性存在强烈的空间异质性，受大光度差异、弱纹理和重复纹理影响，多视图几何约束稀疏、分布不均且局部不可靠。现有2DGS缺乏可泛化的前馈框架。
analysis.problem: 解决稀疏视图卫星图像表面重建中多视图匹配可靠性空间异质导致的重建困难，以及缺乏可泛化2DGS前馈框架的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多视图匹配可靠性在卫星图像中高度空间异质，导致几何约束稀疏、不均匀且局部不可靠。
analysis.method: 构建粗到细的高斯属性预测框架，并在特征学习、高斯参数估计和训练优化三个层面显式建模局部几何可靠性。具体包括：置信感知单目多视图特征融合模块、跨阶段自一致性残差引导模块和置信双向路由损失。
contributions: 提出SatSurfGS，首个基于2DGS的可泛化稀疏视图卫星表面重建方法。
设计粗到细的高斯属性预测框架，并在三个层面显式建模局部几何可靠性。
在卫星数据集上实现了优于代表性可泛化基线和竞争性逐场景优化方法的渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化能力和推理效率。
analysis.experiments: 在卫星数据集上进行了实验，与代表性可泛化基线和竞争性逐场景优化方法比较，展示了改进的渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化能力和推理效率。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏视图或严重遮挡场景效果有限。
依赖卫星图像的多视图几何一致性假设，在非理想条件下可能退化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于2D高斯泼溅的卫星表面重建方法，通过粗到细的属性预测和局部几何可靠性建模，实现稀疏视图下的高效重建。

papers.title: Masks Can Talk: Extracting Structured Text Information from Single-Modal Images for Remote Sensing Change Detection
papers.abstract: Remote sensing change detection is pivotal for urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and environmental resource management. Yet, unimodal deep learning methods frequently confuse genuine semantic changes with visually similar but irrelevant variations. Recent multimodal approaches incorporate text as auxiliary supervision, but their descriptions are either semantically coarse and unstructured or model-generated and thus noisy. Critically, all of them overlook a simple fact: fine-grained change semantics are already implicitly encoded in the ground-truth mask labels that come standard with every change detection dataset. These masks know where the change happened, what the land-cover types were before and after, how the transition occurred, and how many objects were involved. In this paper, we propose S2M, a framework that obtains structured textual features directly from change labels at zero additional annotation cost. Specifically, each change region is automatically transcribed into a semantic quadruple (where, what, how, how many) and converted into several fixed-template text descriptions, providing precise, dense, and noise-free multimodal supervision. We adopts a two-stage training strategy to fine-tune on remote sensing imagery firstly for robust domain-specific representation, after which a multimodal decoder with a bi-directional contrastive loss is introduced to achieve deep alignment between visual features and structured textual embeddings. To validate our method, we construct Gaza-Change-v2, a new multi-class change detection (MCD) dataset about the Gaza Strip. On this MCD dataset, S2M achieves a Sek of 17.80\% and an F$_{\text{scd}}$ of 66.14\%, notably surpassing even multimodal methods that leverage large language models. Our work demonstrates that masks can indeed talk. They tell us exactly what, where, how, and how many changes have occurred.

analysis.tldr: 利用变化检测数据集自带掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注的多模态遥感变化检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感变化检测方法中，单模态方法易混淆语义变化与视觉相似变化，多模态方法依赖粗粒度或含噪文本描述，且忽略了掩码标签本身已隐含细粒度变化语义。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加标注成本的前提下，从掩码标签中提取结构化文本特征以提升变化检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 掩码标签隐式编码了变化位置、前后地物类型、变化方式和涉及对象数量等细粒度语义信息，但现有方法未充分利用。
analysis.method: 提出S2M框架，将每个变化区域自动转录为语义四元组（where, what, how, how many）并转换为固定模板文本描述，采用两阶段训练策略：先在遥感图像上微调获得领域表示，再通过多模态解码器与双向对比损失实现视觉特征与结构化文本嵌入的深度对齐。
contributions: 首次利用变化检测数据集中的掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注的多模态监督。
提出S2M框架，通过语义四元组和两阶段训练策略有效对齐视觉与文本特征。
构建了Gaza-Change-v2多类变化检测数据集，并在该数据集上取得优于使用大语言模型的多模态方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在自建Gaza-Change-v2多类变化检测数据集上，S2M的Sek为17.80%，F_scd为66.14%，超越使用大语言模型的多模态方法。
limitations: 固定模板文本描述可能无法覆盖所有变化语义细节。
方法依赖掩码标签的准确性，标签噪声可能影响结构化文本质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用变化检测数据集自带掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注的多模态遥感变化检测。

papers.title: Hierarchical Perfusion Graphs for Tumor Heterogeneity Modeling in Glioma Molecular Subtyping
papers.abstract: Precise molecular subtyping of gliomas, including isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) mutation and 1p/19q codeletion, directly guides surgical and therapeutic decisions, yet currently relies on invasive tissue sampling. Deep learning on structural MRI has emerged as a non-invasive alternative, but anatomy-only approaches cannot capture the hemodynamic signatures that distinguish molecular subtypes. Radiogenomics based on dynamic susceptibility contrast (DSC) MRI holds immense potential for non-invasively characterizing glioma molecular subtypes, yet clinical deployment has been hindered by inter-site variability and the limitations of voxel-wise analysis. We introduce HiPerfGNN, a framework that first learns discrete hemodynamic representations from raw time-intensity curves using a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE). These quantized perfusion codes define coarse-level graph nodes representing functional tumor habitats, each of which is hierarchically subdivided into fine-level subregions guided by structural MRI. A hierarchical graph neural network then propagates information across scales for molecular prediction. On an internal cohort (n=475), the model achieved AUCs of 0.96 (IDH), 0.89 (1p/19q), and 0.84 (WHO grade), and maintained robust IDH performance (AUC 0.89) on an independent external cohort (n=397) without recalibration. Gradient-based saliency analysis confirms biologically grounded attention patterns aligned with known glioma pathophysiology. Our results demonstrate the added value of integrating perfusion dynamics into radiogenomic pipelines for glioma molecular subtyping. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出HiPerfGNN框架，通过层次化灌注图建模肿瘤异质性，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 胶质瘤分子亚型（如IDH突变、1p/19q共缺失）对手术和治疗决策至关重要，但当前依赖有创组织取样。基于结构MRI的深度学习方法无法捕捉区分分子亚型的血流动力学特征，而基于DSC MRI的放射基因组学受限于站点间变异和体素级分析的局限性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用DSC MRI灌注数据，克服站点间变异和体素级分析的局限，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性、准确预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: HiPerfGNN框架：首先使用VQ-VAE从原始时间-强度曲线学习离散血流动力学表示；这些量化灌注码定义粗粒度图节点（功能肿瘤栖息地），每个节点根据结构MRI层次细分为细粒度子区域；层次图神经网络跨尺度传播信息进行分子预测。
contributions: 提出层次化灌注图框架HiPerfGNN，整合DSC MRI灌注动力学与结构MRI进行胶质瘤分子亚型预测。
在内部队列（n=475）和外部独立队列（n=397）上验证了模型的有效性和泛化性，IDH预测AUC分别达0.96和0.89。
梯度显著性分析证实模型关注区域与已知胶质瘤病理生理学一致。
analysis.experiments: 在内部队列（n=475）上，模型在IDH、1p/19q和WHO分级预测上分别达到AUC 0.96、0.89和0.84；在外部独立队列（n=397）上，IDH预测AUC为0.89，无需重新校准。
limitations: 仅基于DSC MRI，可能未充分利用其他模态信息。
外部验证仅针对IDH亚型，1p/19q和WHO分级的外部性能未报告。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HiPerfGNN框架，通过层次化灌注图建模肿瘤异质性，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性预测。

papers.title: PRIMED: Adaptive Modality Suppression for Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation via Biased Competition
papers.abstract: Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation (Ref-AVS) seeks to localize and segment target objects in video frames based on visual, auditory, and textual referring cues. The task is challenging because the relevance of different modalities varies across referring expressions and scenes, while existing methods typically treat multimodal cues as homogeneous inputs for fusion, prompting, or reasoning, making them vulnerable to irrelevant or misleading modalities. To address this problem, we propose PRIMED, inspired by the biased competition theory in cognitive neuroscience, which explicitly models both visual perception and language-driven prior modulation, and enables more accurate Ref-AVS by adaptive modality suppression. Specifically, a Modality Prior Decoder first estimates whether the referring expression relies primarily on audio, vision, or their joint interaction, generating a modality prior to adaptively guide high-level attention. A Token Distiller further extracts compact global visual tokens from high-level features and shares them across Competition-aware Cross-modal Fusion modules to provide hierarchical global context. Additionally, we introduce a Spatial-Aware Semantic Alignment loss to further enhance foreground-background discrimination through contrastive learning. Extensive experiments on the Ref-AVS benchmark demonstrate that PRIMED achieves state-of-the-art overall performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出受认知科学中竞争理论启发的自适应模态抑制方法，实现指代音视频分割的SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将多模态线索视为同质输入，易受无关或误导模态干扰，缺乏对模态相关性的自适应处理。
analysis.problem: 如何根据指代表达和场景自适应地抑制无关模态，提升指代音视频分割的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同指代表达和场景中模态相关性动态变化，现有融合方法无法有效处理。
analysis.method: 基于竞争理论，通过模态先验解码器估计模态依赖类型，Token蒸馏器提取全局视觉token，并引入空间感知语义对齐损失。
contributions: 提出PRIMED框架，首次将竞争理论引入指代音视频分割，实现自适应模态抑制。
设计模态先验解码器和Token蒸馏器，以及空间感知语义对齐损失，提升分割性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Ref-AVS基准上达到整体SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量指代表达和场景多样性。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出受认知科学中竞争理论启发的自适应模态抑制方法，实现指代音视频分割的SOTA。

papers.title: DPG-CD: Depth-Prior-Guided Cross-Modal Joint 2D-3D Change Detection
papers.abstract: Urban spatial evolution is manifested not only through horizontal expansion but also through vertical structural changes. Consequently, jointly capturing 2D semantic changes and 3D height changes is essential for urban morphology analysis and emergency management. In practical scenarios, collecting 3D observations is often constrained by high acquisition costs and the inability to support frequent updates. The multi-temporal cross-modal input consisting of pre-event Digital Surface Model (DSM) and post-event imagery provides a practical solution for 3D change detection in high-frequency urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and emergency response scenarios. However, this setting remains challenging as imagery and DSM data exhibit significant spectral-geometric representation gaps. Moreover, modality differences may be confused with actual changes, and robust change detection requires effective fusion of semantic and geometric features from multi-temporal data. In this paper, we propose DPG-CD, a depth-prior-guided multi-temporal cross-modal fusion framework for joint 2D semantic and 3D height change detection. Specifically, an estimated depth prior is introduced into the imagery to mitigate the modality gap with DSM. A gated fusion mechanism then selectively injects geometric cues from depth prior while preserving discriminative spectral representations. Subsequently, a multi-stage cross-temporal cross-modal feature fusion architecture is employed to extract change-aware features. Finally, a multi-task decoder jointly predicts 2D semantic changes and 3D height changes, complemented by an auxiliary DSM prediction task to improve structural consistency and height estimation accuracy. Experiments on two public datasets, Hi-BCD and 3DCD, and a new dataset, NYC-MMCD, demonstrate that DPG-CD outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both 2D and 3D change detection tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度先验引导的跨模态融合框架DPG-CD，联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测，在多个数据集上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市空间演化不仅体现在水平扩张，还有垂直结构变化，联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测对城市形态分析和应急管理至关重要。但实际中3D观测获取成本高、难以频繁更新，而多时相跨模态输入（前事件DSM和后事件影像）虽提供了可行方案，却面临光谱-几何表征差异大、模态差异易与真实变化混淆、语义与几何特征融合困难等挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决多时相跨模态（影像与DSM）输入下，联合2D语义变化和3D高度变化检测中的模态差异、特征融合和变化感知问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DPG-CD框架：1) 引入估计的深度先验到影像中，缩小与DSM的模态差距；2) 门控融合机制选择性注入深度先验的几何线索，同时保留判别性光谱表示；3) 多阶段跨时相跨模态特征融合架构提取变化感知特征；4) 多任务解码器联合预测2D语义变化和3D高度变化，并辅以DSM预测任务提升结构一致性和高度估计精度。
contributions: 提出深度先验引导的跨模态融合框架DPG-CD，实现联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测。
设计门控融合机制和多阶段跨时相跨模态特征融合架构，有效缓解模态差异并融合语义与几何特征。
在Hi-BCD、3DCD和新数据集NYC-MMCD上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Hi-BCD、3DCD和NYC-MMCD三个数据集上评估，DPG-CD在2D和3D变化检测任务上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖深度先验估计的质量，估计误差可能影响性能。
多任务学习可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度先验引导的跨模态融合框架DPG-CD，联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测，在多个数据集上超越SOTA。

papers.title: Real-IAD MVN: A Multi-View Normal Vector Dataset and Benchmark for High-Fidelity Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Industrial Anomaly Detection (IAD) is critical for quality control, but existing methods struggle with subtle, geometric defects. Standard 2D (RGB) images are sensitive to texture and lighting but often miss fine geometric anomalies. While 3D point clouds capture macro-shape, they are typically too sparse to detect micro-defects like scratches or pits. We address this fundamental data limitation by introducing Real-IAD-MVN (Multi-View Normal), a large-scale industrial dataset. By upgrading our acquisition system, Real-IAD-MVN captures high-fidelity surface normal maps from five distinct viewpoints, replacing sparse 3D data entirely. This provides a comprehensive geometric representation at a micro-detail level, making previously invisible side-wall and occluded defects explicitly detectable. Our experiments, conducted on this new dataset, first provide evidence that incorporating dense, multi-view pseudo-3D (surface normals) yields significantly better detection performance than using sparse 3D point cloud data. To further validate the dataset and provide a strong benchmark, we introduce a baseline method based on reconstruction, which learns to extract cross-modal unified prototypes from the image and normal map streams. We demonstrate that this unified prototype approach surpasses existing state-of-the-art multimodal fusion methods, highlighting the rich potential of our new dataset for advancing geometric anomaly detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视角法向量图数据集Real-IAD-MVN，替代稀疏3D点云实现高保真工业异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工业异常检测方法受限于数据模态：2D RGB图像对纹理敏感但易遗漏细微几何缺陷，3D点云虽能捕获宏观形状却因稀疏性难以检测微缺陷（如划痕、凹坑），亟需一种兼顾几何细节与多视角信息的数据形式。
analysis.problem: 如何构建高保真、多视角的几何表示数据集，使微小几何缺陷（如侧壁、遮挡缺陷）可被显式检测，并验证其优于稀疏3D点云。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 升级采集系统，从五个不同视角捕获高保真表面法向量图，替代稀疏3D点云；并基于重建方法提出跨模态统一原型基线，从图像和法向量流中提取统一原型。
contributions: 构建Real-IAD-MVN大规模多视角法向量数据集，提供微细节级别的几何表示。
实验证明密集多视角伪3D（表面法向量）比稀疏3D点云显著提升检测性能。
提出基于重建的统一原型基线方法，超越现有最先进的多模态融合方法。
analysis.experiments: 在新数据集上实验，验证密集多视角法向量优于稀疏3D点云，且统一原型方法超越现有SOTA多模态融合方法。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖工业场景，泛化到其他领域需验证。
基线方法依赖重建，可能对复杂缺陷泛化不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视角法向量图数据集Real-IAD-MVN，替代稀疏3D点云实现高保真工业异常检测。

papers.title: Uncovering and Shaping the Latent Representation of 3D Scene Topology in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Decades of cognitive science establish that humans navigate environments by forming cognitive maps, defined as allocentric and topology-preserving representations of 3D space. While modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate emergent spatial reasoning from 2D egocentric inputs, it remains unclear whether they construct an analogous 3D internal representation. In this paper, we demonstrate that current VLMs do possess a latent topological map of 3D scenes, but it is heavily overshadowed by non-geometric visual semantics, such as color and shape. By isolating this spatial subspace through cross-scene linear feature extraction, we extract a clean spatial subspace that causally controls the model's spatial outputs. We mathematically shape this latent representation and prove its correspondence to the Laplacian eigenmaps of the scene's 3D Gaussian-kernel graph, converging to the physical 3D space in the continuous limit. Motivated by this geometric identification, we further introduce a mathematically principled latent regularization method for VLMs, based on Dirichlet energy. Applying this single-term regularizer to a minimal 500-step supervised VLM fine-tuning (SFT) on simple synthetic data yields significant improvements on real-world spatial benchmarks, outperforming standard SFT and competitive baselines by up to 12.1\% in spatial tasks involving scene topology understanding. Source code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 揭示VLM中3D场景拓扑的隐式表征，并通过Dirichlet能量正则化提升空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类通过拓扑保持的认知地图导航，但VLM是否构建了类似的3D内部表征尚不明确，且现有模型的空间推理受非几何语义干扰。
analysis.problem: VLM中3D场景拓扑的隐式表征被非几何视觉语义掩盖，如何提取并利用该表征提升空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM存在潜在拓扑地图，但被颜色、形状等非几何语义主导；通过跨场景线性特征提取可分离出干净的空间子空间。
analysis.method: 跨场景线性特征提取分离空间子空间，并引入基于Dirichlet能量的潜在正则化方法，在简单合成数据上微调VLM。
contributions: 证明VLM拥有3D场景的潜在拓扑地图，并可通过线性方法提取空间子空间。
提出基于Dirichlet能量的潜在正则化方法，在真实空间基准上提升拓扑理解任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界空间基准上，该方法相比标准SFT和竞争基线在空间拓扑任务中提升高达12.1%。
limitations: 仅基于简单合成数据微调，可能限制复杂场景泛化。
正则化方法依赖场景图构建，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示VLM中3D场景拓扑的隐式表征，并通过Dirichlet能量正则化提升空间推理能力。

papers.title: UniV2D: Bridging Visual Restoration and Semantic Perception for Underwater Salient Object Detection
papers.abstract: Underwater salient object detection (USOD) plays a vital role in marine vision tasks but remains fundamentally challenging due to severe visual degradation, such as selective absorption and medium scattering. Conventional pipelines typically adopt a sequential "enhance-then-detect" paradigm. However, isolating low-level visual restoration from high-level semantic perception often leads to semantic inconsistency, where the restored images may not be optimal for detection and can even introduce task-irrelevant noise. To break this sequential bottleneck, we propose UniV2D, a Unified Vision-to-Detection Network that jointly optimizes visual restoration and salient object detection within a mutually beneficial framework. Unlike traditional methods that rely on disjointed pipelines or rigid physical priors, UniV2D introduces a semantic-driven learning paradigm: high-level saliency semantics actively guide the restoration process, while the restored visual cues reciprocally enhance saliency perception. Specifically, UniV2D features a hierarchical dual-branch architecture. It first employs a self-calibrated decoder to predict initial saliency masks alongside a mask-aware restoration module to reconstruct image content. Subsequently, a saliency-guided refinement module equipped with cross-level modulation is utilized to align structural fidelity with semantic consistency. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that UniV2D significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, establishing a new standard for joint underwater perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出UniV2D，一种联合优化水下视觉恢复与显著目标检测的统一网络，通过语义驱动范式打破传统顺序流水线的语义不一致瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下显著目标检测因视觉退化（如选择性吸收和介质散射）而极具挑战。传统'增强-检测'顺序流水线将低级视觉恢复与高级语义感知隔离，导致恢复图像对检测并非最优，甚至引入任务无关噪声，存在语义不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 如何打破水下视觉恢复与显著目标检测之间的顺序瓶颈，实现两者联合优化与互惠增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统顺序流水线中，低级恢复与高级感知隔离导致语义不一致：恢复图像可能包含检测无关的噪声，且恢复过程未利用语义信息指导。
analysis.method: 提出UniV2D统一视觉到检测网络，包含层次化双分支架构：自校准解码器预测初始显著图，掩码感知恢复模块重建图像内容；显著引导精炼模块通过跨层级调制对齐结构保真度与语义一致性。采用语义驱动学习范式：高层显著语义主动引导恢复过程，恢复的视觉线索反过来增强显著感知。
contributions: 提出UniV2D，首个联合优化水下视觉恢复与显著目标检测的统一框架，打破顺序流水线瓶颈。
引入语义驱动学习范式，实现恢复与感知的互惠增强。
设计层次化双分支架构，包含自校准解码器、掩码感知恢复模块和显著引导精炼模块。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上进行定量和定性评估，UniV2D显著优于现有最先进方法，建立了水下联合感知的新标准。
limitations: 可能依赖特定水下退化假设，泛化到其他退化类型需验证。
双分支架构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UniV2D，一种联合优化水下视觉恢复与显著目标检测的统一网络，通过语义驱动范式打破传统顺序流水线的语义不一致瓶颈。

papers.title: TriP: A Triangle Puzzle Approach to Robust Translation Averaging
papers.abstract: Translation averaging aims to recover camera locations from pairwise relative translation directions and is a fundamental component of global Structure-from-Motion pipelines. The problem is challenging because direction measurements contain no distance information, making the estimation problem highly ill-conditioned and highly sensitive to corrupted observations. In this paper, we propose TriP, a triangle-based framework for robust translation averaging. TriP first infers local relative edge scales from triangle geometry, and then synchronizes the scales of overlapping triangles in the logarithmic domain to recover globally consistent edge lengths and camera locations. By leveraging higher-order consistency across triangles, the proposed method is robust to adversarial, cycle-consistent, and other structured corruptions. In addition, TriP avoids the collapse issue without requiring any extra anti-collapse constraints, since log-scale synchronization excludes the degenerate zero-scale solution by construction. These structural advantages enable a particularly strong theory for exact location recovery. On the practical side, TriP is fully parallelizable, computationally efficient, and naturally scalable to graphs with millions of cameras. Moreover, it outperforms all previous translation averaging methods by a large margin on both synthetic and real datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于三角形的鲁棒平移平均框架TriP，通过局部尺度推断与对数域同步实现精确相机定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 平移平均是全局SfM的核心，但方向测量缺乏距离信息导致问题病态且对异常值敏感，现有方法难以同时处理结构化噪声和避免退化解。
analysis.problem: 从成对相对平移方向中鲁棒且高效地恢复相机位置，尤其对抗对抗性、循环一致等结构化污染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TriP框架：先利用三角形几何推断局部相对边尺度，再在对数域同步重叠三角形尺度以恢复全局一致边长和相机位置，通过高阶一致性增强鲁棒性，且对数同步天然避免零尺度退化。
contributions: 提出基于三角形的鲁棒平移平均方法，利用高阶一致性抵抗结构化污染。
证明方法在理论上能精确恢复位置，且无需额外抗退化约束。
方法完全可并行、计算高效，可扩展到百万级相机图，并在合成和真实数据集上大幅超越先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上进行了实验，结果大幅优于所有先前平移平均方法。
limitations: 可能依赖三角形质量，在极端退化几何下性能未知。
未讨论与全局SfM其他组件的联合优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于三角形的鲁棒平移平均框架TriP，通过局部尺度推断与对数域同步实现精确相机定位。

papers.title: AGA3DNet: Anatomy-Guided Gaussian Priors with Multi-view xLSTM for 3D Brain MRI Subtype Classification
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D brain MRI subtype classification benefits from both localized anatomical cues and long-range contextual reasoning. We present AGA3DNet, a report-grounded framework that incorporates brief anatomical phrases extracted from radiology reports as a soft anatomical prior channel and fuses it with a lightweight 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM aggregation. Specifically, extracted anatomical phrases are mapped to atlas-defined regions and converted into smooth spatial priors using a signed-distance transform followed by Gaussian weighting, providing interpretable, anatomy-grounded guidance without requiring dense voxel annotations. We evaluate AGA3DNet on a retrospective institutional brain MRI cohort for abnormal subtype discrimination and compare against reproducible 3D classification baselines. AGA3DNet achieves improved overall balance across performance metrics and supports clinically interpretable localization through the prior channel. We discuss limitations related to single-cohort evaluation and the lack of large-scale public brain MRI datasets paired with radiology reports under broadly usable terms.

analysis.tldr: 利用放射学报告中的解剖短语作为先验，结合3D CNN和多视图xLSTM，提升脑MRI亚型分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D脑MRI亚型分类需要局部解剖线索和长程上下文推理，现有方法依赖密集体素标注，成本高且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖密集体素标注的情况下，将解剖先验融入3D脑MRI分类模型，提升准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从放射学报告中提取解剖短语，映射到图谱区域，通过符号距离变换和高斯加权生成平滑空间先验，与轻量级3D CNN及多视图xLSTM融合。
contributions: 提出一种报告引导的框架，利用解剖短语作为软先验通道，无需密集标注。
设计多视图xLSTM聚合机制，增强长程上下文建模。
在回顾性数据集上验证了分类性能提升和临床可解释定位能力。
analysis.experiments: 在回顾性机构脑MRI队列上进行异常亚型区分实验，与可复现的3D分类基线比较，AGA3DNet在性能指标上取得更均衡的提升。
limitations: 仅在单中心回顾性数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
缺乏大规模公开脑MRI数据集及配套放射学报告。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用放射学报告中的解剖短语作为先验，结合3D CNN和多视图xLSTM，提升脑MRI亚型分类性能。

papers.title: Qwen3-VL-Seg: Unlocking Open-World Referring Segmentation with Vision-Language Grounding
papers.abstract: Open-world referring segmentation requires grounding unconstrained language expressions to precise pixel-level regions. Existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibit strong open-world visual grounding, but their outputs remain limited to sparse bounding-box coordinates and are insufficient for dense visual prediction. Recent MLLM-based segmentation methods either directly predict sparse contour coordinates, struggling to reconstruct continuous object boundaries, or rely on external segmentation foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM), introducing substantial architectural and deployment overhead. We present Qwen3-VL-Seg, a parameter-efficient framework that treats the MLLM-predicted box as a semantically grounded structural prior and decodes it into pixel-level referring segmentation. At its core, a lightweight box-guided mask decoder combines multi-scale spatial feature injection, spatial-semantic query construction, box-guided high-resolution pixel fusion, and iterative mask-aware query refinement, introducing only 17M parameters (about 0.4\% of the base model). For scalable open-world training, we construct SA1B-ORS, an SA-1B-derived dataset with two subsets: SA1B-CoRS (category-oriented samples) and SA1B-DeRS (descriptive, instance-specific samples). For evaluation, we curate ORS-Bench, a manually screened benchmark with in-distribution and out-of-distribution subsets covering diverse referring expression types. Extensive experiments on referring expression segmentation, visual grounding, and ORS-Bench show that Qwen3-VL-Seg performs strongly across closed-set and open-world settings, with clear advantages on language-intensive instructions and strong out-of-distribution generalization. Evaluations on general multimodal benchmarks further show that the model broadly preserves general-purpose multimodal competence after segmentation-oriented adaptation.

analysis.tldr: Qwen3-VL-Seg 通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器，将 MLLM 预测的边界框转化为像素级分割，实现开放世界指代分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 在开放世界视觉定位中输出稀疏边界框，无法进行密集像素预测；而基于 MLLM 的分割方法要么直接预测稀疏轮廓坐标导致边界不连续，要么依赖外部分割模型（如 SAM）带来架构和部署开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入大量参数和外部模型的前提下，将 MLLM 的开放世界视觉定位能力扩展到像素级指代分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Qwen3-VL-Seg，一个参数高效框架：将 MLLM 预测的边界框作为语义结构先验，通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器（包含多尺度空间特征注入、空间-语义查询构建、框引导高分辨率像素融合、迭代掩码感知查询精化）解码为像素级分割掩码，仅增加 17M 参数。同时构建大规模训练数据集 SA1B-ORS 和评估基准 ORS-Bench。
contributions: 提出 Qwen3-VL-Seg，一种参数高效的开放世界指代分割框架，仅增加 17M 参数即可实现像素级分割。
构建 SA1B-ORS 大规模训练数据集和 ORS-Bench 评估基准，支持开放世界指代分割训练与评测。
在指代分割、视觉定位和 ORS-Bench 上表现优异，尤其在语言密集型指令和分布外泛化上具有优势，且保持通用多模态能力。
analysis.experiments: 在指代分割、视觉定位和 ORS-Bench 上进行实验，结果显示在封闭集和开放世界设置下表现强劲，在语言密集型指令和分布外泛化上具有明显优势，且通用多模态基准评测表明模型保留了通用能力。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 预测的边界框质量，若框不准确则影响分割效果。
仅增加 17M 参数，但框架在极端复杂场景下的泛化能力有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Qwen3-VL-Seg 通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器，将 MLLM 预测的边界框转化为像素级分割，实现开放世界指代分割。

papers.title: Neurosymbolic Framework for Concept-Driven Logical Reasoning in Skeleton-Based Human Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Skeleton-based human activity recognition has achieved strong empirical performance, yet most existing models remain black boxes and difficult to interpret. In this work, we introduce a neurosymbolic formulation of skeleton-based HAR that reframes action recognition as concept-driven first-order logical reasoning over motion primitives. Our framework bridges representation learning and symbolic inference by grounding first-order logic predicates in learnable spatial and temporal motion concepts. Specifically, we employ a standard spatio-temporal skeleton encoder to extract latent motion representations, which are then mapped to interpretable concept predicates via a spatio-temporal concept decoder that explicitly separates pose-centric and dynamics-centric abstractions. These concept predicates are composed through differentiable first-order logic layers, enabling the model to learn human-readable logical rules that govern action semantics. To impose semantic structure on the learned concepts, we align skeleton representations with LLM-derived descriptions of atomic motion primitives, establishing a shared conceptual space for perception and reasoning. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D 60/120 and NW-UCLA demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive recognition performance while providing explicit, interpretable explanations grounded in logical structure. Our results highlight neurosymbolic reasoning as an effective paradigm for interpretable spatio-temporal action understanding. Code: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号框架，将骨架动作识别转化为基于概念的一阶逻辑推理，实现可解释的动作理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有骨架动作识别模型性能强但缺乏可解释性，难以理解其决策逻辑，限制了在安全关键领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将骨架动作识别从黑箱模型转变为可解释的、基于逻辑推理的框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用时空骨架编码器提取潜在运动表示，通过时空概念解码器映射为可解释的概念谓词（姿态中心与动态中心），再经可微一阶逻辑层组合成逻辑规则，并利用LLM描述对齐概念语义。
contributions: 提出首个将骨架动作识别重构为概念驱动一阶逻辑推理的神经符号框架。
设计时空概念解码器显式分离姿态与动态抽象，并通过LLM对齐建立共享概念空间。
在多个基准上取得竞争性性能，同时提供基于逻辑结构的可解释解释。
analysis.experiments: 在NTU RGB+D 60/120和NW-UCLA数据集上进行了实验，识别性能具有竞争力，并提供可解释性。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM描述的质量和覆盖范围。
逻辑规则的可读性可能随动作复杂度下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号框架，将骨架动作识别转化为基于概念的一阶逻辑推理，实现可解释的动作理解。

papers.title: InfoGeo: Information-Theoretic Object-Centric Learning for Cross-View Generalizable UAV Geo-Localization
papers.abstract: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) is fundamental for precise localization and navigation in GPS-denied environments, aiming to match ground or UAV imagery with satellite views. While existing approaches rely on global feature alignment, they often suffer from substantial domain shifts induced by varying regional textures and weather conditions. This issue becomes even more pronounced in UAV-based scenarios, where the broader perspective inevitably introduces dense, fine-grained objects, creating significant visual clutter. To address this, we draw inspiration from Object-Centric Learning (OCL) and propose InfoGeo, an information-theoretic framework designed to enhance robustness and generalization. InfoGeo reformulates the optimization as an information bottleneck process with two core objectives: (i) maximizing view-invariant information by aligning the object-centric structural relations across views, and (ii) minimizing view-specific noisy signals through cross-view knowledge constraints. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks and challenging scenarios demonstrate that InfoGeo significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出信息论框架InfoGeo，通过物体中心学习提升无人机跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法依赖全局特征对齐，在无人机场景中因区域纹理和天气变化导致域偏移，且广视角引入密集细粒度物体造成视觉杂乱，亟需更鲁棒的定位方法。
analysis.problem: 解决无人机跨视角地理定位中因域偏移和视觉杂乱导致的性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出全局特征对齐方法在区域纹理和天气变化下表现不佳，无人机广视角引入的密集细粒度物体造成显著视觉杂乱。
analysis.method: 提出InfoGeo框架，将优化重构为信息瓶颈过程，包含两个核心目标：最大化视角不变信息（对齐物体中心结构关系）和最小化视角特定噪声信号（通过跨视角知识约束）。
contributions: 提出InfoGeo，首个将物体中心学习与信息瓶颈结合用于跨视角地理定位的框架。
通过最大化视角不变信息和最小化视角特定噪声，显著提升模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和挑战性场景下进行广泛评估，InfoGeo显著优于现有最先进方法。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖物体检测或分割的准确性，在极端遮挡或小物体场景下性能受限。
信息瓶颈优化可能增加计算复杂度，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信息论框架InfoGeo，通过物体中心学习提升无人机跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

papers.title: Task Relevance Is Not Local Replaceability: A Two-Axis View of Channel Information
papers.abstract: Channel importance in vision networks is usually summarized by a single score. That summary hides two different questions: how much a channel is related to the task, and whether its function can be supplied by same-layer peers when the channel is removed. We call the second property local replaceability. We introduce a two-axis view that separates these questions. The local axis measures input capture and peer overlap, while the target axis measures task information and target-excess information. Across ResNet-18, VGG-16, and MobileNetV2 trained on CIFAR-100, the two axes are weakly aligned, induce different channel groupings, and separate rapidly during training despite being strongly coupled at random initialization. A Gaussian linear analysis accounts for how this separation can arise through residualized gradient directions, and lesion plus peer-replacement experiments show that peer support refines removability beyond input capture and task relevance alone. Under the fixed FLOPs-matched pruning protocol, local-axis metrics are more reliable predictors of removability than target-axis metrics across the three CIFAR-100 backbones, with the same direction preserved in stress tests on CIFAR-10, Tiny-ImageNet, ImageNet-100, and a ConvNeXt-T/ImageNet-100 pilot. These findings identify an axis-level distinction rather than a universal ranking of pruning scores: local replaceability is a more reliable guide to removability than target relevance, while norm-based baselines remain competitive in architectures such as VGG-16. Relevance-based scores ask what a channel says about the task; pruning asks whether the network still needs that channel when its peers remain available.

analysis.tldr: 提出通道重要性的双轴视角，区分任务相关性与局部可替代性，发现局部可替代性比任务相关性更能预测剪枝移除效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有通道重要性评估通常使用单一分数，混淆了通道与任务的相关性及其功能是否可被同层其他通道替代这两个不同问题，导致剪枝决策不够精确。
analysis.problem: 如何分离并量化通道的任务相关性和局部可替代性，并确定哪个属性更能指导剪枝。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在多个网络和数据集上，任务相关性和局部可替代性两个轴弱对齐，诱导不同的通道分组，且在训练过程中迅速分离；局部轴指标比目标轴指标更可靠地预测移除性。
analysis.method: 提出双轴视图：局部轴衡量输入捕获和同伴重叠，目标轴衡量任务信息和目标多余信息；通过残差梯度方向的高斯线性分析解释分离机制，并通过消融和同伴替换实验验证。
contributions: 提出通道重要性的双轴视角，区分任务相关性和局部可替代性。
通过实验证明局部可替代性比任务相关性更能预测剪枝移除效果，并揭示轴级差异而非通用排序。
analysis.experiments: 在ResNet-18、VGG-16、MobileNetV2上使用CIFAR-100进行主要实验，并在CIFAR-10、Tiny-ImageNet、ImageNet-100及ConvNeXt-T/ImageNet-100上进行压力测试，采用固定FLOPs匹配的剪枝协议。
limitations: 实验仅在图像分类任务和特定架构上进行，未验证其他任务或更大规模模型。
局部可替代性指标的计算可能依赖于具体实现，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通道重要性的双轴视角，区分任务相关性与局部可替代性，发现局部可替代性比任务相关性更能预测剪枝移除效果。

papers.title: ImplantMamba: Long-range Sequential Modeling Mamba For Dental Implant Position Prediction
papers.abstract: In the design of surgical guides for implant placement, determining the precise implant position is a critical step. However, the implant region itself is often characterized by a lack of distinctive texture in medical images. Consequently, artificial intelligence (AI) models must infer the correct implant position and angulation (slope) primarily by analyzing the texture of the surrounding teeth, which poses a significant challenge. To address this, we propose ImplantMamba, a network architecture designed for long-range sequential modeling to integrate texture information from adjacent teeth. Our approach explicitly couples the regression of the implant position with its slope. The core of ImplantMamba is a hybrid encoder that combines Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with Mamba layers. This design enables the network to hierarchically extract local anatomical features through CNNs while simultaneously modeling global contextual dependencies across the entire scan volume via Mamba's selective scan operations, leading to a more comprehensive understanding of the implant site. Furthermore, we introduce a Slope-Coupled Prediction Branch (SCP). This branch is designed to connect the prediction of implant position with the slope, ensuring internal consistency and anatomical plausibility by thereby enforcing a coherent relationship between the predicted implant location and its angulation. Extensive experiments on a large-scale dental implant dataset demonstrate that the proposed ImplantMamba achieves superior performance compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出ImplantMamba，结合CNN与Mamba进行长程序列建模，实现牙种植体位置与角度的联合预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 牙种植体区域缺乏纹理特征，AI模型需依赖周围牙齿纹理推断位置和角度，现有方法难以有效整合长程上下文信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用周围牙齿的纹理信息精确预测牙种植体的位置和角度（斜率）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ImplantMamba网络，包含CNN-Mamba混合编码器（CNN提取局部特征，Mamba建模全局依赖）和斜率耦合预测分支（SCP，联合回归位置与角度）。
contributions: 提出ImplantMamba，结合CNN与Mamba实现长程序列建模，有效整合相邻牙齿纹理信息。
引入斜率耦合预测分支，强制位置与角度预测的一致性，提升解剖合理性。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模牙种植体数据集上实验，ImplantMamba优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量全景扫描数据，泛化性待验证。
仅针对牙种植体任务，未讨论其他医学图像应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ImplantMamba，结合CNN与Mamba进行长程序列建模，实现牙种植体位置与角度的联合预测。

papers.title: Learning Visual Feature-Based World Models via Residual Latent Action
papers.abstract: World models predict future transitions from observations and actions. Existing works predominantly focus on image generation only. Visual feature-based world models, on the other hand, predict future visual features instead of raw video pixels, offering a promising alternative that is more efficient and less prone to hallucination. However, current feature-based approaches rely on direct regression, which leads to blurry or collapsed predictions in complex interactions, while generative modeling in high-dimensional feature spaces still remains challenging. In this work, we discover that a new type of latent action representation, which we refer to as *Residual Latent Action* (RLA), can be easily learned from DINO residuals. We also show that RLA is predictive, generalizable, and encodes temporal progression. Building on RLA, we propose *RLA World Model* (RLA-WM), which predicts RLA values via flow matching. RLA-WM outperforms both state-of-the-art feature-based and video-diffusion world models on simulation and real-world datasets, while being orders of magnitude faster than video diffusion. Furthermore, we develop two robot learning techniques that use RLA-WM to improve policy learning. The first one is a minimalist world action model with RLA that learns from actionless demonstration videos. The second one is the first visual RL framework trained entirely inside a world model learned from offline videos only, using a video-aligned reward and no online interactions or handcrafted rewards. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出残差隐动作（RLA）和基于流匹配的世界模型RLA-WM，在视觉特征空间中高效预测未来状态，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型主要基于图像生成，效率低且易产生幻觉；基于视觉特征的方法虽更高效，但直接回归导致预测模糊或崩溃，而高维特征空间中的生成建模仍具挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地基于视觉特征预测未来世界状态，避免模糊预测和幻觉，并支持机器人学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现从DINO残差中可学习到一种新的隐动作表示RLA，具有预测性、泛化性和时间编码能力。
analysis.method: 提出RLA-WM，使用流匹配（flow matching）预测RLA值，从而构建基于视觉特征的世界模型。
contributions: 发现并定义了残差隐动作（RLA），可从DINO残差中学习，具有预测性、泛化性和时间编码能力。
提出RLA-WM，基于流匹配预测RLA，在仿真和真实数据集上超越现有特征基和视频扩散世界模型，且速度比视频扩散快数个数量级。
开发两种基于RLA-WM的机器人学习技术：从无动作演示视频中学习的极简世界动作模型，以及首个完全在离线视频学习的视觉RL框架。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实数据集上评估，RLA-WM优于最先进的特征基和视频扩散世界模型，且速度显著更快。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖DINO特征的质量和泛化性。
流匹配的采样效率可能仍有提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出残差隐动作（RLA）和基于流匹配的世界模型RLA-WM，在视觉特征空间中高效预测未来状态，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Decoupling Semantics and Fingerprints: A Universal Representation for AI-Generated Image Detection
authors: Yunfeng Diao (2) ((1) Hefei University of Technology
(2) Key Laboratory of Knowledge Engineering with Big Data (Hefei University of Technology)
Ministry of Education / School of Computer Science and Information Engineering
Hefei University of Technology / Intelligent Interconnected Systems Laboratory of Anhui Province (Hefei University of Technology))
papers.abstract: Detecting AI-generated images across unseen architectures remains challenging, as existing models often overfit to generator-specific fingerprints and semantic content rather than learning universal forgery traces. We attribute this failure to feature entanglement: detectors learn these factors as a single entangled representation, where universal forgery traces are inextricably confounded with both generator-specific fingerprints and semantic content. Crucially, our spectral analysis reveals that this entanglement is avoidable: distinct generator-specific fingerprints (e.g., GAN stripes vs. Diffusion Model spots) occupy disjoint frequency subspaces and coexist as independent superpositions. Leveraging this physical orthogonality, we propose the Orthogonal Decomposition and Purification Network (ODP-Net) to structurally disentangle these factors. Specifically, ODP-Net employs (1) Instance-aware Orthogonal Decomposition to project features into mutually exclusive subspaces: universal forgery traces, generator-specific fingerprints, and semantic content; (2) Perturbation-based Purification to enforce semantic invariance via cross-sample feature injection; and (3) Manifold Alignment to bridge domain gaps. By explicitly decoupling universal forgery traces from generator-specific fingerprints and semantic content, ODP-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on unseen architectures (e.g., Stable Diffusion 3), validating that structural disentanglement is key to generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出ODP-Net，通过正交分解与净化实现AI生成图像检测中通用伪造痕迹与生成器指纹、语义内容的解耦，提升跨架构泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测模型在未见过的生成架构上泛化能力差，因为模型容易过拟合生成器特定的指纹和语义内容，而非学习通用的伪造痕迹。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦通用伪造痕迹、生成器特定指纹和语义内容，以实现跨架构的AI生成图像检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频谱分析发现，不同生成器的指纹（如GAN条纹、扩散模型斑点）占据不相交的频率子空间，以独立叠加方式共存，表明特征纠缠是可避免的。
analysis.method: 提出正交分解与净化网络（ODP-Net），包含三个模块：实例感知正交分解将特征投影到互斥子空间（通用伪造痕迹、生成器指纹、语义内容）；基于扰动的净化通过跨样本特征注入强制语义不变性；流形对齐弥合域差距。
contributions: 揭示了AI生成图像检测中特征纠缠的根源，并通过频谱分析证明了物理正交性。
提出了ODP-Net，首次实现通用伪造痕迹与生成器指纹、语义内容的结构化解耦。
在未见过的架构（如Stable Diffusion 3）上取得了最先进的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对高度相似的生成器指纹解耦效果有限。
需要进一步验证在更复杂生成模型上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ODP-Net，通过正交分解与净化实现AI生成图像检测中通用伪造痕迹与生成器指纹、语义内容的解耦，提升跨架构泛化能力。

papers.title: Learning to Track Instance from Single Nature Language Description
papers.abstract: How to achieve vision-language (VL) tracking using natural language descriptions from a video sequence \textbf{without relying on any bounding-box ground truth}? In this work, we achieve this goal by tackling \textit{self-supervised VL tracking}, which aims to evaluate tracking capabilities guided by natural language descriptions. We introduce \textbf{\tracker}, a novel self-supervised VL tracker that is capable of tracking any referred object by a language description. Unlike traditional methods that equally fuse all language and visual tokens, we propose an efficient Dynamic Token Aggregation Module, which treats each visual token \textbf{unequally}. The module consists of three main steps: i) Based on an anchor token, it selects multiple important target tokens from the template frame. ii) The selected target tokens are merged according to their attention scores and aggregated into the language tokens, thereby eliminating redundant visual token noise and enhancing semantic alignment. iii) Finally, the fused language tokens serve as guiding signals to extract potential target tokens from the search frame and propagate them to subsequent frames, enhancing temporal prompts and encouraging the tracker to autonomously learn instance tracking from unlabeled videos. This new modeling approach enables the effective self-supervised learning of language-guided tracking representations without the need for large-scale bounding box annotations. Extensive experiments on VL tracking benchmarks show that {\tracker} surpasses SOTA self-supervised methods.
