analysis.tldr: 提出无需边界框标注的自监督视觉-语言跟踪器，通过动态令牌聚合模块实现语言引导的实例跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言跟踪方法依赖边界框标注，成本高且难以扩展；自监督方法在语言引导跟踪中效果有限，缺乏有效的语义对齐机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有边界框真值的情况下，仅利用自然语言描述实现视频序列中的实例跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法平等融合所有语言和视觉令牌，导致冗余视觉噪声干扰语义对齐，影响跟踪性能。
analysis.method: 提出自监督VL跟踪器，包含动态令牌聚合模块：基于锚令牌选择模板帧中的关键目标令牌，按注意力分数合并并聚合到语言令牌中，再用融合后的语言令牌引导搜索帧中的目标令牌提取并传播至后续帧。
contributions: 首次实现无需边界框标注的自监督视觉-语言跟踪。
提出动态令牌聚合模块，通过非平等处理视觉令牌增强语义对齐并消除噪声。
在VL跟踪基准上超越现有自监督方法。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉-语言跟踪基准上进行实验，结果表明所提方法优于现有自监督方法。
limitations: 可能对复杂语言描述或长视频序列的鲁棒性有限。
自监督学习依赖视频内在一致性，可能受场景变化影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需边界框标注的自监督视觉-语言跟踪器，通过动态令牌聚合模块实现语言引导的实例跟踪。

papers.title: Pan-FM: A Pan-Organ Foundation Model with Saliency-Guided Masking for Missing Robustness
papers.abstract: Foundation models (FMs) have shown great promise in medical imaging, but most FMs are trained on unimodal data within isolated domains, such as brain MRI alone. Human aging and disease arise through coordinated biological processes across organs, therefore motivating multimodal FMs that learn whole-body representations. A key challenge, however, is that real-world multimodal biomedical data are often missing not at random, which can reduce power, limit generalizability, and introduce bias. We propose Pan-FM, a pan-organ foundation model pre-trained on imaging from seven organs (Brain, Heart, Adipose, Liver, Kidney, Spleen, and Pancreas) under realistic missing-organ scenarios. Pan-FM uses a unified backbone that handles organ missingness during both training and inference, and is pre-trained with masking-based self-distillation. We find that naive multimodal pre-training leads to dominant-organ shortcut learning bias, with the model over-relying on dominant organs such as adipose and heart. To address this, we introduce Saliency-Guided Masking (SGM), which uses the model attention distribution to adaptively mask dominant organs during pre-training, thus encouraging more balanced cross-organ, whole-body learning. Notably, SGM introduces negligible computational overhead and can be seamlessly integrated into existing self-supervised learning frameworks to improve multi-organ representation learning. On the UK Biobank, Pan-FM achieves stronger prediction across 13 disease categories and 14 single disease entities than single-organ and multi-organ baselines, with improved robustness under missing-organ settings. Pan-FM serves as a scalable solution to realistic modality-missingness in multimodal learning in system neuroscience and as a step toward more generalizable whole-body FMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pan-FM，一种通过显著性引导掩码预训练的全器官基础模型，解决多器官数据缺失下的鲁棒性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基础模型多基于单模态单器官数据训练，但人类衰老和疾病涉及多器官协调过程，需要全身体表型学习；然而真实多器官数据常非随机缺失，导致模型性能下降、泛化受限且引入偏差。
analysis.problem: 多器官医学影像数据缺失场景下，如何预训练一个鲁棒的全器官基础模型，避免主导器官捷径学习偏差，实现均衡的跨器官表征学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现朴素多模态预训练会导致主导器官捷径学习偏差，模型过度依赖脂肪和心脏等主导器官。
analysis.method: 提出Pan-FM，使用统一骨干网络处理训练和推理中的器官缺失，基于掩码自蒸馏预训练；引入显著性引导掩码（SGM），利用模型注意力分布自适应地掩码主导器官，促进均衡的跨器官学习。
contributions: 提出Pan-FM，首个在七器官真实缺失场景下预训练的全器官基础模型。
发现并解决多器官预训练中的主导器官捷径学习偏差，提出显著性引导掩码（SGM）方法。
在UK Biobank上13种疾病类别和14种单一疾病预测中取得更优性能，且对器官缺失具有鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在UK Biobank数据集上评估，涵盖13种疾病类别和14种单一疾病预测，与单器官和多器官基线对比，显示更强预测性能和缺失鲁棒性。
limitations: 仅基于七个器官，可能未覆盖所有相关器官。
SGM依赖模型注意力分布，可能受注意力质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Pan-FM，一种通过显著性引导掩码预训练的全器官基础模型，解决多器官数据缺失下的鲁棒性问题。

papers.title: OneViewAll: Semantic Prior Guided One-View 6D Pose Estimation for Novel Objects
papers.abstract: In many practical 6D object pose estimation scenarios, we often have access to only a single real-world RGB-D reference view per object, typically without CAD models. Existing methods largely rely on explicit 3D models or multi-view data, which limits their scalability. To address this challenging single-reference model-free setting, we propose \textbf{OneViewAll}, a semantic-prior-guided framework that performs pose estimation via a novel Project-and-Compare paradigm. Instead of relying on computationally expensive CAD-based rendering, our method directly aligns reference and query observations within a projection-equivariant space. OneViewAll progressively integrates hierarchical semantic priors across three levels: (1) \textit{category- and scene-level} priors for efficient hypothesis initialization; (2) \textit{object-level symmetry} priors for geometry completion via mirror fusion; and (3) \textit{patch-level} priors for discriminative refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OneViewAll achieves \textbf{92.5\%} ADD-0.1 accuracy on the LINEMOD dataset using only one real reference view -- significantly outperforming the CVPR 2025 baseline One2Any (52.6\%). It also yields consistent improvements on YCB-V, Real275, and Toyota-Light while maintaining low inference latency. Our results underscore the efficacy of symmetry-aware projection in handling symmetric, texture-less, and occluded objects.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义先验引导的单视图6D姿态估计框架，仅需单张RGB-D参考图即可实现高精度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际应用中常只有单张参考视图且无CAD模型，现有方法依赖3D模型或多视图数据，可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 解决单参考视图、无CAD模型条件下的6D物体姿态估计问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对称性先验有助于处理对称、无纹理和遮挡物体；投影等变空间可替代CAD渲染。
analysis.method: 提出Project-and-Compare范式，在投影等变空间中直接对齐参考和查询观测，并渐进集成类别/场景、物体对称性和补丁级语义先验。
contributions: 首次在单参考视图无CAD模型设定下实现高精度6D姿态估计
提出层次化语义先验框架，包括对称性先验的镜像融合和补丁级判别细化
analysis.experiments: 在LINEMOD、YCB-V、Real275、Toyota-Light数据集上评估，LINEMOD上ADD-0.1准确率92.5%，远超基线One2Any的52.6%。
limitations: 依赖RGB-D输入，可能不适用于纯RGB场景
对称性先验对非对称物体可能帮助有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义先验引导的单视图6D姿态估计框架，仅需单张RGB-D参考图即可实现高精度估计。

papers.title: LensVLM: Selective Context Expansion for Compressed Visual Representation of Text
papers.abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) offer the exciting possibility of processing text as rendered images, bypassing the need for tokenizing the text into long token sequences. Since VLM image encoders map fixed-size images to a fixed number of visual tokens, varying rendering resolution provides a fine-grained compression knob. However, accuracy deteriorates quickly as compression increases: characters shrink below the vision encoder's effective resolution, making them indistinguishable. To address this, we propose LensVLM, an inference framework and post-training recipe that enables VLMs to scan compressed images, then selectively expand only the relevant images to their uncompressed form via learned tools. Building on Qwen3.5-9B-Base, LensVLM maintains accuracy comparable to the full-text upper bound at 4.3x effective compression and outperforms retrieval-based, text- and visual-compression baselines up to 10.1x effective compression across seven text QA benchmarks. LensVLM also generalizes to multimodal document and code understanding tasks, with the accuracy gain over baselines growing as compression increases. Our analysis validates this approach: training makes visual compression robust to rendering choices, and as compression grows the model increasingly relies on expanded content rather than unreliable visual reading. The analysis also yields practical tool-choice guidance: text expansion is preferable for rendered text, while high-resolution image expansion suits native documents whose layout cues carry task-relevant information.

analysis.tldr: LensVLM通过选择性扩展压缩图像中的相关区域，在4.3倍压缩下保持全文本精度，并推广到多模态文档和代码理解任务。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM将文本渲染为图像处理时，压缩会导致字符模糊、精度下降，现有方法缺乏对压缩图像中关键区域的智能选择与扩展机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高压缩比的同时，避免因视觉分辨率不足导致的文本识别精度损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 压缩使字符低于视觉编码器有效分辨率而难以区分；模型在训练后对压缩的鲁棒性增强，且高压缩下更依赖扩展内容而非不可靠的视觉读取。
analysis.method: 提出LensVLM推理框架和后训练方法，使VLM先扫描压缩图像，再通过学习的工具选择性地将相关图像扩展为未压缩形式。
contributions: 提出选择性上下文扩展方法，在4.3倍有效压缩下保持与全文本上界相当的精度，并在7个文本QA基准上优于检索、文本和视觉压缩基线。
验证了方法对多模态文档和代码理解任务的泛化能力，并分析了压缩鲁棒性和工具选择策略。
analysis.experiments: 在7个文本QA基准上评估，LensVLM在4.3倍压缩下精度与全文本上界相当，在10.1倍压缩下优于基线；并在多模态文档和代码理解任务上验证泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构（Qwen3.5-9B-Base），迁移性需验证。
选择性扩展机制可能引入额外推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LensVLM通过选择性扩展压缩图像中的相关区域，在4.3倍压缩下保持全文本精度，并推广到多模态文档和代码理解任务。

papers.title: TRAJGANR: Trajectory-Centric Urban Multimodal Learning via Geospatially Aligned Neural Representations
papers.abstract: Multimodal self-supervised learning (MSSL) has emerged as a key paradigm for pretraining geospatial foundation models. However, existing geospatial MSSL methods are mainly designed for static pairs of modalities, such as satellite imagery, street-view imagery, and text, where learning is driven by aligning observations from the same or nearby locations. This assumption breaks down for human mobility trajectories, which represent continuous movement along paths rather than discrete observations at individual locations. Although trajectories are important for urban understanding through their ability to capture human activity across roads, neighborhoods, and places over time, they remain largely underexplored in current geospatial MSSL frameworks. We present TrajGANR, a novel trajectory-centric geospatial MSSL framework that aligns continuous movement patterns with static, location-based observations. TrajGANR learns a continuous neural representation of trajectories at arbitrary points along each path, which enables fine-grained alignment with nearby street-view images, even when they are not co-located with any trajectory waypoints. We leverage this capability to introduce an MSSL objective that jointly aligns three modalities: trajectories, street-view images, and their geographic locations. We evaluate TrajGANR on four urban mobility and road understanding tasks. Across these tasks, TrajGANR consistently outperforms existing geospatial MSSL frameworks and a trajectory-specific foundation model. Ablation studies further demonstrate that our proposed MSSL objective and the multimodal learning framework are the primary drivers of these improvements, highlighting the importance of fine-grained geospatial alignment over coarser aggregation, as well as geospatial multimodal learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出TrajGANR，通过连续神经表示对齐轨迹与街景图像，实现轨迹中心的多模态自监督学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地理空间多模态自监督学习主要针对静态模态对（如卫星图像、街景图像和文本），无法处理人类移动轨迹这种连续路径数据，而轨迹对城市理解至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何将连续移动轨迹与静态位置观测（如街景图像）进行细粒度对齐，以构建轨迹中心的地理空间多模态自监督学习框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 学习轨迹的连续神经表示，使其在路径任意点都能与附近街景图像进行细粒度对齐，并联合对齐轨迹、街景图像和地理位置三种模态。
contributions: 提出TrajGANR，首个轨迹中心的地理空间多模态自监督学习框架。
引入连续神经表示实现轨迹与静态观测的细粒度对齐，并设计联合对齐三种模态的MSSL目标。
analysis.experiments: 在四个城市移动和道路理解任务上评估，TrajGANR持续优于现有地理空间MSSL框架和轨迹专用基础模型。消融实验表明所提MSSL目标和多模态学习框架是主要改进来源。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量街景图像和轨迹数据，数据获取成本高。
连续神经表示的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TrajGANR，通过连续神经表示对齐轨迹与街景图像，实现轨迹中心的多模态自监督学习。

papers.title: Bringing Multimodal Large Language Models to Infrared-Visible Image Fusion Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: Infrared-Visible image fusion (IVIF) aims to integrate thermal information and detailed spatial structures into a single fused image to enhance perception. However, existing evaluation approaches tend to over-optimize both hand-crafted no-reference statistics and full-reference metrics that treat the source images as pseudo ground truths. Recent IVIF reward-modelling efforts learn from human ratings but use scalar regression on aggregated scores, neither leveraging the reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) nor encoding per-image perceptual ambiguity in their supervision, but naively introducing MLLMs with discrete one-hot supervision likewise collapses fused images of similar quality into different rating levels. To address this, we introduce FuScore, which utilizes an MLLM to mimic human visual perception by producing continuous quality score, rather than discrete level predictions, enabling fine-grained discrimination among fused images of similar quality. We exploit the agreement among four IVIF-specific sub-dimensions to construct a per-image soft label whose sharpness reflects how consensual the overall judgment is. We further introduce a tripartite objective combining per-image distributional supervision, within-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for method-level ordering, and cross-source-pair Thurstone fidelity for scene-level ordering across scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FuScore achieves state-of-the-art correlation with human visual preferences.

analysis.tldr: FuScore 利用 MLLM 生成连续质量分数，实现红外-可见光融合图像的细粒度质量评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外-可见光图像融合质量评估方法过度优化手工特征或全参考指标，且基于人类评分的奖励建模仅使用标量回归，未能利用多模态大语言模型的推理能力或编码每张图像的感知模糊性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态大语言模型对红外-可见光融合图像进行细粒度、连续的质量评估，避免离散标签导致的相似质量图像被错误分级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接使用离散 one-hot 监督的 MLLM 会将相似质量的融合图像划分到不同等级，而连续分数能实现更精细的区分。
analysis.method: 提出 FuScore，使用 MLLM 生成连续质量分数，利用四个 IVIF 特定子维度的一致性构建软标签，并引入三部分目标：每张图像的分布监督、源对内的瑟斯通保真度（方法级排序）和跨源对的瑟斯通保真度（场景级排序）。
contributions: 首次将 MLLM 用于 IVIF 质量评估，生成连续分数而非离散等级。
提出基于子维度一致性的软标签构建方法，反映判断共识。
设计三部分训练目标，同时优化图像级、方法级和场景级排序。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 的预训练质量，对低质量 MLLM 泛化性未知。
软标签构建依赖于四个子维度的定义，可能不适用于其他融合任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FuScore 利用 MLLM 生成连续质量分数，实现红外-可见光融合图像的细粒度质量评估。

papers.title: XiYOLO: Energy-Aware Object Detection via Iterative Architecture Search and Scaling
papers.abstract: Object detection on heterogeneous edge devices must satisfy strict energy, latency, and memory constraints while still providing reliable perception for downstream autonomy. Existing energy-aware NAS methods often target limited deployment settings, while real energy remains difficult to optimize because it is highly device-dependent and costly to measure. We address these challenges with an energy-adaptive framework that combines an energy-aware XiResOFA search space, a two-stage energy estimator, and iterative search to identify a single energy-efficient base architecture. We then apply compound scaling to transform this base design into the XiYOLO family across deployment budgets, enabling interpretable accuracy-energy tradeoffs under sparse hardware measurements. Experiments on PascalVOC, COCO, and real-device deployment show that XiYOLO achieves a stronger energy-accuracy tradeoff than YOLO baselines. On PascalVOC, the medium XiYOLO model reaches 86.15 mAP50 while reducing energy relative to YOLOv12m by 20.6% on GPU and 35.9% on NPU. On COCO, XiYOLO reduces energy relative to YOLOv12 by up to 53.7% on GPU and 51.6% on NPU at the small scale. The proposed two-stage estimator also improves sample efficiency over a joint predictor under few-shot adaptation with only 2-20 target-device samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出能量感知的迭代架构搜索与缩放方法XiYOLO，在异构边缘设备上实现更优的能效-精度权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构边缘设备上的目标检测需满足严格的能量、延迟和内存约束，但现有能量感知NAS方法部署场景有限，且真实能量高度依赖设备、测量成本高，难以直接优化。
analysis.problem: 如何在稀疏硬件测量下，高效搜索并缩放出适应不同部署预算的能量高效目标检测架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出能量自适应框架，包含能量感知的XiResOFA搜索空间、两阶段能量估计器和迭代搜索，先识别单一高效基架构，再通过复合缩放生成XiYOLO系列。
contributions: 提出能量自适应框架，结合迭代架构搜索与复合缩放，实现可解释的精度-能量权衡。
设计两阶段能量估计器，在少量目标设备样本下提升样本效率。
在PascalVOC和COCO上，XiYOLO相比YOLO基线在GPU和NPU上均显著降低能耗。
analysis.experiments: 在PascalVOC、COCO和真实设备上部署实验，XiYOLO中等模型在PascalVOC上达到86.15 mAP50，相比YOLOv12m在GPU上能耗降低20.6%，NPU上降低35.9%；COCO上小规模相比YOLOv12在GPU上能耗降低53.7%，NPU上降低51.6%。两阶段估计器在2-20个目标设备样本下优于联合预测器。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定边缘设备（GPU/NPU）验证，泛化性需更多设备测试。
复合缩放策略的通用性可能受限于搜索空间设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出能量感知的迭代架构搜索与缩放方法XiYOLO，在异构边缘设备上实现更优的能效-精度权衡。

papers.title: A$^2$RD: Agentic Autoregressive Diffusion for Long Video Consistency
papers.abstract: Synthesizing consistent and coherent long video remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods suffer from semantic drift and narrative collapse over long horizons. We present A$^2$RD, an Agentic Auto-Regressive Diffusion architecture that decouples creative synthesis from consistency enforcement. A$^2$RD formulates long video synthesis as a closed-loop process that synthesizes and self-improves video segment-by-segment through a Retrieve--Synthesize--Refine--Update cycle. It comprises three core components: (i) Multimodal Video Memory that tracks video progression across modalities; (ii) Adaptive Segment Generation that switches among generation modes for natural progression and visual consistency; and (iii) Hierarchical Test-Time Self-Improvement that self-improves each segment at frame and video levels to prevent error propagation. We further introduce LVBench-C, a challenging benchmark with non-linear entity and environment transitions to stress-test long-horizon consistency. Across public and LVBench-C benchmarks spanning one- to ten-minute videos, A$^2$RD outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 30% in consistency and 20% in narrative coherence. Human evaluations corroborate these gains while also highlighting notable improvements in motion and transition smoothness.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种解耦创意生成与一致性约束的智能体自回归扩散架构，通过检索-合成-精炼-更新循环实现长视频逐段生成与自我改进，在一致性和叙事连贯性上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频合成面临语义漂移和叙事崩溃的挑战，现有方法难以在长时间跨度内保持连贯性和一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成语义一致、叙事连贯的长视频，避免逐段生成中的错误累积和内容漂移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在长视频生成中会出现语义漂移和叙事崩溃，即随着时间推移，视频内容逐渐偏离初始设定或失去逻辑连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出A$^2$RD架构，包含多模态视频记忆、自适应片段生成和层次化测试时自我改进三个核心组件，通过检索-合成-精炼-更新循环实现闭环生成。
contributions: 提出一种解耦创意生成与一致性约束的智能体自回归扩散架构，用于长视频合成。
引入LVBench-C基准，用于评估长视频一致性。
在公开和LVBench-C基准上，A$^2$RD在一致性和叙事连贯性上分别提升高达30%和20%。
analysis.experiments: 在涵盖1到10分钟视频的公开和LVBench-C基准上评估，A$^2$RD在一致性和叙事连贯性上优于最先进基线，人类评估也证实了运动和平滑度的改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的视频记忆和检索机制，对初始片段质量敏感。
测试时自我改进可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种解耦创意生成与一致性约束的智能体自回归扩散架构，通过检索-合成-精炼-更新循环实现长视频逐段生成与自我改进，在一致性和叙事连贯性上显著超越现有方法。

papers.title: Advancing Reliable Synthetic Video Detection: Insights from the SAFE Challenge
papers.abstract: The proliferation of generative video technologies has intensified the need for reliable methods to detect and characterize synthetic media. To address this challenge, we organized the \href{ this https URL }{SAFE: Synthetic Video Detection Challenge}, co-located with the \textit{Authenticity and Provenance in the Age of Generative AI (APAI) Workshop }at ICCV 2025. The competition invited participants to develop and evaluate algorithms capable of distinguishing real from synthetic videos under fully blind evaluation conditions with over 600 submissions from 12 teams over a 90 day span. Hosted on the Hugging Face platform, the challenge comprised two primary tasks: (1) detection of synthetic video content generated by diverse state-of-the-art models, and (2) detection of synthetic content following common post-processing operations such as resizing, re-compression, motion blur and others. The challenge data consisted of 13 modern high quality synthetic video models with generated content matched to real videos from 21 diverse and challenge sources, all adding up to 20 hours of 6,000 video samples. This paper describes the challenge design, dataset construction, evaluation methodology, and outcomes, offering insights into the generalization and robustness of contemporary synthetic video detection methods. Our findings highlight measurable progress in cross-generator generalization but also persistent vulnerabilities to post-processing artifacts. this https URL

analysis.tldr: SAFE挑战赛系统评估了合成视频检测方法，发现跨生成器泛化有进展但后处理鲁棒性不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成视频技术泛滥，亟需可靠的合成视频检测方法，但现有方法在跨模型泛化和后处理鲁棒性方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个全面的基准测试来评估合成视频检测方法在盲测条件下的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出跨生成器泛化有可测量的进步，但对后处理操作（如缩放、重压缩、运动模糊）存在持续脆弱性。
analysis.method: 组织SAFE挑战赛，构建包含13种现代高质量合成视频模型和21种真实视频来源的数据集，设计两个任务：原始检测和后处理检测，采用完全盲测评估。
contributions: 发布了包含20小时、6000个视频样本的合成视频检测基准数据集
系统评估了12个团队超过600个提交方法，揭示了跨生成器泛化的进展和后处理鲁棒性的弱点
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了挑战赛设计和观察到的现象。
limitations: 数据集可能未覆盖所有最新的生成模型
后处理操作种类有限，可能无法完全反映真实场景
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAFE挑战赛系统评估了合成视频检测方法，发现跨生成器泛化有进展但后处理鲁棒性不足。

papers.title: Not All Tokens Need 40 Steps: Heterogeneous Step Allocation in Diffusion Transformers for Efficient Video Generation
papers.abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have achieved state-of-the-art video generation quality, but they incur immense computational cost because standard inference applies the same number of denoising steps uniformly to every token in the sequence. It is well known that human vision ignores vast amounts of redundant motion. Why, then, do our densest models treat every spatiotemporal token with equal priority? In this paper, we introduce Heterogeneous Step Allocation (HSA), a training-free inference algorithm that assigns varying step budgets to different spatiotemporal tokens based on their velocity dynamics. To resolve the resulting sequence-length mismatch without sacrificing global context, HSA introduces a KV-cache synchronization mechanism that allows active tokens to attend to the full sequence while entirely bypassing inactive tokens. Furthermore, we derive a cached Euler update that advances the latent states of skipped tokens in a single operation without additional model evaluations. We evaluate HSA on the Wan-2 and LTX-2 models for both text-to-video (T2V) and image-to-video (I2V) generation. Our results demonstrate that HSA significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art caching methods and the vanilla Flow Matching baseline, especially at aggressive acceleration regimes (e.g., 50% and 25% runtimes). Crucially, HSA achieves a superior quality-runtime Pareto frontier without the need for expensive offline profiling, robustly preserving structural integrity and generation quality even under tight computational budgets. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出异构步分配（HSA）方法，根据令牌速度动态分配去噪步数，实现高效视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiT）在视频生成中计算成本极高，因为标准推理对所有令牌使用相同步数，而人类视觉能忽略冗余运动，现有方法缺乏对令牌差异性的利用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，通过非均匀分配去噪步数来降低DiT视频生成的计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准推理对所有时空令牌统一分配步数导致计算浪费，而人类视觉可忽略冗余运动，暗示令牌间存在计算优先级差异。
analysis.method: HSA：基于速度动态为不同令牌分配不同步数，引入KV缓存同步机制解决序列长度不匹配，并推导缓存欧拉更新以单步推进跳过令牌的潜状态。
contributions: 提出训练无关的异构步分配算法HSA，根据令牌速度动态分配去噪步数。
设计KV缓存同步机制和缓存欧拉更新，实现高效推理并保持全局上下文。
analysis.experiments: 在Wan-2和LTX-2模型上评估T2V和I2V任务，HSA在激进加速（50%和25%运行时）下显著优于先前缓存方法和Flow Matching基线，实现质量-运行时帕累托前沿。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（DiT），泛化性需验证。
速度动态的阈值选择可能影响性能，未讨论自适应调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异构步分配（HSA）方法，根据令牌速度动态分配去噪步数，实现高效视频生成。

papers.title: Towards Fairness under Label Bias in Image Segmentation: Impact, Measurement and Mitigation
papers.abstract: Labeled datasets reflect the biases of their annotation pipelines, which sometimes introduce label bias: group-conditional label errors that cause systematic performance disparities across demographic subgroups. Label bias in image segmentation remains underexplored, as even detecting it typically requires clean, unbiased annotations, which are not readily available. We present a data-centric adaptation of Confident Learning to segmentation, allowing detection of label bias directly in the training data without a clean, unbiased ground truth. By comparing the provided training labels to the model's confident predictions, we isolate directional errors that quantify the presence and nature of bias, where standard overlap metrics like Dice fail. We further show that label bias influences subgroup separability in the encoder's feature space, an artifact we leverage for bias mitigation rather than suppressing it. We evaluate three datasets, spanning from synthetic to real-life bias, showing how our framework reliably detects and mitigates bias without access to clean labels, achieving equitable performance across experimental conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的置信学习适配方法，用于检测和缓解图像分割中的标签偏差，无需干净标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像分割中的标签偏差（组条件标签错误）会导致不同人口统计子群之间的系统性能差异，但现有方法通常需要干净无偏的标注来检测偏差，而这在实际中难以获得。
analysis.problem: 如何在缺乏干净无偏标注的情况下，检测并缓解图像分割中的标签偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标签偏差影响编码器特征空间中子群的可分离性，标准重叠指标（如Dice）无法有效检测偏差。
analysis.method: 将置信学习（Confident Learning）数据自适应地应用于分割任务，通过比较训练标签与模型置信预测来隔离方向性误差，从而量化偏差的存在和性质，并利用特征空间中的偏差伪影进行缓解。
contributions: 提出一种数据驱动的置信学习适配方法，用于检测图像分割中的标签偏差，无需干净无偏标注。
揭示了标签偏差影响特征空间子群可分离性的现象，并利用该现象进行偏差缓解。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集上评估，涵盖合成到真实偏差，框架能可靠检测和缓解偏差，无需干净标签，实现跨实验条件的公平性能。
limitations: 可能依赖于模型置信预测的准确性，若模型本身存在偏差可能影响检测效果。
未提及对多种类型标签偏差的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种数据驱动的置信学习适配方法，用于检测和缓解图像分割中的标签偏差，无需干净标注。

papers.title: TriDE: Triangle-Consistent Translation Directions for Global Camera Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Pairwise translation directions are a key input to camera location estimation in global structure-from-motion. Existing estimators usually process each image pair independently, producing directions that may be locally plausible but inconsistent with the other relative directions in the viewing graph. To jointly estimate the direction, we propose TriDE, which exploits camera-triangle consistency as an efficient higher-order verification signal. Instead of solving a costly global nonlinear optimization problem that is sensitive to initialization, TriDE refines unreliable pairwise directions through message passing between directions and their incident weighted triangles. This information propagation strategy enables us to establish a strong phase-transition bound for exact recovery under a realistic random corruption model. Experiments on real image graphs show that TriDE improves direction accuracy by a large margin and yields better downstream camera locations, providing a practical link between local pairwise estimation and global camera pose geometry.

analysis.tldr: 提出三角一致性约束优化全局相机位姿估计中的平移方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 全局运动恢复结构中，成对平移方向是相机位置估计的关键输入，但现有方法独立处理每对图像，导致局部合理但全局不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地联合估计全局一致的成对平移方向，避免昂贵的全局非线性优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TriDE，利用相机三角形一致性作为高阶验证信号，通过消息传递在方向及其关联加权三角形之间传播信息，优化不可靠的成对方向。
contributions: 提出基于三角形一致性的高效高阶验证方法TriDE，用于全局相机位姿估计中的平移方向联合优化。
建立了在随机损坏模型下精确恢复的强相变界。
analysis.experiments: 在真实图像图上，TriDE大幅提升方向精度，并得到更好的下游相机位置。
limitations: 可能依赖三角形结构的质量，在退化场景中效果受限。
未讨论与更复杂全局优化方法的结合。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三角一致性约束优化全局相机位姿估计中的平移方向。

papers.title: AdpSplit: Error-Driven Adaptive Splitting for Faster Geometry Discovery in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Adaptive density control in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) repeatedly grows the Gaussian population through fixed-cardinality random splitting to discover useful scene structure. However, in vanilla 3DGS, its binary split operator requires many densification rounds to expose fine details, making it a bottleneck for efficient training schedules with fewer iterations. We introduce AdpSplit, an error-driven adaptive split operator that determines the number of split children and initializes the child parameters from L1-pixel-error region statistics, enabling fewer densification iterations, thus reduced training time, while preserving the rendering quality of full-schedule training. Across the MipNeRF360, Deep-Blending, and Tanks&Temples datasets, AdpSplit reduces the training time of multiple accelerated 3DGS pipelines by 9.2%-22.3% as a simple drop-in replacement for the standard split operator. With FastGS, AdpSplit matches the full-schedule PSNR on MipNeRF360 while reducing training time by 16.4%, corresponding to a 12.6x acceleration over vanilla 3DGS.

analysis.tldr: AdpSplit通过误差驱动的自适应分裂算子加速3DGS训练，减少迭代次数并保持渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS中固定数量的随机分裂算子需要多次稠密化才能发现精细结构，成为高效训练瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自适应分裂算子以减少稠密化迭代次数，加速3DGS训练而不牺牲渲染质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准3DGS的二元分裂算子需要多次稠密化才能暴露细节，导致训练效率低下。
analysis.method: 提出AdpSplit，基于L1像素误差区域统计自适应决定分裂子节点数量并初始化参数。
contributions: 提出误差驱动的自适应分裂算子AdpSplit，减少稠密化迭代次数。
在多个数据集上验证AdpSplit作为即插即用替换，可加速多种3DGS流水线9.2%-22.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在MipNeRF360、Deep-Blending和Tanks&Temples数据集上，AdpSplit将多种加速3DGS流水线的训练时间减少9.2%-22.3%；与FastGS结合，在MipNeRF360上达到全调度PSNR，训练时间减少16.4%，相对原始3DGS加速12.6倍。
limitations: 可能依赖L1误差统计的准确性，在噪声数据中效果未知。
仅针对3DGS的分裂操作，未涉及其他密度控制步骤。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdpSplit通过误差驱动的自适应分裂算子加速3DGS训练，减少迭代次数并保持渲染质量。

papers.title: Knowledge Transfer Scaling Laws for 3D Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Vision foundation models are increasingly moving beyond 2D to volumetric domains such as 3D medical imaging, where unified pretraining across different imaging modalities (i.e. CT, MRI, and PET) could provide foundational models for diverse clinical tasks. However, training such models requires mixing heterogeneous imaging domains, and current mixture strategies remain largely heuristic. In this work, we observe that different medical imaging domains scale at variable rates during pretraining, and knowledge transfer between domains is strongly asymmetric: training on one domain can substantially improve another, but the reverse may be much weaker. Interestingly, both MAE reconstruction loss and cross-domain transfer follow predictable power-law trends with domain-specific behaviors. Motivated by these findings, we formulate data allocation as a scaling-law optimization problem. The derived allocations reveal an interpretable hub-and-island structure: highly transferable domains emerge as hubs that benefit many others and deserve strategic allocation, while isolated domains act as islands requiring direct investment. Empirically, transfer-aware allocation outperforms data-proportional sampling by up to 58% and generalizes well to unseen budgets with r=0.989. Downstream validation on disease classification and organ/lesion segmentation further confirms that the derived transfer-aware mixtures provide stronger pretrained representations for clinical 3D medical imaging tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识迁移缩放定律，优化3D医学影像预训练数据分配，发现跨模态迁移不对称性，并设计枢纽-孤岛结构分配策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D医学影像基础模型需要混合不同模态（CT、MRI、PET）进行预训练，但当前数据混合策略主要依赖启发式方法，缺乏理论指导，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据跨模态知识迁移的缩放定律，优化多模态3D医学影像预训练中的数据分配，以提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同医学影像模态在预训练中缩放速率不同，且跨域知识迁移存在强不对称性（训练一个域可大幅提升另一域，反之则弱）；MAE重建损失和跨域迁移均遵循可预测的幂律趋势。
analysis.method: 将数据分配建模为基于缩放定律的优化问题，推导出枢纽-孤岛结构：高迁移性域作为枢纽需战略分配，孤立域需直接投入。
contributions: 发现3D医学影像预训练中跨模态知识迁移的不对称性和幂律缩放规律
提出基于缩放定律的数据分配优化方法，揭示枢纽-孤岛结构
实验证明迁移感知分配比数据比例采样提升高达58%，且泛化到未见预算
analysis.experiments: 在CT、MRI、PET多模态预训练中验证，迁移感知分配优于数据比例采样（提升58%），泛化到未见预算（r=0.989）；下游疾病分类和器官/病变分割任务进一步确认。
limitations: 缩放定律可能依赖特定预训练目标和模型架构
枢纽-孤岛结构可能随新模态加入而改变
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识迁移缩放定律，优化3D医学影像预训练数据分配，发现跨模态迁移不对称性，并设计枢纽-孤岛结构分配策略。

papers.title: LookWhen? Fast Video Recognition by Learning When, Where, and What to Compute
papers.abstract: Transformers dominate video recognition. They split videos into tokens, and processing them has expensive superlinear computational cost. Yet videos are filled with redundancy, so we can question the need for this expense. We introduce LookWhen, a selector-extractor framework that factorizes video recognition into learning when, where, and what to compute. Our shallow selector gets a scaled-down video and quickly scores all tokens across space-time, while our deep extractor gets the top-K selected tokens to approximate full-video representations without actually processing all the tokens. A key challenge is defining effective supervision for selection and extraction. For selection pre-training, we introduce a score on representations that ranks tokens by uniqueness using a simple nearest-neighbor distance. For extraction pre-training, we distill both a video teacher and an image teacher, for which we normalize its frame-wise representations to learn what changes within videos. Through these strategies, our selector-extractor learns general and efficient representations for feature extraction or fine-tuning to a task. Through experiments on Kinetics-400, SSv2, Epic-Kitchens, Diving48, Jester, and Charades, we show that LookWhen achieves a better accuracy-computation trade-off than efficient models and upgraded baselines of similar size. LookWhen Pareto-dominates in accuracy-FLOPs on 9 of 12 cases (6 tasks x 2 settings) and roughly matches on 3. In accuracy-throughput, measuring time in practice, LookWhen is more efficient still at 6.7x faster than InternVideo2-B at equal accuracy.

analysis.tldr: LookWhen通过学习何时、何地、计算什么，实现高效视频识别，在多个基准上达到更优的精度-计算权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频识别中Transformer处理所有token的计算成本高昂，而视频存在大量冗余，因此需要更高效的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过选择性计算减少视频识别中的冗余处理，同时保持高精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频中存在时空冗余，并非所有token对识别同等重要。
analysis.method: 提出选择器-提取器框架：浅层选择器快速评分所有token，深层提取器仅处理top-K token；通过基于最近邻距离的独特性评分进行选择预训练，并通过蒸馏视频和图像教师进行提取预训练。
contributions: 提出LookWhen框架，将视频识别分解为学习何时、何地、计算什么。
设计有效的选择预训练和提取预训练策略，包括基于最近邻距离的独特性评分和双教师蒸馏。
analysis.experiments: 在Kinetics-400、SSv2、Epic-Kitchens、Diving48、Jester和Charades上评估，LookWhen在9/12个案例中Pareto占优精度-FLOPs，在精度-吞吐量上比InternVideo2-B快6.7倍。
limitations: 选择器可能无法完美捕捉所有重要token，导致信息丢失。
预训练策略依赖教师模型，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LookWhen通过学习何时、何地、计算什么，实现高效视频识别，在多个基准上达到更优的精度-计算权衡。

papers.title: R$^3$L: Reasoning 3D Layouts from Relative Spatial Relations
papers.abstract: Relative spatial relations provide a compact representation of spatial structure and are fundamental to relative spatial reasoning in 3D layout generation. Recent works leverage Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to infer such relations, but the inferred relations are often unreliable and are typically handled with post-hoc heuristics. In this paper, we propose R$^3$L, a general framework that improves the reliability and consistency of relative spatial reasoning for 3D layout generation. Our key motivation is that multi-hop reasoning requires repeated reference-frame transformations, which accumulate errors in inferred relations and lead to semantic and metric drift. To mitigate this, we propose invariant spatial decomposition to break coupled relation chains, and consistent spatial imagination to promote self-consistency through an imagine-and-revise loop. We further introduce supportive spatial optimization to ease pose optimization via global-to-local coordinate re-parameterization. Extensive experiments across diverse scene types and instructions demonstrate that R$^3$L produces more physically feasible and semantically consistent layouts. Notably, our analysis shows that resolving frame-induced inconsistencies is crucial for reliable multi-hop relative spatial reasoning. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出R³L框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升3D布局生成中相对空间推理的可靠性与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 相对空间关系是3D布局生成的基础，但现有MLLM推理结果不可靠，且多跳推理中参考系变换累积误差导致语义和度量漂移。
analysis.problem: 多跳相对空间推理中参考系变换导致的误差累积和推理不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多跳推理需要重复的参考系变换，累积误差导致语义和度量漂移；帧引起的不一致性是可靠多跳推理的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出R³L框架，包含不变空间分解（解耦耦合关系链）、一致空间想象（想象-修正循环促进自一致性）和支持空间优化（全局到局部坐标重参数化简化位姿优化）。
contributions: 提出R³L框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升相对空间推理的可靠性。
引入支持空间优化，通过全局到局部坐标重参数化简化位姿优化。
实验证明解决帧引起的不一致性对多跳相对空间推理至关重要。
analysis.experiments: 在多种场景类型和指令上进行实验，结果表明R³L生成更物理可行和语义一致的布局。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的初始推理质量。
框架复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R³L框架，通过不变空间分解和一致空间想象提升3D布局生成中相对空间推理的可靠性与一致性。

papers.title: HumanNet: Scaling Human-centric Video Learning to One Million Hours
papers.abstract: Progress in embodied intelligence increasingly depends on scalable data infrastructure. While vision and language have scaled with internet corpora, learning physical interaction remains constrained by the lack of large, diverse, and richly annotated human activity data. We present HumanNet, a one-million-hour human-centric video corpus that captures how humans interact with the physical world at scale. HumanNet spans both first-person and third-person perspectives and covers fine-grained activities, human-object interactions, tool use, and long-horizon behaviors across diverse real-world environments. Beyond raw video, the dataset provides interaction-centric annotations, including captions, motion descriptions, and hand and body-related signals, enabling motion-aware and interaction-aware learning. Beyond scale, HumanNet introduces a systematic data curation paradigm for embodied learning, where human-centric filtering, temporal structuring, viewpoint diversity, and annotation enrichment are treated as first-class design principles. This design transforms unstructured internet video into a scalable substrate for representation learning, activity understanding, motion generation, and human-to-robot transfer. We conduct a first-step validation on the value of this design through controlled vision-language-action ablation: under a fixed set of validation data, continued training from the Qwen VLM model with 1000 hours of egocentric video drawn from HumanNet surpasses the continued training with 100 hours of real-robot data from Magic Cobot, indicating that egocentric human video could be a scalable and cost-effective substitute for robot data. By building this project, we aim to explore the opportunity to scale embodied foundation models using human-centric videos, rather than relying solely on robot-specific data.

analysis.tldr: HumanNet 是一个百万小时级人类中心视频数据集，通过系统化数据策展范式支持具身智能学习，初步实验表明第一人称人类视频可替代机器人数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能依赖大规模数据基础设施，但物理交互学习受限于缺乏大规模、多样化且丰富标注的人类活动数据。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模、高质量、富含交互标注的人类中心视频数据集，以支持具身表征学习、活动理解、运动生成和人到机器人迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 HumanNet 数据集，包含百万小时第一/第三人称视频，提供交互中心标注（字幕、运动描述、手/身体信号），并引入系统化数据策展范式（人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性、标注丰富化）。
contributions: 构建了百万小时级人类中心视频语料库 HumanNet，覆盖细粒度活动、人-物交互、工具使用和长时行为。
提出系统化数据策展范式，将人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性和标注丰富化作为一等设计原则。
通过 VLA 消融实验初步验证：使用 HumanNet 中 1000 小时第一人称视频继续训练 Qwen VLM，效果优于使用 100 小时真实机器人数据。
analysis.experiments: 在固定验证集上，使用 HumanNet 中 1000 小时第一人称视频继续训练 Qwen VLM，与使用 100 小时 Magic Cobot 真实机器人数据继续训练进行对比，前者表现更优。
limitations: 仅进行了初步的 VLA 消融验证，缺乏更全面的下游任务评估。
数据集规模巨大，可能带来存储、处理和隐私方面的挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HumanNet 是一个百万小时级人类中心视频数据集，通过系统化数据策展范式支持具身智能学习，初步实验表明第一人称人类视频可替代机器人数据。

papers.title: Edge Deep Learning in Computer Vision and Medical Diagnostics: A Comprehensive Survey
papers.abstract: Edge deep learning, a paradigm change reconciling edge computing and deep learning, facilitates real-time decision making attuned to environmental factors through the close integration of computational resources and data sources. Here we provide a comprehensive review of the current state of the art in edge deep learning, focusing on computer vision applications, in particular medical diagnostics. An overview of the foundational principles and technical advantages of edge deep learning is presented, emphasising the capacity of this technology to revolutionise a wide range of domains. Furthermore, we present a novel categorisation of edge hardware platforms based on performance and usage scenarios, facilitating platform selection and operational effectiveness. Following this, we dive into approaches to effectively implement deep neural networks on edge devices, encompassing methods such as lightweight design and model compression. Reviewing practical applications in the fields of computer vision in general and medical diagnostics in particular, we demonstrate the profound impact edge-deployed deep learning models can have in real-life situations. Finally, we provide an analysis of potential future directions and obstacles to the adoption of edge deep learning, with the intention to stimulate further investigations and advancements of intelligent edge deep learning solutions. This survey provides researchers and practitioners with a comprehensive reference shedding light on the critical role deep learning plays in the advancement of edge computing applications.

analysis.tldr: 综述边缘深度学习在计算机视觉和医学诊断中的应用，涵盖硬件平台分类、模型压缩方法和未来挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘深度学习结合边缘计算与深度学习，能实现实时决策，但缺乏系统性综述来指导硬件选择、模型部署和应用实践。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对边缘深度学习在计算机视觉和医学诊断中全面、结构化的综述，包括硬件平台分类、模型轻量化方法和实际应用案例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过文献综述，提出基于性能和场景的边缘硬件平台分类，并总结轻量级设计和模型压缩等部署方法。
contributions: 首次提出边缘硬件平台的性能-场景分类法，辅助平台选择。
系统梳理了边缘设备上部署深度神经网络的轻量化和压缩技术。
全面回顾了边缘深度学习在通用计算机视觉和医学诊断中的实际应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提供新的实验验证。
可能未涵盖所有最新边缘硬件和算法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述边缘深度学习在计算机视觉和医学诊断中的应用，涵盖硬件平台分类、模型压缩方法和未来挑战。

papers.title: Visual Text Compression as Measure Transport
papers.abstract: Visual text compression (VTC) promises efficient long-context processing by rendering text into an image and re-encoding it with a vision-language model, often producing $3$--$20\times$ fewer decoder tokens than subword tokenization. Yet token savings do not translate predictably into downstream utility: on some tasks the visual path matches or exceeds the text path, on others it collapses, and the compression ratio itself does not predict which regime will occur. The missing quantity is therefore not another summary of efficiency, but a principled measure of task-relevant information loss induced by visual encoding. We address this problem by formulating VTC in the language of measure transport. Treating text and visual tokens as empirical probability measures, we show that the ViT patch encoder induces a push-forward map whose transport cost decomposes into a precision cost from within-patch aggregation and a coverage cost from cross-patch fragmentation. Both terms are estimable from downstream-label-free probes. This formulation yields two operational consequences: a downstream-label-free routing criterion that selects whether to use the visual path for a given input or benchmark instance, and a transport-informed foveation mechanism that re-encodes high-cost regions at higher resolution. Across $24$ NLP datasets at Qwen3-4B, our label-free rule matches the per-dataset oracle on $17/24$ datasets ($70.8\%$), and improves the average task score by $+3.3\%$ with $-10.3\%$ average tokens relative to a pure-LLM.

analysis.tldr: 将视觉文本压缩建模为测度传输，提出无标签路由准则和注视机制，在24个NLP数据集上匹配70.8%的oracle选择并提升平均任务分数3.3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉文本压缩虽能大幅减少解码token数，但压缩比无法预测下游任务性能，需要一种原则性的任务相关信息损失度量来指导视觉路径的选择。
analysis.problem: 如何量化视觉文本压缩中的任务相关信息损失，并据此设计无标签的路由准则和分辨率优化机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉路径在某些任务上匹配或超越文本路径，在其他任务上性能崩溃，且压缩比本身无法预测这种差异。
analysis.method: 将文本和视觉token视为经验概率测度，ViT补丁编码器诱导一个推前映射，其传输代价分解为补丁内聚合的精度代价和跨补丁碎片化的覆盖代价，两者均可通过无下游标签的探针估计。基于此提出无标签路由准则和传输信息引导的注视机制。
contributions: 首次将视觉文本压缩形式化为测度传输问题，并推导出可分解的传输代价。
提出无下游标签的路由准则和注视机制，在Qwen3-4B上24个NLP数据集中70.8%匹配oracle选择，平均任务分数提升3.3%，token减少10.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B模型上对24个NLP数据集进行实验，无标签路由准则在17/24（70.8%）数据集上匹配per-dataset oracle，平均任务分数提升+3.3%，平均token减少-10.3%。
limitations: 仅在一个模型（Qwen3-4B）上验证，泛化性未知。
注视机制的具体实现细节和计算开销未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将视觉文本压缩建模为测度传输，提出无标签路由准则和注视机制，在24个NLP数据集上匹配70.8%的oracle选择并提升平均任务分数3.3%。

papers.title: 123D: Unifying Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Data at Scale
papers.abstract: The pursuit of autonomous driving has produced one of the richest sensor data collections in all of robotics. However, its scale and diversity remain largely untapped. Each dataset adopts different 2D and 3D modalities, such as cameras, lidar, ego states, annotations, traffic lights, and HD maps, with different rates and synchronization schemes. They come in fragmented formats requiring complex dependencies that cannot natively coexist in the same development environment. Further, major inconsistencies in annotation conventions prevent training or measuring generalization across multiple datasets. We present 123D, an open-source framework that unifies such multi-modal driving data through a single API. To handle synchronization, we store each modality as an independent timestamped event stream with no prescribed rate, enabling synchronous or asynchronous access across arbitrary datasets. Using 123D, we consolidate eight real-world driving datasets spanning 3,300 hours and 90,000 kilometers, together with a synthetic dataset with configurable collection scripts, and provide tools for data analysis and visualization. We conduct a systematic study comparing annotation statistics and assessing each dataset's pose and calibration accuracy. Further, we showcase two applications 123D enables: cross-dataset 3D object detection transfer and reinforcement learning for planning, and offer recommendations for future directions. Code and documentation are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 123D是一个开源框架，通过统一API整合多模态自动驾驶数据，支持跨数据集同步与访问。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶数据集规模大但格式碎片化、标注不一致，难以跨数据集训练或评估泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何统一多模态自动驾驶数据的格式、同步和访问，以支持跨数据集训练和评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出123D框架，将每种模态存储为独立的时间戳事件流，通过单一API实现同步或异步访问，并整合8个真实数据集和1个合成数据集。
contributions: 提出123D开源框架，统一多模态自动驾驶数据格式和访问接口
整合8个真实数据集（3300小时/9万公里）和1个合成数据集，提供分析工具
analysis.experiments: 进行了跨数据集3D目标检测迁移和强化学习规划的应用展示，并比较了标注统计和位姿校准精度。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有自动驾驶数据集
跨数据集迁移性能可能受标注差异限制
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 123D是一个开源框架，通过统一API整合多模态自动驾驶数据，支持跨数据集同步与访问。

papers.title: Uncertainty Quantification for Cardiac Shape Reconstruction with Deep Signed Distance Functions via MCMC methods
papers.abstract: Atlas-based approaches allow high-quality, patient-specific shape reconstructions of cardiac anatomy from sparse and/or noisy data such as point clouds. However, these methods are mainly prior-driven, so the impact of uncertainty can be large, limiting their clinical reliability. We propose a probabilistic framework for uncertainty-aware cardiac shape reconstruction that combines Deep Signed Distance Functions (DeepSDFs) with Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling. Cardiac geometries are modeled implicitly as zero-level sets of a neural network conditioned on learned latent codes, enabling multi-surface reconstruction of the left and right ventricles. By interpreting the reconstruction loss as a log-likelihood, we perform Bayesian inference in the latent space to obtain both maximum a posteriori (MAP) and posterior-sampled reconstructions. Experiments on a public cardiac dataset show that our approach produces accurate reconstructions and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates.

analysis.tldr: 结合DeepSDF与MCMC实现心脏形状重建的不确定性量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于图谱的心脏形状重建方法主要依赖先验，不确定性影响大，限制了临床可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何对心脏形状重建进行不确定性量化，提高临床可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将DeepSDF与MCMC结合，通过将重建损失解释为对数似然，在潜在空间进行贝叶斯推断，获得MAP和后验采样重建。
contributions: 提出一个概率框架用于不确定性感知的心脏形状重建。
结合DeepSDF与MCMC实现多表面重建及不确定性估计。
analysis.experiments: 在公开心脏数据集上实验，表明方法能产生准确重建和良好校准的不确定性估计。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定数据集，泛化性需验证。
MCMC采样计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合DeepSDF与MCMC实现心脏形状重建的不确定性量化。

papers.title: TAVIS: A Benchmark for Egocentric Active Vision and Anticipatory Gaze in Imitation Learning
papers.abstract: Active vision -- where a policy controls its own gaze during manipulation -- has emerged as a key capability for imitation learning, with multiple independent systems demonstrating its benefits in the past year. Yet there is no shared benchmark to compare approaches or quantify what active vision contributes, on which task types, and under what conditions. We introduce TAVIS, evaluation infrastructure for active-vision imitation learning, with two complementary task suites -- TAVIS-Head (5 tasks, global search via pan/tilt necks) and TAVIS-Hands (3 tasks, local occlusion via wrist cameras) -- on two humanoid torso embodiments (GR1T2, Reachy2), built on IsaacLab. TAVIS provides three evaluation primitives: a paired headcam-vs-fixedcam protocol on identical demonstrations; GALT (Gaze-Action Lead Time), a novel metric grounded in cognitive science and HRI that quantifies anticipatory gaze in learned policies; and procedural ID/OOD splits. Baseline experiments with Diffusion Policy and $\pi_0$ reveal that (i) active-vision generally helps, but benefits are task-conditional rather than uniform; (ii) multi-task policies degrade sharply under controlled distribution shifts on both suites; and (iii) imitation alone yields anticipatory gaze, with median lead times comparable to the human teleoperator reference. Code, evaluation scripts, demonstrations (LeRobot v3.0; ~2200 episodes) and trained baselines are released at this https URL and this https URL .

analysis.tldr: TAVIS 是首个用于模仿学习中主动视觉与预期注视的标准化基准，包含双任务套件和量化指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 主动视觉在模仿学习中显示出潜力，但缺乏统一基准来比较不同方法、量化其贡献及适用条件。
analysis.problem: 缺少一个共享基准来评估主动视觉在模仿学习中的效果，以及量化预期注视行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主动视觉通常有帮助，但收益因任务而异；多任务策略在分布偏移下性能急剧下降；仅靠模仿学习即可产生预期注视行为，其中位领先时间与人类操作员相当。
analysis.method: 构建基于 IsaacLab 的 TAVIS 基准，包含 TAVIS-Head（5 个任务，全局搜索）和 TAVIS-Hands（3 个任务，局部遮挡）两个任务套件，提供配对头戴相机与固定相机协议、GALT 指标以及程序化 ID/OOD 划分。
contributions: 提出首个用于主动视觉模仿学习的标准化基准 TAVIS，包含两个任务套件和两种人形机器人平台。
引入 GALT 指标，用于量化学习策略中的预期注视行为。
通过基线实验揭示了主动视觉的任务条件性收益、分布偏移下的脆弱性以及预期注视的涌现特性。
analysis.experiments: 使用 Diffusion Policy 和 π0 进行基线实验，在 TAVIS-Head 和 TAVIS-Hands 套件上评估，并提供了代码、评估脚本、演示数据（约 2200 个片段）和训练好的基线模型。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限，可能无法覆盖所有主动视觉场景。
仅基于两种人形机器人平台，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TAVIS 是首个用于模仿学习中主动视觉与预期注视的标准化基准，包含双任务套件和量化指标。

papers.title: Flatness and Gradient Alignment Are Both Necessary: Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration for Multi-Distribution Learning
papers.abstract: Sharpness-aware and gradient-alignment methods have been shown to improve generalization, however each family of methods targets a single geometric property of the loss landscape, while ignoring the other. In this paper, we show that this omission is structurally unavoidable and that both flatness and gradient alignment should be considered in multi-distribution learning settings. Specifically, we derive an excess-risk decomposition that yields two additive leading-order terms: (i) an alignment term, controlled by the trace of $\bar{H}^{-1}\Sigma_g$ and (ii) a curvature term, controlled by $\bar{H}$, where $\bar{H}$ is the average Hessian and $\Sigma_g$ is the covariance of the gradient across distributions. Notably, $\bar{H}$ appears inverted in one and non-inverted in the other. We further show, via a counterexample, that neither quantity bounds the other in general, so no algorithm targeting only one term can guarantee low excess risk. Motivated by this decomposition, we propose SAGE (Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration) that targets both terms. The curvature component replaces SAM's gradient-scaled perturbation with the polar factor of each layer's gradient matrix, computed via Newton-Schulz iteration, so that the ascent step probes all directions with similar magnitude. On the other hand, the alignment component injects isotropic noise at the descent step, the magnitude of which scales with cross-distribution gradient disagreement. Experiments on five domain-generalization and two multi-task learning benchmarks show that the proposed method establishes a new state-of-the-art on DomainBed and acts as a general-purpose improvement to base MTL solvers, remaining competitive with, or even surpassing, state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAGE方法，同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，在多分布学习中实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有锐度感知和梯度对齐方法各自只关注损失曲面的单一几何性质，忽略了另一性质，导致在多分布学习场景中泛化性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，以降低多分布学习中的超额风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推导出超额风险分解包含两个主导项：对齐项（由Hessian逆与梯度协方差的迹控制）和曲率项（由平均Hessian控制），且两者互不蕴含，单独优化任一项无法保证低风险。
analysis.method: 提出SAGE方法：曲率组件用每层梯度矩阵的极因子替代SAM的梯度缩放扰动，通过Newton-Schulz迭代计算，使上升步均匀探索所有方向；对齐组件在下降步注入各向同性噪声，噪声幅度与跨分布梯度不一致性成比例。
contributions: 推导出多分布学习下超额风险的分解，揭示平坦性和梯度对齐均需考虑。
提出SAGE算法，同时优化曲率和对齐项，在域泛化和多任务学习基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在DomainBed的5个域泛化基准和2个多任务学习基准上实验，SAGE在域泛化上达到新SOTA，在多任务学习中作为通用改进与SOTA方法竞争或超越。
limitations: Newton-Schulz迭代可能增加计算开销。
方法对超参数（如噪声幅度）敏感，需进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAGE方法，同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，在多分布学习中实现SOTA。

papers.title: Consistency Regularised Gradient Flows for Inverse Problems
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) (Rombach et al., 2022) provide powerful generative priors for inverse problems. However, existing LDM-based inverse solvers typically require a large number of neural function evaluations (NFEs) and backpropagation through large pretrained components, leading to substantial computational costs and, in some cases, degraded reconstruction quality. We propose a unified Euclidean-Wasserstein-2 gradient-flow framework that jointly performs posterior sampling and prompt optimization in the latent space through a single flow that aligns the prior and posterior with the observed data. Combined with few-step latent text-to-image models, this formulation enables low-NFE inference without backpropagation through autoencoders. Experiments across several canonical imaging inverse problems show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly reduced computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种统一欧几里得- Wasserstein-2梯度流框架，实现低NFE逆问题求解，无需反向传播。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于潜扩散模型的逆问题求解器需要大量神经函数评估和反向传播，计算成本高且重建质量可能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用视觉-语言潜扩散模型进行逆问题求解，同时降低计算成本并保持重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一欧几里得- Wasserstein-2梯度流框架，在潜空间中联合执行后验采样和提示优化，通过单一流对齐先验和后验与观测数据，结合少步潜文本到图像模型实现低NFE推理。
contributions: 提出统一梯度流框架，联合后验采样和提示优化，无需反向传播。
在多个经典成像逆问题上实现SOTA性能，显著降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在多个经典成像逆问题上进行实验，显示方法达到SOTA性能且计算成本显著降低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定潜扩散模型架构。
未讨论对更复杂逆问题的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种统一欧几里得- Wasserstein-2梯度流框架，实现低NFE逆问题求解，无需反向传播。

papers.title: Enhancing Federated Quadruplet Learning: Stochastic Client Selection and Embedding Stability Analysis
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralised model training across distributed clients without requiring data centralisation. However, the generalisation performance of the global model is usually degraded by data heterogeneity across clients, particularly under limited data availability and class imbalance. To address this challenge, we propose FedQuad, a novel method that explicitly enforces minimising intra-class representations while enabling inter-class splits across clients. By jointly minimising distances between positive pairs and maximising distances between negative pairs, the proposed approach mitigates representation misalignment introduced during model aggregation. We evaluate our method on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet under diverse non-IID settings and varying numbers of clients, demonstrating consistent improvements over existing baselines. Additionally, we provide a comprehensive analysis of metric learning-based approaches in both centralised and federated environments, highlighting their effectiveness in alleviating representation collapse under heterogeneous data distributions.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedQuad，通过四元组损失和随机客户端选择缓解联邦学习中的数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中数据异质性（非独立同分布、类别不平衡、数据有限）导致全局模型泛化性能下降，现有方法在缓解表征对齐问题上效果有限。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习中客户端数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题，具体表现为类内距离增大和类间距离减小。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出数据异质性会导致模型聚合时表征对齐错误，但未提供具体失败模式或瓶颈分析。
analysis.method: 提出FedQuad方法，在客户端本地训练中引入四元组损失，同时最小化正样本对距离、最大化负样本对距离，并结合随机客户端选择策略。
contributions: 提出FedQuad方法，通过四元组损失显式约束类内紧凑性和类间分离性，缓解联邦学习中的表征对齐问题。
在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上，多种非独立同分布设置下验证了方法优于现有基线。
提供了度量学习在集中式和联邦环境下缓解表征坍塌的全面分析。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，采用多种非独立同分布设置和不同客户端数量进行实验，结果一致优于现有基线。
limitations: 未在更大规模或真实联邦场景中验证。
未讨论四元组损失的计算开销对通信效率的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FedQuad，通过四元组损失和随机客户端选择缓解联邦学习中的数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题。

papers.title: Anisotropic Modality Align
papers.abstract: Training multimodal large language models has long been limited by the scarcity of high-quality paired multimodal data. Recent studies show that the shared representation space of pretrained multimodal contrastive models can serve as a bridge, enabling models to perform multimodal training with unimodal data. However, the key premise of this paradigm remains insufficiently understood: can representations from different modalities be reliably interchanged? The core obstacle lies in the persistent Modality Gap in the shared space. In this work, we revisit the geometric nature of the modality gap. We find that modality representations already share compatible dominant semantic geometry. What truly hinders modality interchangeability is not a simple global shift, but an anisotropic residual structure concentrated along a small number of dominant directions. Based on this finding, we further propose the principle of anisotropic modality gap alignment: effective modality alignment should align with the target-modality distribution while preserving the semantic structure of the source modality. Guided by this principle, we propose an anisotropic geometric correction framework, AnisoAlign, for unpaired modality alignment. This framework leverages the internal geometric prior of the target modality and performs bounded correction on source-modality representations, thereby constructing substitute representations in the target modality. Experiments confirm its benefits in both geometric diagnostics and text-only MLLM training. Overall, this work recasts the modality gap from an empirical observation into a correctable, structured geometric phenomenon and provides a new representation alignment perspective for training multimodal models with unimodal data.

analysis.tldr: 发现多模态表征间的模态间隙本质是各向异性残差结构，并提出各向异性几何校正框架AnisoAlign实现非配对模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量配对多模态数据稀缺限制了多模态大模型训练，现有方法利用预训练对比模型的共享表征空间作为桥梁，但模态间表征能否可靠互换的关键前提尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 共享表征空间中模态间隙阻碍了不同模态表征的可靠互换，需要理解其几何本质并设计有效的对齐方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模态表征已共享兼容的主语义几何，真正阻碍互换的是沿少数主导方向集中的各向异性残差结构，而非简单的全局偏移。
analysis.method: 提出各向异性模态间隙对齐原则：对齐应匹配目标模态分布同时保留源模态语义结构；基于此设计AnisoAlign框架，利用目标模态内部几何先验对源模态表征进行有界校正，构造目标模态中的替代表征。
contributions: 揭示了模态间隙的各向异性残差结构本质，将模态间隙从经验观察重新定义为可校正的结构化几何现象。
提出了各向异性模态间隙对齐原则及AnisoAlign框架，实现了非配对模态对齐，并在几何诊断和纯文本MLLM训练中验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验在几何诊断和纯文本MLLM训练中验证了效果，但未提供具体数值或基准。
limitations: 方法依赖目标模态的几何先验，可能对先验质量敏感。
仅验证了文本到视觉模态的对齐，其他模态对（如音频-视觉）的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现多模态表征间的模态间隙本质是各向异性残差结构，并提出各向异性几何校正框架AnisoAlign实现非配对模态对齐。

papers.title: Pre-training Enables Extraordinary All-optical Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Optical neural networks are emerging as powerful machine learning and information processing tools because of their potential advantages in speed and energy efficiency. The training methods of these physical models, however, remain underexplored compared to their digital counterparts and are leading to suboptimal performance. This paper reports a pre-training-driven approach that leads to snapshot image denoising with substantially improved quality. We demonstrated effective free-space optical denoising by a diffractive network optimized by a two-step process including (1) pre-training using a massive dataset of 3.45 million diverse but simple images and (2) fine-tuning with the corresponding task-specific datasets. Compared to conventional Fourier-domain filtering and directly trained diffractive networks, such a transfer learning process exhibited prominent advantages for denoising images degraded by severe noise, peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) below 8 dB, while preserving fine image features and improving the PSNR to above 18 dB. Importantly, the same pre-trained optical network could be consistently fine-tuned to process degraded images from highly diverse styles ranging from handwritten digits (MNIST) and chest X-rays (ChestMNIST) to CIFAR-10 images and human faces (CelebA). We further demonstrated the critical role of our optical denoisers in vision-based applications, including face detection, plate recognition, and localization of UAVs in noisy conditions.

analysis.tldr: 预训练驱动的全光学图像去噪网络，通过两步训练实现高质量去噪，并在多种视觉任务中验证有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学神经网络在速度和能效上具有优势，但其训练方法研究不足，导致性能欠佳。
analysis.problem: 如何通过预训练策略提升全光学图像去噪网络的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接训练的光学网络在严重噪声（PSNR低于8 dB）下性能不足，而预训练-微调方法能显著提升去噪质量。
analysis.method: 两步训练法：先在大规模简单图像数据集（345万张）上预训练，再在任务特定数据集上微调。
contributions: 提出预训练驱动的全光学图像去噪方法，显著提升严重噪声下的去噪性能。
验证了预训练光学网络可泛化至多种图像风格（如MNIST、ChestMNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA）。
展示了光学去噪器在视觉任务（人脸检测、车牌识别、无人机定位）中的应用价值。
analysis.experiments: 在多种噪声条件下测试，PSNR从低于8 dB提升至18 dB以上，并在多个数据集和视觉任务中验证。
limitations: 仅针对全光学去噪任务，未涉及其他光学计算任务。
预训练数据集为简单图像，复杂场景下的泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 预训练驱动的全光学图像去噪网络，通过两步训练实现高质量去噪，并在多种视觉任务中验证有效性。

papers.title: Spectral Surgery: Class-Targeted Post-Hoc Rebalancing via Hessian Spike Perturbation
papers.abstract: The Hessian spectrum of trained deep networks exhibits a characteristic structure: a continuous bulk of near-zero eigenvalues and a small number of large outlier eigenvalues (spikes), confirming the relevance of Random Matrix Theory in deep learning. The spike count matches the number of classes minus one. While prior work has described this structure, no method has exploited it operationally to improve classification performance. We propose Spectral Surgery, a post-hoc optimization method that directly perturbs model weights along spike eigenvectors to rebalance per-class accuracy without retraining. We introduce (i) a spike-class sensitivity matrix that quantifies the directional derivative of each class's accuracy along each spike eigenvector, (ii) a constrained optimization of perturbation coefficients that targets weak classes while preserving strong ones, and (iii) an adaptive amplitude control that raises or lowers the perturbation budget based on iteration-level improvement signals. We obtain encouraging results on CIFAR-10 and ISIC-2019 on both balanced accuracy and standard deviation.

analysis.tldr: 利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构，通过沿尖峰特征向量扰动权重来后验重平衡类别准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度网络 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构已被观察到，但尚未被用于实际提升分类性能，现有重平衡方法通常需要重新训练或修改损失函数。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构，在不重新训练的情况下后验地重平衡各类别准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Hessian 谱具有连续 bulk 和少量尖峰，尖峰数量等于类别数减一，且尖峰方向与类别相关。
analysis.method: 提出 Spectral Surgery，一种后验优化方法，通过沿尖峰特征向量扰动模型权重来重平衡类别准确率，包括尖峰-类别敏感度矩阵、约束优化和自适应幅度控制。
contributions: 首次利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构进行后验类别重平衡。
提出尖峰-类别敏感度矩阵和自适应幅度控制机制。
analysis.experiments: 在 CIFAR-10 和 ISIC-2019 上获得平衡准确率和标准差方面的鼓励性结果。
limitations: 仅验证了图像分类任务，未涉及其他模态。
需要计算 Hessian 谱，可能对大规模模型计算成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰结构，通过沿尖峰特征向量扰动权重来后验重平衡类别准确率。

papers.title: Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation for Fast Probabilistic Inference
papers.abstract: Diffusion models achieve strong generation quality, diversity, and distribution coverage, but their performance often comes with expensive inference. In this work, we propose Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation (STMD), a teacher-free framework for accelerating diffusion model inference while preserving probabilistic sample generation. In contrast to score-based diffusion models, whose denoising parametrization models the mean of the posterior distribution, STMD distills the full transition map associated with the sampling stochastic differential equation (SDE). We parameterize these SDE transitions with a conditional Mean Flow model, yielding a one- or few-step stochastic sampler that retains the transition structure of the underlying diffusion process. This perspective is especially useful for downstream tasks that require stochastic inference, such as diffusion posterior sampling, inverse problems, and energy-based fine-tuning. Compared to recent distillation methods, STMD requires no pretrained teacher, bi-level optimization, or trajectory simulation and caching, enabling efficient and scalable training. We derive convergence bounds for our method in the Wasserstein distance, providing a strong theoretical foundation for our approach, and validate STMD on various image generation examples on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CelebA datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出无教师蒸馏框架STMD，通过蒸馏SDE转移映射实现扩散模型快速概率推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型生成质量高但推理成本昂贵，现有蒸馏方法需要预训练教师模型、双层优化或轨迹缓存，训练复杂且扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持概率样本生成能力的同时加速扩散模型推理，并避免对预训练教师模型的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出随机转移映射蒸馏（STMD），蒸馏采样SDE的完整转移映射，并用条件均值流模型参数化，实现一步或几步随机采样器。
contributions: 提出无教师蒸馏框架STMD，无需预训练教师、双层优化或轨迹缓存，训练高效可扩展。
推导了Wasserstein距离下的收敛界，提供理论保证。
在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA上验证了图像生成效果。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA数据集上进行图像生成实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续时间扩散模型，离散化场景需调整。
理论收敛界可能依赖于特定假设，实际性能可能受限于条件均值流模型的表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无教师蒸馏框架STMD，通过蒸馏SDE转移映射实现扩散模型快速概率推理。

papers.title: Is the Future Compatible? Diagnosing Dynamic Consistency in World Action Models
papers.abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) enable decision-making through imagined rollouts by predicting future observations and actions. However, the reliability of these imagined futures remains under-examined: is a generated future merely visually plausible, or is it dynamically compatible with the action sequence it claims to model? In this work, we identify action-state consistency, the alignment between predicted actions and induced state transitions, as a missing reliability axis for WAMs. Through a systematic study across representative joint-prediction and inverse-dynamics models, we find that action-state consistency systematically separates successful and failed rollouts across many tasks and follows similar success-failure trends as learned value estimates. These results suggest that consistency captures decision-relevant structure beyond visual realism. We further identify background collapse as an important boundary condition, where low-dynamics failed trajectories can become deceptively consistent because static futures are easier to predict. Building on these findings, we introduce a value-free consensus strategy for test-time selection, which ranks candidate rollouts by agreement among predicted futures. This strategy improves success rates on RoboCasa and RoboTwin 2.0 without additional training or reward modeling. Taken together, our findings establish action-state consistency as both a diagnostic tool for evaluating WAM reliability and a practical signal for value-free planning.

analysis.tldr: 世界动作模型（WAM）中动作-状态一致性是评估生成未来动态可靠性的关键，并可用于无价值函数的规划选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 世界动作模型（WAM）通过预测未来观测和动作来支持决策，但其生成未来的可靠性未被充分检验：一个视觉上合理的未来是否与声称的动作序列动态兼容？
analysis.problem: WAM生成的未来轨迹可能视觉上合理但动态不一致，缺乏评估其与动作序列兼容性的可靠性指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 动作-状态一致性（预测动作与诱导状态转移的对齐）系统性地区分了成功与失败的轨迹，且与学习到的价值估计具有相似的成功-失败趋势；背景崩溃（低动态失败轨迹因静态未来易预测而变得欺骗性一致）是重要的边界条件。
analysis.method: 提出一种无价值函数的共识策略，通过预测未来之间的协议对候选轨迹进行排序，用于测试时选择。
contributions: 识别动作-状态一致性作为WAM可靠性的缺失评估轴
提出无价值函数的共识策略，在RoboCasa和RoboTwin 2.0上提升成功率，无需额外训练或奖励建模
analysis.experiments: 在RoboCasa和RoboTwin 2.0上评估，共识策略提升了成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（联合预测和逆动力学模型）
背景崩溃条件可能限制一致性在动态场景中的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 世界动作模型（WAM）中动作-状态一致性是评估生成未来动态可靠性的关键，并可用于无价值函数的规划选择。

papers.title: SR$^2$-LoRA: Self-Rectifying Inter-layer Relations in Low-Rank Adaptation for Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Pre-trained models with parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) have demonstrated promising potential for class-incremental learning (CIL), yet catastrophic forgetting still persists when adapting models to new tasks. In this paper, we present a novel perspective on catastrophic forgetting through the analysis of inter-layer relation drift, i.e., the progressive disruption of relationships among layer-wise representations during the learning of new tasks. We theoretically show that the increase of such drift reduces the classification margins of previously learned tasks, thereby degrading overall model performance. To address this issue, we propose \underline{S}elf-\underline{R}ectifying inter-layer \underline{R}elation Low-Rank Adaptation~(SR$^2$-LoRA), a simple yet effective method that mitigates catastrophic forgetting by constraining inter-layer relation drift. Specifically, SR$^2$-LoRA constructs the relation matrices induced by the previous and current models on current-task samples, and aligns the corresponding singular values. We further theoretically show that this alignment exhibits greater robustness to estimation perturbations than direct entry-wise alignment. Extensive experiments on standard CIL benchmarks demonstrate that SR$^2$-LoRA effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, with its advantages becoming more pronounced as the number of tasks increases. Code is available in the \href{ this https URL }{repository}.

analysis.tldr: 通过约束层间关系漂移来缓解类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练模型结合参数高效微调在类增量学习中表现良好，但灾难性遗忘问题依然存在，尤其是在适应新任务时。
analysis.problem: 类增量学习中，新任务学习导致层间关系漂移，进而破坏旧任务的分类边界，造成灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 层间关系漂移会逐渐破坏旧任务的分类边界，且漂移越大，性能下降越严重。
analysis.method: 提出SR$^2$-LoRA，通过构造新旧模型在当前任务样本上的关系矩阵，并对其奇异值进行对齐，从而约束层间关系漂移。
contributions: 从层间关系漂移角度分析灾难性遗忘，并理论证明其与分类边界的关系
提出SR$^2$-LoRA方法，通过奇异值对齐约束层间关系漂移，且理论证明该方法比直接逐元素对齐更鲁棒
analysis.experiments: 在标准CIL基准上进行了大量实验，表明SR$^2$-LoRA有效缓解灾难性遗忘，且优势随任务数增加而更明显。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于LoRA的PEFT方法
未在更大规模或更复杂的增量学习场景中验证
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过约束层间关系漂移来缓解类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘

papers.title: Velocity-Space 3D Asset Editing
papers.abstract: Editing a 3D asset locally, modifying a target region while preserving the rest, is a fundamental requirement of native 3D editing. Existing methods enforce locality through mechanisms external to the generator, such as manual 3D masks, post-hoc voxel merging, or 2D multi-view lifting. None of them intervene where the corruption actually originates: inside the ODE sampler. For a rectified-flow generator to achieve faithful local editing, its velocity field should be strong over the target editing region while vanishing on preserved content. Yet a single velocity field can hardly satisfy both requirements simultaneously, leading to three problems: (i) identity leakage that keeps the edit signal non-zero on preserved regions; (ii) no dedicated edit-amplification channel, so strengthening the edit inevitably perturbs identity; and (iii) an identity drag at the geometry and material stages, where a global condition pulls every token toward the target. We propose VS3D (Velocity-Space 3D Asset editing}), an inversion-free, training-free, and mask-free framework that addresses each problem with a targeted intervention inside the sampler. VS3D integrates three complementary modules, each corresponding to a specific stage of the editing pipeline. Reconstruction-Anchored Source Injection (RASI) absorbs identity leakage by turning the unconditional embedding into a per-step, asset-specific anchor calibrated through source reconstruction. Partial-Mean Guidance (PMG) amplifies the edit signal by contrasting high- and low-quality subsample estimates of the velocity difference, active only where a consistent edit exists. Twin-Agreement Residual injection (TAR) lets the sampler decide token by token what to preserve at the geometry and material stages.

analysis.tldr: 提出VS3D，在ODE采样器内部通过三个模块实现无掩码、无训练、无逆推的3D资产局部编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D局部编辑方法依赖外部机制（如3D掩码、体素合并、2D多视角提升），无法从根本上解决ODE采样器内部的速度场冲突，导致身份泄露、编辑信号弱、全局条件拖拽等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在整流流生成器内部实现忠实于局部编辑的3D资产修改，同时避免对保留区域产生干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单一速度场无法同时满足编辑区域强信号和保留区域零信号，导致三个具体问题：身份泄露、缺乏专用编辑放大通道、几何和材质阶段的全局条件拖拽。
analysis.method: VS3D框架包含三个模块：RASI（通过源重建校准锚点吸收身份泄露）、PMG（通过对比高低质量子样本估计放大编辑信号）、TAR（在几何和材质阶段逐token决定保留内容）。
contributions: 首次在ODE采样器内部干预实现3D局部编辑，无需掩码、训练或逆推。
提出三个互补模块分别解决身份泄露、编辑放大和全局拖拽问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定生成器架构（整流流），泛化性待验证。
三个模块的协同调参可能增加使用复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VS3D，在ODE采样器内部通过三个模块实现无掩码、无训练、无逆推的3D资产局部编辑。

papers.title: Weather-Robust Scene Semantics with Vision-Aligned 4D Radar
papers.abstract: Cameras and LiDAR degrade in rain, fog, and snow, while millimeter-wave radar remains largely unaffected. We align a radar encoder to frozen SigLIP vision embeddings and decode structured scene captions through a frozen vision-language model (VLM) with approximately 7M trainable parameters. On K-RADAR with held-out fog, light snow, and heavy snow sequences, all radar configurations outperform a camera baseline that collapses to over 90% hallucination. We identify a token-norm mismatch as the dominant failure mode when bridging radar to a frozen VLM and show that projector-output LayerNorm resolves it. Analysis of encoder complexity, caption format, and pooling strategy reveals tradeoffs that inform future radar-VLM pipeline design.

analysis.tldr: 用4D雷达替代相机实现恶劣天气下的场景语义理解，通过视觉对齐和冻结VLM解码，仅7M参数即可在雨雪雾天超越相机基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 相机和LiDAR在雨、雾、雪等恶劣天气下性能严重退化，而毫米波雷达几乎不受影响，因此需要利用雷达实现全天候场景语义理解。
analysis.problem: 如何将4D雷达数据与预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）对齐，以在恶劣天气下生成结构化场景描述，同时避免模态差异导致的性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现token-norm不匹配是雷达桥接到冻结VLM的主要失败模式，通过投影器输出层LayerNorm可解决该问题。
analysis.method: 将雷达编码器对齐到冻结的SigLIP视觉嵌入，并通过冻结的VLM解码生成结构化场景描述，仅训练约7M参数。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级方法（7M参数）将4D雷达与冻结VLM对齐，实现恶劣天气下的鲁棒场景语义理解。
识别并解决了token-norm不匹配这一关键失败模式，通过投影器输出层LayerNorm有效缓解。
系统分析了编码器复杂度、描述格式和池化策略的权衡，为未来雷达-VLM流水线设计提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在K-RADAR数据集上，针对保留的雾、小雪、大雪序列进行测试，所有雷达配置均优于相机基线（相机基线幻觉率超过90%）。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集K-RADAR上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他雷达-VLM方法对比，仅与相机基线比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用4D雷达替代相机实现恶劣天气下的场景语义理解，通过视觉对齐和冻结VLM解码，仅7M参数即可在雨雪雾天超越相机基线。

papers.title: Task-Oriented Communication for Human Action Understanding via Edge-Cloud Co-Inference
papers.abstract: The expanding application of smart sensing has created a growing demand for the accurate understanding of human action at the network edge. Traditional approaches require massive video data to be transmitted from resource-constrained edge devices to powerful cloud servers, incurring prohibitive uplink bandwidth consumption and unacceptable latency while raising privacy concerns. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose a task-oriented communication framework for human action understanding (TOAU) through edge-cloud collaboration. Our framework utilizes a monocular pose estimator to extract continuous joint coordinates from raw videos, followed by a vector quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to convert these coordinates into discrete motion tokens. Consequently, only a compact sequence of codebook indices is transmitted over the network, consuming as few as 9 bits per frame and avoiding privacy leakages. At the cloud server, a lightweight projector aligns these motion tokens with the embedding space of a large vision-language model (VLM) to facilitate complex action understanding, which is trained with an efficient instruction tuning paradigm. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmarks demonstrate that our TOAU system reduces the transmission payload to approximately 1\% and the system latency to around 20\% compared to video codec-based solutions, while delivering comparable action understanding accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种任务导向的通信框架，通过边缘-云协同推理，仅传输离散运动令牌实现高效、低延迟的人体动作理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法需要从边缘设备传输大量视频数据到云端，导致带宽消耗高、延迟大且存在隐私风险，亟需一种高效、低延迟且保护隐私的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的边缘设备上实现准确的人体动作理解，同时大幅减少数据传输量和系统延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用单目姿态估计器提取连续关节坐标，通过VQ-VAE转换为离散运动令牌，仅传输码本索引（每帧9比特）；云端使用轻量投影器将运动令牌对齐到大视觉语言模型的嵌入空间，并通过指令微调实现复杂动作理解。
contributions: 提出任务导向的边缘-云协同推理框架TOAU，显著降低传输负载和延迟。
利用VQ-VAE将人体动作编码为离散运动令牌，实现高效通信并保护隐私。
通过指令微调将运动令牌与VLM对齐，在三个基准上验证了与视频编解码方案相当的精度。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上评估，TOAU将传输负载降至约1%，系统延迟降至约20%，同时保持与视频编解码方案相当的动作理解精度。
limitations: 依赖单目姿态估计的准确性，在遮挡或复杂场景下可能受限。
运动令牌的离散化可能丢失细粒度动作信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种任务导向的通信框架，通过边缘-云协同推理，仅传输离散运动令牌实现高效、低延迟的人体动作理解。

papers.title: Predictive but Not Plannable: RC-aux for Latent World Models
papers.abstract: A latent world model may achieve accurate short-horizon prediction while still inducing a latent space that is poorly aligned with planning. A key issue is spatiotemporal mismatch: these models are often trained with local predictive supervision, but deployed for long-horizon goal-directed search in latent spaces where Euclidean distance may not reflect what is reachable within a finite action budget. We present the Reachability-Correction auxiliary objective (RC-aux), a lightweight correction for this mismatch in reconstruction-free latent world models. RC-aux keeps the world-model backbone unchanged and adds planning-aligned supervision along two axes. Along the time axis, multi-horizon open-loop prediction trains the model beyond one-step consistency. Along the space axis, budget-conditioned reachability supervision, together with temporal hard negatives, encourages the latent space to distinguish states that are eventually reachable from those reachable within the current planning horizon. At test time, the learned reachability signal can also be used by a reachability-aware planner to favor trajectories that are both goal-directed and attainable under the available budget. We instantiate RC-aux on LeWorldModel and evaluate it under both continuation-training and matched-from-scratch settings. Across goal-conditioned pixel-control tasks and a LIBERO-Goal extension, RC-aux improves LeWM-style planning with modest additional cost. These results suggest that planning with latent world models depends not only on predictive accuracy, but also on whether the learned representation encodes the temporal and geometric structure required by downstream search. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，修正潜世界模型中预测与规划之间的时空不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 潜世界模型在短时预测上可能准确，但潜空间与规划目标对齐不良，导致长时程目标导向搜索效果差。
analysis.problem: 潜世界模型的潜空间存在时空不匹配：局部预测训练与长时程规划所需的可达性结构不一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出潜世界模型在短时预测准确时，潜空间中的欧氏距离可能不反映有限动作预算下的可达性，导致规划失败。
analysis.method: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，沿时间轴进行多步开环预测，沿空间轴进行预算条件可达性监督，并引入时间硬负样本。
contributions: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，在不改变世界模型主干的情况下修正潜空间与规划的对齐问题。
