在LeWorldModel上验证，在延续训练和从头训练设置下均提升规划性能，且额外成本适中。
analysis.experiments: 在目标条件像素控制任务和LIBERO-Goal扩展上评估，RC-aux改进了LeWM风格的规划。
limitations: 仅适用于无重建的潜世界模型，可能不适用于其他类型的世界模型。
摘要未提供与其他方法的详细对比或大规模实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，修正潜世界模型中预测与规划之间的时空不匹配问题。

papers.title: PersonaGest: Personalized Co-Speech Gesture Generation with Semantic-Guided Hierarchical Motion Representation
papers.abstract: Co-speech gesture generation aims to synthesize realistic body movements that are semantically coherent with speech and faithful to a user-specified gestural style. Existing VQ-VAE based co-speech gesture generation methods improve generation quality but fail to encode semantic structure into the motion representation or explicitly disentangle content from style, limiting both semantic coherence and personalization fidelity. We present PersonaGest, a two-stage framework addressing both limitations. In the first stage, a semantic-guided RVQ-VAE disentangles motion content and gestural style within the residual quantization structure, where a Semantic-Aware Motion Codebook (SMoC) organizes the content codebook by gesture semantics and contrastive learning further enforces content-style separation. In the second stage, a Masked Generative Transformer generates content tokens via a semantic-aware re-masking strategy, followed by a cascade of Style Residual Transformers conditioned on a reference motion prompt for style control. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on objective metrics and perceptual user studies, with strong style consistency to the reference prompt. Our project page with demo videos is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出语义引导的分层运动表示，实现个性化且语义一致的共语手势生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VQ-VAE方法生成共语手势时，未能将语义结构编码到运动表示中，也未显式分离内容与风格，导致语义连贯性和个性化保真度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何生成与语音语义一致且符合用户指定手势风格的个性化共语手势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用语义引导的RVQ-VAE，通过语义感知运动码本（SMoC）和对比学习解耦运动内容与手势风格；第二阶段使用掩码生成Transformer生成内容令牌，并通过级联风格残差Transformer以参考运动提示控制风格。
contributions: 提出语义引导的RVQ-VAE，在残差量化结构中解耦运动内容与手势风格。
设计语义感知运动码本（SMoC）和对比学习增强内容-风格分离。
提出掩码生成Transformer与风格残差Transformer级联的生成策略，实现风格可控的语义一致手势生成。
analysis.experiments: 在客观指标和感知用户研究上达到最先进性能，风格与参考提示高度一致。
limitations: 可能依赖参考运动提示的质量。
未提及对长序列或复杂语义的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义引导的分层运动表示，实现个性化且语义一致的共语手势生成。

papers.title: Fine-tuning a vision-language model for fracture-surface morphology recognition
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for scientific image understanding, but general-purpose models often lack the domain-specific visual knowledge required for reliable materials characterization. In this work, we fine-tuned an open-source VLM (Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct) for fracture-surface image analysis using a curated dataset of 13,168 open-source, literature-mined fracture-surface images. Morphology annotations were generated by GPT-5.2-Reasoning (high) from both the images and relevant excerpts of their source papers, and the dataset was further enriched with targeted manual collection and rotation-based augmentation. The resulting specialist model outperforms flagship proprietary multimodal models on a benchmark of 100 manually annotated images. It achieves a precision of 0.92, compared to 0.35 for the base Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct, 0.58 for GPT-5.5-Reasoning (high), and 0.78 for Gemini 3.1 Pro-Reasoning (high). Dataset ablations show that manual collection of rare-feature images and augmentation via image rotation are both beneficial to improve recognition of less common fracture morphology features. We further discuss integrated use of the fine-tuned model with proprietary models to combine fracture-specific visual accuracy with broader multimodal reasoning for autonomous fractography. Although focused on fracture-surface images, this work demonstrates how VLMs can be adapted through targeted collection and fine-tuning on novel feature images to recognize those features and support downstream decision-making in autonomous microscopy workflows.

analysis.tldr: 通过微调开源VLM识别断口形貌，在100张人工标注图像上达到0.92精度，远超基线和旗舰模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用VLM缺乏材料科学领域特定的视觉知识，难以可靠地进行断口形貌识别，而传统方法依赖专家且效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何使VLM具备断口形貌的领域特定视觉识别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用13168张文献挖掘的断口图像微调Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct，标注由GPT-5.2-Reasoning生成，并辅以人工收集和旋转增强。
contributions: 构建了包含13168张断口图像的微调数据集，并采用GPT辅助标注和增强策略。
微调模型在100张人工标注测试集上达到0.92精度，显著优于基线（0.35）和旗舰模型（GPT-5.5: 0.58, Gemini 3.1: 0.78）。
analysis.experiments: 在100张人工标注图像上评估，微调模型精度0.92，基线0.35，GPT-5.5 0.58，Gemini 3.1 0.78；消融实验表明人工收集稀有特征和旋转增强有益。
limitations: 仅针对断口形貌，泛化性未验证。
依赖GPT生成标注，可能存在噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调开源VLM识别断口形貌，在100张人工标注图像上达到0.92精度，远超基线和旗舰模型。

papers.title: Do Joint Audio-Video Generation Models Understand Physics?
papers.abstract: Joint audio-video generation models are rapidly approaching professional production quality, raising a central question: do they understand audio-visual physics, or merely generate plausible sounds and frames that violate real-world consistency? We introduce AV-Phys Bench, a benchmark for evaluating physical commonsense in joint audio-video generation. AV-Phys Bench tests models across three scene categories: Steady State, Event Transition, and Environment Transition. It covers physics-grounded subcategories drawn from real-world scenes, plus Anti-AV-Physics prompts that deliberately request physically inconsistent audio-video behavior. Each generation is evaluated along five dimensions: visual semantic adherence, audio semantic adherence, visual physical commonsense, audio physical commonsense, and cross-modal physical commonsense. Across three proprietary and four open-source models, we find that Seedance 2.0 performs best overall, but all models remain far from robust physical understanding. Performance drops sharply on event-driven and environment-driven transitions, and even strong proprietary systems collapse on Anti-AV-Physics prompts. We further introduce AV-Phys Agent, a ReAct-style evaluator that combines a multimodal language model with deterministic acoustic measurement tools, producing rankings that closely align with human ratings. Our results identify cross-modal physical consistency and transition-driven scene dynamics as key open challenges for joint audio-video generation.

analysis.tldr: 联合音视频生成模型缺乏物理常识，在事件和环境转换场景下表现脆弱。
analysis.research_motivation: 联合音视频生成模型虽已接近专业质量，但可能仅生成看似合理却违反物理一致性的内容，缺乏对音视频物理规律的真实理解。
analysis.problem: 评估联合音视频生成模型是否具备物理常识，并揭示其在物理一致性上的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在物理理解上远非鲁棒，事件驱动和环境驱动转换场景下性能急剧下降，专有模型在反物理提示上完全失败。
analysis.method: 提出AV-Phys Bench基准，包含稳态、事件转换、环境转换三类场景及反物理提示，从视觉语义、音频语义、视觉物理常识、音频物理常识、跨模态物理常识五个维度评估；并设计AV-Phys Agent评估器，结合多模态语言模型与声学测量工具。
contributions: 提出AV-Phys Bench基准，系统评估联合音视频生成模型的物理常识。
揭示现有模型在跨模态物理一致性和转换场景动态方面的严重不足。
analysis.experiments: 在三个专有模型和四个开源模型上评估，Seedance 2.0表现最佳，但所有模型均远未达到鲁棒的物理理解。
limitations: 基准场景有限，可能未覆盖所有物理常识类型。
评估依赖AV-Phys Agent，其与人类评分的一致性可能受限于特定设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 联合音视频生成模型缺乏物理常识，在事件和环境转换场景下表现脆弱。

papers.title: Dr-BA: Separable Optimization for Direct Radar Bundle Adjustment & Localization
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Dr-BA, a first-of-its-kind radar bundle adjustment (BA) framework that operates directly on 2D spinning radar intensity images. Unlike camera or lidar sensors, radar is largely unaffected by precipitation, making it a critical modality for autonomous systems that require all-weather robustness. Existing state estimation approaches using spinning radar typically extract sparse point clouds from range-azimuth-intensity measurements and apply point cloud alignment techniques to estimate vehicle motion, scene structure, or to localize within an existing map. In contrast, Dr-BA uses the full radar returns from multiple scans to jointly estimate dense maps and sensor poses. By formulating the problem as a separable optimization, we derive an efficient and general solution that decouples pose estimation from mapping. In addition to solving the BA problem, this formulation naturally extends to direct radar-only localization (DRL) within a previously built map. Dr-BA achieves state-of-the-art radar-based BA and cross-session localization performance, demonstrated on more than 200 km of on-road data across five distinct routes. Our implementation is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出首个直接操作2D雷达强度图像的雷达束调整框架Dr-BA，通过可分离优化实现高效建图与定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 雷达在恶劣天气下具有鲁棒性，但现有方法依赖稀疏点云提取，未能充分利用完整雷达回波信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用完整雷达强度图像进行联合地图构建与位姿估计，并实现跨会话定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将束调整问题建模为可分离优化，解耦位姿估计与建图，并扩展至直接雷达定位。
contributions: 首个直接操作2D雷达强度图像的束调整框架
可分离优化实现高效解耦，自然支持直接定位
analysis.experiments: 在超过200公里、5条不同路线的道路数据上验证，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定雷达传感器配置
未讨论动态场景适应性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个直接操作2D雷达强度图像的雷达束调整框架Dr-BA，通过可分离优化实现高效建图与定位。

papers.title: EULER-ADAS: Energy-Efficient & SIMD-Unified Logarithmic-Posit Engine for Precision-Reconfigurable Approximate ADAS Acceleration
papers.abstract: Advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) require neural compute engines that deliver low-latency inference under strict power and area constraints. Posit arithmetic is attractive for such accelerators because it provides high numerical fidelity at low precision, but its variable-length regime encoding increases encode/decode cost and exposes the datapath to large regime-field fault effects. This paper presents EULER-ADAS, a SIMD-enabled logarithmic bounded-Posit neural compute engine for energyefficient and reliability-aware ADAS acceleration. The proposed datapath combines bounded-regime Posit representation, stageadaptive logarithmic mantissa multiplication with bit truncation, and a SIMD-shared quire accumulation path supporting Posit- (8,0), Posit-(16,1), and Posit-(32,2) execution. The unified architecture enables 4xPosit-8, 2xPosit-16, or 1xPosit-32 operation without duplicating precision-specific hardware. FPGA implementation shows that the proposed configurations reduce LUT count by up to 41.4%, delay by up to 76.1%, and power by up to 71.9% relative to exact Posit neural compute engines, while achieving up to 10x lower energy-delay product than radix-4 Booth-based Posit multipliers. In 28-nm CMOS, the bounded variants occupy 0.013-0.016 mm2 , consume 19.8-22.1 mW, and operate at up to 1.84 GHz. Application-level evaluation across image-classification, ADAS, and edge-inference workloads shows that the evaluated Posit-16 and Posit-32 configurations remain within about 1.5 percentage points of FP32 accuracy. A TinyYOLOv3 prototype on Pynq-Z2 achieves 78 ms latency at 0.29 W and 22.6 mJ/frame, demonstrating the suitability of EULERADAS for low-power real-time ADAS inference.

analysis.tldr: EULER-ADAS 提出一种 SIMD 统一的对数-posit 引擎，通过有界 regime 和位截断实现高能效、精度可重构的 ADAS 加速。
analysis.research_motivation: ADAS 需要低延迟推理，但受严格功耗和面积约束；Posit 算术在低精度下提供高数值保真度，但其变长 regime 编码增加编解码开销并引入大 regime 场故障效应，现有方案能效不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能效高、可靠性好且支持多种 Posit 精度（8/16/32）的 SIMD 神经计算引擎，以加速 ADAS 推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合有界 regime Posit 表示、阶段自适应对数尾数乘法与位截断、SIMD 共享 quire 累加路径，支持 4×Posit-8、2×Posit-16 或 1×Posit-32 操作，无需复制精度专用硬件。
contributions: 提出有界 regime Posit 表示和阶段自适应对数尾数乘法，降低硬件开销和故障影响。
设计 SIMD 统一架构，支持多种 Posit 精度可重构执行，提升硬件利用率。
FPGA 和 ASIC 实现显示显著的面积、延迟、功耗和能效优势，且精度损失小。
analysis.experiments: FPGA 实现显示 LUT 减少 41.4%，延迟降低 76.1%，功耗降低 71.9%，能效比基于 Booth 的 Posit 乘法器低 10 倍；28nm CMOS 下面积 0.013-0.016 mm²，功耗 19.8-22.1 mW，频率 1.84 GHz；在图像分类、ADAS 和边缘推理任务中，Posit-16/32 精度与 FP32 相差约 1.5 个百分点；TinyYOLOv3 在 Pynq-Z2 上实现 78 ms 延迟、0.29 W 功耗和 22.6 mJ/帧。
limitations: 仅评估了特定 Posit 格式（8,0/16,1/32,2），其他格式未测试。
精度损失在极端低精度下可能更大，摘要未覆盖所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EULER-ADAS 提出一种 SIMD 统一的对数-posit 引擎，通过有界 regime 和位截断实现高能效、精度可重构的 ADAS 加速。

papers.title: A Unified Measure-Theoretic View of Diffusion, Score-Based, and Flow Matching Generative Models
papers.abstract: We survey continuous-time generative modeling methods based on transporting a simple reference distribution to a data distribution via stochastic or deterministic dynamics. We present a unified framework in which diffusion models, score-based generative models, and flow matching are instances of learning a time-dependent vector field that induces a family of marginals $(\rho_t)_{t \in [0,1]}$ governed by continuity and Fokker-Planck equations. Such a unified theory is timely because these methods are converging methodologically, yet fragmented notation and competing derivations continue to obscure their shared structure and the practical tradeoffs governing sampling, stability, and computation. Within this framework, we (i) derive reverse-time sampling for diffusion and score-based models as controlled stochastic dynamics, (ii) show that the probability flow ODE yields identical marginals and connects diffusion to likelihood-based normalizing flows, and (iii) interpret flow matching as direct regression of the velocity field under a chosen interpolation, clarifying when it coincides with or differs from score-based training. We compare objectives, sampling schemes, and discretization errors under unified notation, discuss connections to Schrodinger bridges and entropic optimal transport, and summarize theoretical guarantees and open problems on approximation, stability, and scalability.

analysis.tldr: 统一测度论框架下扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型与流匹配的连续时间生成方法综述。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型和流匹配等方法在方法论上趋于收敛，但碎片化的符号和竞争性的推导掩盖了它们的共享结构和实际权衡，亟需统一的理论框架。
analysis.problem: 如何统一描述和比较基于连续时间传输的生成模型（扩散、分数、流匹配）的数学结构、目标函数、采样方案和离散化误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个统一的测度论框架，将扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型和流匹配视为学习时变向量场，该向量场诱导由连续性方程和Fokker-Planck方程控制的边际分布族。
contributions: 统一了扩散、分数和流匹配生成模型的数学框架，澄清了共享结构和实际权衡。
推导了扩散和分数模型的反向时间采样作为受控随机动力学，并展示了概率流ODE与似然归一化流的联系。
将流匹配解释为在选定插值下速度场的直接回归，明确了其与分数训练的一致或差异条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架主要针对连续时间生成模型，可能不直接涵盖离散时间或非扩散类方法。
理论保证和开放问题部分仅作总结，未提供新的收敛性或稳定性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 统一测度论框架下扩散模型、基于分数的生成模型与流匹配的连续时间生成方法综述。

papers.title: Uneven Evolution of Cognition Across Generations of Generative AI Models
papers.abstract: The pursuit of artificial general intelligence necessitates robust methods for evaluating the cognitive capabilities of models beyond narrow task performance. Here, we introduce a psychometric framework to assess the cognitive profiles of generative AI, comparing them to human norms and tracking their evolution across generations. Initial evaluation of leading multimodal models using tasks adapted from the Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scale revealed a profoundly uneven cognitive architecture: near-ceiling performance in verbal comprehension and working memory (>$98^{\text{th}}$ percentile) contrasted with near-floor performance in perceptual reasoning (<$1^{\text{st}}$ percentile). To track developmental trajectories beyond human-normed limits, we developed the Artificial Intelligence Quotient (AIQ) Benchmark and applied it to six generations and two model families, revealing significant but asymmetric performance gains. Notably, we uncovered a sharp dissociation between modalities; abstract quantitative reasoning matured far more rapidly when presented linguistically compared to a visually analogous format, indicating an architectural bias towards language-based symbolic manipulation. While abstract visual reasoning improved, visual-perceptual organization remained largely stagnant. Collectively, these findings demonstrate that the cognitive abilities of generative models are evolving unevenly, suggesting that scaling and optimization approaches to AGI development alone may be insufficient to overcome fundamental architectural limitations in achieving balanced, human-like general intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 生成式AI模型的认知能力发展极不均衡，语言能力远超视觉推理，且视觉感知能力停滞不前。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估方法多关注窄任务性能，缺乏对生成式AI模型认知能力的系统性、类人评估，难以追踪其向通用人工智能发展的真实轨迹。
analysis.problem: 如何量化生成式AI模型的认知能力，并揭示其跨代际、跨模态的发展模式与架构性局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：多模态模型在言语理解和工作记忆上接近人类顶尖水平（>98百分位），但在知觉推理上接近地板（<1百分位）；抽象定量推理在语言模态下比视觉模态成熟更快；视觉感知组织能力基本停滞。
analysis.method: 提出心理测量框架，基于韦氏成人智力量表改编任务评估模型，并开发AIQ基准测试，应用于两个模型家族的六代模型。
contributions: 引入心理测量框架评估生成式AI的认知轮廓，并与人类常模比较。
开发AIQ基准测试，追踪跨代际的认知发展轨迹。
揭示模态间认知能力的不对称发展，指出架构性语言偏向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及对领先多模态模型的初始评估及对两个模型家族六代模型的AIQ基准测试。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖特定模型家族和任务类型，泛化性有限。
AIQ基准测试的效度和信度需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生成式AI模型的认知能力发展极不均衡，语言能力远超视觉推理，且视觉感知能力停滞不前。

papers.title: Enhancing Eye Movement Biometrics for User Authentication via Continuous Gaze Offset Score Fusion
papers.abstract: Eye movement biometrics (EMB) use subject-specific gaze dynamics for user authentication and identification. Recent deep learning-based EMB systems achieve strong performance by modeling temporal eye movement behavior. However, these systems typically overlook continuous gaze offset, despite prior evidence that it contains user-discriminative information. This work examines whether continuous gaze offset can improve biometric performance when combined with existing biometric features. We evaluate linear and nonlinear fusion methods on two publicly available datasets, collected via the lab-grade eye tracker and virtual reality headset across multiple tasks and observation durations. Results indicate that fusion offers performance benefits on both datasets, particularly when using nonlinear fusion. Additionally, fusing biometric information across multiple tasks further improves authentication performance. These findings support the hypothesis that continuous gaze offset may serve as useful auxiliary information under conditions of degraded or noisy eye tracking.

analysis.tldr: 融合连续注视偏移分数可提升眼动生物特征认证性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习眼动生物特征系统忽略连续注视偏移，而该信号可能包含用户判别信息，值得研究其能否提升认证性能。
analysis.problem: 验证连续注视偏移作为辅助信息与现有生物特征融合是否能改善用户认证效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用线性与非线性融合方法，将连续注视偏移分数与现有眼动生物特征结合，并在多个任务和观测时长下评估。
contributions: 首次系统研究连续注视偏移在眼动生物特征认证中的辅助作用。
在实验室眼动仪和VR头显两个公开数据集上验证了非线性融合的有效性。
发现跨任务融合可进一步提升认证性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开数据集（实验室眼动仪和VR头显）上，针对多个任务和观测时长进行实验，比较线性与非线性融合方法。
limitations: 仅使用两个数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论融合方法的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 融合连续注视偏移分数可提升眼动生物特征认证性能。

papers.title: Weblica: Scalable and Reproducible Training Environments for Visual Web Agents
papers.abstract: The web is complex, open-ended, and constantly changing, making it challenging to scale training data for visual web agents. Existing data collection attempts remain limited to offline trajectories for supervised fine-tuning or a handful of simulated environments for RL training, thus failing to capture web diversity. We propose Weblica (Web Replica), a framework for constructing reproducible and scalable web environments. Our framework leverages 1) HTTP-level caching to capture and replay stable visual states while preserving interactive behavior and 2) LLM-based environment synthesis grounded in real-world websites and core web navigation skills. Using this framework, we scale RL training to thousands of diverse environments and tasks. Our best model, Weblica-8B, outperforms open-weight baselines of similar size across multiple web navigation benchmarks while using fewer inference steps, scales favorably with additional test-time compute, and is competitive with API models.

analysis.tldr: 提出Weblica框架，通过HTTP缓存和LLM合成构建可复现、可扩展的Web环境，用于训练视觉Web Agent。
analysis.research_motivation: Web环境复杂、开放且不断变化，现有训练数据收集方法（离线轨迹或少量模拟环境）无法覆盖Web多样性，限制了视觉Web Agent的扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模、可复现且多样化的Web训练环境，以支持视觉Web Agent的强化学习训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Weblica框架：1) HTTP级缓存捕获和重放稳定视觉状态，同时保持交互行为；2) 基于LLM的环境合成，以真实网站和核心导航技能为基础。
contributions: 提出Weblica框架，实现可复现、可扩展的Web环境构建。
通过数千个多样化环境进行RL训练，得到Weblica-8B模型，在多个Web导航基准上优于同规模开源模型，且与API模型竞争。
analysis.experiments: 在多个Web导航基准上评估，Weblica-8B优于同规模开源基线，使用更少推理步骤，测试时计算扩展性好，与API模型竞争。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM合成质量，存在与真实环境的分布偏移。
HTTP缓存可能无法完全模拟动态Web内容。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Weblica框架，通过HTTP缓存和LLM合成构建可复现、可扩展的Web环境，用于训练视觉Web Agent。

papers.title: Multimodal synthesis of MRI and tabular data with diffusion in a joint latent space via cross-attention
papers.abstract: We propose a multimodal latent diffusion model that jointly synthesizes volumetric magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and tabular clinical data within a shared latent space via cross-attention. This approach enables coherent joint representation learning of MRI and tabular modalities for generative modeling. Our model utilizes a variational autoencoder to fuse the two modalities before diffusion-based synthesis, allowing modality-appropriate reconstruction with separate decoders for MRI and tabular data. We evaluated the framework on data from the German National Cohort (NAKO Gesundheitsstudie), comprising over 10,000 participants with MRI scans and clinical tabular features such as age, sex, body measurements, and ethnicity. The generated MRI volumes exhibited anatomical plausibility and body composition consistent with the synthesized tabular attributes. Quantitative evaluation using Fréchet distance and precision-recall metrics confirmed high-fidelity image generation. In the tabular modality, our model outperformed CTGAN across standard evaluation metrics and achieved results comparable to TVAE, demonstrating competitive performance relative to established unimodal baselines. This work is, to our knowledge, the first to demonstrate the feasibility of jointly modeling MRI and mixed-type tabular data in a single latent diffusion framework, offering a proof-of-concept for generating coherent synthetic multimodal patient data and aligning with the broader goal of developing digital twins in healthcare.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个联合扩散模型，在共享潜空间通过交叉注意力同步合成MRI和表格临床数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型通常只处理单一模态，而医疗数据常包含多模态（如MRI和表格数据），缺乏能联合生成且保持模态间一致性的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一的扩散框架中联合生成高保真、模态一致的MRI体积和混合型表格临床数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用变分自编码器融合MRI和表格数据到共享潜空间，再通过交叉注意力机制进行扩散合成，最后用独立解码器分别重建各模态。
contributions: 首个在单一潜扩散框架中联合建模MRI和混合型表格数据的工作
在NAKO数据集上验证了生成数据的解剖合理性和表格属性一致性，表格生成优于CTGAN，与TVAE相当
analysis.experiments: 在德国国家队列（NAKO）超过10,000名参与者的数据上评估，使用Fréchet距离和精确率-召回率指标评估图像质量，表格模态与CTGAN和TVAE对比。
limitations: 可能未在多种MRI序列或病理数据上验证
表格数据种类有限，未涉及更复杂的临床变量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个联合扩散模型，在共享潜空间通过交叉注意力同步合成MRI和表格临床数据。

papers.title: A Hierarchical Ensemble Pipeline for Anomaly Detection in ESA Satellite Telemetry
papers.abstract: A hierarchical ensemble pipeline is introduced to address anomaly detection in multivariate telemetry data provided by European Space Agency (ESA). The method integrates shapelet-based and statistical feature extraction, per-channel modeling, intra-channel stacking, and a final cross-channel aggregation. The pipeline is trained and validated using time-series cross-validation and two-level masking strategies to prevent information leakage. Results on the European Space Agency Anomaly Detection Benchmark (ESA-ADB) challenge demonstrate strong generalization, highlighting the effectiveness of hierarchical modeling in detecting subtle anomalies in realistic satellite telemetry.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化集成管道，结合形状基元和统计特征，用于ESA卫星遥测异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星遥测数据中的异常检测对航天任务安全至关重要，但多变量时间序列的复杂性和信息泄漏风险使得传统方法难以有效检测细微异常。
analysis.problem: 解决多变量卫星遥测数据中的异常检测问题，特别是如何防止信息泄漏并提高对细微异常的检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 层次化集成管道：先提取形状基元和统计特征，进行逐通道建模，再通过通道内堆叠和跨通道聚合，结合时间序列交叉验证和两级掩码策略防止信息泄漏。
contributions: 提出一种层次化集成管道用于多变量卫星遥测异常检测。
引入两级掩码策略防止时间序列交叉验证中的信息泄漏。
analysis.experiments: 在ESA-ADB基准上验证，显示强泛化能力，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定特征工程，泛化到其他遥测系统需调整。
层次化结构可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化集成管道，结合形状基元和统计特征，用于ESA卫星遥测异常检测。

papers.title: On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Flow matching generates data by integrating a learned velocity field, where the number of integration steps (NFE) directly determines inference cost. We analyze which properties of the velocity field govern integration error by decomposing the velocity Jacobian into its symmetric part S (strain rate) and antisymmetric part Omega (vorticity). We prove that strain and vorticity play different roles: strain controls exponential error amplification through the logarithmic norm, while vorticity contributes only linearly to the local truncation error. We further show that the optimal transport velocity field is irrotational and has zero material derivative, implying second-order Euler accuracy; for exact displacement interpolation, the associated Lagrangian particle dynamics are integrated exactly by Euler. Motivated by this analysis, we study weighted Jacobian regularization with strain weight alpha and vorticity weight beta. Experiments on 2D synthetic data confirm the main theoretical predictions, showing up to 2.7x lower integration error at NFE=5. Preliminary CIFAR-10 experiments show consistent trends, with a lightweight fine-tuning procedure improving FID by 14 percent at NFE=10 while preserving high-NFE quality.

analysis.tldr: 流匹配中速度场的应变和涡度对数值积分误差有不同影响，应变控制指数级误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配生成数据需要积分速度场，积分步数（NFE）直接影响推理成本，理解速度场属性如何影响积分误差有助于降低NFE。
analysis.problem: 分析流匹配中速度场的应变和涡度如何影响数值积分误差，并利用该分析设计正则化方法以减少积分步数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 应变通过对数范数控制指数级误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献于局部截断误差；最优传输速度场无旋且物质导数为零，可实现二阶欧拉精度。
analysis.method: 将速度雅可比分解为应变率S和涡度Omega，理论分析其对积分误差的不同作用；提出加权雅可比正则化，分别对S和Omega施加权重alpha和beta。
contributions: 理论证明了应变和涡度在流匹配积分误差中的不同角色：应变导致指数误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献。
揭示了最优传输速度场的无旋性质，并证明其可实现二阶欧拉精度。
提出加权雅可比正则化方法，在2D合成数据和CIFAR-10上验证了有效性，显著降低积分误差。
analysis.experiments: 在2D合成数据上验证理论预测，NFE=5时积分误差降低2.7倍；在CIFAR-10上通过轻量微调，NFE=10时FID改善14%，同时保持高NFE质量。
limitations: 实验仅在2D合成数据和CIFAR-10上进行，未在更大规模数据集或高分辨率图像上验证。
轻量微调过程可能对特定模型架构敏感，泛化性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 流匹配中速度场的应变和涡度对数值积分误差有不同影响，应变控制指数级误差放大，涡度仅线性贡献。

papers.title: Mean Mode Screaming: Mean--Variance Split Residuals for 1000-Layer Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Scaling Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) to hundreds of layers introduces a structural vulnerability: networks can enter a silent, mean-dominated collapse state that homogenizes token representations and suppresses centered variation. Through mechanistic auditing, we isolate the trigger event of this collapse as Mean Mode Screaming (MMS). MMS can occur even when training appears stable, with a mean-coherent backward shock on residual writers that opens deep residual branches and drives the network into a mean-dominated state. We show this behavior is driven by an exact decomposition of these gradients into mean-coherent and centered components, compounded by the structural suppression of attention-logit gradients through the null space of the Softmax Jacobian once values homogenize. To address this, we propose Mean-Variance Split (MV-Split) Residuals, which combine a separately gained centered residual update with a leaky trunk-mean replacement. On a 400-layer single-stream DiT, MV-Split prevents the divergent collapse that crashes the un-stabilized baseline; it tracks close to the baseline's pre-crash trajectory while remaining substantially better than token-isotropic gating methods such as LayerScale across the full schedule. Finally, we present a 1000-layer DiT as a scale-validation run at boundary scales, establishing that the architecture remains stably trainable at extreme depth.

analysis.tldr: 通过机制分析发现扩散Transformer深层网络中的均值主导崩溃现象，并提出均值-方差分裂残差结构实现1000层稳定训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 将扩散Transformer扩展到数百层时，网络会陷入一种静默的均值主导崩溃状态，导致token表示同质化，限制了模型深度扩展。
analysis.problem: 解决扩散Transformer在极深网络（如1000层）中出现的均值主导崩溃问题，实现稳定训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现均值模式尖叫（MMS）是崩溃的触发事件：即使训练看似稳定，均值相干的反向冲击会打开深层残差分支，使网络进入均值主导状态。该行为由梯度分解为均值相干和中心化分量驱动，并通过Softmax雅可比零空间对注意力logit梯度的结构抑制而加剧。
analysis.method: 提出均值-方差分裂（MV-Split）残差：将中心化残差更新与泄漏的干道均值替换相结合，分别处理均值和方差分量。
contributions: 首次识别并机制性解释了扩散Transformer深层网络中的均值主导崩溃现象（MMS）。
提出MV-Split残差结构，在400层单流DiT上防止崩溃，并优于LayerScale等方法。
成功训练1000层DiT，验证了架构在极端深度下的可训练性。
analysis.experiments: 在400层单流DiT上验证MV-Split防止崩溃，并跟踪接近基线预崩溃轨迹；在1000层DiT上进行规模验证。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 方法仅在单流DiT上验证，多流或跨模态场景未测试。
1000层实验仅为规模验证，未报告生成质量或下游任务性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过机制分析发现扩散Transformer深层网络中的均值主导崩溃现象，并提出均值-方差分裂残差结构实现1000层稳定训练。

papers.title: VecCISC: Improving Confidence-Informed Self-Consistency with Reasoning Trace Clustering and Candidate Answer Selection
papers.abstract: A standard technique for scaling inference-time reasoning is Self-Consistency, whereby multiple candidate answers are sampled from an LLM and the most common answer is selected. More recently, it has been shown that weighted majority voting (e.g. Confidence-Informed Self Consistency (CISC)), which assigns a confidence value to each candidate answer and chooses the answer with the largest accumulated score, tends to be more accurate on a wide range of popular benchmarks. In practice, weighted majority voting necessitates calling a critic LLM on each candidate's reasoning trace to produce the answer's confidence score. This secondary series of LLM calls greatly increases the overhead and cost of weighted majority voting, despite its potential performance benefits. To reduce this expense, we propose VecCISC, a lightweight, adaptive framework that uses a measure of semantic similarity to filter reasoning traces that are semantically equivalent to others, degenerate, or hallucinated, thus decreasing the number of candidate answers that must be evaluated by the critic. To ensure adequate experimental thoroughness, we evaluate VecCISC on five challenging, widely-adopted datasets spanning the domains of mathematics, chemistry, biology, commonsense reasoning, and the humanities. Our results demonstrate that VecCISC reduces the total token usage by 47%, while maintaining or exceeding the accuracy of CISC.

analysis.tldr: VecCISC通过语义相似性聚类过滤冗余推理轨迹，在保持或提升准确率的同时将CISC的token消耗降低47%。
analysis.research_motivation: 加权多数投票（如CISC）虽能提升LLM推理准确率，但需额外调用批评模型为每条推理轨迹打分，导致高昂的计算开销和成本。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著牺牲准确率的前提下，减少加权多数投票中批评模型需要评估的候选答案数量，从而降低推理开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VecCISC：利用语义相似性度量对推理轨迹进行聚类，过滤掉语义等价、退化或幻觉的轨迹，从而减少需要批评模型评估的候选答案数量。
contributions: 提出VecCISC框架，通过语义聚类减少CISC中批评模型的调用次数，降低token消耗47%。
在数学、化学、生物、常识推理和人文学科五个挑战性数据集上验证，保持或超越CISC的准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数据集（数学、化学、生物、常识推理、人文学科）上评估，结果显示总token使用量减少47%，准确率维持或超过CISC。
limitations: 语义相似性度量可能对特定领域或长尾推理轨迹不鲁棒。
过滤策略可能误删有价值但表达新颖的推理轨迹。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VecCISC通过语义相似性聚类过滤冗余推理轨迹，在保持或提升准确率的同时将CISC的token消耗降低47%。

papers.title: Rubric-Grounded RL: Structured Judge Rewards for Generalizable Reasoning
papers.abstract: We argue that decomposing reward into weighted, verifiable criteria and using an LLM judge to score them provides a partial-credit optimization signal: instead of a binary outcome or a single holistic score, each response is graded along multiple task-specific criteria. We formalize \emph{rubric-grounded reinforcement learning (RL)}: a framework in which the policy is optimized against a structured, multi-criterion reward produced by a frozen LLM judge that conditions on auxiliary grounding the policy never sees. We instantiate the framework by deriving rubrics from an Office of Scientific and Technical Information (OSTI)-derived corpus of roughly 100,000 scientific and technical documents and training Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). With GRPO-based training, the model achieves $71.7\%$ normalized reward on held-out rubric evaluation. The GRPO-tuned policy also improves over the base model on four reasoning benchmarks not derived from the training corpus -- GSM8K, MATH, GPQA Main, and GPQA Diamond. These results provide evidence that structured, document-grounded rewards can improve held-out rubric performance and induce transferable reasoning behaviors beyond the corpus used to construct the training environment.

analysis.tldr: 将奖励分解为可验证标准并使用LLM法官评分，通过GRPO优化策略，提升推理泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习奖励信号多为二元结果或单一整体分数，缺乏细粒度反馈，难以引导模型学习可迁移的推理行为。
analysis.problem: 如何设计结构化、多标准的奖励信号，使策略优化能泛化到未见过的推理任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Rubric-Grounded RL框架，将奖励分解为加权可验证标准，由冻结的LLM法官根据辅助文档评分，并使用GRPO优化策略。
contributions: 形式化了基于评分标准的强化学习框架，利用结构化多标准奖励进行策略优化。
在科学文档语料上训练Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct，并在多个推理基准上验证了泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在OSTI语料上训练，GRPO调优模型在保留评分标准上达到71.7%归一化奖励，并在GSM8K、MATH、GPQA Main和GPQA Diamond上优于基础模型。
limitations: 依赖LLM法官的评分质量，可能引入偏差。
实验仅在8B模型上进行，更大规模模型效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将奖励分解为可验证标准并使用LLM法官评分，通过GRPO优化策略，提升推理泛化能力。

papers.title: MPD$^2$-Router: Mask-aware Multi-expert Prior-regularized Dual-head Deferral Router in Glaucoma Screening and Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Learning-to-defer (L2D) can make glaucoma screening safer by routing difficult/uncertain cases to humans, yet standard formulations overlook expert availability, heterogeneous readers behavior, workload imbalance, asymmetric diagnostic harm, case difficulty from morphology and deployment shift. We introduce MPD$^2$-Router, a mask-aware multi-expert deferral framework that recasts ophthalmic triage as constrained human--AI routing: whether to defer and to which available expert. It couples a dual-head deferral/allocation policy with mask-aware Gumbel--sigmoid gating that strictly enforces per-sample availability, and fuses uncertainty, morphology, image-quality, and OOD signals. Training uses an asymmetric cost-sensitive objective with an augmented-Lagrangian deferral budget, a group-specific distribution prior, and a rank-majorization JS regularizer that jointly prevent expert collapse without forcing uniform allocation. Across three cross-national glaucoma cohorts (REFUGE, CHAKSU, ORIGA) with a frozen REFUGE-trained backbone, MPD$^2$-Router substantially lowers clinical cost and improves MCC over AI-only at a moderate deferral rate. It is Pareto-optimal in F1--MCC--cost, robust under cross-domain shift, and yields balanced expert utilization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种掩码感知的多专家延迟路由框架，用于青光眼筛查中的人机协作决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 青光眼筛查中，学习-延迟（L2D）方法可以提升安全性，但现有方法忽略了专家可用性、读者行为异质性、工作负载不平衡、不对称诊断危害以及病例难度和部署偏移等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个考虑专家可用性、行为异质性和不对称成本的延迟路由策略，在青光眼筛查中实现安全、高效的人机协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MPD$^2$-Router框架，包含双头延迟/分配策略、掩码感知Gumbel-sigmoid门控（强制样本级专家可用性）、融合不确定性、形态、图像质量和OOD信号；训练使用不对称成本敏感目标、增广拉格朗日延迟预算、组特定分布先验和秩主化JS正则化器。
contributions: 提出掩码感知的多专家延迟路由框架，解决专家可用性和行为异质性。
设计不对称成本敏感目标和正则化方法，平衡临床成本和专家利用率。
analysis.experiments: 在三个跨国青光眼数据集（REFUGE、CHAKSU、ORIGA）上，使用冻结的REFUGE训练骨干，MPD$^2$-Router显著降低临床成本并提高MCC，在F1-MCC-成本上达到帕累托最优，对跨域偏移鲁棒，且专家利用率均衡。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练骨干的质量。
框架复杂度较高，实际部署可能需要额外计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种掩码感知的多专家延迟路由框架，用于青光眼筛查中的人机协作决策。

papers.title: Reason to Play: Behavioral and Brain Alignment Between Frontier LRMs and Human Game Learners
papers.abstract: Humans rapidly learn abstract knowledge when encountering novel environments and flexibly deploy this knowledge to guide efficient and intelligent action. Can modern AI systems learn and plan in a similar way? We study this question using a dataset of complex human gameplay with concurrent fMRI recordings, in which participants learn novel video games that require rule discovery, hypothesis revision, and multi-step planning. We jointly evaluate models by their ability to play the games, match human learning behavior, and predict brain activity during the same task, comparing a suite of frontier Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) against model-free and model-based deep reinforcement learning agents and a Bayesian theory-based agent. We find that frontier LRMs most closely match human behavioral patterns during game discovery and predict brain activity an order of magnitude better than both reinforcement learning alternatives across cortical and subcortical regions, with effects robust to permutation controls. Through targeted manipulations, we further show that brain alignment reflects the model's in-context representation of the game state rather than its downstream planning or reasoning. Our results establish LRMs as compelling computational accounts of human learning and decision making in complex, naturalistic environments. Project page with interactive replays: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 前沿大型推理模型在复杂游戏学习中的行为和大脑对齐优于强化学习代理。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类能快速学习抽象知识并灵活运用，而现代AI系统是否具备类似能力尚不清楚，需要从行为、认知和神经层面进行联合评估。
analysis.problem: 评估前沿大型推理模型（LRMs）在复杂游戏学习任务中是否能够匹配人类的学习行为、规划能力以及大脑活动模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用人类游戏数据集（含fMRI记录），比较LRMs、无模型/基于模型的深度强化学习代理和贝叶斯理论代理在游戏表现、行为匹配和脑活动预测上的差异。
contributions: 发现LRMs在行为模式匹配上最接近人类，且在脑活动预测上比强化学习代理高一个数量级。
通过操控实验表明，大脑对齐反映的是模型对游戏状态的上下文表征，而非下游规划或推理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定游戏环境，泛化性待验证。
大脑对齐的因果机制仍需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 前沿大型推理模型在复杂游戏学习中的行为和大脑对齐优于强化学习代理。

papers.title: Learning CLI Agents with Structured Action Credit under Selective Observation
papers.abstract: Command line interface (CLI) agents are emerging as a practical paradigm for agent-computer interaction over evolving filesystems, executable command line programs, and online execution feedback. Recent work has used reinforcement learning (RL) to learn these interaction abilities from verifiable task feedback, yet few methods exploit the native structured attributes of CLI actions as learning signals. Beyond this underused action structure, CLI learning also couples two bottlenecks for coding agents. First, the agent must identify task-relevant evidence in a large codebase from partial observations. Second, sparse terminal rewards must be assigned to the actions that shape a long multi-turn trajectory. We study these bottlenecks through shell-driven information extraction and file editing tasks. For selective observation, we introduce $\sigma$-Reveal, an inference-time mechanism that selects token-budgeted context for the same CLI. For credit assignment, we propose Action Advantage Assignment ($\mathrm{A}^3$), a native agentic RL method that preserves the algorithmic complexity of standard agentic RL. $\mathrm{A}^3$ constructs turn-level advantages from episode-level relative feedback, abstract syntax tree (AST) based action sub-chain residuals, and tree-level trajectory margins. To further evaluate this problem setting, we construct ShellOps, a verifiable dataset suite covering CLI tasks in repository environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出σ-Reveal和A³方法，分别解决CLI智能体在部分观察下的选择性观察和稀疏奖励下的结构化动作信用分配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: CLI智能体在与文件系统和命令行程序交互时，面临部分观察和稀疏奖励两大瓶颈，现有RL方法未充分利用CLI动作的结构化属性。
analysis.problem: 解决CLI智能体在部分观察下识别任务相关证据，以及将稀疏终端奖励分配给长轨迹中多个动作的信用分配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出CLI学习耦合了两个瓶颈：一是智能体需从部分观察中识别任务相关证据；二是稀疏的终端奖励难以分配给长轨迹中的动作。
analysis.method: 提出σ-Reveal（推理时选择token预算上下文）和A³（基于AST动作子链残差和轨迹边界的回合级优势分配方法）。
contributions: 提出σ-Reveal机制，在推理时选择token预算上下文以缓解部分观察问题。
提出A³方法，利用AST动作子链残差和轨迹边界进行结构化信用分配。
构建ShellOps数据集，用于CLI任务在仓库环境中的可验证评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖AST解析的准确性，对非结构化CLI命令效果有限。
σ-Reveal的token预算选择可能引入额外推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出σ-Reveal和A³方法，分别解决CLI智能体在部分观察下的选择性观察和稀疏奖励下的结构化动作信用分配问题。

papers.title: Abductive Reasoning with Probabilistic Commonsense
papers.abstract: Recent efforts to improve the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) have focused on integrating formal logic solvers within neurosymbolic frameworks. A key challenge is that formal solvers lack commonsense world knowledge, preventing them from making reasoning steps that humans find obvious. Prior methods address this by using LLMs to supply missing commonsense assumptions, but these approaches implicitly assume universal agreement on such commonsense facts. In reality, commonsense beliefs vary across individuals. We propose a probabilistic framework for abductive commonsense reasoning that explicitly models this variation, aiming to determine whether most people would judge a statement as true or false. We introduce Probabilistic Abductive CommonSense (PACS), a novel algorithm that uses an LLM and a formal solver to sample proofs as observations of individuals' distinct commonsense beliefs, and aggregates conclusions across these samples. Empirically, PACS outperforms chain-of-thought reasoning, prior neurosymbolic methods, and search-based approaches across multiple benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率溯因常识推理框架PACS，通过LLM采样个体常识信念并聚合结论，提升溯因推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经符号方法假设常识事实普遍一致，但现实中个体常识信念存在差异，导致推理不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何建模个体间常识信念的变异性，实现鲁棒的溯因常识推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PACS算法，利用LLM和形式化求解器采样反映个体不同常识信念的证明，并聚合这些样本的结论。
contributions: 提出概率溯因常识推理框架，显式建模个体常识信念的变异性。
设计PACS算法，结合LLM和形式化求解器进行采样与聚合。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，PACS优于链式思维推理、先前神经符号方法和基于搜索的方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM生成多样信念的质量。
采样效率可能受限于证明空间大小。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率溯因常识推理框架PACS，通过LLM采样个体常识信念并聚合结论，提升溯因推理性能。

papers.title: The Limits of AI-Driven Allocation: Optimal Screening under Aleatoric Uncertainty
papers.abstract: The rise of machine learning has shifted targeted resource allocation in policy and humanitarian settings toward algorithmic targeting based on predicted risk scores. This approach is typically cheaper and faster than traditional screening procedures that directly observe the latent vulnerability status through physical verification. Yet, even access to the true conditional vulnerability probability cannot eliminate misallocation: aleatoric uncertainty over individual vulnerability status is irreducible, and probabilistic targeting inevitably misallocates some resources. In this work we study how screening and algorithmic targeting should be optimally combined in a two-stage allocation framework where a screening stage observes true outcomes for a subset of units before a final allocation stage assigns the resource under a fixed coverage budget. We show that the optimal strategy screens units at the margin of algorithmic allocation, while directly targeting the highest-risk units. Furthermore, we empirically characterize when screening and algorithmic targeting act as complements or substitutes: efficiency gains from screening grow as the aleatoric uncertainty in the population increases. We illustrate our framework with applications in income-based social protection programs and humanitarian demining in Colombia, where the tension between screening costs and allocation efficiency is operationally consequential.

analysis.tldr: 研究在资源分配中如何最优组合筛查与算法预测，以应对不可约的偶然不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于风险评分的算法分配成本低、速度快，但偶然不确定性导致资源错配不可避免；传统筛查虽准确但成本高。如何平衡两者以提高分配效率是政策制定中的关键问题。
analysis.problem: 在固定覆盖预算下，如何最优地结合筛查（直接观察真实状态）和算法预测（基于风险评分），以最小化资源错配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个两阶段分配框架：第一阶段对部分单位进行筛查以获取真实结果，第二阶段根据筛查结果和算法预测分配资源。理论推导出最优策略：筛查处于算法分配边缘的单位，直接分配最高风险单位。
contributions: 理论刻画了筛查与算法预测的最优组合策略，即筛查边缘单位、直接分配高风险单位。
实证表明筛查与算法预测的互补/替代关系取决于群体偶然不确定性程度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架假设筛查成本固定且可忽略，实际中成本可能变化。
理论结果依赖于风险评分准确反映真实条件概率，实际中模型可能偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究在资源分配中如何最优组合筛查与算法预测，以应对不可约的偶然不确定性。

papers.title: TraceFix: Repairing Agent Coordination Protocols with TLA+ Counterexamples
papers.abstract: We present TraceFix, a verification-first pipeline for Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent coordination. An agent synthesizes a protocol topology as a structured intermediate representation (IR) from a task description, generates PlusCal coordination logic, and iteratively repairs the protocol using counterexamples from the TLA+ model checker (TLC) until verification succeeds. Verified process bodies are compiled into per-agent system prompts and executed under a runtime monitor that rejects out-of-topology coordination operations. On 48 tasks spanning 16 scenario families, all tasks reach full TLC verification; 62.5% pass on the first attempt and none requires more than four repair iterations. State spaces span six orders of magnitude yet verification completes in under 60 s for every task. A 3,456-run runtime comparison shows that topology-monitored execution achieves the highest task completion (89.4% average, 81.5% full) and that runtimes using the verified protocol degrade at roughly half the rate of prompt-only and chat-only baselines when model capability is reduced. A paired ablation under a fixed runtime shows that TLC-verified protocols cut deadlock/livelock (DL/LL) from 31.1% to 14.1%, with the largest separation under fault injection.

analysis.tldr: TraceFix 使用 TLA+ 模型检查器自动修复 LLM 多智能体协调协议，实现零死锁/活锁的高效任务执行。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 多智能体协调中，协议容易产生死锁、活锁等错误，手动调试困难且耗时，需要自动化验证与修复方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成并验证 LLM 多智能体协调协议，确保其无死锁/活锁等错误，并高效执行任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但实验表明未验证的协议在运行时易出现死锁/活锁（31.1%），而 TLC 验证可将其降至 14.1%。
analysis.method: TraceFix 采用验证优先的流水线：从任务描述合成协议拓扑作为结构化中间表示（IR），生成 PlusCal 协调逻辑，利用 TLA+ 模型检查器（TLC）的反例迭代修复协议直至验证通过，然后将验证后的进程体编译为智能体系统提示，并在运行时监控下执行。
contributions: 提出 TraceFix，首个将 TLA+ 模型检查用于 LLM 多智能体协调协议自动修复的验证优先流水线。
在 48 个任务上实现完全 TLC 验证，62.5% 一次通过，所有任务在 60 秒内完成验证。
运行时实验表明，拓扑监控执行达到最高任务完成率（89.4%），且验证协议在模型能力降低时性能下降速度仅为基线的一半。
消融实验显示 TLC 验证协议将死锁/活锁从 31.1% 降至 14.1%，在故障注入下差异最大。
analysis.experiments: 在 48 个任务（16 个场景族）上评估，所有任务达到完全 TLC 验证；62.5% 首次通过，最多 4 次修复。状态空间跨越六个数量级，验证均在 60 秒内完成。3,456 次运行时比较显示拓扑监控执行平均任务完成率 89.4%（完全完成 81.5%），验证协议在模型能力降低时性能下降速度约为纯提示和纯聊天基线的一半。消融实验显示 TLC 验证协议将死锁/活锁从 31.1% 降至 14.1%。
limitations: 依赖 TLA+ 模型检查，可能对复杂协议有状态空间爆炸风险。
仅针对协调协议，未涉及智能体内部推理错误。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TraceFix 使用 TLA+ 模型检查器自动修复 LLM 多智能体协调协议，实现零死锁/活锁的高效任务执行。

papers.title: AgentEscapeBench: Evaluating Out-of-Domain Tool-Grounded Reasoning in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: As LLM-based agents increasingly rely on external tools, it is important to evaluate their ability to sustain tool-grounded reasoning beyond familiar workflows and short-range interactions. We introduce AgentEscapeBench, an escape-room-style benchmark that tests whether agents can infer, execute, and revise novel tool-use procedures under explicit long-range dependency constraints. Each task defines a directed acyclic dependency graph over tools and items, requiring agents to invoke real external functions, track hidden state revealed incrementally, propagate intermediate results, and submit a deterministically verifiable final answer. AgentEscapeBench includes 270 instances across five difficulty tiers and supports fully automated evaluation. Experiments with sixteen LLM agents and human participants show that performance drops sharply as dependency depth increases: humans decline from 98.3% success at difficulty-5 to 80.0% at difficulty-25, while the best model drops from 90.0% to 60.0%. Trajectory analysis attributes model failures mainly to breakdowns in long-range state tracking, clue adherence, and intermediate-result propagation. These findings suggest that current agents can often handle local tool use but still struggle with deep contextual dependencies. We hope AgentEscapeBench can serve as a diagnostic testbed for measuring current agent capabilities and informing future training efforts toward more robust general-purpose reasoning, action, and adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentEscapeBench基准，评估LLM Agent在长程依赖工具推理中的能力，发现深度依赖下性能显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent在熟悉工作流和短程交互中表现良好，但在需要长程依赖推理的新工具使用场景中能力未知，缺乏系统评估基准。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM Agent在超出熟悉工作流和短程交互的、具有显式长程依赖约束的工具推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着依赖深度增加，Agent性能急剧下降：人类从98.3%降至80.0%，最佳模型从90.0%降至60.0%；失败主要源于长程状态跟踪、线索遵循和中间结果传播的崩溃。
analysis.method: 构建基于逃逸室风格的基准AgentEscapeBench，包含270个实例、5个难度等级，每个任务定义有向无环依赖图，要求Agent调用真实外部函数、跟踪隐藏状态、传播中间结果并提交可验证答案。
contributions: 提出AgentEscapeBench基准，系统评估LLM Agent在长程依赖工具推理中的能力。
通过实验揭示当前Agent在深度依赖下的性能瓶颈，并归因于状态跟踪、线索遵循和结果传播的失败。
analysis.experiments: 使用16个LLM Agent和人类参与者进行实验，报告了不同难度下的成功率，并进行了轨迹分析。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖逃逸室风格任务，可能无法完全代表现实世界工具使用场景。
未提供模型在失败后的恢复或自适应策略分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AgentEscapeBench基准，评估LLM Agent在长程依赖工具推理中的能力，发现深度依赖下性能显著下降。

papers.title: Exact Regular-Constrained Variable-Order Markov Generation via Sparse Context-State Belief Propagation
papers.abstract: Variable-order Markov models generate sequences over a finite alphabet by conditioning each symbol on the longest available suffix of the generated history. Regular constraints, by contrast, describe finite-horizon control requirements by an automaton: fixed positions, forced endings, metrical patterns, and forbidden copied fragments are all special cases. Existing exact methods already handle regular constraints with belief propagation for first-order Markov chains. The contribution here is the variable-order extension: identifying the state space on which the existing BP-regular machinery must be run when the generator is a variable-order/backoff model. A first-order constraint layer can enforce useful support conditions, but it computes future mass after merging histories that a variable-order generator deliberately keeps distinct. We formalize this mismatch and give the sparse construction obtained by replacing the first-order Markov state with the observed context state, then taking the standard product with the regular constraint automaton. For a fixed trained context graph and automaton, inference is linear in the sequence horizon; in general it is polynomial in the number of reachable product edges. This gives the correct variable-order distribution conditioned on regular constraints without expanding to all K-tuples. The same finite-source interface supports reversible data augmentation by inverse count lookup, matching materialized transposition augmentation without storing transformed corpora. We also separate exact BP inference from generation-time backoff policies, such as singleton avoidance, whose stochastic semantics must be made explicit if exactness is claimed.

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏上下文-状态置信传播方法，实现变阶马尔可夫模型在正则约束下的精确生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 变阶马尔可夫模型在序列生成中广泛使用，但现有精确方法仅支持一阶马尔可夫链的正则约束，无法处理变阶模型因历史区分导致的约束不匹配问题。
analysis.problem: 如何对变阶马尔可夫模型施加正则约束（如固定位置、强制结尾、禁止重复片段等），并实现精确的约束条件概率生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一阶约束层在合并历史时丢失了变阶模型刻意保持的区分信息，导致未来质量计算不准确。
analysis.method: 将一阶马尔可夫状态替换为观测到的上下文状态，并与正则约束自动机做标准乘积，构建稀疏上下文-状态图，然后在该图上运行置信传播。
contributions: 形式化了变阶马尔可夫生成器与一阶正则约束之间的不匹配问题。
提出稀疏上下文-状态置信传播方法，在固定上下文图和自动机下推理复杂度与序列长度线性相关。
支持可逆数据增强（逆计数查找），无需存储变换后的语料库。
区分了精确BP推理与生成时的回退策略（如避免单例），明确了精确性声明所需的随机语义。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于训练好的上下文图和自动机，可能不适用于动态或未知约束。
多项式复杂度在边数上，对于极大自动机可能仍有限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏上下文-状态置信传播方法，实现变阶马尔可夫模型在正则约束下的精确生成。

papers.title: RuleSafe-VL: Evaluating Rule-Conditioned Decision Reasoning in Vision-Language Content Moderation
papers.abstract: Platform content moderation applies explicit policy rules and context-dependent conditions to decide whether user content is allowed, restricted, or removed. A correct moderation outcome must therefore depend on which rules a case activates, how those rules interact, and whether the available evidence is sufficient. Current multimodal safety benchmarks largely reduce moderation to matching predefined final labels, leaving this underlying rule structure untested. As a result, a high benchmark score reveals little about whether a model applies the policy correctly or arrives at the correct label through superficial cues. To evaluate this rule-governed process, we introduce RuleSafe-VL, a benchmark for rule-conditioned decision reasoning in vision-language content moderation. Derived from publicly available platform moderation policies, RuleSafe-VL formalizes 93 atomic rules and 92 typed rule relations, yielding 2,166 context-sensitive image-text cases across three high-risk policy families. Its four diagnostic tasks decompose moderation into a rule-conditioned decision chain. They identify activated rules, recover rule interactions, judge decision sufficiency, and resolve outcomes once missing context is supplied. Experiments on 10 frontier, open-source, and safety-oriented VLMs reveal rule-relation recovery as the dominant bottleneck, where the best model reaches only 64.8 Macro-F1 and some safety-oriented models fall below 7 Macro-F1. Decision-state prediction also remains unreliable, peaking at 64.5 Macro-F1. RuleSafe-VL shifts moderation evaluation from final-label scoring toward diagnostic assessment of rule-conditioned decision reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出RuleSafe-VL基准，系统评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理能力，发现规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态安全基准仅匹配预定义标签，无法测试模型是否真正理解并应用平台政策规则，导致高分可能来自表面线索而非正确推理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中基于规则条件进行决策推理的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈，最佳模型仅64.8 Macro-F1，部分安全导向模型低于7 Macro-F1；决策状态预测也不可靠，最高64.5 Macro-F1。
analysis.method: 从公开平台审核政策中形式化93条原子规则和92种规则关系，构建2,166个上下文敏感图文案例，设计四个诊断任务分解决策链。
contributions: 提出RuleSafe-VL基准，系统评估VLM在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理。
揭示规则关系恢复是当前VLM的主要瓶颈，并指出安全导向模型表现不佳。
analysis.experiments: 在10个前沿、开源和安全导向的VLM上实验，报告了Macro-F1指标。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三个高风险政策族，可能不全面。
未提供模型在真实平台上的部署验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RuleSafe-VL基准，系统评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理能力，发现规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: Alternating Target-Path Planning for Scalable Multi-Agent Coordination
papers.abstract: The concurrent target assignment and pathfinding (TAPF) problem extends multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) by asking planners to allocate distinct targets and collision-free paths to agents. Prior work on TAPF has relied exclusively on Conflict-Based Search (CBS), which tightly couples target assignment and pathfinding, resulting in compute-intensive, non-scalable solutions. In contrast, we propose an iterative refinement framework that decouples target assignment from pathfinding. Our framework builds on modern, fast, suboptimal MAPF solvers, such as LaCAM. Specifically, within a given time budget, it repeatedly solves MAPF for the current target assignment, identifies bottleneck agents via MAPF feedback, and refines the assignment. Empirical results show that feedback-driven reassignment loop is effective, enabling our framework to scale well beyond the reach of the state-of-the-art CBS-based solver while maintaining decent solution quality. This represents a solid step toward practical, large scale TAPF suitable for real-world setups.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦目标分配与路径规划的迭代框架，利用MAPF反馈循环实现大规模多智能体协调。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有TAPF方法依赖CBS紧密耦合目标分配与路径规划，计算密集且难以扩展，无法满足实际大规模应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何高效解耦目标分配与路径规划，实现可扩展的多智能体目标分配与路径规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出迭代优化框架，在时间预算内重复使用快速次优MAPF求解器（如LaCAM）求解当前目标分配下的路径，通过MAPF反馈识别瓶颈智能体并重新分配目标。
contributions: 提出解耦目标分配与路径规划的迭代框架，突破CBS的扩展性瓶颈。
利用MAPF反馈驱动目标重分配，在保持解质量的同时显著提升可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖MAPF求解器的性能，瓶颈识别策略有待进一步优化。
未讨论理论最优性保证，仅保证次优解。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦目标分配与路径规划的迭代框架，利用MAPF反馈循环实现大规模多智能体协调。

papers.title: Online Goal Recognition using Path Signature and Dynamic Time Warping
papers.abstract: Online goal recognition in continuous domains poses two central challenges: efficiently encoding large trajectories and effectively comparing them. Recent work addresses these challenges by using custom state-space representations and metrics to compare observations against hypotheses. However, these approaches often overlook well-established encoding techniques used in other domains that offer substantial advantages. This paper introduces a novel method for online goal recognition that leverages path signatures, a compact, expressive representation of rough path theory that efficiently captures key semantic features of trajectories, enabling more meaningful comparisons between them. Experiments show that our method consistently outperforms the state of the art in predictive accuracy and online planning efficiency, while remaining competitive offline.

analysis.tldr: 利用路径签名和动态时间规整实现高效的在线目标识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线目标识别在连续域中面临轨迹编码和比较效率的挑战，现有方法依赖定制表示，忽略了其他领域成熟的编码技术。
analysis.problem: 如何高效编码长轨迹并进行有效比较，以提升在线目标识别的预测准确性和规划效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合路径签名（Path Signature）和动态时间规整（Dynamic Time Warping）进行轨迹编码与比较。
contributions: 提出一种基于路径签名的在线目标识别方法，实现紧凑且富有表现力的轨迹表示。
在预测准确性和在线规划效率上持续超越现有方法，离线性能也具有竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对噪声或异常轨迹敏感。
路径签名的计算复杂度在极长轨迹上可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用路径签名和动态时间规整实现高效的在线目标识别。

papers.title: Hierarchical Task Network Planning with LLM-Generated Heuristics
papers.abstract: HTN planning is a variation of classical planning where, instead of searching for a linear sequence of actions, an algorithm decomposes higher-level tasks using a method library until only executable actions remain. On one hand, this allows one to introduce domain knowledge that can speed up the search for a solution through the method library. On the other hand, it creates challenges that go beyond those of classical state-space search. While recent research produced a number of heuristics and novel algorithms that speed up HTN planning, these heuristics are not yet as informative as those available in classical planning algorithms. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can generate effective search heuristics for HTN planning, extending the methodology of Corrêa, Pereira, and Seipp (2025) from classical to hierarchical planning. Using the Pytrich planner on six standard total-order HTN benchmark domains, we evaluate heuristics generated by nine LLMs under domain-specific prompting and compare them against the TDG and LMCount domain-independent baselines and the PANDA planner. Our results show that LLM-generated heuristics nearly match the coverage of the best available HTN planner, while substantially reducing search effort on 83% of shared problems.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的启发式函数在HTN规划中几乎达到最佳规划器的覆盖率，同时大幅减少搜索代价。
analysis.research_motivation: HTN规划依赖方法库加速搜索，但现有启发式函数不如经典规划中的信息丰富，限制了规划效率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM为HTN规划生成有效的搜索启发式函数，以提升规划性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用LLM在领域特定提示下生成启发式函数，集成到Pytrich规划器中，并在六个标准总序HTN基准域上评估。
contributions: 首次将LLM生成启发式的方法从经典规划扩展到HTN规划。
实验表明LLM生成的启发式在覆盖率和搜索效率上接近甚至超越现有最优HTN规划器。
analysis.experiments: 在六个标准总序HTN基准域上，使用九个LLM生成启发式，与TDG、LMCount基线和PANDA规划器对比，LLM启发式在83%的共享问题上减少了搜索代价。
limitations: 仅测试了总序HTN规划，未涉及偏序或更复杂变体。
依赖领域特定提示，可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的启发式函数在HTN规划中几乎达到最佳规划器的覆盖率，同时大幅减少搜索代价。

papers.title: Finite-Time Analysis of MCTS in Continuous POMDP Planning
papers.abstract: This paper presents a finite-time analysis for Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) in Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs), with probabilistic concentration bounds in both discrete and continuous observation spaces. While MCTS-style solvers such as POMCP achieve empirical success in many applications, rigorous finite-time guarantees remain an open problem due to the nonstationarity and the interdependencies induced by heuristic action selection (e.g., UCB). In the discrete setting, we address these challenges by extending the polynomial exploration bonus to UCB in POMDP setting, yielding polynomial concentration bounds for the empirical value estimation at the root node. For continuous observation spaces, we introduce an abstract partitioning framework and propose a finite-time bound on partitioning loss. Under mild conditions, we prove highprobability bound on value estimates in POMDPs with continuous observation space. Specifically, we propose Voro-POMCPOW, a variant of POMCPOW with f inite-time guarantees that adaptively partitions the continuous observation space using Voronoi cells. This approach maintains a finite branching factor while preserving the original observation generator. Empirical validation demonstrates that the proposed Voro-POMCPOW shows competitive performance while providing theoretical guarantees. Although our analysis focuses on continuous POMDPs, the techniques developed herein are also applicable to continuous MDPs, closing another gap on the MDP side.

analysis.tldr: 为连续POMDP中的MCTS提供有限时间分析，提出Voro-POMCPOW算法并给出理论保证。
analysis.research_motivation: MCTS在POMDP中应用广泛，但缺乏严格的有限时间保证，现有分析受限于非平稳性和启发式动作选择带来的依赖问题。
analysis.problem: 为离散和连续观测空间的POMDP中的MCTS提供有限时间收敛保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在离散空间中扩展多项式探索奖励到UCB；在连续空间中引入抽象划分框架，提出Voro-POMCPOW，使用Voronoi单元自适应划分连续观测空间，保持有限分支因子。
contributions: 首次为离散观测POMDP中的MCTS提供多项式浓度界。
提出Voro-POMCPOW算法，为连续观测POMDP提供有限时间保证，并实证验证其竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实证验证Voro-POMCPOW具有竞争性能，但未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖于特定假设（如温和条件）。
Voronoi划分在高维空间可能面临计算复杂度问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为连续POMDP中的MCTS提供有限时间分析，提出Voro-POMCPOW算法并给出理论保证。

papers.title: GASim: A Graph-Accelerated Hybrid Framework for Social Simulation
papers.abstract: Large-scale social simulators are essential for studying complex social patterns. Prior work explores hybrid methods to scale up simulations, combining large language models (LLM)-based agents with numerical agent-based models (ABM). However, this incurs high latency due to expensive memory retrieval and sequential ABM execution. To address this challenge, we propose GASim, a graph-accelerated hybrid multi-agent framework for large-scale social simulations. For core agents driven by LLM, GASim introduces Graph-Optimized Memory (GOM) to replace intensive LLM-based retrieval pipelines with lightweight propagation over a sparse memory graph. For the majority of ordinary agents, GASim employs Graph Message Passing (GMP), substituting sequential ABM execution with parallel updates by fine-grained feature aggregation and Graph Attention Network. We further introduce Entropy-Driven Grouping (EDG) that coordinates this hybrid partitioning, leveraging information entropy to dynamically identify emergent core agents situated in information-diverse neighborhoods. Extensive experiments show that GASim not only delivers a substantial 9.94-fold end-to-end speedup over the traditional hybrid framework but also consumes less than 20% of baseline tokens, significantly reducing costs while preserving strong alignment with real-world public opinion trends. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出图加速混合多智能体框架GASim，通过图优化记忆和图消息传递实现大规模社会模拟的9.94倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模社会模拟器对研究复杂社会模式至关重要，但现有混合方法（LLM智能体+数值ABM）因昂贵的记忆检索和顺序ABM执行导致高延迟，亟需加速。
analysis.problem: 如何降低混合社会模拟框架的高延迟和成本，同时保持与现实世界趋势的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GASim框架，包含三个组件：图优化记忆（GOM）用轻量级传播替代LLM检索；图消息传递（GMP）用并行更新替代顺序ABM执行；熵驱动分组（EDG）动态识别核心智能体以协调混合分区。
contributions: 提出图加速混合框架GASim，实现9.94倍端到端加速和80%的token节省。
引入图优化记忆和图消息传递，替代传统LLM检索和顺序ABM执行。
提出熵驱动分组方法，动态识别核心智能体以优化混合分区。
analysis.experiments: 在大型社会模拟任务上，GASim相比传统混合框架实现9.94倍加速，token消耗低于基线20%，且与现实舆论趋势保持强对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖图结构质量，稀疏图设计可能限制某些场景下的信息传播。
熵驱动分组可能在高动态环境中引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图加速混合多智能体框架GASim，通过图优化记忆和图消息传递实现大规模社会模拟的9.94倍加速。

papers.title: FactoryBench: Evaluating Industrial Machine Understanding
papers.abstract: We introduce FactoryBench, a benchmark for evaluating time-series models and LLMs on machine understanding over industrial robotic telemetry. Q&A pairs are organized along four causal levels (state, intervention, counterfactual, decision) instantiating Pearl's ladder of causation, and span five answer formats: four structured formats are scored deterministically and free-form answers are scored by an LLM-as-judge voting protocol. We propose a scalable Q&A generation framework built around structured question templates, present FactoryWave (a dense, multitask, multivariate sensor dataset collected from a UR3 cobot and a KUKA KR10 industrial arm), and construct FactoryBench as a large-scale benchmark of over 70k Q&A items grounded in roughly 15k normalized episodes from FactoryWave, AURSAD, and voraus-AD. Zero-shot evaluation of six frontier LLMs shows that no model exceeds 50% on structured levels or 18% on decision-making, revealing a wide gap between current models and operational machine understanding.

analysis.tldr: FactoryBench 评估了时间序列模型和 LLM 在工业机器人遥测数据上的机器理解能力，发现当前模型在结构化问答和决策任务上表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业机器人遥测数据蕴含丰富的机器状态信息，但缺乏系统评估模型理解能力的基准，现有方法难以衡量模型在因果推理和决策层面的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个覆盖多因果层次和多答案格式的基准，以评估时间序列模型和 LLM 对工业机器人遥测数据的理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FactoryBench 基准，包含基于 Pearl 因果阶梯的四级因果问答（状态、干预、反事实、决策）和五种答案格式（四种结构化格式确定性评分，自由形式由 LLM 投票评分），并构建了可扩展的问答生成框架和包含 UR3 与 KUKA KR10 数据的 FactoryWave 数据集。
contributions: 提出 FactoryBench，一个大规模工业机器理解基准，包含超过 70k 个问答项，覆盖四个因果层次和五种答案格式。
发布 FactoryWave，一个密集多任务多变量传感器数据集，并整合了 AURSAD 和 voraus-AD 数据。
零样本评估六个前沿 LLM，揭示其在结构化层次上不超过 50%、决策任务上不超过 18% 的性能差距。
analysis.experiments: 零样本评估了六个前沿 LLM，结果显示没有模型在结构化层次上超过 50%，在决策任务上超过 18%。
limitations: 基准仅基于工业机器人遥测数据，可能不直接适用于其他工业场景。
自由形式答案的评分依赖 LLM-as-judge，可能引入评估偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FactoryBench 评估了时间序列模型和 LLM 在工业机器人遥测数据上的机器理解能力，发现当前模型在结构化问答和决策任务上表现不佳。

papers.title: Tacit Knowledge Extraction via Logic Augmented Generation and Active Inference
papers.abstract: Tacit knowledge plays a central role in human expertise, yet it remains difficult to capture, formalize, and reuse in machine-interpretable form. This challenge is especially relevant in procedural domains, where successful execution depends not only on explicit instructions, but also on implicit assumptions, contextual constraints, embodied skills, and experience-based judgments rarely documented. As a result, current knowledge engineering pipelines struggle to transform tacit and process-centric knowledge into formally specified, machine-interpretable representations that can be queried, validated, reasoned over, and reused. In this paper, we introduce a neuro-symbolic framework that combines Logic-Augmented Generation and an Active-Inference-inspired approach for ontology-grounded Knowledge Graph construction. We evaluate the approach in a knowledge transfer case study in manufacturing, using assembly-like repair procedures from instructional videos as a reproducible proxy domain. Results show that the proposed solution improves completeness and semantic quality, advancing neuro-symbolic knowledge engineering for industrial domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号框架结合逻辑增强生成与主动推理，从视频中提取隐性知识构建知识图谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐性知识难以形式化，现有知识工程管道无法将过程性隐性知识转化为可查询、验证和推理的机器可解释表示。
analysis.problem: 如何从程序性领域（如制造装配维修）的视频中提取隐性知识并构建形式化的知识图谱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合逻辑增强生成（Logic-Augmented Generation）和基于主动推理（Active Inference）的本体引导知识图谱构建方法。
contributions: 提出一种神经符号框架，融合逻辑增强生成与主动推理用于隐性知识提取。
在制造领域的维修视频案例中验证了方法，提升了知识图谱的完整性和语义质量。
analysis.experiments: 在制造领域的装配维修视频数据集上进行知识迁移案例研究，结果显示方法提升了完整性和语义质量。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的本体设计。
视频领域可能限制泛化到其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号框架结合逻辑增强生成与主动推理，从视频中提取隐性知识构建知识图谱。

papers.title: Learning to Communicate Locally for Large-Scale Multi-Agent Pathfinding
papers.abstract: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is a widely used abstraction for multi-robot trajectory planning problems, where multiple homogeneous agents move simultaneously within a shared environment. Although solving MAPF optimally is NP-hard, scalable and efficient solvers are critical for real-world applications such as logistics and search-and-rescue. To this end, the research community has proposed various decentralized suboptimal MAPF solvers that leverage machine learning. Such methods frame MAPF (from a single agent perspective) as a Dec-POMDP where at each time step an agent has to decide an action based on the local observation and typically solve the problem via reinforcement learning or imitation learning. We follow the same approach but additionally introduce a learnable communication module tailored to enhance cooperation between agents via efficient feature sharing. We present the Local Communication for Multi-agent Pathfinding (LC-MAPF), a generalizable pre-trained model that applies multi-round communication between neighboring agents to exchange information and improve their coordination. Our experiments show that the introduced method outperforms the existing learning-based MAPF solvers, including IL and RL-based approaches, across diverse metrics in a diverse range of (unseen) test scenarios. Remarkably, the introduced communication mechanism does not compromise LC-MAPF's scalability, a common bottleneck for communication-based MAPF solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种局部通信模块增强多智能体路径规划中的协作，在未见场景中优于现有学习方法且保持可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体路径规划（MAPF）在物流、搜救等实际应用中至关重要，但最优求解是NP难的，现有基于学习的分散式方法缺乏有效的智能体间协作机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可学习的通信模块，在不牺牲可扩展性的前提下提升多智能体路径规划中的协作效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LC-MAPF，一个可泛化的预训练模型，通过多轮局部通信在相邻智能体间交换特征以改进协调。
contributions: 引入可学习的局部通信模块，增强多智能体路径规划中的协作。
LC-MAPF在多种未见测试场景中优于现有基于学习和强化学习的方法，且不牺牲可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种未见测试场景中，LC-MAPF在多个指标上优于现有基于学习和强化学习的MAPF求解器。
limitations: 可能仅适用于同构智能体场景。
通信机制在极端密集环境中可能仍存在瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种局部通信模块增强多智能体路径规划中的协作，在未见场景中优于现有学习方法且保持可扩展性。

papers.title: Inference Time Causal Probing in LLMs
papers.abstract: Causal probing methods aim to test and control how internal representations influence the behavior of generative models. In causal probing, an intervention modifies hidden states so that a property takes on a different value. Most existing approaches define such interventions by training an auxiliary probe classifier, which ties the method to a specific task or model and risks misalignment with the model's predictive geometry. We propose Hidden-state Driven Margin Intervention (HDMI), a probe-free, gradient-based technique that directly steers hidden states using the model's native output. HDMI applies a margin objective that increases the probability of a target continuation while decreasing that of the source, without relying on probe classifiers. We further introduce a lookahead variant (LA-HDMI) for text editing that backpropagates through the softmax embeddings, modifying the current hidden state so that the likelihood of user-specified tokens increases in next token generations while preserving fluency. To evaluate interventions, we measure completeness (whether the targeted property changes as intended) and selectivity (whether unrelated properties are preserved), and report their harmonic mean as an overall measure of reliability. HDMI consistently achieves higher reliability than prior methods on the LGD agreement corpus and the CausalGym benchmark, across Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct, and Pythia-70M.

analysis.tldr: 提出无探针的因果干预方法 HDMI，利用模型原生输出直接调控隐藏状态，在因果探测任务中取得更高可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果探测方法依赖辅助探针分类器定义干预，这会导致方法绑定于特定任务或模型，且可能与模型的预测几何不一致，限制了通用性和准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用探针分类器的情况下，对 LLM 内部表征进行因果干预，以可靠地测试和控制模型行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Hidden-state Driven Margin Intervention (HDMI)，一种无探针、基于梯度的技术，利用模型原生输出（margin 目标）直接调控隐藏状态，增加目标延续概率并降低源概率；还提出 lookahead 变体 LA-HDMI 用于文本编辑，通过 softmax 嵌入反向传播修改当前隐藏状态。
contributions: 提出 HDMI，一种无探针的因果干预方法，避免与特定任务或模型绑定。
引入 LA-HDMI 变体，支持文本编辑场景下的流畅性保持。
定义 completeness 和 selectivity 指标及其调和均值作为干预可靠性度量。
analysis.experiments: 在 LGD agreement corpus 和 CausalGym 基准上，使用 Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct 和 Pythia-70M 模型，HDMI 在可靠性上一致优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能对梯度计算敏感，需要额外计算开销。
lookahead 变体可能受限于 softmax 嵌入的维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无探针的因果干预方法 HDMI，利用模型原生输出直接调控隐藏状态，在因果探测任务中取得更高可靠性。

papers.title: Parallel Lifted Planning via Semi-Naive Datalog Evaluation
papers.abstract: Lifted classical planners operate directly on first-order planning tasks to avoid the computationally demanding grounding step. However, lifted planning is typically slower, as planners must repeatedly instantiate ground structures during search. Many core components of lifted classical planning, such as successor generation, axiom evaluation, task grounding, and delete-relaxed heuristics, have previously been studied through the lens of Datalog evaluation. We build upon this line of work and extend it by developing and analyzing an execution model with two levels of parallelism: rule-level parallelism and grounding parallelism. We further specialize this solver for planning-specific workloads with a grounder based on clique enumeration, which we extend to support semi-naive Datalog evaluation. Our experimental evaluation using greedy best-first search with the FF heuristic shows that our implementation already solves more tasks than the baselines on a single core, and the gap widens as additional cores are used. Moreover, on hard-to-ground tasks where on average 97.6% of the total runtime is spent in Datalog execution, the proposed execution model exhibits an average parallel fraction of 92.4%, while achieving up to a 6-fold speedup on 8 cores in practice.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于半朴素Datalog评估的并行提升规划方法，通过规则级和实例化级并行加速规划求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 提升规划器避免昂贵的实例化步骤，但搜索中需重复实例化结构导致速度较慢，现有方法缺乏并行化支持。
analysis.problem: 如何通过并行化Datalog评估来加速提升经典规划中的核心组件（如后继生成、公理评估、任务实例化和删除松弛启发式）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在难实例化任务中，平均97.6%的运行时间花费在Datalog执行上，表明Datalog评估是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 开发具有规则级并行和实例化级并行的执行模型，并基于团枚举的实例化器扩展支持半朴素Datalog评估。
contributions: 提出一种两层并行（规则级和实例化级）的执行模型，专门针对规划工作负载优化。
基于团枚举的实例化器扩展支持半朴素Datalog评估，实现高效并行。
实验表明单核上已优于基线，多核下加速比可达6倍（8核），并行效率高。
analysis.experiments: 使用贪婪最佳优先搜索和FF启发式，在单核上比基线解决更多任务，多核下加速比达6倍，并行分数92.4%。
limitations: 实验仅在8核环境下进行，更大规模并行效果未知。
方法依赖于Datalog评估，可能不适用于所有规划领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于半朴素Datalog评估的并行提升规划方法，通过规则级和实例化级并行加速规划求解。

papers.title: Open-Ended Task Discovery via Bayesian Optimization
papers.abstract: When applying Bayesian optimization (BO) to scientific workflow, a major yet often overlooked source of uncertainty is the task itself -- namely, what to optimize and how to evaluate it -- which can evolve as evidence accumulates. We introduce Generate-Select-Refine (GSR), a open-ended BO framework that alternates between task generation and task optimization. Starting from a user-provided seed task, GSR generates new tasks in a coarse-to-fine manner while a task-acquisition function schedules optimization. Asymptotically, it concentrates evaluations on the best task, incurring only logarithmic regret overhead relative to single-task BO. We apply GSR to new product development, chemical synthesis scaling, algorithm analysis, and patent repurposing, where it outperforms existing LLM-based optimizers.

analysis.tldr: 提出GSR框架，将贝叶斯优化扩展到开放式任务发现，在多个科学工作流中优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 贝叶斯优化在科学工作流中常忽略任务本身的不确定性，即优化目标和评估方式会随证据积累而演变，现有方法缺乏对任务发现的系统支持。
analysis.problem: 如何让贝叶斯优化自动发现并优化新任务，而不仅限于固定任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Generate-Select-Refine (GSR)框架，交替进行任务生成（粗到细）和任务优化，通过任务采集函数调度优化，渐近地集中评估于最佳任务。
contributions: 提出开放式贝叶斯优化框架GSR，支持任务自动发现与优化。
理论证明GSR相对于单任务BO仅产生对数级遗憾开销。
在多个领域（新产品开发、化学合成、算法分析、专利再利用）验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个科学工作流（新产品开发、化学合成缩放、算法分析、专利再利用）中评估，GSR优于现有基于LLM的优化器。
limitations: 可能依赖种子任务质量。
理论分析限于渐近行为，实际收敛速度可能受任务空间复杂度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GSR框架，将贝叶斯优化扩展到开放式任务发现，在多个科学工作流中优于现有方法。

papers.title: From Pixels to Prompts: Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: When you read a paper about a new Vision-Language Model today, it can be easy to forget how strange this idea would have sounded not so long ago. Teaching machines to see was already hard. Teaching them to read and generate language was already hard. Asking them to do both at once - and then to reason, answer questions, follow instructions, and sometimes even surprise us - still carries a quiet trace of science fiction, even as it becomes routine. This book was born from a simple feeling: \emph{it is too easy to get lost}. The field moves quickly, new model names appear constantly, and the gap between ``I know the buzzwords'' and ``I actually understand how this works'' can feel uncomfortably wide. I have felt that gap many times. If you are holding this book, you probably have too. My goal is not to provide an exhaustive catalog of every dataset, benchmark, and new model variant. Instead, I want to offer something more modest - and, I hope, more durable: a clear mental map of Vision-Language Models. Enough structure that you can read new papers with confidence; enough intuition that you can design your own systems without feeling as if you are assembling LEGO bricks blindly.

analysis.tldr: 本书为视觉-语言模型提供清晰的概念地图，帮助读者建立系统理解。

analysis.problem: 如何为视觉-语言模型领域提供一个清晰、持久的概念地图，帮助读者自信地阅读新论文和设计系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象。
analysis.method: 通过撰写书籍，梳理视觉-语言模型的核心概念、结构和直觉，而非罗列所有数据集和模型变体。
contributions: 提供视觉-语言模型的清晰概念地图
帮助读者建立系统理解，从而自信阅读新论文和设计系统

papers.title: Multi-Environment POMDPs with Finite-Horizon Objectives
papers.abstract: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) are systems in which one agent interacts with a stochastic environment, and receives only partial information about the current state. In a multi-environment POMDP (MEPOMDP), the initial state is unknown, and assumed to be adversarially chosen. In this work we focus on computing the optimal value and policy in MEPOMDPs with finite-horizon objectives. That problem is known to be PSPACE-complete in POMDPs.
