analysis.tldr: 提出在成本约束下选择最优实验子集以收紧部分可识别因果查询边界的方法，证明问题NP-hard，并引入图剪枝准则高效求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 因果查询常仅部分可识别，实验成本高昂，需在有限预算下选择能最大程度收紧边界的实验子集。
analysis.problem: 在观察实验前，选择成本约束下的实验子集，最大化目标查询边界宽度的最坏情况缩减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 形式化为最大效力问题，证明NP-hard；基于多项式规划框架评估离散设置下的认知效力；引入路径拦截规则和ID算法剪枝准则，缩减候选实验空间。
contributions: 形式化成本约束下最优实验选择问题并证明NP-hard
提出两种图剪枝准则，平均剪枝50-88%候选实验
证明ID剪枝实验组合惰性，实现超指数级子集缩减
analysis.experiments: 在Erdos-Renyi随机图和11个bnlearn基准网络上验证剪枝效果，并在NHANES观测数据上展示端到端实验选择。
limitations: 方法限于离散设置
剪枝准则依赖因果图结构，可能不适用于复杂图
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在成本约束下选择最优实验子集以收紧部分可识别因果查询边界的方法，证明问题NP-hard，并引入图剪枝准则高效求解。

papers.title: Learning and Reusing Policy Decompositions for Hierarchical Generalized Planning with LLM Agents
papers.abstract: We present a dynamic policy-learning approach that combines generalized planning and hierarchical task decomposition for LLM-based agents. Our method, Hierarchical Component Learning for Generalized Policies (HCL-GP ), learns parameterized policies that generalize across task instances and automatically extracts reusable components from successful executions, organizing them into a component library for compositional policy generation. We address three challenges: (1) learning components through automated decomposition, (2) generalizing components to maximize reuse, and (3) efficient retrieval via semantic search. Evaluated on the AppWorld benchmark, our approach achieves 98.2% accuracy on normal tasks and 97.8% on challenge tasks with unseen applications, improving 15.8 points over static synthesis on challenging scenarios. For open-source models, dynamic reuse enables 62.5% success versus near-zero without reuse. This demonstrates that classical planning concepts can be effectively integrated with LLM agents for improved accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 结合广义规划与层次任务分解，通过动态学习可复用组件库提升LLM Agent在复杂任务中的准确率和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在复杂任务中常因缺乏结构化规划能力而表现不佳，现有方法难以有效复用成功经验，导致泛化性差和效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM Agent自动学习并复用任务分解中的策略组件，以提升在未见任务上的泛化能力和执行效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HCL-GP方法，通过自动层次分解学习参数化策略，提取可复用组件并构建组件库，利用语义搜索高效检索以组合生成新策略。
contributions: 提出动态策略学习方法，结合广义规划与层次分解，实现LLM Agent的组件化策略学习与复用。
在AppWorld基准上达到98.2%正常任务准确率和97.8%挑战任务准确率，开源模型成功率从近零提升至62.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld基准上评估，正常任务准确率98.2%，挑战任务（未见应用）准确率97.8%，相比静态合成提升15.8个百分点；开源模型动态复用成功率达62.5%，而无复用接近零。
limitations: 方法依赖任务分解的自动化和组件库的初始构建，可能对全新领域适应性有限。
语义搜索的检索效率可能随组件库规模增大而下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合广义规划与层次任务分解，通过动态学习可复用组件库提升LLM Agent在复杂任务中的准确率和泛化能力。

papers.title: Multi-Objective Constraint Inference using Inverse reinforcement learning
papers.abstract: Constraint inference is widely considered essential to align reinforcement learning agents with safety boundaries and operational guidelines by observing expert demonstrations. However, existing approaches typically assume homogeneous demonstrations (i.e., generated by a single expert or multiple experts with identical objectives). They also have limited ability to capture individual preferences and often suffer from computational inefficiencies. In this paper, we introduce Multi-Objective Constraint Inference (MOCI), a novel framework designed to jointly extract shared constraints and individual preferences from heterogeneous expert trajectories, where multiple experts pursue different objectives. MOCI effectively models and learns from diverse, and potentially conflicting, behaviors. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that MOCI significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving improved predictive performance, and maintaining competitive computational efficiency on a standard grid-world benchmark. These results establish MOCI as an accurate, flexible, and computationally practical approach for real-world constraint inference and preference learning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOCI框架，从异构专家轨迹中联合推断共享约束和个体偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有约束推断方法通常假设同质演示，无法捕捉个体偏好且计算效率低，难以应用于多目标异构场景。
analysis.problem: 如何从多个具有不同目标的专家轨迹中同时提取共享约束和个体偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Multi-Objective Constraint Inference (MOCI)框架，利用逆强化学习从异构专家轨迹中联合学习共享约束和个体偏好。
contributions: 提出MOCI框架，能够处理异构专家轨迹并同时推断共享约束和个体偏好。
在标准网格世界基准上显著优于现有基线，预测性能提升且保持计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 在标准网格世界基准上进行实验，MOCI在预测性能和计算效率上优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能仅在简单网格世界环境中验证，复杂现实场景效果未知。
未讨论对专家轨迹数量或质量的敏感性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOCI框架，从异构专家轨迹中联合推断共享约束和个体偏好。

papers.title: Self-Programmed Execution for Language-Model Agents
papers.abstract: At the heart of existing language model agents is a fixed orchestrator program responsible for the state transition between consecutive turns. This paper introduces self-programmed execution (SPE), an agent architecture in which the model completion is itself the orchestrator program, and the harness evaluates this program but does not impose its own orchestration policy. I formalize this idea using agentic machines: an SPE state is one from which a model completion can load any state of an embedded copy of the machine, meaning that it is subject to no fixed turn-to-turn orchestration policy. Realizing SPE in practice is nontrivial because the same data is both model context and executable program. I therefore introduce Spell, a Lisp-based language in which programs can edit and re-evaluate themselves, and effectful expressions like model invocations are structured such that re-evaluating an edited program does not replay its side effects. Experiments with existing models, not trained for SPE or Spell, show that frontier models can operate in this regime and accomplish challenging agentic tasks. These results demonstrate how an LM can act as an agent without any fixed orchestration policy, and they raise the question of what self-orchestration strategies might be learned by a model trained for self-programmed execution. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出自编程执行（SPE）架构，让语言模型自身作为编排程序，无需固定策略即可完成复杂智能体任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言模型智能体依赖固定的编排程序来管理状态转换，限制了灵活性和自主性。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型在没有固定编排策略的情况下自主执行智能体任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自编程执行（SPE）架构，并设计基于Lisp的语言Spell，使程序能自编辑和自求值，且模型调用等副作用在重求值时不会重放。
contributions: 提出SPE架构，让模型完成本身作为编排程序。
设计Spell语言支持自修改程序且避免副作用重放。
实验证明前沿模型无需训练即可在SPE模式下完成复杂智能体任务。
analysis.experiments: 使用现有前沿模型（未针对SPE或Spell训练）进行实验，证明能完成挑战性智能体任务。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了现有模型，未训练专门模型。
Spell语言可能增加上下文长度和计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自编程执行（SPE）架构，让语言模型自身作为编排程序，无需固定策略即可完成复杂智能体任务。

papers.title: Mitigating Cognitive Bias in RLHF by Altering Rationality
papers.abstract: How can we make models robust to even imperfect human feedback? In reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), human preferences over model outputs are used to train a reward model that assigns scalar values to responses. Because these rewards are inferred from pairwise comparisons, this learning depends on an assumed relationship between latent reward differences and observed preferences, typically modeled using a Boltzmann formulation in which a rationality parameter beta informs how consistently preferences reflect reward differences. In practice, beta is typically treated as a fixed constant that reflects assumed uniform annotator reliability. However, human feedback is not this simplistic in practice: real human judgments are shaped by cognitive biases, leading to systematic deviations from reward-consistent behavior that arise contextually. To address this, we treat rationality as context- and annotation-dependent. We design an approach to dynamically adjust the rationality parameter beta during reward learning using an LLM-as-judge to assess the likely presence of cognitive biases. This approach effectively downweights comparisons that are likely to reflect biased or unreliable judgments. Empirically, we show that this approach learns a more rational downstream model, even when finetuning on datasets with strongly biased preferences.

analysis.tldr: 通过动态调整理性参数减轻人类反馈中的认知偏差，提升RLHF奖励模型鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: RLHF依赖人类偏好训练奖励模型，但实际人类反馈受认知偏差影响，导致偏好与真实奖励不一致，现有方法将理性参数固定为常数，无法处理这种偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何使RLHF中的奖励学习对存在认知偏差的人类反馈更加鲁棒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类反馈中的认知偏差导致偏好行为偏离基于奖励差异的理性假设，且偏差具有上下文依赖性。
analysis.method: 提出动态调整理性参数β的方法：利用LLM作为裁判评估当前比较中认知偏差的存在概率，据此降低偏差比较的权重。
contributions: 首次将理性参数视为上下文和标注相关的变量，而非固定常数
提出基于LLM-as-judge的动态β调整方法，有效减轻认知偏差影响
analysis.experiments: 在具有强偏差偏好的数据集上微调，显示该方法能学习更理性的下游模型。
limitations: 依赖LLM作为裁判，可能引入额外偏差或计算成本
未在多种偏差类型和实际场景中充分验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过动态调整理性参数减轻人类反馈中的认知偏差，提升RLHF奖励模型鲁棒性。

papers.title: Beyond the Black Box: Interpretability of Agentic AI Tool Use
papers.abstract: AI agents are promising for high-stakes enterprise workflows, but dependable deployment remains limited because tool-use failures are difficult to diagnose and control. Agents may skip required tool calls, invoke tools unnecessarily, or take actions whose consequence becomes visible only after execution. Existing observability methods are mostly external: prompts reveal correlations, evaluations score outputs, and logs arrive only after the model has already acted. In long-horizon settings, these failures are especially costly because an early tool mistake can alter the rest of the trajectory, increase token consumption, and create downstream safety and security risk. We introduce a mechanistic-interpretability toolkit built on Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) and linear probes. The framework reads model states before each action and infers both whether a tool is needed and how consequential the next tool action is likely to be. By decomposing activations into sparse features, it identifies the internal layers and features most associated with tool decisions and tests their functional importance through feature ablation. We train the probes on multi-step trajectories from the NVIDIA Nemotron function-calling dataset and apply the same workflow to GPT-OSS 20B and Gemma 3 27B models. The goal is not to replace external evaluation, but to add a missing layer: visibility into what the model signaled internally before action. This helps surface deeper causes of agent failure, especially in long-horizon runs where an early mistake can reshape the rest of the agentic interaction. More broadly, the paper shows how mechanistic interpretability can support practical internal observability for monitoring tool calls and risk in agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于稀疏自编码器和线性探针的机制可解释性工具，用于诊断AI智能体工具调用失败。
analysis.research_motivation: AI智能体在企业工作流中工具调用失败难以诊断和控制，现有外部观测方法（提示、评估、日志）无法提供内部可见性，尤其在长周期任务中早期错误会级联放大成本和安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何通过内部模型状态分析，在工具调用前预测是否需要工具以及调用后果的严重性，从而诊断智能体工具使用失败的根本原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体可能跳过必要工具调用、不必要地调用工具或执行后果不可见的操作；早期工具错误会改变后续轨迹、增加token消耗并带来安全风险。
analysis.method: 基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）和线性探针的机制可解释性工具：在每次动作前读取模型状态，推断是否需要工具及工具调用的后果严重性；通过特征消融测试特征的功能重要性。
contributions: 提出一种基于SAE和线性探针的框架，用于内部观测智能体工具调用决策。
在NVIDIA Nemotron函数调用数据集上训练探针，并应用于GPT-OSS 20B和Gemma 3 27B模型，展示了跨模型的可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定函数调用数据集和有限模型规模。
特征消融的因果性验证可能受限于模型架构差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于稀疏自编码器和线性探针的机制可解释性工具，用于诊断AI智能体工具调用失败。

papers.title: How Well Do LLMs Perform on the Simplest Long-Chain Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study on the Equivalence Class Problem
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved great improvements in recent years. Nevertheless, it still remains unclear how good LLMs are for reasoning tasks, especially for long-chain ones. In this paper, we evaluate LLMs' performance on the simplest yet long-chain reasoning task, namely the Equivalence Class Problem (ECP), i.e., determining whether two variables are equal given a set of randomly generated equivalence relations. We consider both reasoning and non-reasoning representative LLMs over a large variety of problem instances, ranging over different numbers of variables, connectivity probabilities, prompts, and other factors. The experimental results show that non-reasoning LLMs fail ECP, while reasoning models are significantly better but still struggle to completely solve this problem. Interestingly, considering various connectivity probabilities with a fixed number of variables, we observe that, for non-reasoning models, the hardest problem instances coincide with the phase transition point of ln n/(n-1), suggesting the chaos of the problem; in contrast, for reasoning models, the hardest ones coincide with the biggest diameter, suggesting the reasoning difficulty of the problem.

analysis.tldr: LLM在简单长链推理任务（等价类问题）上表现不佳，推理模型优于非推理模型但仍未完全解决。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管LLM在推理任务上取得进展，但其在长链推理上的能力仍不明确，需要系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在等价类问题（ECP）这一简单但长链的推理任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非推理模型在ECP上失败；推理模型显著更好但仍困难。非推理模型的最难实例对应相变点ln n/(n-1)，推理模型的最难实例对应最大直径。
analysis.method: 设计等价类问题（ECP）作为基准，系统变化变量数量、连接概率、提示等因子，评估多种推理和非推理LLM。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM在等价类问题上的长链推理能力
发现非推理模型和推理模型在困难实例上的不同模式
analysis.experiments: 在多种变量数量、连接概率、提示等条件下测试了多个推理和非推理LLM。
limitations: 仅针对等价类问题，可能不泛化到其他长链推理任务
未提供具体模型名称和性能数值
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在简单长链推理任务（等价类问题）上表现不佳，推理模型优于非推理模型但仍未完全解决。

papers.title: Agentick: A Unified Benchmark for General Sequential Decision-Making Agents
papers.abstract: AI agent research spans a wide spectrum: from RL agents that learn from scratch to foundation model agents that leverage pre-trained knowledge, yet no unified benchmark enables fair comparison across these approaches. We present Agentick, a benchmark for sequential decision-making agents designed to evaluate RL, LLM, VLM, hybrid, and human agents on common ground and to power research on the fundamental challenges of sequential decision-making. Agentick provides 37 procedurally generated tasks across six capability categories, four difficulty levels, and five observation modalities, all exposed through a single Gymnasium-compatible interface. The benchmark ships with a Coding API, oracle reference policies for all tasks, pre-built SFT datasets, a composable agent harness, and a live leaderboard. An evaluation spanning 27 configurations and over 90,000 episodes reveals that no single approach dominates: GPT-5 mini leads overall at 0.309 oracle-normalized score while PPO dominates planning and multi-agent tasks; the reasoning harness multiplies LLM performance by 3-10x; and ASCII observations consistently outperform natural language. These findings highlight the substantial room for improvement that remains across all agent paradigms. Agentick's capability-decomposed, multi-modal design provides the empirical infrastructure needed to drive progress toward general autonomous agents, both as an evaluation framework and as a training ground for RL post-training of foundation models in truly sequential environments.

analysis.tldr: Agentick 是一个统一的基准，用于公平比较 RL、LLM、VLM 等不同范式的顺序决策智能体。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 智能体研究涵盖从 RL 到基础模型等多种方法，但缺乏统一基准来公平比较这些不同范式，阻碍了通用自主智能体的发展。
analysis.problem: 现有基准无法在共同基础上评估 RL、LLM、VLM、混合和人类智能体，且缺乏对顺序决策基本挑战的系统性研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Agentick 基准包含 37 个程序化生成的任务，覆盖 6 个能力类别、4 个难度级别和 5 种观察模态，通过统一的 Gymnasium 兼容接口暴露，并提供 Coding API、参考策略、SFT 数据集、可组合智能体框架和实时排行榜。
contributions: 提出了 Agentick，一个统一的顺序决策智能体基准，支持 RL、LLM、VLM、混合和人类智能体的公平比较。
提供了 37 个程序化生成的任务、多种观察模态、参考策略和预构建 SFT 数据集，以及实时排行榜。
analysis.experiments: 在 27 种配置和超过 90,000 个 episode 上的评估显示，没有单一方法占主导：GPT-5 mini 以 0.309 的归一化分数领先，PPO 在规划和多智能体任务中占优，推理框架将 LLM 性能提升 3-10 倍，ASCII 观察始终优于自然语言。
limitations: 基准任务可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的复杂性。
评估主要基于程序化生成的任务，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agentick 是一个统一的基准，用于公平比较 RL、LLM、VLM 等不同范式的顺序决策智能体。

papers.title: AGWM: Affordance-Grounded World Models for Environments with Compositional Prerequisites
papers.abstract: In model-based learning, the agent learns behaviors by simulating trajectories based on world model predictions. Standard world models typically learn a stationary transition function that maps states and actions to next states, when an action and an outcome frequently co-occur in training data, the model tends to internalize this correlation as a general causal rule while ignoring action preconditions. In interactive environments, however, agent actions can reshape the future affordance space. At each timestep, an action may becomes executable only after its prerequisites are met, or non-executable when they are destroyed. We term such events structure-changing events (SC events). As a result, a conventional world model often fails to determine whether a given action is executable in the current state, especially in multi-step predictions. Each imagined step is conditioned on an incorrect affordance state, and therefore the prediction error compounds over the rollout horizon. In this paper, we propose AGWM (Affordance-Grounded World Model), which learns an abstract affordance structure represented as a DAG of prerequisite dependencies to explicitly track the dynamic executability of actions. Experiments on game-based simulated environments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by achieving lower multi-step prediction error, better generalization to novel configurations, and improved interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于可执行性图结构的世界模型，解决动作前提条件变化导致的预测误差累积问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准世界模型假设状态转移是平稳的，但在交互环境中动作的可执行性会动态变化（如前提条件满足后才可执行），导致多步预测误差累积。
analysis.problem: 传统世界模型无法准确判断动作在当前状态下的可执行性，尤其在多步预测中因忽略动作前提条件而失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当动作与结果频繁共现时，模型会将其内化为因果规则而忽略前提条件；结构改变事件（SC events）使动作可执行性动态变化，导致预测误差随规划步长累积。
analysis.method: 学习一个抽象的可执行性结构，表示为前提依赖关系的有向无环图（DAG），显式追踪动作的动态可执行性。
contributions: 提出AGWM框架，通过可执行性图结构显式建模动作前提条件。
在游戏模拟环境中实现更低的多步预测误差、更好的泛化性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在基于游戏的模拟环境中进行实验，验证了方法在多步预测误差、泛化到新配置和可解释性方面的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖环境可执行性结构的可观测性。
DAG学习可能在大规模动作空间下扩展性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于可执行性图结构的世界模型，解决动作前提条件变化导致的预测误差累积问题。

papers.title: Extracting Search Trees from LLM Reasoning Traces Reveals Myopic Planning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs), especially reasoning models, generate extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that often contains explicit deliberation over future outcomes. Yet whether this deliberation constitutes genuine planning, how it is structured, and what aspects of it drive performance remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a new method to characterize LLM planning by extracting and quantifying search trees from reasoning traces in the four-in-a-row board game. By fitting computational models on the extracted search trees, we characterize how plans are structured and how they influence move decisions. We find that LLMs' search is shallower than humans', and that performance is predicted by search breadth rather than depth. Most strikingly, although LLMs expand deep nodes in their traces, their move choices are best explained by a myopic model that ignores those nodes entirely. A causal intervention study where we selectively prune CoT paragraphs further suggests that move selection is driven predominantly by shallow rather than deep nodes. These patterns contrast with human planning, where performance is driven primarily by deep search. Together, our findings reveal a key difference between LLM and human planning: while human expertise is driven by deeper search, LLMs do not act on deep lookahead. This dissociation offers targeted guidance for aligning LLM and human planning. More broadly, our framework provides a generalizable approach for interpreting the structure of LLM planning across strategic domains.

analysis.tldr: 通过从LLM推理轨迹中提取搜索树，发现LLM的规划是短视的，其决策主要由浅层搜索驱动，而非深层搜索。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管LLM在推理中表现出对未来结果的显式思考，但这种思考是否构成真正的规划、其结构如何以及哪些方面驱动性能仍不清楚，理解这些差异对于对齐LLM与人类规划至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何表征和量化LLM在推理过程中的规划结构，并揭示其与人类规划的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM的搜索比人类更浅，性能由搜索广度而非深度预测；虽然LLM在推理轨迹中扩展了深层节点，但移动选择主要由忽略深层节点的短视模型解释；因果干预实验进一步表明移动选择主要由浅层节点驱动。
analysis.method: 从LLM在四子棋游戏中的推理轨迹中提取搜索树，并通过拟合计算模型来表征规划结构及其对决策的影响，同时进行因果干预实验（选择性剪枝CoT段落）。
contributions: 提出一种从LLM推理轨迹中提取和量化搜索树的新方法，用于表征规划结构。
发现LLM规划是短视的，其决策主要由浅层搜索驱动，与人类深层驱动的规划形成对比。
analysis.experiments: 在四子棋游戏中，通过提取搜索树、拟合计算模型和因果干预实验，比较了LLM与人类规划的行为差异。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 研究仅限于四子棋游戏，可能无法推广到其他更复杂的规划任务。
搜索树提取方法可能依赖于推理轨迹的显式结构，对于隐式规划可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过从LLM推理轨迹中提取搜索树，发现LLM的规划是短视的，其决策主要由浅层搜索驱动，而非深层搜索。

papers.title: Randomness is sometimes necessary for coordination
papers.abstract: Full parameter sharing is standard in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for homogeneous agents. Under permutation-symmetric observations, however, a shared deterministic policy outputs identical action distributions for every agent, making role differentiation impossible. This failure can theoretically be resolved using symmetry breaking among anonymous identical processors, which requires randomness. We propose Diamond Attention, a cross-attention architecture in which each agent samples a scalar random number per timestep, inducing a transient rank ordering that masks lower-ranked peers from agent-to-agent attention while leaving task attention fully unmasked. This realizes a random-bit coordination protocol in a single broadcast round, and the set-based attention enables zero-shot deployment to teams of different sizes. We evaluate across three regimes that isolate when structured randomness matters. On the perfectly symmetric XOR game, our method achieves $1.0$ success while all deterministic baselines plateau near $0.5$. On control coordination tasks, a policy trained on $N=4$ generalizes zero-shot to $N \in [2,8]$. On SMACLite cross-scenario transfer, we achieve zero-shot transfer where standard baselines cannot transfer due to structural limitations. Furthermore, replacing the structured mask with standard dropout-based randomness results in a 0\% win rate, confirming that protocol-space structure, not stochastic noise, is the operative ingredient. this https URL

analysis.tldr: 在对称多智能体系统中，引入结构化随机性（Diamond Attention）实现角色分化与协调，显著优于确定性策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准参数共享策略在对称观测下无法区分角色，导致协调失败，而现有方法缺乏有效的对称破缺机制。
analysis.problem: 解决同质智能体在置换对称观测下因确定性策略输出相同动作分布而无法实现角色分化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，共享确定性策略在对称环境下无法区分角色，而随机性（如随机数排序）可打破对称性，且结构化随机性（而非随机噪声）是关键。
analysis.method: 提出Diamond Attention，一种交叉注意力架构，每个智能体每步采样一个随机数，产生临时排序，屏蔽低排名智能体的注意力，实现单轮广播协调协议。
contributions: 提出Diamond Attention，利用随机数排序实现对称破缺，使同质智能体在对称观测下完成角色分化。
在XOR游戏、控制协调任务和SMACLite跨场景迁移中实现零样本泛化，且结构化随机性优于标准dropout。
analysis.experiments: 在XOR游戏上达到1.0成功率（确定性基线约0.5）；控制任务上N=4训练零样本泛化至N∈[2,8]；SMACLite跨场景零样本迁移成功，标准基线因结构限制失败。
limitations: 随机数排序可能引入额外计算开销。
方法依赖单轮广播，可能不适用于需要多轮通信的复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在对称多智能体系统中，引入结构化随机性（Diamond Attention）实现角色分化与协调，显著优于确定性策略。

papers.title: Towards Security-Auditable LLM Agents: A Unified Graph Representation
papers.abstract: LLM-based agentic systems are rapidly evolving to perform complex autonomous tasks through dynamic tool invocation, stateful memory management, and multi-agent collaboration. However, this semantics-driven execution paradigm creates a severe semantic gap between low-level physical events and high-level execution intent, making post-hoc security auditing fundamentally difficult. Existing representation mechanisms, including static SBOMs and runtime logs, provide only fragmented evidence and fail to capture cognitive-state evolution, capability bindings, persistent memory contamination, and cascading risk propagation across interacting agents. To bridge this gap, we propose Agent-BOM, a unified structural representation for agent security auditing. Agent-BOM models an agentic system as a hierarchical attributed directed graph that separates static capability bases, such as models, tools, and long-term memory, from dynamic runtime semantic states, such as goals, reasoning trajectories, and actions. These layers are connected through semantic edges and security attributes, transforming fragmented execution traces into queryable audit paths. Building on Agent-BOM, we develop a graph-query-based paradigm for path-level risk assessment and instantiate it with the OWASP Agentic Top 10. We further implement an auditing plugin in the OpenClaw environment to construct Agent-BOM from live executions. Evaluation on representative real-world agentic attack scenarios shows that Agent-BOM can reconstruct stealthy attack chains, including cross-session memory poisoning and tool misuse, capability supply-chain hijacking and unexpected code execution, multi-agent ecosystem hijacking, and privilege and trust abuse. These results demonstrate that Agent-BOM provides a unified and auditable foundation for root-cause analysis and security adjudication in complex agentic ecosystems.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agent-BOM，一种统一图表示方法，用于LLM智能体系统的安全审计，能够重构隐蔽攻击链。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体系统执行复杂自主任务时，语义驱动的执行范式导致低级物理事件与高级执行意图之间存在严重语义鸿沟，现有表示机制（如静态SBOM和运行时日志）仅提供碎片化证据，无法捕获认知状态演化、能力绑定、持久内存污染及跨智能体级联风险传播，使得事后安全审计极为困难。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一种统一的结构化表示，能够桥接低级事件与高级意图，支持对LLM智能体系统进行可查询、可追溯的安全审计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agent-BOM，一种层次化属性有向图，将静态能力基础（模型、工具、长期记忆）与动态运行时语义状态（目标、推理轨迹、动作）分离，通过语义边和安全属性连接，将碎片化执行轨迹转化为可查询的审计路径；并基于图查询范式实现路径级风险评估，实例化OWASP Agentic Top 10。
contributions: 提出Agent-BOM，一种统一的结构化图表示，用于LLM智能体系统的安全审计。
开发基于图查询的路径级风险评估方法，并实例化OWASP Agentic Top 10。
在OpenClaw环境中实现审计插件，从实时执行构建Agent-BOM，并在真实攻击场景中验证其重构隐蔽攻击链的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性真实世界智能体攻击场景上评估，包括跨会话内存投毒、工具滥用、能力供应链劫持、意外代码执行、多智能体生态系统劫持以及权限与信任滥用，结果显示Agent-BOM能够重构这些隐蔽攻击链。
limitations: 可能依赖OpenClaw环境，泛化性需进一步验证。
图构建和查询的计算开销在大型系统中可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agent-BOM，一种统一图表示方法，用于LLM智能体系统的安全审计，能够重构隐蔽攻击链。

papers.title: When Does Critique Improve AI-Assisted Theoretical Physics? SCALAR: Structured Critic--Actor Loop for Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) show increasing promise on research-level physics reasoning tasks and agentic AI becomes more common, a practical question emerges: How does the interaction between researchers and agents affect the results? We study this using SCALAR (Structured Critic--Actor Loop for AI Reasoning), an Actor--Critic--Judge pipeline applied to quantum field theory and string theory problems. The Actor proposes solutions, the Critic provides iterative feedback, and an independent Judge evaluates the transcript against reference solutions. We vary the Actor persona, the Critic feedback strategy, and the Actor model family and scale. Multi-turn dialogue improves over single-shot attempts throughout, but both the mechanism of improvement and the value of different prompting choices depend strongly on the Actor--Critic pairing. Increasing the scale within one model family (e.g. from the 8B-parameter DeepSeek-R1 variant to DeepSeek-R1 70B) improves some easier-problem behavior, but does not remove the hardest bottleneck we observe. Critic feedback strategy matters most clearly in the asymmetric Actor--Critic setting (e.g., a lightweight Haiku Actor guided by a stronger Sonnet Critic), where constructive feedback improves mean-score outcomes. In same-family Actor--Critic settings, strategy effects are weaker: lenient feedback is sometimes favored, while strict and adversarial feedback are not beneficial. Taken together, SCALAR provides a controlled testbed for evaluating which interaction structures help or hinder AI-driven scientific discovery.

analysis.tldr: SCALAR框架研究AI辅助理论物理中批评反馈如何影响推理性能，发现Actor-Critic配对和反馈策略是关键因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM在物理推理任务中表现提升，研究者与AI Agent的交互方式对结果的影响尚不明确，需要系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和优化AI Agent在理论物理问题中的交互结构（特别是批评反馈机制）以提升推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮对话优于单次尝试；模型规模提升仅改善简单问题，无法消除最难瓶颈；批评反馈策略在非对称Actor-Critic设置中效果显著，在同族设置中效果较弱。
analysis.method: SCALAR框架：Actor-Critic-Judge流水线，Actor提出解答，Critic提供迭代反馈，Judge独立评估。
contributions: 提出SCALAR框架作为评估AI驱动科学发现中交互结构的受控测试平台
系统分析Actor角色、Critic反馈策略和模型规模对理论物理推理性能的影响
analysis.experiments: 在量子场论和弦论问题上进行实验，变化Actor角色、Critic反馈策略和模型家族/规模。
limitations: 仅针对理论物理领域，泛化性未知
未涉及更复杂的多Agent协作或人类介入场景
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCALAR框架研究AI辅助理论物理中批评反馈如何影响推理性能，发现Actor-Critic配对和反馈策略是关键因素。

papers.title: When Does a Language Model Commit? A Finite-Answer Theory of Pre-Verbalization Commitment
papers.abstract: Language models often generate reasoning before giving a final answer, but the visible answer does not reveal when the model's answer preference became stable. We study this question through a narrow computable object: \emph{finite-answer preference stabilization}. For a model state and specified answer verbalizers, we project the model's own continuation probabilities onto a finite answer set; in binary tasks this yields an exact log-odds code, $\delta(\xi)=S_\theta(\mathrm{yes}\mid\xi)-S_\theta(\mathrm{no}\mid\xi)$. This target defines parser-based answer onset, retrospective stabilization time, and lead without relying on greedy rollouts or learned probes. In controlled delayed-verdict tasks with Qwen3-4B-Instruct, the contextual finite-answer projection stabilizes before the answer is parseable, with 17--31 token mean lead in the main templates and positive, shorter lead in a parser-clean replication. The signal tracks the model's eventual output rather than truth, is linearly recoverable from compact hidden summaries, is partly separable from cursor progress, and transfers as shared information without a single invariant coordinate. Diagnostics separate the measurement from online stopping, verbalizer-free belief, and causal answer control; exact steering shows local sensitivity of $\delta$ but not reliable generation control.

analysis.tldr: 提出有限答案偏好稳定化理论，通过投影续生概率到有限答案集来检测语言模型何时形成答案偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型在给出最终答案前常生成推理过程，但可见答案无法揭示模型何时稳定了答案偏好。理解这一时间点对模型行为分析和可解释性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖贪婪解码或学习探针的情况下，精确检测语言模型在生成过程中何时对有限答案集形成稳定偏好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在延迟裁决任务中，有限答案投影在答案可解析之前就已稳定，平均领先17-31个token；该信号追踪模型最终输出而非事实，可从紧凑隐藏状态中线性恢复，部分独立于光标进度，并作为共享信息传递。
analysis.method: 定义有限答案偏好稳定化，通过将模型续生概率投影到有限答案集（如二元任务中的log-odds编码δ(ξ)）来定义解析器答案起始点、回顾性稳定时间和领先量。
contributions: 提出有限答案偏好稳定化的形式化定义和计算方法，无需贪婪解码或学习探针。
在Qwen3-4B-Instruct上实验验证了偏好稳定早于答案可解析，并分析了信号特性。
analysis.experiments: 在受控延迟裁决任务中使用Qwen3-4B-Instruct，报告了平均领先17-31 token，以及正领先的解析器干净复制实验。
limitations: 仅针对有限答案集（如二元任务），扩展性有限。
精确答案控制（steering）显示局部敏感性但不可靠，实际应用受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出有限答案偏好稳定化理论，通过投影续生概率到有限答案集来检测语言模型何时形成答案偏好。

papers.title: From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have fundamentally reshaped artificial intelligence by integrating external tools and planning capabilities. While memory mechanisms have emerged as the architectural cornerstone of these systems, current research remains fragmented, oscillating between operating system engineering and cognitive science. This theoretical divide prevents a unified view of technological synthesis and a coherent evolutionary perspective. To bridge this gap, this survey proposes a novel evolutionary framework for LLM agent memory mechanisms, formalizing the development process into three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (trajectory refinement), and Experience (trajectory abstraction). We first formally define these three stages before analyzing the three core drivers of this evolution: the necessity for long-range consistency, the challenges in dynamic environments, and the ultimate goal of continual learning. Furthermore, we specifically explore two transformative mechanisms in the frontier Experience stage: proactive exploration and cross-trajectory abstraction. By synthesizing these disparate views, this work offers robust design principles and a clear roadmap for the development of next-generation LLM agents.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM智能体记忆机制从存储到经验的演化三阶段框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM智能体记忆研究在操作系统工程与认知科学之间碎片化，缺乏统一视角和演化脉络，阻碍技术整合与下一代系统设计。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化梳理并形式化LLM智能体记忆机制的发展路径，弥合不同研究视角之间的理论鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段演化框架：存储（轨迹保存）、反思（轨迹精炼）、经验（轨迹抽象），并分析长程一致性、动态环境挑战、持续学习目标三大驱动力，重点探讨经验阶段的前瞻探索与跨轨迹抽象机制。
contributions: 首次提出LLM智能体记忆机制的三阶段演化框架（存储→反思→经验），提供统一视角。
识别并分析了驱动记忆演化的三个核心因素：长程一致性、动态环境挑战、持续学习目标。
深入探讨了经验阶段的前瞻探索与跨轨迹抽象两种变革性机制，为下一代智能体设计提供原则与路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提供实证验证或定量比较。
框架的通用性和可操作性需在具体系统中进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述LLM智能体记忆机制从存储到经验的演化三阶段框架。

papers.title: CASCADE: Case-Based Continual Adaptation for Large Language Models During Deployment
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become a central foundation of modern artificial intelligence, yet their lifecycle remains constrained by a rigid separation between training and deployment, after which learning effectively ceases. This limitation contrasts with natural intelligence, which continually adapts through interaction with its environment. In this paper, we formalise deployment-time learning (DTL) as the third stage in the LLM lifecycle that enables LLM agents to improve from experience during deployment without modifying model parameters. We present CASCADE (CASe-based Continual Adaptation during DEployment), a general and principled framework that equips LLM agents with an explicit, evolving episodic memory. CASCADE formulates experience reuse as a contextual bandit problem, enabling principled exploration-exploitation trade-offs and establishing no-regret guarantees over long-term interactions. This design allows agents to accumulate, select, and refine task-relevant cases, transforming past experience into actionable knowledge. Across 16 diverse tasks spanning medical diagnosis, legal analysis, code generation, web search, tool use, and embodied interaction, CASCADE improves macro-averaged success rate by 20.9% over zero-shot prompting while consistently outperforming gradient-based and memory-based baselines. By reframing deployment as an adaptive learning process, this work establishes a foundation for continually improving AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出CASCADE框架，通过案例式持续适应让LLM在部署阶段无需修改参数即可从经验中学习，在16个任务上平均提升20.9%成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM生命周期中训练与部署严格分离，部署后学习停止，这与自然智能的持续适应能力形成对比，限制了LLM在动态环境中的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何在部署阶段让LLM无需修改参数即可从交互经验中持续改进，实现部署时学习（DTL）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CASCADE框架：为LLM代理配备显式、演化的情景记忆，将经验重用形式化为上下文赌博机问题，实现探索-利用权衡并保证无遗憾，从而积累、选择和精炼任务相关案例。
contributions: 形式化部署时学习（DTL）作为LLM生命周期的第三阶段。
提出CASCADE框架，结合情景记忆与上下文赌博机，提供理论保证。
在16个多样化任务上验证有效性，平均成功率提升20.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在16个任务（医疗诊断、法律分析、代码生成、网络搜索、工具使用、具身交互）上评估，CASCADE相比零样本提示提升20.9%宏平均成功率，并持续优于基于梯度和基于记忆的基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始案例库。
上下文赌博机假设可能不适用于所有复杂任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CASCADE框架，通过案例式持续适应让LLM在部署阶段无需修改参数即可从经验中学习，在16个任务上平均提升20.9%成功率。

papers.title: Hidden Coalitions in Multi-Agent AI: A Spectral Diagnostic from Internal Representations
papers.abstract: Collections of interacting AI agents can form coalitions, creating emergent group-level organization that is critical for AI safety and alignment. However, observing agent behavior alone is often insufficient to distinguish genuine informational coupling from spurious similarity, as consequential coalitions may form at the level of internal representations before any overt behavioral change is apparent. Here, we introduce a practical method for detecting coalition structure from the internal neural representations of multi-agent systems. The approach constructs a pairwise mutual-information graph from the hidden states of agents and applies spectral partitioning to identify the most salient coalition boundary. We validate this method in two domains. First, in multi-agent reinforcement learning environments, the method successfully recovers programmed hierarchical and dynamic coalition structures and correctly rejects false positives arising from behavioral coordination without informational coupling. Second, using a large language model, the method identifies coalition structures implied by descriptive prompts, tracks dynamic team reassignments, and reveals a representational hierarchy where explicit labels dominate over conflicting interaction patterns. Across both settings, the recovered partition reveals subgroup organization that a scalar cross-agent mutual-information measure cannot distinguish. The results demonstrate that analyzing hidden-state mutual information through spectral partitioning provides a scalable diagnostic for identifying representational coalitions, offering a valuable tool for monitoring emergent structure in distributed AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 通过谱划分多智能体内部表示的互信息图，可检测隐藏的联盟结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统中可能形成隐藏的联盟，这对AI安全与对齐至关重要，但仅观察行为无法区分真正的信息耦合与虚假相似性，因为联盟可能在内部表示层面形成而行为尚未变化。
analysis.problem: 如何从多智能体系统的内部神经表示中检测联盟结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建智能体隐藏状态的成对互信息图，并应用谱划分识别最显著的联盟边界。
contributions: 提出一种基于谱划分的实用方法，从多智能体系统的内部表示中检测联盟结构。
在多智能体强化学习和大型语言模型两个领域验证了方法的有效性，能正确恢复已知结构并拒绝假阳性。
analysis.experiments: 在多智能体强化学习环境中，方法成功恢复编程的层次和动态联盟结构，并正确拒绝行为协调但无信息耦合的假阳性；在大型语言模型中，方法识别出描述性提示隐含的联盟结构，跟踪动态团队重组，并揭示表示层次中显式标签主导冲突交互模式。
limitations: 可能依赖于智能体隐藏状态的可获取性。
谱划分的阈值选择可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过谱划分多智能体内部表示的互信息图，可检测隐藏的联盟结构。

papers.title: State Representation and Termination for Recursive Reasoning Systems
papers.abstract: Recursive reasoning systems alternate between acquiring new evidence and refining an accumulated understanding. Two design choices are typically left implicit: how to represent the evolving reasoning state, and when to stop iterating. This paper addresses both. We represent the reasoning state as an epistemic state graph encoding extracted claims, evidential relations, open questions, and confidence weights. We define the order-gap as the distance between the states reached by expand-then-consolidate versus consolidate-then-expand; a small order-gap suggests that the two orderings agree and further iteration is unlikely to help. Our main result gives a necessary and sufficient condition for the linearised order-gap to be non-degenerate near the fixed point, showing when the criterion is informative rather than algebraically vacuous. This is a local condition, not a global convergence guarantee. We apply the framework to recursive reasoning systems and sketch its application to agent loops, tree-of-thought reasoning, theorem proving, and continual learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出用认知状态图表示递归推理状态，并基于序间隙定义终止条件。
analysis.research_motivation: 递归推理系统通常隐式处理状态表示和终止条件，缺乏形式化框架，导致设计不明确且难以分析。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化表示递归推理中的演化状态，并确定何时停止迭代。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将推理状态表示为认知状态图，包含提取的声明、证据关系、开放问题和置信权重；定义序间隙（order-gap）作为两种扩展-整合顺序下状态之间的距离，并给出序间隙在不动点附近非退化的充要条件。
contributions: 提出用认知状态图表示递归推理状态的形式化方法。
定义序间隙作为终止判据，并给出其非退化的充要条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 终止条件是局部而非全局收敛保证。
应用部分仅为草图，缺乏实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用认知状态图表示递归推理状态，并基于序间隙定义终止条件。

papers.title: Fast and Effective Redistricting Optimization via Composite-Move Tabu Search
papers.abstract: Spatial redistricting is a practical combinatorial optimization problem that demands high-quality solutions, rapid turnaround, and flexibility to accommodate multi-criteria objectives and interactive refinement. A central challenge is the contiguity constraint: enforcing contiguity in integer-programming or heuristic search can severely shrink the feasible neighborhood, weaken exploration, and trap the search in poor local optima. We introduce a composite-move Tabu search (CM-Tabu) that systematically expands the feasible neighborhood space in Tabu search while preserving contiguity. When a boundary unit cannot be reassigned individually without disconnecting its district, our method identifies a minimal set of units that can move together, or a pair of units (or sets of units) that can be switched, as a contiguity-preserving composite move. Candidate single-unit and composite moves are generated in linear time by analyzing each district's contiguity graph using articulation points and biconnected components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach substantially improves solution quality, run-to-run robustness, and computational efficiency relative to traditional Tabu search and other baselines. For example, in the Philadelphia case, the approach can consistently attain the theoretical global optimum in population-equality and support multi-criteria trade-offs. CM-Tabu delivers optimization performance suitable for real-world practices and decision-support workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu）以解决空间重划中的连通性约束问题，显著提升解质量和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间重划是实际组合优化问题，需要高质量解、快速周转和灵活性，但连通性约束严重缩小可行邻域，导致搜索陷入局部最优。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持连通性的前提下扩大禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间，避免搜索陷入局部最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，强制连通性约束会严重缩小可行邻域，削弱探索能力，使搜索陷入较差的局部最优。
analysis.method: 提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu），通过识别可一起移动的最小单元集或可交换的单元对，生成保持连通性的复合移动，并利用关节点和双连通分量在线性时间内生成候选移动。
contributions: 提出一种系统性的复合移动机制，在保持连通性的同时扩大禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间。
通过分析连通图的关节点和双连通分量，实现线性时间生成候选单单元和复合移动。
analysis.experiments: 在多个案例（如费城）上进行实验，表明该方法在解质量、运行间鲁棒性和计算效率上显著优于传统禁忌搜索和其他基线，在费城案例中能一致达到人口平等的理论全局最优。
limitations: 可能对大规模问题计算开销较高，尽管线性时间生成移动。
复合移动的识别依赖于图结构，对于复杂约束可能需扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu）以解决空间重划中的连通性约束问题，显著提升解质量和效率。

papers.title: More Thinking, More Bias: Length-Driven Position Bias in Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and reasoning-tuned models such as DeepSeek-R1 are commonly assumed to reduce shallow heuristic biases by thinking carefully. We test this on position bias in multiple-choice QA and find a different story: within any reasoning-capable model, per-question position bias scales with the length of the reasoning trajectory. Across thirteen reasoning-mode configurations (two R1-distilled 7-8B models, two base models prompted with CoT, and DeepSeek-R1 at 671B) on MMLU, ARC-Challenge, and GPQA, twelve show a positive partial correlation between trajectory length and Position Bias Score (PBS) after controlling for accuracy, ranging from 0.11 to 0.41 (all p < 0.05). All twelve open-weight reasoning-mode configurations show monotonically increasing PBS across length quartiles. A truncation intervention provides causal evidence: continuations resumed from later points in the trajectory are increasingly likely to shift toward position-preferred options (16% to 32% for R1-Qwen-7B across absolute-position buckets). At 671B, aggregate PBS collapses to 0.019, but the length effect still manifests in the longest quartile (PBS = 0.071), suggesting that accuracy gates the expression of length-driven bias rather than eliminating the underlying mechanism. We additionally find that direct-answer position bias is a distinct phenomenon with a different footprint (strong in Llama-Instruct-direct, weak in Qwen-Instruct-direct, and uncorrelated with trajectory length): CoT reasoning replaces this baseline bias with length-accumulated bias. Our results argue that reasoning-capable models should not be treated as order-robust by default in MCQ evaluation pipelines, and offer a diagnostic toolkit (PBS, commitment change point, effective switching, truncation probes) for auditing position bias in reasoning models.

analysis.tldr: 推理模型在多项选择问答中，推理轨迹越长，位置偏差越大，截断实验表明因果效应存在。
analysis.research_motivation: 链式推理和推理调优模型通常被认为能减少浅层启发式偏差，但位置偏差在推理模型中是否真的被缓解尚不清楚，且现有评估流程默认模型对选项顺序鲁棒，可能掩盖偏差。
analysis.problem: 研究推理模型中推理轨迹长度与位置偏差之间的关系，并验证其因果性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在13种推理模式配置中，12种显示轨迹长度与位置偏差分数（PBS）呈正偏相关（0.11-0.41，p<0.05），且PBS随长度四分位数单调递增；截断干预表明从轨迹后期恢复的续写更倾向于选择位置偏好选项（16%到32%）；671B模型整体PBS降至0.019，但最长四分位数仍显示偏差（0.071），表明准确率门控而非消除偏差。
analysis.method: 通过控制准确率后的偏相关分析、长度四分位数单调性检验、截断干预实验（从不同绝对位置恢复续写）来测量位置偏差，并引入PBS、承诺变化点、有效切换、截断探针等诊断工具。
contributions: 发现推理模型中的位置偏差随推理轨迹长度增加而增大，且具有因果性。
提出一套诊断工具（PBS、承诺变化点、有效切换、截断探针）用于审计推理模型的位置偏差。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU、ARC-Challenge、GPQA上测试13种推理模式配置（包括R1蒸馏7-8B模型、基础模型+CoT、DeepSeek-R1 671B），12种显示正偏相关，所有12种开源模型显示单调递增，截断干预在R1-Qwen-7B上验证因果效应。
limitations: 仅针对多项选择问答中的位置偏差，其他偏差类型未涉及。
实验限于特定模型和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 推理模型在多项选择问答中，推理轨迹越长，位置偏差越大，截断实验表明因果效应存在。

papers.title: GraphDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Multi-Agent System for Scalable Graph Algorithm Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential for many mathematical problems. However, their performance on graph algorithmic tasks is still unsatisfying, since graphs are naturally more complex in topology and often require systematic multi-step reasoning, especially on larger graphs. Motivated by this gap, we propose GraphDC, a Divide-and-Conquer multi-agent framework for scalable graph algorithm reasoning. Specifically, inspired by Divide-and-Conquer design, GraphDC decomposes an input graph into smaller subgraphs, assigns each subgraph to a specialized agent for local reasoning, and uses a master agent to integrate the local outputs with inter-subgraph information to produce the final solution. This hierarchical design reduces the reasoning burden on individual agents, alleviates computational bottlenecks, and improves robustness on large graph instances. Extensive experiments show that GraphDC consistently outperforms existing methods on graph algorithm reasoning across diverse tasks and scales, especially on larger instances where direct end-to-end reasoning is less reliable.

analysis.tldr: 提出分治多智能体框架GraphDC，将大图分解为子图并行推理，提升LLM在图算法任务上的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在数学问题上表现良好，但在图算法任务上仍不理想，因为图拓扑复杂且需要系统多步推理，尤其在大图上。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM在图算法推理中难以处理大规模图，存在推理负担重、计算瓶颈和鲁棒性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GraphDC，采用分治策略：将输入图分解为子图，每个子图由专门智能体进行局部推理，主智能体整合局部输出和子图间信息得到最终解。
contributions: 提出基于分治的多智能体框架GraphDC，用于可扩展的图算法推理。
通过子图分解和并行推理，降低单个智能体负担，提升大图上的鲁棒性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多种图算法任务和不同规模上，GraphDC一致优于现有方法，尤其在大实例上。
limitations: 子图分解策略可能影响全局结构信息的完整性。
多智能体通信开销可能成为新瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分治多智能体框架GraphDC，将大图分解为子图并行推理，提升LLM在图算法任务上的可扩展性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: The Memory Curse: How Expanded Recall Erodes Cooperative Intent in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Context window expansion is often treated as a straightforward capability upgrade for LLMs, but we find it systematically fails in multi-agent social dilemmas. Across 7 LLMs and 4 games over 500 rounds, expanding accessible history degrades cooperation in 18 of 28 model--game settings, a pattern we term the memory curse. We isolate the underlying mechanism through three analyses. First, lexical analysis of 378,000 reasoning traces associates this breakdown with eroding forward-looking intent rather than rising paranoia. We validate this using targeted fine-tuning as a cognitive probe: a LoRA adapter trained exclusively on forward-looking traces mitigates the decay and transfers zero-shot to distinct games. Second, memory sanitization holds prompt length fixed while replacing visible history with synthetic cooperative records, which restores cooperation substantially, proving the trigger is memory content, not length alone. Finally, ablating explicit Chain-of-Thought reasoning often reduces the collapse, showing that deliberation paradoxically amplifies the memory curse. Together, these results recast memory as an active determinant of multi-agent behavior: longer recall can either destabilize or support cooperation depending on the reasoning patterns it elicits.

analysis.tldr: 扩展上下文窗口会系统性地降低LLM智能体在多智能体社会困境中的合作意图，称为“记忆诅咒”。
analysis.research_motivation: 上下文窗口扩展通常被视为LLM能力的直接提升，但其在多智能体交互中的负面影响未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 研究扩展历史记忆如何影响LLM智能体在重复社会困境中的合作行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在7个LLM和4个游戏中，扩展历史记忆在28个模型-游戏设置中的18个中降低了合作，称为“记忆诅咒”。通过分析378,000条推理轨迹，发现合作崩溃与前瞻性意图的侵蚀相关，而非偏执增加。
analysis.method: 通过词汇分析、记忆清理（用合成合作记录替换可见历史）、消融思维链推理等方法隔离机制。
contributions: 发现并命名了“记忆诅咒”现象，即扩展上下文窗口在多智能体社会困境中系统性地降低合作。
通过词汇分析和微调实验证明合作崩溃源于前瞻性意图的侵蚀。
证明记忆内容而非长度是触发合作崩溃的关键，且思维链推理会放大该效应。
analysis.experiments: 在7个LLM和4个游戏上进行了超过500轮实验，分析了378,000条推理轨迹，并进行了记忆清理和思维链消融实验。
limitations: 仅研究了社会困境游戏，可能不适用于其他多智能体场景。
未探索不同记忆长度阈值的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩展上下文窗口会系统性地降低LLM智能体在多智能体社会困境中的合作意图，称为“记忆诅咒”。

papers.title: CA-SQL: Complexity-Aware Inference Time Reasoning for Text-to-SQL via Exploration and Compute Budget Allocation
papers.abstract: While recent advancements in inference-time learning have improved LLM reasoning on Text-to-SQL tasks, current solutions still struggle to perform well on the most challenging tasks in the Bird-Bench (BIRD) benchmark. This is due to inadequate solution space exploration, which is necessary to uncover promising candidate queries that can be further refined to produce the correct output. To address this challenge, we introduce CA-SQL, a novel Text-to-SQL pipeline that utilizes the estimated difficulty of a task to dynamically scale the breadth of the exploration for generating solution candidates. In addition, we use a custom prompt seeding method, based on principles of evolutionary search, to further elicit exploratory behavior from the base LLM and a novel voting method to select the best candidate solution at the end of the search. Experiments demonstrate that our solution achieves a state-of-the-art score of 51.72% on the "challenging" tier of BIRD development set problems, using only GPT-4o-mini, out-performing other in-context learning approaches, even those that leverage larger models. Overall, our method attains a competitive 61.06% execution accuracy and 68.77% Soft F1 score on the BIRD development dataset.

analysis.tldr: CA-SQL通过复杂度感知的推理时计算预算分配和进化搜索，在BIRD基准的困难任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL推理方法在BIRD基准的困难任务上表现不佳，主要因为解空间探索不足，难以发现可进一步优化的候选查询。
analysis.problem: 如何根据任务难度动态调整推理时的探索广度，以提升LLM在复杂Text-to-SQL任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法在BIRD困难任务上性能瓶颈源于解空间探索不充分，且不同难度任务需要不同的探索广度。
analysis.method: 提出CA-SQL流水线：1) 估计任务难度，动态缩放候选查询生成的探索广度；2) 基于进化搜索原理的自定义提示播种方法增强探索；3) 新颖的投票方法选择最佳候选。
contributions: 提出复杂度感知的推理时计算预算分配策略，根据任务难度动态调整探索广度
引入进化搜索启发的提示播种方法和投票机制，提升候选查询质量和选择准确性
在BIRD基准困难任务上以GPT-4o-mini达到51.72%的SOTA准确率，超越使用更大模型的方法
analysis.experiments: 在BIRD开发集上评估，困难任务准确率51.72%，整体执行准确率61.06%，Soft F1 68.77%。
limitations: 依赖任务难度估计的准确性，估计偏差可能影响性能
仅使用GPT-4o-mini，未验证在其他基座模型上的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CA-SQL通过复杂度感知的推理时计算预算分配和进化搜索，在BIRD基准的困难任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Fast Byte Latent Transformer
papers.abstract: Recent byte-level language models (LMs) match the performance of token-level models without relying on subword vocabularies, yet their utility is limited by slow, byte-by-byte autoregressive generation. We address this bottleneck in the Byte Latent Transformer (BLT) through new training and generation techniques. First, we introduce BLT Diffusion (BLT-D), a new model and our fastest BLT variant, trained with an auxiliary block-wise diffusion objective alongside the standard next-byte prediction loss. This enables an inference procedure that generates multiple bytes in parallel per decoding step, substantially reducing the number of forward passes required to generate a sequence. Second, we propose two extensions inspired by speculative decoding that trade some of this speed for higher generation quality: BLT Self-speculation (BLT-S), in which BLT's local decoder continues generating past its normal patch boundaries to draft bytes, which are then verified with a single full-model forward pass; and BLT Diffusion+Verification (BLT-DV), which augments BLT-D with an autoregressive verification step after diffusion-based generation. All methods may achieve an estimated memory-bandwidth cost over 50% lower than BLT on generation tasks. Each approach offers its own unique advantages, together removing key barriers to the practical use of byte-level LMs.

analysis.tldr: 通过扩散和推测解码加速字节级语言模型生成，实现并行解码与带宽降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 字节级语言模型无需子词词汇表即可匹配词级模型性能，但逐字节自回归生成速度极慢，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决字节级语言模型（如BLT）生成速度慢的问题，减少生成序列所需的前向传播次数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种加速方法：BLT-D（辅助块级扩散目标实现并行生成）、BLT-S（推测解码扩展局部解码器）、BLT-DV（扩散生成后加自回归验证）。
contributions: 提出BLT-D，通过扩散目标实现多字节并行生成，大幅减少解码步数。
提出BLT-S和BLT-DV，在速度与质量间取得权衡，并实现超过50%的估计内存带宽成本降低。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 扩散生成可能引入质量损失，需验证步骤补偿。
方法依赖特定模型架构（BLT），泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过扩散和推测解码加速字节级语言模型生成，实现并行解码与带宽降低。

papers.title: Beyond Pairs: Your Language Model is Secretly Optimizing a Preference Graph
papers.abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns language models using pairwise preference comparisons, offering a simple and effective alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) from human feedback. However, in many practical settings, training data consists of multiple rollouts per prompt, inducing rich preference structure that pairwise DPO fails to exploit. Collapsing such data into independent pairs discards transitivity, introduces redundant or conflicting supervision, and can lead to unstable optimization. We propose Graph Direct Preference Optimization (GraphDPO), a principled generalization of DPO that operates over directed acyclic preference graphs induced by rollout rankings. GraphDPO encodes dominance relations as edges and optimizes a graph-structured Plackett--Luce-inspired objective that aggregates supervision over graph neighborhoods, enforcing transitivity while recovering standard DPO as a special case. To handle discrete or sparse signals, we introduce an equivalence-class construction where responses with identical preferences form graph layers, and intra-layer edges contribute zero loss, preventing spurious gradients. Despite leveraging full graph structure, GraphDPO maintains linear per-prompt complexity via efficient log-sum-exp aggregation. We further incorporate optional ground-truth anchoring by inserting verified solutions as dominant nodes and applying an annealed schedule that stabilizes early training while gradually relaxing oracle supervision. Experiments on reasoning and program synthesis tasks demonstrate superior performance, suggesting that graph-structured preference modeling is a scalable and robust alternative to pairwise and listwise alignment objectives.

analysis.tldr: GraphDPO 将成对偏好优化扩展为有向无环偏好图，利用排序结构实现更稳定、可扩展的对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 DPO 仅利用成对偏好比较，但在多轮生成数据中会丢弃传递性、引入冗余或冲突监督，导致优化不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多轮生成数据中的完整偏好图结构（而非独立成对比较）来更有效地对齐语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将多轮数据折叠为独立成对比较会丢失传递性，产生冗余或冲突监督，导致优化不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出 GraphDPO，基于有向无环偏好图，使用图结构 Plackett-Luce 目标聚合邻域监督，强制传递性，并通过等价类构造处理离散信号，保持线性复杂度。
contributions: 提出 GraphDPO，将 DPO 泛化到偏好图，利用排序结构进行对齐。
引入等价类构造和可选真实答案锚定，稳定训练并提升性能。
在推理和程序合成任务上验证了图结构偏好建模的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在推理和程序合成任务上进行了实验，展示了优越性能。
limitations: 依赖可排序的偏好图，可能不适用于非传递性偏好。
等价类构造可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GraphDPO 将成对偏好优化扩展为有向无环偏好图，利用排序结构实现更稳定、可扩展的对齐。

papers.title: Globally Optimal Training of Spiking Neural Networks via Parameter Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have been proposed as biologically plausible and energy-efficient alternatives to conventional Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). However, the training of SNN usually relies on surrogate gradients due to the non-differentiability of the spike function, introducing approximation errors that accumulate across layers. To address this challenge, we extend the work on convexification of parallel feedforward threshold networks to parallel recurrent threshold networks, which subsume parallel SNNs as a structured special case. Building on this theoretical framework, we propose a parameter reconstruction algorithm for SNN training that demonstrates consistent and significant advantages across various tasks, both as a standalone method and in combination with surrogate-gradient training. The ablations further demonstrate the data scalability and robustness to model configurations of our training algorithm, pointing toward its potential in large-scale SNN training.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于参数重构的全局最优SNN训练方法，无需代理梯度。
analysis.research_motivation: SNN因脉冲函数不可微，依赖代理梯度训练引入累积近似误差，亟需无偏训练方法。
analysis.problem: SNN训练中代理梯度导致的近似误差累积问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将并行前馈阈值网络凸化扩展到并行循环阈值网络，覆盖SNN作为特例，并设计参数重构算法实现全局最优训练。
contributions: 将阈值网络凸化理论从并行前馈扩展到并行循环结构，统一SNN框架
提出参数重构训练算法，在多种任务上作为独立方法或与代理梯度结合均表现优势
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定结构的SNN
大规模网络上的计算效率待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于参数重构的全局最优SNN训练方法，无需代理梯度。

papers.title: Position: Mechanistic Interpretability Must Disclose Identification Assumptions for Causal Claims
papers.abstract: Mechanistic interpretability papers increasingly use causal vocabulary: circuits, mediators, causal abstraction, monosemanticity. Such claims require explicit identification assumptions. A purposive audit of 10 papers across four methodological strands finds no dedicated identification-assumptions section and a recurring pattern: validation metrics such as faithfulness, completeness, monosemanticity, alignment, or ablation effects are reported as causal support without stating the assumptions that make them identifying. A two-human-coder audit on $n=30$ reproduces the direction of the main finding: dedicated identification sections are absent, and validation-metric substitution is common, though exact Dim B/D counts are coding-rule sensitive. The paper proposes a disclosure norm: state whether the claim is causal, name the identification strategy, enumerate assumptions, stress at least one, and explain how conclusions shift if assumptions fail. Validation is not identification.

analysis.tldr: 机械可解释性论文需明确披露因果识别假设，否则验证指标不能替代因果识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 机械可解释性领域越来越多地使用因果词汇（如电路、中介、因果抽象），但因果声明需要明确的识别假设，而当前论文普遍缺乏这一披露，导致因果结论可能不可靠。
analysis.problem: 机械可解释性论文在做出因果声明时，未明确披露识别假设，且常将验证指标（如忠实度、完整性）误作因果支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对10篇论文的审计发现：没有专门的识别假设部分，验证指标被报告为因果支持而未说明使其具有识别性的假设；对30篇论文的双人编码验证了主要发现方向。
analysis.method: 提出披露规范：声明是否因果、命名识别策略、列举假设、强调至少一个假设、解释假设失败时结论如何变化。
contributions: 通过审计揭示机械可解释性论文中因果识别假设缺失的普遍问题
提出因果声明披露规范以提升领域严谨性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 审计样本有限（10篇和30篇），可能不全面
编码规则敏感性可能导致计数差异
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 机械可解释性论文需明确披露因果识别假设，否则验证指标不能替代因果识别。

papers.title: Graph-Structured Hyperdimensional Computing for Data-Efficient and Explainable Process-Structure-Property Prediction
papers.abstract: Multiphoton photoreduction enables high-fidelity fabrication of complex 3D microstructures, yet reliable process-structure-property (PSP) prediction remains difficult because the available data are sparse, heterogeneous, and interaction-dominated. In this regime, conventional feature-vector models are statistically underdetermined, making them prone to spurious correlations, poor regime transfer, and unstable post hoc explanations, whereas mechanistic pipelines depend on calibrated submodels that are rarely available during early process development. We present PSP-HDC, a graph-structured hyperdimensional computing framework that encodes a directed PSP graph as an internal prior for representation, inference, and explanation. A trainable scalar-to-hypervector encoder learns parameter-specific embeddings on a fixed hyperdimensional basis to accommodate heterogeneous scales and noise. Sample representations are then composed through graph-aligned binding and bundling along directed PSP dependencies, and prediction is performed by associative-memory retrieval against class prototypes. Because the same prototype memories support both decision making and attribution, PSP-HDC provides intrinsic explanations at the parameter, group, and within-group levels, while memory alignment and separation quantify prototype formation during training. On sheet-resistance regime prediction for the 3D platform, PSP-HDC achieves an accuracy of 0.910 +/- 0.077 over 1000 random splits and 0.896 under process-fold generalization, outperforming strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出图结构超维计算框架PSP-HDC，利用有向PSP图作为先验实现数据高效且可解释的过程-结构-性能预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 多光子光还原制造中，过程-结构-性能数据稀疏、异构且交互主导，传统特征向量模型统计欠定，易产生虚假相关和解释不稳定，而机理模型依赖早期开发中难以获得的校准子模型。
analysis.problem: 在数据稀疏、异构且交互主导的3D微结构制造场景中，实现可靠且可解释的过程-结构-性能预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将有向PSP图编码为内部先验，通过可训练标量到超向量编码器学习参数特定嵌入，利用图对齐的绑定与捆绑组合样本表示，通过关联记忆检索进行预测，并基于原型记忆提供内在解释。
contributions: 提出图结构超维计算框架PSP-HDC，利用PSP图先验实现数据高效预测。
提供参数级、组级和组内级的内在解释，无需后处理。
analysis.experiments: 在3D平台的薄层电阻状态预测任务上，PSP-HDC在1000次随机划分中达到0.910±0.077准确率，在过程折叠泛化下达到0.896，优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖PSP图结构的先验知识，在无明确图结构时需额外构建。
超维计算在高维空间中的可扩展性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图结构超维计算框架PSP-HDC，利用有向PSP图作为先验实现数据高效且可解释的过程-结构-性能预测。

papers.title: Tool Calling is Linearly Readable and Steerable in Language Models
papers.abstract: When a tool-calling agent picks the wrong tool, the failure is invisible until execution: the email gets sent, the meeting gets missed. Probing 12 instruction-tuned models across Gemma 3, Qwen 3, Qwen 2.5, and Llama 3.1 (270M to 27B), we find the identity of the chosen tool is linearly readable and steerable inside the model. Adding the mean-difference between two tools' average internal activations switches which tool the model selects at 77-100% accuracy on name-only single-turn prompts (93-100% at 4B+), and the JSON arguments that follow autoregressively match the new tool's schema, so flipping the name is enough. The same per-tool means also flag likely errors before they happen: on Gemma 3 12B and 27B, queries where the gap between the top-1 and top-2 tool is smallest produce 14-21x more wrong calls than queries with the largest gap. The causal effect concentrates along one direction, the row of the output layer that produces the target tool's first token: a unit vector along it at matched magnitude already reaches 93-100%, while what is left over leaves the choice almost untouched. Activation patching localises this to a small set of mid- and late-layer attention heads, and a within-topic probe across 14 same-domain $\tau$-bench airline tools reaches top-1 61-89% across five 4B-14B models, ruling out the reading that we are just moving the model along a topic axis. Even base models encode the right tool before they can emit it: cosine readout from the internal state recovers 69-82% on BFCL while base generation reaches only 2-10%, suggesting pretraining forms the representation and instruction tuning later wires it to the output. We measure tool identity selection and JSON schema correctness in single-turn fixed-menu settings; multi-turn agentic transfer is more fragile and is discussed in Limitations.

analysis.tldr: 工具调用身份在语言模型内部是线性可读且可操控的，通过激活干预可高精度切换工具选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具调用代理选错工具时，错误直到执行才显现，导致严重后果，因此需要理解模型内部如何表示和选择工具。
analysis.problem: 探究语言模型内部工具选择的表征是否线性可读和可操控，以及如何通过激活干预实现工具切换和错误检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工具身份在模型内部是线性编码的，通过平均激活差异可高精度切换工具选择；工具选择不确定性（top-1与top-2差距小）与错误率正相关；因果效应集中在输出层特定方向；预训练阶段已形成工具表征，指令微调将其连接到输出。
analysis.method: 通过探针分析工具身份线性可读性，使用平均激活差异进行激活干预切换工具，利用激活修补定位关键注意力头，并在同领域工具上验证非主题轴效应。
contributions: 发现工具身份在语言模型内部是线性可读且可操控的，通过平均激活差异可高精度切换工具选择。
揭示工具选择不确定性可预测错误，且因果效应集中在输出层特定方向。
证明预训练阶段已编码工具表征，指令微调将其连接到输出。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma 3、Qwen 3、Qwen 2.5、Llama 3.1等12个指令微调模型（270M-27B）上进行实验，使用名称单轮提示和BFCL基准，评估工具切换准确率（77-100%）和错误预测能力（14-21x差异）。
limitations: 实验限于单轮固定菜单设置，多轮智能体迁移更脆弱。
未探索更复杂工具调用场景（如参数依赖）。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 工具调用身份在语言模型内部是线性可读且可操控的，通过激活干预可高精度切换工具选择。

papers.title: Towards Apples to Apples for AI Evaluations: From Real-World Use Cases to Evaluation Scenarios
papers.abstract: AI measurement science has a wide variety of methodologies and measurements for comparing AI systems, resulting in what often appear to be "apples-to-oranges" comparisons across AI evaluations. To move toward "apples-to-apples" comparisons in real-world AI evaluations, this work advocates for methodological transparency in evaluation scenarios, operational grounding, and human-centered design (HCD) principles. We propose a repeatable process for transforming high-level use cases to detailed scenarios by eliciting use cases from subject matter experts (SMEs) via a structured AI Use Case Worksheet with six key elements: use case, sector, user (direct and indirect), intended outcomes, expected impacts (positive and negative), and KPIs and metrics. We demonstrate utility of the worksheet and process in the U.S. financial services sector. This paper reports on example high-level AI use cases identified by financial services sector SMEs: cyber defense enablement, developer productivity, financial crime aggregation, suspicious activity report (SAR) filing, credit memo generation, and internal call center support. These AI use cases provided are illustrative of the process and not exhaustive. Central to our work is a three-stage expansion pipeline combining LLM prompting with human reviews to generate 107 scenarios from those use cases elicited from SMEs. This process integrates iterative human reviews at every juncture to ensure operational grounding: for scenario titles and descriptions; for core scenario elements like users, benefits and risks, and metrics; and for scenario narratives and evaluation objectives. Human checkpoints ensure scenarios remain reflective of real-world usage and human needs. We describe a validation rubric to assess scenario quality. By defining key scenario components, this work supports a more consistent and meaningful paradigm for human-centered AI evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将AI用例转化为可评估场景的流程，强调方法透明性和人本设计，并在金融领域验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI评估方法多样，导致不同评估之间难以进行公平比较（苹果与橙子问题），缺乏将真实用例转化为可操作评估场景的系统性方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将高层AI用例系统性地转化为详细、可操作且反映真实世界需求的评估场景，以实现公平、一致的AI比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个三阶段扩展流程：通过结构化AI用例工作表从领域专家处获取用例，结合LLM提示和人工审核生成107个场景，并设计验证标准评估场景质量。
contributions: 提出一个可重复的流程，将高层用例转化为详细评估场景，强调方法透明性和人本设计。
设计AI用例工作表，包含六个关键要素，并在美国金融服务领域展示其效用。
通过LLM与人工审核结合，生成107个场景，并建立验证标准确保场景质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 用例仅来自美国金融服务领域，可能不具普遍性。
流程依赖专家输入和人工审核，可能成本较高且难以规模化。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种将AI用例转化为可评估场景的流程，强调方法透明性和人本设计，并在金融领域验证。

papers.title: Dooly: Configuration-Agnostic, Redundancy-Aware Profiling for LLM Inference Simulation
papers.abstract: Selecting the optimal LLM inference configuration requires evaluation across hardware, serving engines, attention backends, and model architectures, since no single choice performs best across all workloads. Profile-based simulators are the standard tool, yet they hardcode their operation set to a specific configuration and re-profile every operation from scratch, making exploration prohibitively expensive. This cost stems from a missing structural understanding: every input dimension of each operation is fixed by the model configuration or determined by the incoming request. Many model-configuration values (e.g., head size, layer count) recur across models, so the same operation runs in many configurations; a single sweep over the request-dependent dimensions can serve them all. We present Dooly, which exploits this structure to achieve configuration-agnostic, redundancy-aware profiling. Dooly performs a single inference pass, labels each input dimension with its origin via taint propagation, and selectively profiles only operations absent from its latency database; stateful operations such as attention are isolated by reusing the serving engine's own initialization code, eliminating manual instrumentation. It builds latency regression models based on the database, which becomes a drop-in backend for existing simulators. Across two GPU platforms, three attention backends, and diverse model architectures, Dooly achieves simulation accuracy within 5% MAPE for TTFT and 8% for TPOT while reducing profiling GPU-hours by 56.4% across 12 models compared to the existing profiling approach.

analysis.tldr: Dooly通过配置无关和冗余感知的分析方法，大幅降低LLM推理模拟的配置探索成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 选择最优LLM推理配置需要评估多种硬件、引擎、注意力后端和模型架构，但现有基于profile的模拟器硬编码操作集，每次重新profile所有操作，导致探索成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地对LLM推理配置进行profile，避免重复计算冗余操作，从而加速模拟器配置探索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 每个操作的输入维度要么由模型配置固定，要么由请求决定；许多模型配置值（如head size、层数）在不同模型中重复出现，因此同一操作会在多种配置下运行，只需一次扫描请求相关维度即可覆盖所有配置。
analysis.method: Dooly执行单次推理，通过污点传播标记每个输入维度的来源，仅profile数据库中缺失的操作；对有状态操作（如attention）复用服务引擎的初始化代码，避免手动插桩；基于数据库构建延迟回归模型，作为现有模拟器的即插即用后端。
contributions: 提出配置无关、冗余感知的profile方法，通过污点传播和选择性profile减少重复计算
在多种GPU、注意力后端和模型架构上实现高精度模拟（TTFT MAPE<5%，TPOT MAPE<8%），同时减少56.4%的profile GPU小时
analysis.experiments: 在两种GPU平台、三种注意力后端和多种模型架构上评估，模拟精度TTFT MAPE<5%，TPOT MAPE<8%，profile GPU小时减少56.4%（12个模型）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定服务引擎的初始化代码，迁移到新引擎需适配
未讨论对非标准模型架构（如MoE）的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Dooly通过配置无关和冗余感知的分析方法，大幅降低LLM推理模拟的配置探索成本。

papers.title: Where's the Plan? Locating Latent Planning in Language Models with Lightweight Mechanistic Interventions
papers.abstract: We study planning site formation in language models -- where internal representations of structurally-constrained future tokens form during the forward pass, and whether they causally drive generation. Using rhyming-couplet completion as a clean test of forward-looking constraint, we apply two lightweight methods (linear probing and activation patching) across Qwen3, Gemma-3, and Llama-3 at more than ten scales. Probing shows that future-rhyme information is linearly decodable at the line boundary, with signal that strengthens with scale in all three families. Activation patching reveals that only Gemma-3-27B causally relies on this encoding, exhibiting a handoff in which the causal driver migrates from the rhyme word to the line boundary around layer 30. Every other model we test conditions on the rhyme word throughout generation, with near-zero causal effect at the line boundary despite strong probe signal. We localize the Gemma-3-27B handoff to five attention heads through two-stage path patching that recover ~90% of the rhyme-routing capacity at the newline.

analysis.tldr: 通过轻量级机制干预，发现语言模型在生成押韵对句时存在潜在规划，但仅Gemma-3-27B因果依赖该编码。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解语言模型是否在生成过程中形成面向未来的内部规划，以及这些规划是否因果驱动生成，对于揭示模型工作机制和提升可控性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 语言模型在生成结构约束的未来token时，其内部表示是否形成以及是否因果驱动生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 线性探针显示未来押韵信息在行边界可线性解码，且信号随模型规模增强；但激活修补表明仅Gemma-3-27B因果依赖该编码，其他模型在行边界因果效应接近零。
analysis.method: 结合线性探针和激活修补两种轻量级方法，在押韵对句完成任务上分析模型内部规划。
contributions: 发现未来押韵信息在语言模型行边界可线性解码，且信号随规模增强。
揭示仅Gemma-3-27B因果依赖该编码，并定位到五个注意力头的交接机制。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3、Gemma-3和Llama-3三个系列超过十个规模的模型上进行实验，使用押韵对句完成作为测试任务。
limitations: 仅针对押韵对句这一特定任务，泛化性有待验证。
方法仅适用于轻量级干预，可能无法捕捉更复杂的规划机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轻量级机制干预，发现语言模型在生成押韵对句时存在潜在规划，但仅Gemma-3-27B因果依赖该编码。

papers.title: It Just Takes Two: Scaling Amortized Inference to Large Sets
papers.abstract: Neural posterior estimation has emerged as a powerful tool for amortized inference, with growing adoption across scientific and applied domains. In many of these applications, the conditioning variable is a set of observations whose elements depend not only on the target but also on unknown factors shared across the set. Optimal inference therefore requires treating the set jointly, which in turn requires training the estimator at the deployment set size -- a regime where memory and compute quickly become prohibitive. We introduce a simple, theoretically grounded strategy that decouples representation learning from posterior modeling. Our method trains a mean-pool Deep Set on sets of size at most two, producing an encoder that generalizes to arbitrary set sizes. The inference head is then finetuned on pre-aggregated embeddings, making training cost essentially independent of the deployment set size N. Across scalar, image, multi-view 3D, molecular, and high-dimensional conditional generation benchmarks with N in the thousands, our approach matches or outperforms standard baselines at a fraction of the compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，仅用大小为2的集合训练即可泛化到任意大规模集合的变分推断。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经后验估计在科学和应用领域广泛使用，但处理大规模观测集合时，训练时需使用部署时的集合大小，导致内存和计算成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练计算成本的前提下，使神经后验估计器能够处理任意大小的观测集合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用均值池化的Deep Set，在集合大小最多为2的数据上训练编码器，使其泛化到任意集合大小；然后在预聚合的嵌入上微调推断头，使训练成本与部署集合大小N基本无关。
contributions: 提出一种简单且理论支持的策略，将表示学习与后验建模解耦，仅用大小为2的集合训练即可处理任意大规模集合。
在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成基准上，以极低计算成本达到或超越标准基线。
analysis.experiments: 在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成基准上，集合大小N达数千，方法匹配或超越标准基线且计算成本大幅降低。
limitations: 可能对集合内元素高度异质的情况泛化能力有限。
均值池化可能丢失某些结构信息，对于需要精细对齐的任务可能不够。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，仅用大小为2的集合训练即可泛化到任意大规模集合的变分推断。

papers.title: Exploring the non-convexity in machine learning using quantum-inspired optimization
papers.abstract: The escalating complexity of modern machine learning necessitates solving challenging non-convex optimization problems, particularly in high-dimensional regimes and scenarios contaminated by gross outliers. Traditional approaches, relying on convex relaxations or specialized local search heuristics, frequently succumb to suboptimal local minima and fail to recover the true underlying discrete structures. In this paper, we propose treating these non-convex challenges as a global search problem and introduce a unified framework based on Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Optimization (QIEO). By leveraging a probabilistic representation inspired by quantum superposition, QIEO maintains a global view of the search space, enabling it to tunnel through local optima that trap conventional gradient-based and greedy solvers. We comprehensively evaluate QIEO across diverse non-convex applications, including sparse signal recovery (gene expression analysis and compressed sensing) and robust linear regression. Extensive benchmarking against state-of-the-art continuous solvers (ADAM, Differential Evolution), classical metaheuristics (Genetic Algorithms), and specialized non-convex algorithms (Iterative Hard Thresholding) demonstrates that QIEO consistently achieves superior structural fidelity, lower mean squared error, and enhanced robustness without support inflation. Our findings suggest that embracing a quantum-inspired global search provides a resilient, unified paradigm for overcoming the inherent intractability of discrete nonconvex machine learning landscapes.

analysis.tldr: 提出量子启发进化优化框架，在非凸机器学习任务中实现全局搜索，优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代机器学习面临高维和异常值污染下的非凸优化难题，传统凸松弛或局部搜索易陷入次优局部极小，无法恢复真实离散结构。
analysis.problem: 解决非凸优化问题中全局搜索困难，避免局部最优陷阱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法（如凸松弛、梯度下降、贪婪算法）在非凸高维场景下易陷入局部最优，导致结构保真度低和误差大。
analysis.method: 提出量子启发进化优化（QIEO）框架，利用量子叠加启发的概率表示维护搜索空间的全局视图，实现穿越局部最优的隧道效应。
contributions: 提出统一的量子启发进化优化框架，适用于多种非凸机器学习问题。
在稀疏信号恢复和鲁棒线性回归任务中，QIEO在结构保真度、均方误差和鲁棒性上优于ADAM、差分进化、遗传算法等基线。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏信号恢复（基因表达分析、压缩感知）和鲁棒线性回归上进行了全面基准测试，与ADAM、差分进化、遗传算法、迭代硬阈值等对比。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算效率或可扩展性分析。
可能对超参数敏感，需进一步研究自适应机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量子启发进化优化框架，在非凸机器学习任务中实现全局搜索，优于传统方法。

papers.title: INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy
papers.abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is widely employed in machine learning to protect confidential or sensitive training data from being revealed. As data owners gain greater control over their data due to personal data ownership, they are more likely to set their own privacy requirements, necessitating individualized DP (IDP) to fulfil such requests. In particular, owners of data from more sensitive subsets, such as positive cases of stigmatized diseases, likely set stronger privacy requirements, as leakage of such data could incur more serious societal impact. However, existing IDP algorithms induce a critical utility imbalance problem: Data from owners with stronger privacy requirements may be severely underrepresented in the trained model, resulting in poorer performance on similar data from subsequent users during deployment. In this paper, we analyze this problem and propose the INO-SGD algorithm, which strategically down-weights data within each batch to improve performance on the more private data across all iterations. Notably, our algorithm is specially designed to satisfy IDP, while existing techniques addressing utility imbalance neither satisfy IDP nor can be easily adapted to do so. Lastly, we demonstrate the empirical feasibility of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出 INO-SGD 算法，在个性化差分隐私下缓解高隐私数据效用不足的失衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 个性化差分隐私（IDP）允许数据所有者设置不同隐私需求，但高隐私数据在训练中易被低估，导致模型对这类数据性能差，现有方法无法同时满足 IDP 和解决效用失衡。
analysis.problem: 解决 IDP 场景下因隐私需求不同导致的效用不平衡问题，即高隐私数据在模型中的代表性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，高隐私数据（如敏感疾病阳性病例）的所有者倾向于设置更强的隐私保护，但现有 IDP 算法会导致这些数据在训练模型中严重欠表示，从而在部署时对类似数据表现较差。
analysis.method: 提出 INO-SGD 算法，在每个批次中策略性地降低某些数据的权重，以提升高隐私数据在所有迭代中的性能，并专门设计以满足 IDP 约束。
contributions: 分析了 IDP 下的效用不平衡问题
提出 INO-SGD 算法，满足 IDP 且能缓解效用失衡
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定隐私预算范围内有效
未讨论对低隐私数据性能的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 INO-SGD 算法，在个性化差分隐私下缓解高隐私数据效用不足的失衡问题。

papers.title: Trajectory as the Teacher: Few-Step Discrete Flow Matching via Energy-Navigated Distillation
papers.abstract: Discrete flow matching generates text by iteratively transforming noise tokens into coherent language, but may require hundreds of forward passes. Distillation uses the multi-step trajectory to train a student to reproduce the process in a few steps. When the student underperforms, the usual explanation is insufficient capacity. We argue the opposite: the trajectory is the bottleneck, not the student. Each training trajectory is built through a chain of blind stochastic jumps with no evaluation of sequence quality; a single bad decision at an early midpoint propagates through subsequent steps, yet the student must imitate the result.
