We compare three LLMs (GPT-5.2, GPT-4o, Claude Opus 4.5) in few-shot mode, a fine-tuned BERT-based encoder, and a human expert on two open-ended biology items, using several hundred student responses and ground truth scores provided by a biology education expert. The results show that human-human agreement is highest and stable across the full quality spectrum. All AI models perform well on fully correct and fully incorrect responses, but exhibit substantial degradation on mid-range responses. This mid-range degradation is conditioned on task-specific adaptation: It is most severe in few-shot LLMs with few examples and decreases as task-specific data increases, with fine-tuned encoder models performing best. This mid-range degradation may lead to inequitable evaluation of responses produced by students with developing understanding. Our findings highlight the importance of quality-conditioned fairness, with particular attention to mid-range responses.

analysis.tldr: 自动短答案评分中，AI模型在中等质量答案上表现显著下降，且任务特定适应可缓解此问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动短答案评分（ASAS）正从判别式微调模型转向大语言模型（LLM）的少样本设置，但任务特定数据有限可能降低复杂评分任务的对齐性，尤其是对需要细致解读的部分正确响应的影响尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 研究不同模型的任务特定适应程度与质量条件评分一致性之间的关系，特别是中等质量答案上的退化现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有AI模型在完全正确和完全错误的答案上表现良好，但在中等质量答案上出现显著退化；退化程度与任务特定适应程度相关：少样本LLM退化最严重，随着任务特定数据增加而减轻，微调编码器模型表现最佳。
analysis.method: 比较三种LLM（GPT-5.2、GPT-4o、Claude Opus 4.5）在少样本模式、微调BERT编码器模型和人类专家在两个开放生物学题目上的评分一致性，使用数百个学生回答和专家提供的真实分数。
contributions: 揭示了自动短答案评分中AI模型在中等质量答案上的退化现象，并证明其与任务特定适应程度相关。
强调了质量条件公平性的重要性，特别是对中等质量答案的关注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用两个生物学题目，可能限制泛化性。
未探讨其他学科或更复杂评分任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自动短答案评分中，AI模型在中等质量答案上表现显著下降，且任务特定适应可缓解此问题。

papers.title: MAVEN: Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing
papers.abstract: While explicit reasoning trajectories enhance model interpretability, existing paradigms often rely on monolithic chains that lack intermediate verification, allowing early errors to cascade unchecked. This lack of modularity impedes granular auditing and compromises the epistemic trust required for high-stakes applications. We propose MAVEN (Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing), a blackboard-inspired framework designed to transform LLMs into deliberate reasoners through explicit role-decoupling. At its core, MAVEN operationalizes an adversarial Skeptic-Researcher-Judge loop, simulating expert deliberation by functionally separating logical defense from factual grounding. Experiments on OpenBookQA, TruthfulQA, HALUEVAL and StrategyQA benchmarks demonstrate that MAVEN delivers superior reasoning quality across four fine-grained metrics. Notably, MAVEN consistently outperforms latent reasoning models such as GEMINI-3.1-Pro and consensus-based baselines (e.g., ReConcile) by generating explicitly structured, modular, and verifiable deliberation trajectories, rather than relying on implicit internal states or post-hoc consensus. Moreover, comprehensive evaluations confirm that MAVEN is fully model-agnostic, serving as a strong and transferable reasoning booster that yields substantial performance improvements across diverse backbone models.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体验证-细化网络MAVEN，通过对抗性 Skeptic-Researcher-Judge 循环实现显式、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹，提升推理质量与可审计性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有显式推理轨迹缺乏中间验证，早期错误会级联放大，且缺乏模块化导致细粒度审计困难，在高风险应用中难以建立认知信任。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM转变为具有中间验证和模块化审计能力的审慎推理者，避免早期错误级联并提升推理轨迹的可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有范式依赖单一链条，缺乏中间验证，早期错误会无检查地级联；缺乏模块化阻碍了细粒度审计，损害了高风险应用所需的认知信任。
analysis.method: 提出MAVEN框架，采用黑板架构，通过对抗性 Skeptic-Researcher-Judge 循环实现角色解耦，将逻辑辩护与事实基础功能分离，生成显式结构化、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹。
contributions: 提出MAVEN框架，通过多智能体对抗性循环实现显式、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹。
在多个基准上验证了MAVEN优于潜在推理模型和基于共识的基线，且模型无关，可作为强迁移推理增强器。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenBookQA、TruthfulQA、HALUEVAL和StrategyQA基准上，使用四个细粒度指标评估，MAVEN优于GEMINI-3.1-Pro和ReConcile等基线。
limitations: 可能增加推理计算开销，因为需要多轮智能体交互。
依赖基座LLM的质量，若基座模型能力不足，可能影响整体性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体验证-细化网络MAVEN，通过对抗性 Skeptic-Researcher-Judge 循环实现显式、模块化、可验证的推理轨迹，提升推理质量与可审计性。

papers.title: Post-training makes large language models less human-like
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as surrogates for human participants, but it remains unclear which models best capture human behavior and why. To address this, we introduce Psych-201, a novel dataset that enables us to measure behavioral alignment at scale. We find that post-training -- the stage that turns base models into useful assistants -- consistently reduces alignment with human behavior across model families, sizes, and objectives. Moreover, this misalignment widens in newer model generations even as base models continue to improve. Finally, we find that persona-induction -- a popular technique for eliciting human-like behavior by conditioning models on participant-specific information -- does not improve predictions at the level of individuals. Taken together, our results suggest that the very processes that are currently employed to turn LLMs into useful assistants also make them less accurate models of human behavior.

analysis.tldr: 后训练阶段使大语言模型与人类行为的一致性降低，且新模型更明显。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 被广泛用作人类参与者的替代，但哪些模型最能模拟人类行为以及原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估后训练（将基础模型转化为有用助手的阶段）对 LLM 与人类行为对齐的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后训练一致地降低了模型与人类行为的对齐，且这种错位在新一代模型中加剧，即使基础模型本身在改进。
analysis.method: 引入 Psych-201 数据集，测量行为对齐程度，并测试角色诱导技术。
contributions: 构建 Psych-201 数据集用于大规模测量行为对齐
发现后训练降低人类行为对齐，且随模型代际加剧
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定行为测试集
未探讨后训练中具体哪些步骤导致对齐下降
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 后训练阶段使大语言模型与人类行为的一致性降低，且新模型更明显。

papers.title: Safe, or Simply Incapable? Rethinking Safety Evaluation for Phone-Use Agents
papers.abstract: When a phone-use agent avoids harm, does that show safety, or simply inability to act? Existing evaluations often cannot tell. A harmful outcome may be avoided because the agent recognized the risk and chose the safe action, or because it failed to understand the screen or execute any relevant action at all. These cases have different causes and call for different fixes, yet current benchmarks often merge them under task success, refusal, or final harmful outcome. We address this problem with PhoneSafety, a benchmark of 700 safety-critical moments drawn from real phone interactions across more than 130 apps. Each instance isolates the next decision at a risky moment and asks a simple question: does the model take the safe action, take the unsafe action, or fail to do anything useful? We evaluate eight representative phone-use agents under this framework. Our results reveal two main patterns. First, stronger general phone-use ability does not reliably imply safer choices at risky moments. Models that perform better on ordinary app tasks are not always the ones that behave more safely when the next action matters. Second, failures to do anything useful behave like a capability signal rather than a safety signal: they are concentrated in more visually and operationally demanding settings and remain stable when the evaluation protocol changes. Across models, failures split into two recurring patterns: unsafe choices in settings where the model can act but chooses wrongly, and inability to act in more visually and operationally demanding screens. Overall, a harmless outcome is not enough to count as evidence of safety. Evaluating phone-use agents requires separating unsafe judgment from inability to act.

analysis.tldr: PhoneSafety基准揭示手机Agent的无害结果可能源于能力不足而非安全对齐，需区分不安全判断与无法行动。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全评估无法区分手机Agent避免伤害是出于安全对齐还是能力不足，导致错误归因和修复方向偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计评估框架，区分手机Agent在风险时刻的三种行为：安全行动、不安全行动、无法行动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更强的通用手机操作能力并不保证更安全的选择；无法行动模式更像能力信号而非安全信号，集中在视觉和操作要求高的场景。
analysis.method: 构建PhoneSafety基准，包含700个来自130+真实应用的风险时刻，每个实例要求模型在下一决策点选择安全行动、不安全行动或无法行动。
contributions: 提出PhoneSafety基准，用于区分手机Agent的安全对齐与能力不足。
揭示无害结果不能作为安全证据，需分离不安全判断与无法行动。
analysis.experiments: 评估了8个代表性手机Agent，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖手机交互场景，可能不适用于其他Agent类型。
无法行动的分类可能受任务定义影响，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhoneSafety基准揭示手机Agent的无害结果可能源于能力不足而非安全对齐，需区分不安全判断与无法行动。

papers.title: Nürnberg NLP at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Axis Voter Ensembles for Psychological Defence Mechanism Classification
papers.abstract: Detecting levels of psychological defence mechanisms in supportive conversations is inherently ambiguous. In the PsyDefDetect shared task at BioNLP 2026 the eight positive defence categories share surface language and differ only in pragmatic function and trained raters reach only moderate inter-annotator agreement. On such a task the decisive lever is not a stronger single model but error independence, since any single representation will waver on the overlapping defence boundaries. We translate this insight into a 9-voter ensemble spanning three orthogonal axes: class granularity (all nine classes for the gatekeeper, only the eight defence classes for the specialists), training method (generative and discriminative) and base model. The system reaches $F1_{test}{=}.420$ on the hidden test set, placing first among 21 registered teams.

analysis.tldr: 通过多轴投票集成提升心理防御机制分类性能，在BioNLP 2026共享任务中取得第一。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理防御机制检测任务存在固有歧义，不同类别共享表面语言，仅靠单一模型难以区分重叠的决策边界。
analysis.problem: 在支持性对话中准确分类八种积极心理防御机制，克服类别间表面语言重叠和标注者一致性低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单一表示会在重叠的防御边界上摇摆，因此关键杠杆不是更强的单一模型，而是错误独立性。
analysis.method: 构建9个投票器的集成，沿三个正交轴变化：类别粒度（门控器用全部9类，专家仅用8个防御类）、训练方法（生成式和判别式）、基础模型。
contributions: 提出多轴投票集成方法，利用错误独立性提升分类性能。
在PsyDefDetect共享任务中取得第一名，F1=0.420。
analysis.experiments: 在隐藏测试集上F1=0.420，在21支注册队伍中排名第一。
limitations: 集成方法计算开销较大。
可能依赖特定任务的数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多轴投票集成提升心理防御机制分类性能，在BioNLP 2026共享任务中取得第一。

papers.title: Mathematical Reasoning via Intervention-Based Time-Series Causal Discovery Using LLMs as Concept Mastery Simulators
papers.abstract: Recent methods for improving LLM mathematical reasoning, whether through MCTS-based test-time search or causal graph-guided knowledge injection, cannot identify which concepts causally contribute to a correct answer, as the observed association may be spurious, driven by confounders such as problem difficulty. We propose CIKA (Causal Intervention for Knowledge Activation), a framework that uses the LLM itself as an interventional simulator: a prompt sets the concept state to ``mastered'' and the correctness change estimates the causal effect. We formalize this quantity as an Interventional Capability Probe (ICP), which diagnoses whether the LLM can use a given concept -- distinct from merely possessing knowledge. Because the intervention exogenously sets the concept state independently of problem difficulty, ICP separates confounding that observational methods cannot. On 67 screened problems, the ICP of the top-ranked concept (+0.219) is significantly larger than that of the negative control (+0.039; paired $t$-test, $p < 10^{-6}$, Cohen's $d = 0.86$), confirming that the probe discriminates causally relevant concepts from irrelevant ones. Analysis of 601 Omni-MATH problems further shows that solved problems have 6.1$\times$ higher ATE than unsolved ones (0.338 vs. 0.055), confirming that ICP is predictive of problem-solving success. With a 7B-parameter LLM whose weights are entirely frozen, CIKA achieves 69.7\% on the contamination-free Omni-MATH-Rule benchmark and 64.0\% overall, compared to 60.5\% for o1-mini, and 97.2\% on GSM8K, 46--50\% on AIME 2024--2026, and 46.2\% on MathArena. The Causal Knowledge Activation component contributes 33.8\% of correct answers on problems where the base model alone fails, demonstrating that the LLM already possessed but had not activated the requisite knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 提出CIKA框架，利用LLM作为干预模拟器进行因果发现，通过干预概念掌握状态分离混杂因素，显著提升数学推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法无法区分概念对正确答案的因果贡献，因为观测关联可能受问题难度等混杂因素影响，导致虚假关联。
analysis.problem: 如何从时间序列数据中识别哪些概念因果性地贡献于LLM的数学推理正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出观测关联可能受混杂因素影响。
analysis.method: CIKA框架：将LLM作为干预模拟器，通过提示设置概念状态为“已掌握”，观察正确性变化来估计因果效应，形式化为干预能力探针（ICP），分离混杂因素。
contributions: 提出CIKA框架，利用LLM自身作为干预模拟器进行因果发现。
定义干预能力探针（ICP）诊断LLM是否能够使用给定概念。
在多个数学推理基准上取得显著提升，且证明LLM已拥有但未激活所需知识。
analysis.experiments: 在67个筛选问题、601个Omni-MATH问题、Omni-MATH-Rule、GSM8K、AIME 2024-2026、MathArena等基准上评估，CIKA在7B参数冻结模型上达到69.7% (Omni-MATH-Rule)、64.0%总体、97.2% (GSM8K)、46-50% (AIME)、46.2% (MathArena)。
limitations: 依赖LLM作为干预模拟器的准确性。
可能仅适用于数学推理领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CIKA框架，利用LLM作为干预模拟器进行因果发现，通过干预概念掌握状态分离混杂因素，显著提升数学推理能力。

papers.title: Revisiting Transformer Layer Parameterization Through Causal Energy Minimization
papers.abstract: Transformer blocks typically combine multi-head attention (MHA) for token mixing with gated MLPs for token-wise feature transformation, yet many choices in their parameterization remain largely empirical. We introduce Causal Energy Minimization (CEM), a framework that recasts Transformer layers as optimization steps on conditional energy functions while explicitly accounting for layer parameterization. Extending prior energy-based interpretations of attention, CEM shows that weight-tied MHA can be derived as a gradient update on an interaction energy, and that a gated MLP with shared up/down projections can be viewed through an element-wise energy. This perspective identifies a design space for Transformer layers that includes within-layer weight sharing, diagonal-plus-low-rank interactions, lightweight preconditioners, and recursive updates. We evaluate CEM-derived layers in language-modeling experiments at the moderate hundred-million-parameter scale. Despite their constrained parameterizations, these layers train stably and can match corresponding Transformer baselines. Overall, our results suggest that CEM provides a useful lens for understanding Transformer layer parameterization, connecting Transformer architectures to energy-based models and motivating further exploration of energy-guided layer designs.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果能量最小化框架重新解释Transformer层参数化，揭示权重共享与低秩交互的设计空间。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer层中多头注意力和门控MLP的参数化选择大多基于经验，缺乏理论指导，亟需统一框架理解其设计原理。
analysis.problem: 如何从能量最小化视角推导Transformer层的参数化结构，并探索受约束但有效的层设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因果能量最小化（CEM）框架，将Transformer层重述为条件能量函数上的优化步骤，推导出权重共享MHA、共享投影的gated MLP等设计。
contributions: 提出CEM框架，统一解释Transformer层参数化与能量模型的关系。
识别出包含层内权重共享、对角加低秩交互、轻量预条件子和递归更新的设计空间。
analysis.experiments: 在数亿参数规模的语言建模实验中，CEM派生层训练稳定且性能匹配标准Transformer基线。
limitations: 实验规模限于中等参数（数亿），未验证更大规模或不同任务。
CEM框架可能无法覆盖所有Transformer变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果能量最小化框架重新解释Transformer层参数化，揭示权重共享与低秩交互的设计空间。

papers.title: Your Language Model is Its Own Critic: Reinforcement Learning with Value Estimation from Actor's Internal States
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for Large Reasoning Models hinges on baseline estimation for variance reduction, but existing approaches pay a heavy price: PPO requires a policy-model scale critic, while GRPO needs multiple rollouts per prompt to keep its empirical group mean stable. We introduce Policy Optimization with Internal State Value Estimation), which obtains a baseline at negligible cost by using the policy model's internal signals already computed during the policy forward pass. A lightweight probe predicts the expected verifiable reward from the hidden states of the prompt and generated trajectory, as well as token-entropy statistics, and is trained online alongside the policy. To preserve gradient unbiasedness despite using trajectory-conditioned features, we introduce a cross-rollout construction that predicts each rollout's value from an independent rollout's internal states. Because POISE estimates prompt value using only a single rollout, it enables higher prompt diversity for a fixed compute budget during training. This reduces gradient variance for more stable learning and also eliminates the compute overhead of sampling costs for detecting zero-advantage prompts. On Qwen3-4B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B across math reasoning benchmarks, POISE matches DAPO while requiring less compute. Moreover, its value estimator shows similar performance to a separate LLM-scale value model and generalizes to various verifiable tasks. By leveraging the model's own internal representations, POISE enables more stable and efficient policy optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出POISE方法，利用策略模型内部状态进行价值估计，实现更稳定高效的强化学习策略优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法（如PPO、GRPO）在基线估计上计算成本高：PPO需要与策略模型同规模的评论家，GRPO需要多次采样以稳定组均值。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加显著计算开销的前提下，获得低方差的价值基线以稳定策略优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用策略模型前向传播中已计算的内部状态（隐藏状态和token熵统计），通过轻量级探针预测可验证奖励，并采用跨rollout构造保持梯度无偏性。
contributions: 提出POISE，利用策略模型内部状态进行价值估计，无需额外大规模评论家或多rollout。
引入跨rollout构造，确保使用轨迹条件特征时梯度无偏。
实验表明POISE在数学推理基准上匹配DAPO性能，且计算开销更低。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B上，针对数学推理基准进行实验，POISE匹配DAPO性能且计算更少。
limitations: 可能依赖模型内部表征的质量，对于内部表征较差的模型效果可能受限。
跨rollout构造可能增加实现复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出POISE方法，利用策略模型内部状态进行价值估计，实现更稳定高效的强化学习策略优化。

papers.title: Ensemble Distributionally Robust Bayesian Optimisation
papers.abstract: We study zeroth-order optimisation under context distributional uncertainty, a setting commonly tackled using Bayesian optimisation (BO). A prevailing strategy to make BO more robust to the complex and noisy nature of data is to employ an ensemble as the surrogate model, thereby mitigating the weaknesses of any single model. In this study, we propose a novel algorithm for Ensemble Distributionally Robust Bayesian Optimisation that remains computationally tractable while managing continuous context. We obtain theoretical sublinear regret bounds, improving current state-of-the-art results. We show that our method's empirical behaviour aligns with its theoretical guarantees.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法，在连续上下文中实现可计算且具有理论次线性遗憾界。
analysis.research_motivation: 贝叶斯优化在处理复杂噪声数据时鲁棒性不足，现有集成方法虽能缓解单一模型弱点，但缺乏对上下文分布不确定性的处理且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在连续上下文分布不确定性下，设计计算可行且具有理论保证的集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法，通过集成代理模型和分布鲁棒优化框架处理连续上下文不确定性，并保持计算可处理性。
contributions: 提出首个在连续上下文中可计算的集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法
推导出次线性遗憾界，改进了当前最优理论结果
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的上下文分布不确定性
理论界可能在实际中不够紧致
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化算法，在连续上下文中实现可计算且具有理论次线性遗憾界。

papers.title: ProteinJEPA: Latent prediction complements protein language models
papers.abstract: Protein language models are trained primarily with masked language modeling (MLM), which predicts amino-acid identities at masked positions. We ask whether latent-space prediction can complement these token-level objectives under matched wall-clock budget. Across pretrained and random-init protein sequence encoders at 35--150M parameters, we find that the best protein-JEPA design is not all-position latent prediction but a variant: predicting latent targets only at masked positions, and retaining the MLM cross-entropy. We call this recipe masked-position MLM+JEPA. On a 16-task downstream suite (15 frozen linear probes plus SCOPe-40 zero-shot fold retrieval), under matched wall-clock budgets, this recipe wins more tasks than it loses against MLM-only continuation: 10 wins / 3 losses / 3 ties (hereafter W/L/T) on pretrained ESM2-35M, 11/2/3 on ESM2-150M while results in pretraining from scratch are mixed (6/8/2). Gains are seen for multiple models on 11 of 16 tasks, including stability, \b{eta}\beta \b{eta}-lactamase fitness, variant effect, intrinsic disorder, remote homology, enzyme classification, and SCOPe-40 fold retrieval. Tasks with more losses than wins are Fluorescence (TAPE) and Peptide-HLA Binding. All-position MLM+JEPA matches MLM-only overall but does not reproduce the masked-position gains. JEPA-only (no MLM) collapses in nearly every experiment. We conclude that JEPA, when combined with MLM, is competitive and can outperform pure MLM in pretraining and continued training, even under matched wall-clock budgets.

analysis.tldr: 在匹配时间预算下，仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留MLM交叉熵的JEPA变体可提升蛋白质语言模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 蛋白质语言模型主要依赖掩码语言建模（MLM）训练，但潜在空间预测能否在相同计算预算下补充这种词元级目标尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 研究潜在预测（JEPA）与MLM结合是否能提升蛋白质语言模型在下游任务上的表现，并找到最优结合方式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全位置潜在预测效果不佳，仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留MLM交叉熵的变体（masked-position MLM+JEPA）表现最好；纯JEPA（无MLM）几乎在所有实验中失败。
analysis.method: 提出masked-position MLM+JEPA方法，即在掩码位置同时进行MLM词元预测和JEPA潜在预测，保留MLM交叉熵损失。
contributions: 发现仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留MLM交叉熵的JEPA变体优于全位置预测和纯MLM。
在16个下游任务上验证了该方法在匹配时间预算下优于纯MLM持续训练，并在多个任务上取得增益。
analysis.experiments: 在35M-150M参数的预训练和随机初始化蛋白质序列编码器上，使用16任务下游套件（15个冻结线性探针加SCOPe-40零样本折叠检索）进行实验，匹配壁钟时间预算。
limitations: 在Fluorescence和Peptide-HLA Binding任务上表现不如纯MLM。
从零开始预训练时结果不一致（6胜8负2平）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在匹配时间预算下，仅在掩码位置进行潜在预测并保留MLM交叉熵的JEPA变体可提升蛋白质语言模型性能。

papers.title: Why Self-Inconsistency Arises in GNN Explanations and How to Exploit It
papers.abstract: Recent work has observed that explanations produced by Self-Interpretable Graph Neural Networks (SI-GNNs) can be self-inconsistent: when the model is reapplied to its own explanatory graph subset, it may produce a different explanation. However, why self-inconsistency arises remains poorly understood. In this work, we first identify re-explanation-induced context perturbation as the direct cause of score variation. We then introduce a latent signal assignment hypothesis to explain why only some edges are sensitive to this perturbation, and analyze how conciseness regularization affects latent signal assignment. Given that self-inconsistent edges do not provide stable evidence for the model's prediction, we propose Self-Denoising (SD), a model-agnostic and training-free post-processing strategy that calibrates explanations with only one additional forward pass. Experiments across representative SI-GNN frameworks, backbone architectures, and benchmark datasets support our hypothesis and show that SD consistently improves explanation quality while adding only about 4--6\% computational overhead in practice.

analysis.tldr: 发现自解释图神经网络（SI-GNN）解释的自不一致性源于重解释导致的上下文扰动，并提出一种轻量级后处理策略SD来校准解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 自解释图神经网络（SI-GNN）的解释存在自不一致问题，即模型对其自身解释子图重新应用时可能产生不同解释，这损害了解释的可靠性，但原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 解释自不一致性的根本原因是什么，以及如何在不增加训练成本的情况下缓解该问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出重解释导致的上下文扰动是分数变化的直接原因，并提出潜在信号分配假说解释为何只有部分边对该扰动敏感，同时分析了简洁性正则化对信号分配的影响。
analysis.method: 提出Self-Denoising (SD)，一种模型无关、无需训练的后处理策略，仅需额外一次前向传播即可校准解释。
contributions: 首次识别重解释导致的上下文扰动是SI-GNN解释自不一致性的直接原因，并提出潜在信号分配假说。
提出SD方法，轻量级后处理策略有效提升解释质量，仅增加约4-6%计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多种SI-GNN框架、骨干网络和基准数据集上验证了假说，并显示SD一致提升解释质量。
limitations: SD方法可能对特定类型的图结构或任务效果有限。
假说和方法的理论分析深度可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现自解释图神经网络（SI-GNN）解释的自不一致性源于重解释导致的上下文扰动，并提出一种轻量级后处理策略SD来校准解释。

papers.title: LARAG: Link-Aware Retrieval Strategy for RAG Systems in Hyperlinked Technical Documentation
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances the factual grounding of Large Language Models by conditioning their outputs on external documents. However, standard embedding-based retrievers treat naturally structured corpora, such as technical manuals, as flat collections of passages, thereby overlooking the hyperlink topology that users rely on when navigating such content. We introduce LARAG (Link-Aware RAG): a lightweight, link-aware retrieval strategy that leverages the author-defined hyperlink structure already present in HTML documentation, encoding hyperlink relations as metadata in the chunk representations and exploiting them to perform a form of graph-like retrieval of locally relevant content. In a benchmark of twenty expert-designed queries over Rulex Platform technical documentation and four prompting strategies, LARAG consistently improves answer quality, achieving the highest BERTScore F1, while retrieving fewer chunks and generating fewer tokens than a baseline RAG architecture used for comparison. These results show that directly leveraging the existing hyperlink topology of technical documentation, even without explicit graph construction or inference, enables an implicit form of graph-like retrieval that yields a more faithful and efficient RAG pipeline, providing better grounding at lower cost.

analysis.tldr: LARAG利用超链接拓扑结构改进RAG检索，在技术文档问答中提升质量并降低开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准RAG系统将结构化文档（如技术手册）视为扁平段落集合，忽略了用户导航时依赖的超链接拓扑，导致检索质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文档中已有的超链接结构来改进RAG系统的检索效果，而不需要显式构建图结构或进行图推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LARAG，一种轻量级的链接感知检索策略，将超链接关系编码为块表示的元数据，并利用这些元数据执行隐式的图式检索，以获取局部相关的内容。
contributions: 提出LARAG，一种利用超链接拓扑的轻量级检索策略，无需显式图构建或推理。
在Rulex Platform技术文档的20个专家设计查询和四种提示策略上，LARAG在BERTScore F1上达到最高，同时检索更少的块并生成更少的token。
analysis.experiments: 在Rulex Platform技术文档的20个专家设计查询和四种提示策略上进行评估，与基线RAG架构比较，LARAG在BERTScore F1上表现最佳，且检索块数和生成token数更少。
limitations: 仅在单一技术文档集上评估，泛化性有待验证。
未讨论超链接结构稀疏或缺失时的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LARAG利用超链接拓扑结构改进RAG检索，在技术文档问答中提升质量并降低开销。

papers.title: Excluding the Target Domain Improves Extrapolation: Deconfounded Hierarchical Physics Constraints
papers.abstract: Extrapolation to out-of-distribution conditions is a fundamental challenge for physics-constrained deep generative models. Existing methods apply physical constraints as a single static regularization term uniformly across the generation process, and address neither the hierarchical structure of physical laws and the confounding variable problem. We propose the Deconfounded Hierarchical Gate (DHG), which serves as a diagnostic and control mechanism: it identifies when and how strongly temperature confounding contaminates each constraint level, so that hierarchical gates reflect intrinsic physical inconsistency rather than spurious temperature effects. DHG combines counterfactual estimation via the do-operator with backdoor adjustment to remove confounding, then applies Coarse-to-Fine physical constraints progressively. We report a counter-intuitive finding in pretraining: excluding the target-domain data from pretraining outperforms including it by 39% in extrapolation performance (RMSE 0.224 vs. 0.324). This occurs because FNO learns domain-agnostic physical patterns that transfer more effectively when the target domain is withheld. On a lithium-ion battery temperature extrapolation benchmark (trained at 24 degrees Celsius, evaluated at 4.0--43.0 degrees Celsius), our method achieves RMSE = 0.215, a 46% improvement over the unconstrained baseline (Pure CFM: 0.397).

analysis.tldr: 提出去混杂层次门控机制，通过排除目标域数据预训练提升物理约束生成模型的外推性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理约束深度生成模型在分布外条件下外推困难，现有方法将物理约束作为单一静态正则项，忽视物理定律的层次结构和混杂变量问题。
analysis.problem: 解决物理约束生成模型在温度混杂下的外推性能退化问题，特别是层次化物理约束中的混杂偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现反直觉现象：预训练时排除目标域数据比包含目标域数据的外推性能提升39%，因为FNO学习到域无关的物理模式，在目标域被排除时迁移更有效。
analysis.method: 提出去混杂层次门控（DHG），结合do算子的反事实估计和后门调整去除温度混杂，然后逐步应用由粗到细的物理约束。
contributions: 提出DHG机制，诊断并控制温度混杂对层次约束的影响，使门控反映内在物理不一致而非虚假温度效应。
发现并验证预训练排除目标域数据可显著提升外推性能，揭示域无关物理模式迁移的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在锂离子电池温度外推基准上（训练于24°C，评估于4.0-43.0°C），方法达到RMSE=0.215，比无约束基线（Pure CFM: 0.397）提升46%。
limitations: 方法依赖温度作为主要混杂变量，可能不适用于其他类型混杂。
反事实估计和后门调整需要因果图假设，实际应用中可能难以准确指定。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出去混杂层次门控机制，通过排除目标域数据预训练提升物理约束生成模型的外推性能。

papers.title: Does Your Neural Network Extrapolate? Feature Engineering as Identifiability Bias for OOD Generalization
papers.abstract: Successful deep neural networks discover salient features of data. We show when and why they fail to learn out-of-distribution (OOD)-relevant representations from an in-distribution (ID) training window. This requires decoupling feature learning from data-generating-process (DGP) identifiability. From a single training window, OOD extrapolation is non-identifiable: infinitely many DGPs are $\varepsilon$-observationally equivalent on the training data but diverge arbitrarily outside it, and no in-distribution criterion alone reliably breaks the tie. A structural commitment, the feature map, label map, and model class $(\varphi, \psi, \mathcal{M})$, dictates the assumed DGP and governs OOD generalization while leaving ID performance essentially unchanged. When architecture, pretraining, augmentation, input formats, or domain knowledge implicitly inject the missing commitment, the model succeeds. When it cannot infer OOD-relevant structure from ID evidence, it fails. Changing only the representation can make the same architecture, at the same in-distribution loss, differ by ${\sim}520\times$ out of distribution. When the commitment is correct and identifiable, OOD error vanishes. For example, Fourier coordinates turn periodic extrapolation into interpolation on $\mathbb{S}^1$. The same mechanism predicts outcomes in three natural-science settings (mass-action chemistry; Kepler's-third-law exoplanet prediction, $n=2{,}362$; and cross-species coding-DNA detection) and in a 264-run positional-encoding study across Transformer, Mamba, and S4D. Finally, a controlled study shows: correct features are necessary but not sufficient. The model class must express the target, and the transformed training data must cover the relevant representation space.

analysis.tldr: 特征工程作为可辨识性偏差，决定了神经网络能否在分布外泛化中成功外推。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在分布外（OOD）场景下常失败，根本原因在于从单一训练窗口无法唯一确定数据生成过程（DGP），导致OOD外推不可辨识。
analysis.problem: 从分布内（ID）训练数据中学习OOD相关表征的失败机制，以及如何通过特征工程注入结构承诺实现OOD泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从单一训练窗口，存在无穷多个DGP在训练数据上ε-观测等价但OOD行为任意发散；ID准则无法可靠区分。结构承诺（特征映射、标签映射、模型类）决定OOD泛化，而ID性能几乎不变。改变表征可使相同架构、相同ID损失下OOD性能差异达~520倍。
analysis.method: 将特征工程视为可辨识性偏差：通过注入结构承诺（如傅里叶坐标将周期外推转化为圆上的插值）使OOD泛化可辨识。
contributions: 揭示了OOD外推不可辨识的根本原因，并建立特征工程与可辨识性偏差的理论联系。
通过多个自然科学和位置编码实验验证了结构承诺对OOD泛化的决定性作用。
analysis.experiments: 在三个自然科学场景（质量作用化学、开普勒第三定律系外行星预测n=2362、跨物种编码DNA检测）和264次位置编码实验（Transformer、Mamba、S4D）中验证理论预测。
limitations: 理论框架主要针对特征工程，未覆盖其他OOD泛化策略（如数据增强、正则化）。
实验限于特定领域，通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 特征工程作为可辨识性偏差，决定了神经网络能否在分布外泛化中成功外推。

papers.title: SHRED: Retain-Set-Free Unlearning via Self-Distillation with Logit Demotion
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning for large language models (LLMs) aims to selectively remove memorized content such as private data, copyrighted text, or hazardous knowledge, without costly full retraining. Most existing methods require a retain set of curated examples to prevent catastrophic degradation of general model utility, creating an extra data dependency that complicates deployment. We propose SHRED (Self-distillation via High-surprisal-only Retain-set-free Entropy Demotion), a retain-set-free unlearning method built on a key insight: not all tokens within a forget set instance carry memorized information equally. High-information tokens concentrate the model's memorized knowledge, while low-information tokens reflect general language competence. SHRED operates in two stages. (1) Selection: We perform a forward pass on a forget set instance, collect per-token autoregressive probabilities, and select the bottom (lowest probability, highest Shannon information) as forget positions; the remaining positions are retained as benign anchors. (2) Training: We construct modified KL targets that demote the memorized token's logit at forget positions while preserving the original distribution at benign positions. The model is then trained via a single top KL self-distillation objective that simultaneously drives forgetting and utility preservation. We evaluate SHRED across four standard unlearning benchmarks and demonstrate that it establishes a new Pareto-optimal trade-off between forget efficacy and model utility, outperforming retain-set-dependent methods. Our analysis shows that SHRED is robust against relearning attacks and membership-inference attacks, and it maintains stable utility even after many sequential unlearning runs.

analysis.tldr: SHRED 通过自蒸馏和对数几率降级实现无需保留集的大模型遗忘，在遗忘效果与模型效用间达到帕累托最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大模型遗忘方法通常需要保留集来防止模型效用退化，这增加了数据依赖和部署复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用保留集的情况下，实现大模型的高效遗忘，同时保持模型的一般能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遗忘集实例中不同token携带的记忆信息量不同：高信息token集中了模型记忆的知识，低信息token反映通用语言能力。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：1) 选择阶段：通过前向传播获取每个token的自回归概率，选择概率最低（信息量最高）的token作为遗忘位置，其余作为良性锚点；2) 训练阶段：构建修改的KL目标，在遗忘位置降级记忆token的logit，在良性位置保持原始分布，通过单一KL自蒸馏目标同时驱动遗忘和效用保持。
contributions: 提出首个无需保留集的大模型遗忘方法SHRED，基于token信息量差异的洞察。
在四个标准遗忘基准上达到遗忘效果与模型效用的帕累托最优，超越依赖保留集的方法。
SHRED对重新学习攻击和成员推理攻击具有鲁棒性，且多次顺序遗忘后仍保持稳定效用。
analysis.experiments: 在四个标准遗忘基准上评估，与依赖保留集的方法比较，显示帕累托最优；分析了鲁棒性和多次遗忘稳定性。
limitations: 可能对高信息token的选择阈值敏感，需要进一步调优。
仅适用于自回归语言模型，对其他架构的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SHRED 通过自蒸馏和对数几率降级实现无需保留集的大模型遗忘，在遗忘效果与模型效用间达到帕累托最优。

papers.title: Vaporizer: Breaking Watermarking Schemes for Large Language Model Outputs
papers.abstract: In this paper, we investigate the recent state-of-the-art schemes for watermarking large language models (LLMs) outputs. These techniques are claimed to be robust, scalable and production-grade, aimed at promoting responsible usage of LLMs. We analyse the effectiveness of these watermarking techniques against an extensive collection of modified text attacks, which perform targeted semantic changes without altering the general meaning of the text content. Our approach encompasses multiple attack strategies, which include lexical alterations, machine translation, and even neural paraphrasing. The attack efficacy is measured with two target criteria - successful removal of the watermark and preservation of semantic content. We evaluate semantic preservation through BERT scores, text complexity measures, grammatical errors, and Flesch Reading Ease indices. The experimental results reveal varying levels of effectiveness among different watermarking models, with the same underlying result that it is possible to remove the watermark with reasonable effort. This study sheds light on the strengths and weaknesses of existing LLM watermarking systems, suggesting how they should be constructed to improve security of available schemes.

analysis.tldr: 本文系统评估了多种LLM水印方案在语义保持攻击下的脆弱性，发现现有水印均可被合理努力移除。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM水印技术被宣称鲁棒且可扩展，但实际安全性缺乏系统评估，需要检验其在语义保持攻击下的有效性。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM水印方案在针对语义保持的文本修改攻击下是否真正鲁棒？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同水印模型在攻击下表现各异，但共同结论是：通过合理努力（如词汇替换、机器翻译、神经释义）均可移除水印，同时保持语义内容。
analysis.method: 提出Vaporizer攻击框架，包含词汇修改、机器翻译、神经释义等多种策略，通过BERT分数、文本复杂度、语法错误和Flesch易读性指数评估语义保持。
contributions: 系统评估了多种SOTA LLM水印方案在语义保持攻击下的鲁棒性
揭示了现有水印方案均可被合理努力移除的脆弱性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用BERT分数、文本复杂度等指标评估语义保持。
limitations: 攻击策略可能未覆盖所有水印方案或更复杂的攻击
语义保持评估指标可能不完全反映人类感知
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文系统评估了多种LLM水印方案在语义保持攻击下的脆弱性，发现现有水印均可被合理努力移除。

papers.title: HBEE: Human Behavioral Entropy Engine -- Pre-Registered Multi-Agent LLM Simulation of Peer-Suspicion-Based Detection Inversion
papers.abstract: Insider threat detection assumes that an adaptive insider leaves behavioral residue distinguishing them from legitimate users. We test this assumption against an LLM-driven adaptive insider in a controlled multi-agent simulator. Our pre-registered five-condition study isolates defender mode (cascade vs. blind UEBA) crossed with adversary type (naive vs. adaptive OPSEC) plus a no-mole control, across 100 runs (95 valid after pre-committed exclusions). The primary finding is a detection inversion: at T_60, the adaptive mole's suspicion in-degree is statistically lower than a randomly selected innocent agent (Cliff's delta = -0.694, 95% BCa CI [-0.855, -0.519], Mann-Whitney p << 0.01). The pre-registered prediction was the opposite direction. A pre-registered equivalence test (H2) shows adaptive OPSEC produces no detectable shift in the mole's UEBA rank under either defender mode. The two detection signals (peer suspicion graph in-degree and per-agent UEBA rank) decouple under adaptive adversary behavior. We bound generalization explicitly: a pre-registered Gini calibration check (H4) returns FAIL, with HBEE pairwise message-exposure Gini (0.213) diverging from the SNAP Enron reference (0.730) by |Delta Gini| = 0.52, exceeding the equivalence bound by 5x. The paper makes a narrow but surprising claim: in a controlled environment where adaptive OPSEC is implementable as an LLM directive, peer-suspicion-cascade detection inverts. We release the simulator, pre-registration document, frozen scenarios, raw telemetry, and analysis pipeline under an open-source license.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM模拟发现，自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑检测中反而比随机无辜者更不被怀疑，出现检测反转。
analysis.research_motivation: 内部威胁检测假设自适应内鬼会留下行为痕迹，但LLM驱动的自适应对手可能颠覆这一假设，值得在受控环境中检验。
analysis.problem: 检验自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑检测和UEBA排名下的可检测性，并验证检测反转现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检测反转：自适应内鬼的怀疑入度显著低于随机无辜者；两种检测信号（同伴怀疑图入度和UEBA排名）在自适应对手下解耦；Gini校准检查失败，模拟与真实网络结构差异大。
analysis.method: 构建多智能体LLM模拟器HBEE，设计五条件预注册实验，交叉防御模式（级联vs盲UEBA）与对手类型（朴素vs自适应OPSEC），运行100次。
contributions: 发现检测反转：自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑检测中比随机无辜者更不被怀疑
公开模拟器、预注册文档、场景、原始数据和分析流程
analysis.experiments: 预注册五条件实验，100次运行（95次有效），使用Cliff's delta、Mann-Whitney检验、等价检验等统计方法。
limitations: 模拟环境与真实组织网络存在差异（Gini校准失败）
结论仅适用于LLM指令实现的自适应OPSEC场景
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM模拟发现，自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑检测中反而比随机无辜者更不被怀疑，出现检测反转。

papers.title: Physical Simulators as Do-Operators: Causal Discovery under Latent Confounders for AI-for-Science
papers.abstract: Existing interventional causal discovery methods -- IGSP, DCDI, ENCO -- assume causal sufficiency (no latent confounders) and rely on virtual interventions in synthetic simulators. In AI-for-Science settings such as molecular design and materials science, latent confounders are ubiquitous and real interventions (e.g., physics-based simulations) require hours to days per data point. We propose CFM-SD (Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data), which uses first-principles physical simulators as do-operators in Pearl's interventional calculus to simultaneously handle latent confounders and real interventional data. Theoretically, $d$-variable causal structure is identifiable with $O(d)$ single-variable interventions -- the minimum under physical realizability constraints. In Intrinsic Evaluation on synthetic data ($\gamma=0.2$--$0.8$), CFM-SD achieves average F1$=0.800$ vs. F1$=0.127$--$0.562$ for all baselines. In Extrinsic Evaluation on real scientific data, CFM-SD achieves 57--58\% bias reduction in molecular toxicity prediction and battery electrolyte optimization, demonstrating practical value beyond synthetic benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CFM-SD方法，利用物理模拟器作为do算子，在存在潜在混杂因素的情况下进行因果发现，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 在AI for Science场景（如分子设计、材料科学）中，潜在混杂因素普遍存在，而现有干预因果发现方法假设因果充分性且依赖合成模拟器中的虚拟干预，无法处理真实数据中的混杂问题。
analysis.problem: 在存在潜在混杂因素且真实干预成本高昂（物理模拟每次需数小时至数天）的条件下，如何高效地进行因果结构发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CFM-SD（Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data），将第一性原理物理模拟器作为Pearl干预演算中的do算子，同时处理潜在混杂因素和真实干预数据。
contributions: 理论上证明在物理可实现性约束下，d变量因果结构可通过O(d)次单变量干预识别，达到最小干预次数。
在合成数据和真实科学数据上验证方法有效性，显著优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据（γ=0.2-0.8）上，CFM-SD平均F1=0.800，基线F1=0.127-0.562；在真实科学数据上，分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化中偏差减少57-58%。
limitations: 方法依赖物理模拟器的可用性和准确性。
理论结果可能对干预类型有特定假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CFM-SD方法，利用物理模拟器作为do算子，在存在潜在混杂因素的情况下进行因果发现，显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: The Moltbook Files: A Harmless Slopocalypse or Humanity's Last Experiment
papers.abstract: Moltbook is a Reddit-like platform where OpenClaw agents post, comment, and vote at scale - a so far unprecedented incident that comes with serious safety concerns. With the aim of studying emergent behavior in populations, we release the Moltbook Files, a dataset of 232k posts and 2.2M comments covering the platform's first 12 days, processed through a pipeline to identify and remove Personally-Identifiable Information (PII). We analyze community structure, authorship, lexical properties, sentiment, topics, semantic geometry, and comment interaction. To understand how Moltbook data could affect the next generation of language models, we fine-tune Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct on Moltbook Files with three adaptation levels. Our PII pipeline reveals that agents post API keys, passwords, BIP39 seed phrases on Moltbook, a publicly indexed platform. The overall sentiment is mostly neutral and mildly positive (66.6% neutral, 19.5% positive) and shows a tendency for self-referential linking. We find that fine-tuning on Moltbook data reduces truthfulness from 0.366 to 0.187. However, a model fine-tuned on a size-matched Reddit dataset produces a comparable decrease. Moltbook thus seems to be more of a harmless slopocalypse. However, tail risks remain, including agent affordances, contamination of future crawls through self-links, and potential transfer of traits to the next generation of language models. More broadly, our findings highlight the importance of control baselines in emergent misalignment evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 分析OpenClaw智能体在Moltbook平台上的行为数据集，发现微调会降低模型真实性，但效果与Reddit数据相当，因此更像无害的“垃圾内容灾难”。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模智能体平台（如Moltbook）可能带来安全风险，但缺乏对其行为及对语言模型影响的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 研究Moltbook平台上智能体社区的行为特征，以及该数据微调对语言模型真实性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体会在公开平台泄露API密钥等敏感信息；微调Moltbook数据后模型真实性下降，但控制实验表明与Reddit数据效果相当，因此Moltbook本身并非特别危险。
analysis.method: 收集Moltbook平台12天的数据（232k帖子、2.2M评论），构建PII清洗管道，分析社区结构、情感、主题等，并以三种适应级别微调Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct。
contributions: 发布Moltbook Files数据集，包含大规模智能体交互数据
系统分析智能体社区行为，发现PII泄露和真实性下降现象
通过控制实验表明Moltbook数据对模型真实性的影响与普通Reddit数据相当
analysis.experiments: 微调Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct，评估真实性（从0.366降至0.187），并与大小匹配的Reddit数据集对比。
limitations: 仅分析单一平台和单一模型
未深入探讨尾部风险的实际影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 分析OpenClaw智能体在Moltbook平台上的行为数据集，发现微调会降低模型真实性，但效果与Reddit数据相当，因此更像无害的“垃圾内容灾难”。

papers.title: Accelerated and data-efficient flow prediction in stirred tanks via physics-informed learning
papers.abstract: The simulation of fluid flows is computationally expensive due to the complexity of its governing partial differential equations. Machine learning models offer a potential surrogate, enabling learning from simulations and significantly faster predictions of flow fields. However, these models require large training datasets, which introduces a trade-off between dataset generation cost and predictive accuracy. In this work, we investigate the relationship between the size of the training-set and accuracy of the prediction when learning steady flow fields in an industrial-scale stirred vessel. A data set of steady flows is generated using Reynolds Averaged Navier Stokes (RANS) simulations in a range of realistic operating conditions, including impeller speeds and liquid heights. We train implicit neural representations of flow fields and compare purely data-driven and constrained variants. Model performance is evaluated using global mean squared error (MSE), qualitative spatial comparisons of predicted and reference flow fields, and tracer transport simulations. We find that the prediction error decreases monotonically with increasing training data, but also that it exhibits clear diminishing returns beyond moderate dataset sizes. Physics-based constraints significantly improve accuracy and reduce variability across training runs in low-data regimes, and they lead to more stable tracer-transport behavior. Furthermore, reasonable interpolation can be achieved over different impeller speeds and liquid heights. However, these benefits come with an increase in the complexity of training, and their relative advantage diminishes as the training set grows.

analysis.tldr: 物理信息约束显著提升搅拌槽流场预测的数据效率和精度，尤其在低数据场景下。
analysis.research_motivation: 流体模拟计算成本高，机器学习代理模型虽能加速预测，但需要大量训练数据，导致数据生成成本与预测精度之间的权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在减少训练数据量的同时保持或提升搅拌槽稳态流场预测的精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预测误差随训练数据增加单调递减，但存在明显的边际收益递减；物理约束在低数据场景下显著提升精度并降低训练方差，但优势随数据量增加而减弱。
analysis.method: 使用隐式神经表示（INR）学习流场，对比纯数据驱动和物理信息约束（如RANS方程残差）两种变体。
contributions: 系统研究了搅拌槽流场预测中训练集大小与精度的关系，揭示了边际收益递减规律。
证明了物理信息约束在低数据场景下能显著提升精度、降低方差，并改善示踪剂传输模拟的稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 使用RANS模拟生成不同操作条件（叶轮转速、液位高度）下的稳态流场数据集，通过全局MSE、空间定性比较和示踪剂传输模拟评估模型性能。
limitations: 物理约束增加了训练复杂度。
物理约束的优势在大数据集下减弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 物理信息约束显著提升搅拌槽流场预测的数据效率和精度，尤其在低数据场景下。

papers.title: Prompt Engineering Strategies for LLM-based Qualitative Coding of Psychological Safety in Software Engineering Communities: A Controlled Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Qualitative analysis plays a pivotal role in understanding the human and social aspects of software engineering. However, it remains a demanding process shaped by the subjective interpretation of individual researchers and sensitive to methodological choices such as prompt design. Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising opportunities to support this type of analysis, although their reliability in reproducing human qualitative reasoning under varying prompting conditions remains largely untested. This study presents a controlled empirical evaluation of three LLMs -- Claude Haiku, DeepSeek-Chat, and Gemini 2.5 Flash -- across two prompt engineering strategies (zero-shot and multi-shot closed coding), using Cohen's kappa as the primary agreement metric over ten independent runs per configuration. Results suggest that multi-shot prompting significantly improves agreement for Claude Haiku (Delta kappa = +0.034, Wilcoxon p = 0.004) but not for DeepSeek-Chat or Gemini 2.5 Flash. Intra-model stability varies substantially -- DeepSeek-Chat and Claude Haiku exhibit the lowest variance (SD approx. 0.017), while Gemini 2.5 Flash is the least stable (SD = 0.038). A systematic over-prediction of "Sharing Negative Feedback" is identified across all models (bias ratios up to 5.25x), alongside consistent under-prediction of "Expressing Concerns." Collectively, these findings provide empirical evidence for prompt engineering guidelines in LLM-assisted qualitative coding for software engineering research.

analysis.tldr: LLM辅助软件工程定性编码中，多样本提示策略对部分模型有效，但存在系统性偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 定性分析在理解软件工程中的人类和社会因素方面至关重要，但过程耗时且受研究者主观解释和提示设计等方法论选择影响。LLM提供了支持此类分析的潜力，但其在不同提示条件下复现人类定性推理的可靠性尚未充分测试。
analysis.problem: 评估不同LLM和提示工程策略在软件工程社区心理安全定性编码中的一致性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多样本提示显著提高了Claude Haiku的一致性，但对DeepSeek-Chat和Gemini 2.5 Flash无显著改善；模型内稳定性差异大，Gemini 2.5 Flash最不稳定；所有模型均存在系统性过度预测“分享负面反馈”和不足预测“表达担忧”的偏差。
analysis.method: 控制实验，使用三种LLM（Claude Haiku、DeepSeek-Chat、Gemini 2.5 Flash）和两种提示策略（零样本和多样本封闭编码），以Cohen's kappa为一致性指标，每个配置运行10次独立实验。
contributions: 提供了LLM辅助定性编码中提示工程策略的实证评估
揭示了不同LLM在一致性和偏差方面的差异，为提示工程指南提供依据
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用Cohen's kappa和Wilcoxon检验，以及偏差比率等指标。
limitations: 仅评估了三种LLM和两种提示策略，泛化性有限
未探讨其他提示工程方法或更复杂的编码任务
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM辅助软件工程定性编码中，多样本提示策略对部分模型有效，但存在系统性偏差。

papers.title: OrchJail: Jailbreaking Tool-Calling Text-to-Image Agents by Orchestration-Guided Fuzzing
papers.abstract: Tool-calling text-to-image (T2I) agents can plan and execute multi-step tool chains to accomplish complex generation and editing queries. However, this capability introduces a new safety attack surface: harmful outputs may arise from tool orchestration, where individually benign steps combine into unsafe results, making prompt-only jailbreak techniques insufficient. We present OrchJail, an orchestration-guided fuzzing framework for jailbreaking tool-calling T2I agents. Its core idea is to exploit high-risk tool-orchestration patterns: by learning from successful jailbreak tool-calling traces and their causal relationships to prompt wording, OrchJail directly guides the fuzzing search toward prompts that are more likely to trigger unsafe multi-step tool behaviors, rather than relying on surface-level textual perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrchJail improves jailbreak effectiveness and efficiency across representative toolcalling T2I agents, achieving higher attack success rates, better image fidelity, and lower query costs, while remaining robust against common jailbreak defenses. Our work highlights tool orchestration as a critical, previously unexplored attack surface and provides a novel framework for uncovering safety risks in T2I agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出OrchJail框架，利用编排引导的模糊测试来越狱调用工具的文生图智能体，揭示工具编排是新的安全攻击面。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具调用的文生图智能体通过多步工具链完成复杂任务，但工具编排可能将单个无害步骤组合成有害输出，而现有仅基于提示的越狱技术不足以应对这种新攻击面。
analysis.problem: 如何有效越狱工具调用的文生图智能体，利用工具编排中的高风险模式生成有害输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，工具编排中单个无害步骤的组合可能导致不安全结果，且成功越狱的工具调用轨迹与提示措辞存在因果关系。
analysis.method: 提出OrchJail，一种编排引导的模糊测试框架，通过学习成功越狱的工具调用轨迹及其与提示措辞的因果关系，直接引导模糊搜索朝向更可能触发不安全多步工具行为的提示。
contributions: 首次揭示工具编排是工具调用文生图智能体的关键安全攻击面。
提出OrchJail框架，通过编排引导的模糊测试实现高效越狱。
analysis.experiments: 在多个代表性工具调用文生图智能体上进行实验，OrchJail在越狱有效性、效率、攻击成功率、图像保真度和查询成本方面均优于基线，且对常见越狱防御具有鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的工具调用T2I智能体。
未讨论对防御机制的适应性更新。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OrchJail框架，利用编排引导的模糊测试来越狱调用工具的文生图智能体，揭示工具编排是新的安全攻击面。

papers.title: Tracking Large-scale Shared Bikes with Inertial Motion Learning in GNSS Blocked Environments
papers.abstract: Although Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) provide a general solution for bike tracking outdoors, there still exist complex riding environments where only inertial navigation systems work, such as urban canyons. Despite decades of research, localization using only low-cost inertial sensors still faces challenges such as cumulative drifts and poor robustness caused by filtering methods. Furthermore, sensors such as visual and LiDAR could provide reliable measurements, but they are not suitable for large-scale deployment. In this paper, we propose an inertial tracking framework that integrates bicycle mechanical constraints with a mixture-of-experts model. Specifically, we leverage multiple expert modules to capture shared representations and weight them through the gating mechanism, thus improving multi-task learning performance and enabling uncertainty-aware trajectory estimation. Furthermore, based on the mechanical transmission between the pedal and the rear wheel of a bike, we explore the intrinsic relationship between the rider's periodic pedalling behaviors and acceleration variations, and convert such patterns into bike's wheel speed for dynamic calibration. Experiments with real-world riding data from shared bikes of the DiDi ride-hailing platform demonstrate that our system improves the accuracy of baselines by at least 12%, with wheel speed errors below 0.5 m/s at 95-percentile.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，在GNSS失效环境下将定位精度提升至少12%。
analysis.research_motivation: GNSS在城市峡谷等复杂环境中失效，而低成本惯性传感器定位存在累积漂移和鲁棒性差的问题；视觉/LiDAR传感器不适合大规模部署，亟需一种可大规模部署的高精度惯性追踪方案。
analysis.problem: 在GNSS阻塞环境下，仅使用低成本惯性传感器实现高精度、鲁棒的自行车追踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出惯性追踪框架，集成自行车机械约束与混合专家模型：利用多个专家模块捕获共享表示并通过门控机制加权，实现多任务学习和不确定性感知轨迹估计；基于踏板与后轮机械传动关系，将骑行者周期性踩踏行为与加速度变化转换为车轮速度进行动态校准。
contributions: 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，提升多任务学习性能并实现不确定性感知轨迹估计。
利用踏板与后轮机械传动关系，将骑行踩踏模式转换为车轮速度进行动态校准，降低定位误差。
analysis.experiments: 使用滴滴出行平台共享单车真实骑行数据进行实验，系统相比基线方法精度提升至少12%，车轮速度误差在95百分位下低于0.5 m/s。
limitations: 可能依赖特定自行车机械结构，泛化到其他车型需调整。
实验仅在共享单车场景验证，未覆盖更多复杂环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，在GNSS失效环境下将定位精度提升至少12%。

papers.title: Rubric-based On-policy Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a powerful paradigm for model alignment, yet its reliance on teacher logits restricts its application to white-box scenarios. We contend that structured semantic rubrics can serve as a scalable alternative to teacher logits, enabling OPD using only teacher-generated responses. To prove it, we introduce ROPD, a simple yet foundational framework for rubric-based OPD. Specifically, ROPD induces prompt-specific rubrics from teacher-student contrasts, and then utilizes these rubrics to score the student rollouts for on-policy optimization. Empirically, ROPD outperforms the advanced logit-based OPD methods across most scenarios, and achieving up to a 10x gain in sample efficiency. These results position rubric-based OPD as a flexible, black-box-compatible alternative to the prevailing logit-based OPD, offering a simple yet strong baseline for scalable distillation across proprietary and open-source LLMs. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于评分标准的在线蒸馏（ROPD），用结构化语义评分替代教师logits，实现黑盒兼容的模型对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线蒸馏（OPD）依赖教师logits，仅适用于白盒场景，限制了其在黑盒模型（如闭源LLM）中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用教师logits的情况下，实现有效的在线蒸馏？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结构化语义评分可作为教师logits的可扩展替代方案，仅需教师生成的响应即可实现OPD。
analysis.method: 从教师-学生对比中诱导出提示特定的评分标准，并用这些评分标准对学生生成进行评分，用于在线优化。
contributions: 提出ROPD框架，首次将结构化语义评分用于在线蒸馏，实现黑盒兼容。
实验表明ROPD在多数场景下优于基于logits的先进OPD方法，样本效率提升达10倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多个场景下与基于logits的OPD方法对比，ROPD在多数场景中表现更优，样本效率提升达10倍。
limitations: 评分标准的自动生成可能引入噪声，影响蒸馏质量。
当前仅在部分场景验证，通用性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于评分标准的在线蒸馏（ROPD），用结构化语义评分替代教师logits，实现黑盒兼容的模型对齐。

papers.title: Unsolvability Ceiling in Multi-LLM Routing: An Empirical Study of Evaluation Artifacts
papers.abstract: Efficient routing across multiple LLMs enables cost-quality tradeoffs by directing queries to the cheapest capable model. Prior work attributes routing headroom to an "unsolvability ceiling", queries no model in the pool can solve. We present a large-scale study of multi-tier LLM routing with 206,000 query-model pairs across six benchmarks (MMLU, MedQA, HumanEval, MBPP, Alpaca, ShareGPT) using the Gemma 4 and Llama 3.1 families. Evaluating with both LLM-as-a-judge and exact-match metrics, we show that a substantial portion of reported unsolvability stems from evaluation artifacts: (i) systematic judge biases favoring verbosity over correctness, (ii) truncation under fixed generation budgets, and (iii) output format mismatches. Through dual-judge validation and exact-match grounding, we reduce measured unsolvability across tasks. We introduce a decomposition framework attributing failures to these artifacts, revealing consistent patterns across domains and model families. These artifacts also distort router training signals: standard routers collapse to majority-class prediction (~79% smallest-tier optimal), confirmed via random-feature and shuffled-label controls, incurring a 13-17 percentage point opportunity cost. We provide actionable recommendations including dual-judge validation, exact-match anchoring, and cost-sensitive objectives. Our findings suggest existing routing headroom estimates are substantially inflated, underscoring the need for reliable evaluation protocols in multi-LLM systems.

analysis.tldr: 多LLM路由中的不可解性天花板很大程度上源于评估伪影，而非模型真实能力不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 多LLM路由通过将查询分配给最便宜的可用模型来实现成本-质量权衡，但现有工作将路由空间归因于“不可解性天花板”，即池中所有模型都无法解决的查询。然而，这种不可解性的真实来源尚不明确，可能被评估伪影所扭曲，导致路由性能估计不准确。
analysis.problem: 论文旨在系统性地识别和量化多LLM路由评估中导致“不可解性”的伪影，并评估这些伪影对路由性能估计和训练信号的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，报告的不可解性很大一部分源于评估伪影，包括：(i) 评判者偏向冗长而非正确性，(ii) 固定生成预算下的截断，(iii) 输出格式不匹配。这些伪影导致不可解性被高估，并扭曲了路由器的训练信号，使标准路由器退化为多数类预测。
analysis.method: 论文通过大规模研究（206,000个查询-模型对，六个基准，Gemma 4和Llama 3.1系列），使用LLM-as-a-judge和精确匹配指标，通过双评判验证和精确匹配锚定来减少测量到的不可解性，并引入分解框架将失败归因于这些伪影。
contributions: 揭示了多LLM路由中不可解性天花板的主要来源是评估伪影，而非模型能力不足。
提出了分解框架和双评判验证等方法来纠正评估伪影，并给出了可操作的建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 研究仅基于Gemma 4和Llama 3.1系列，可能不适用于其他模型家族。
评估伪影的纠正方法可能引入新的偏差或计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多LLM路由中的不可解性天花板很大程度上源于评估伪影，而非模型真实能力不足。

papers.title: Escaping the Diversity Trap in Robotic Manipulation via Anchor-Centric Adaptation
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer broad general capabilities, deploying them on specific hardware requires real-world adaptation to bridge the embodiment gap. Since robot demonstrations are costly, this adaptation must often occur under a strict data budget. In this work, we identify a critical diversity trap: the standard heuristic of "maximizing coverage" by collecting diverse, single-shot demonstrations can be self-defeating due to non-vanishing estimation noise. We formalize this phenomenon as a Coverage--Density Trade-off. By decomposing the policy error into estimation (density) and extrapolation (coverage) terms, we characterize an interior optimal allocation of unique conditions for a fixed budget. Guided by this analysis, we propose Anchor-Centric Adaptation (ACA), a two-stage framework that first stabilizes a policy skeleton through repeated demonstrations at core anchors, then selectively expands coverage to high-risk boundaries via teacher-forced error mining and constrained residual updates. Real-robot experiments validate our trade-off framework and demonstrate that ACA significantly improves task reliability and success rates over standard diverse sampling strategies under the same budget.

analysis.tldr: 提出锚点中心适应方法，通过重复演示核心锚点再选择性扩展覆盖，解决机器人操作中数据有限时的多样性陷阱问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人演示成本高，部署VLA模型到特定硬件需在严格数据预算下进行域适应，但标准的最大覆盖启发式方法因估计噪声而效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 在有限数据预算下，如何避免多样性陷阱（即收集多样但单次演示导致策略误差非减）并优化策略性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出多样性陷阱：标准启发式方法最大化覆盖收集多样单次演示，但因非零估计噪声而自败；形式化为覆盖-密度权衡，存在唯一条件分配的最优内点。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：首先在核心锚点通过重复演示稳定策略骨架，然后通过教师强制错误挖掘和约束残差更新选择性扩展到高风险边界。
contributions: 识别并形式化机器人操作中的多样性陷阱，提出覆盖-密度权衡理论。
提出锚点中心适应（ACA）方法，在固定预算下显著提升任务可靠性和成功率。
analysis.experiments: 真实机器人实验验证了权衡框架，并显示ACA在相同预算下优于标准多样采样策略。
limitations: 可能依赖锚点选择的质量，未讨论自动锚点发现。
实验仅在特定硬件和任务上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出锚点中心适应方法，通过重复演示核心锚点再选择性扩展覆盖，解决机器人操作中数据有限时的多样性陷阱问题。

papers.title: MORPH-U: Multi-Objective Resilient Motion Planning for V2X-Enabled Autonomous Driving in High-Uncertainty Environments via Simulation
papers.abstract: V2X can warn an autonomous vehicle about hazards beyond line-of-sight, but it also brings uncertainty: messages may be delayed, dropped, or even forged. Meanwhile, map knowledge may change during a trip, forcing the vehicle to replan under tight real-time budgets. This paper studies how to make motion planning and low-level control robust to such uncertain, event-driven updates. We present MORPH-U, a CARLA-based closed-loop stack that fuses LiDAR/radar/camera with V2X (CAM/DENM) into a Local Dynamic Map (LDM) and triggers Hybrid-A* replanning when validated hazards or map changes affect the planned route. We expose the planning/control trade-offs via a multi-objective formulation over tracking error, safety margin (minimum TTC), responsiveness, and smoothness, and select operating points using Pareto-frontier analysis. To avoid unsafe replanning from faulty V2X triggers, MORPH-U adds a lightweight Byzantine-inspired acceptance gate that combines a quorum rule with an on-board sensor veto. Experiments in dynamic CARLA scenarios show that V2X-augmented LDM improves downstream safety, Pareto tuning provides controllable accuracy-comfort trade-offs, and the gate prevents replanning under saturated false-DENM injection ($p_{\text{attack}}=1.0$).

analysis.tldr: 提出MORPH-U，一种融合V2X与多目标优化的鲁棒运动规划框架，通过拜占庭容错门控和Pareto前沿分析应对高不确定性自动驾驶场景。
analysis.research_motivation: V2X通信在自动驾驶中引入不确定性（消息延迟、丢失或伪造），同时地图知识可能动态变化，现有方法难以在实时预算下鲁棒地处理这些事件驱动的更新。
analysis.problem: 如何使自动驾驶的运动规划和底层控制对V2X带来的不确定性和动态地图变化具有鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: V2X增强的局部动态地图（LDM）可提升下游安全性；Pareto调优提供可控的精度-舒适度权衡；拜占庭容错门控在饱和虚假DENM注入下仍能阻止不安全重规划。
analysis.method: 基于CARLA的闭环堆栈，融合LiDAR/雷达/相机与V2X（CAM/DENM）构建LDM，触发Hybrid-A*重规划；通过多目标优化（跟踪误差、安全裕度、响应性、平滑性）和Pareto前沿分析选择工作点；添加轻量级拜占庭容错门控（仲裁规则+车载传感器否决）避免错误触发。
contributions: 提出MORPH-U，一个在CARLA中实现的闭环运动规划框架，融合V2X与多传感器构建LDM。
通过多目标优化和Pareto前沿分析显式量化规划/控制权衡。
设计轻量级拜占庭容错门控，抵御V2X攻击导致的不安全重规划。
analysis.experiments: 在动态CARLA场景中进行实验，验证了V2X增强LDM提升安全性、Pareto调优提供可控权衡、门控在p_attack=1.0时阻止重规划。
limitations: 实验仅在仿真环境中进行，未在真实车辆上验证。
拜占庭门控可能对非攻击性但高延迟的V2X消息过于保守。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MORPH-U，一种融合V2X与多目标优化的鲁棒运动规划框架，通过拜占庭容错门控和Pareto前沿分析应对高不确定性自动驾驶场景。

papers.title: MISA: Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.abstract: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) sets the state of the art for fine-grained inference-time sparse attention by introducing a learned token-wise indexer that scores every prefix token and selects the most relevant ones for the main attention. To remain expressive, the indexer uses many query heads (for example, 64 on DeepSeek-V3.2) that share the same selected token set; this multi-head design is precisely what makes the indexer the dominant cost on long contexts. We propose MISA (Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention), a drop-in replacement for the DSA indexer that treats its indexer heads as a pool of mixture-of-experts. A lightweight router uses cheap block-level statistics to pick a query-dependent subset of only a few active heads, and only those heads run the heavy token-level scoring. This preserves the diversity of the original indexer pool while reducing the per-query cost from scoring every prefix token with every head to scoring it with only a handful of routed heads, plus a negligible router term computed on a small set of pooled keys. We further introduce a hierarchical variant of MISA that uses the routed pass to keep an enlarged candidate set and then re-ranks it with the original DSA indexer to recover the final selected tokens almost exactly. With only eight active heads and no additional training, MISA matches the dense DSA indexer on LongBench across DeepSeek-V3.2 and GLM-5 while running with eight and four times fewer indexer heads respectively, and outperforms HISA on average. It also preserves fully green Needle-in-a-Haystack heatmaps up to a 128K-token context and recovers more than 92% of the tokens selected by the DSA indexer per layer. Our TileLang kernel delivers roughly a 3.82 times speedup over DSA's original indexer kernel on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU.

analysis.tldr: MISA 通过混合专家路由机制大幅降低长上下文 LLM 推理中稀疏注意力索引器的计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文 LLM 推理中，稀疏注意力虽能降低主注意力计算量，但其索引器因使用多头设计（如 DeepSeek-V3.2 的 64 头）成为主要计算瓶颈，尤其在长序列上开销巨大。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲索引器表达能力和选择质量的前提下，显著减少索引器每查询的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DSA 索引器使用多头共享同一选中 token 集，导致每查询需对所有前缀 token 进行所有头的评分，计算量随上下文长度线性增长。
analysis.method: 将 DSA 索引器头视为专家池，通过轻量路由器基于块级统计选择少量活跃头，仅这些头执行细粒度 token 评分；进一步提出分层变体，用路由结果扩大候选集后经原 DSA 索引器重排序以近似精确选择。
contributions: 提出 MISA，一种即插即用的稀疏注意力索引器替代方案，通过混合专家路由将每查询评分头数从 64 降至 8。
引入分层 MISA 变体，在保持高选择恢复率（>92%）的同时进一步降低开销。
在 LongBench 上匹配 DSA 索引器性能，并在 H200 GPU 上实现约 3.82 倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在 LongBench 上使用 DeepSeek-V3.2 和 GLM-5 评估，MISA 以 8 个活跃头匹配 DSA 索引器性能（分别减少 8 倍和 4 倍头数），并优于 HISA；在 128K 上下文上保持完整绿色 Needle-in-a-Haystack 热力图，每层恢复超过 92% 的 DSA 索引器选中 token。
limitations: 路由器的块级统计可能在某些极端长上下文或特殊查询模式下引入偏差。
分层变体需要额外的重排序步骤，可能增加少量延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MISA 通过混合专家路由机制大幅降低长上下文 LLM 推理中稀疏注意力索引器的计算开销。

papers.title: Mage: Multi-Axis Evaluation of LLM-Generated Executable Game Scenes Beyond Compile-Pass Rate
papers.abstract: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

analysis.tldr: 提出多轴评估协议Mage，揭示编译通过率在LLM生成游戏场景中具有误导性，需结合结构保真度等多维度评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 编译通过率是LLM代码生成的主流评估指标，但对多组件领域特定工件（如游戏场景）可能产生误导，需要更全面的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有编译通过率指标无法准确反映LLM生成的可执行游戏场景的功能正确性和领域保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接NL-to-C#生成运行时通过率最高（43%），但结构空洞（机制F1≈0.12）；结构IR条件使运行时通过率减半但恢复领域忠实结构（F1最高1.00）；行为级和全场景粒度在统计上无显著差异，表明输入粒度饱和。
analysis.method: 提出四轴评估协议Mage：编译成功、运行时成功、结构保真度、机制遵循，应用于858次生成尝试，涵盖4个LLM、26个Unity目标模式概念和2种IR粒度。
contributions: 揭示编译通过率与功能正确性在游戏场景生成中呈反相关
提出多轴评估协议Mage，包含编译、运行时、结构保真度和机制遵循四个维度
发布包含基准、回放日志和逐记录指标的评估数据集
analysis.experiments: 在858次生成尝试上评估4个开源LLM（7B-30B），使用26个手工制作的Unity目标模式概念和两种自动提取的IR粒度。
limitations: 仅针对Unity游戏场景，可能不适用于其他领域
评估协议依赖手工制作的目标模式，扩展性有限
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多轴评估协议Mage，揭示编译通过率在LLM生成游戏场景中具有误导性，需结合结构保真度等多维度评估。

papers.title: Rethinking Importance Sampling in LLM Policy Optimization: A Cumulative Token Perspective
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning, including reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), has emerged as a powerful approach for LLM post-training. Central to these approaches is the design of the importance sampling (IS) ratio used in off-policy policy-gradient estimation. Existing methods face a fundamental bias-variance dilemma: token-level IS ratios, as adopted by PPO (Schulman et al., 2017) and GRPO (Shao et al., 2024), introduce bias by ignoring prefix state distribution mismatch; full sequence ratios provide exact trajectory-level correction but suffer from high variance due to the multiplicative accumulation of per-token ratios, while GSPO (Zheng et al., 2025) improves numerical stability via length normalization at the cost of deviating from the exact full-sequence IS correction. In this work, we identify the cumulative token IS ratio, the product of per-token ratios up to position $t$, as a theoretically principled solution to this dilemma. We prove that, under the token-level policy-gradient formulation, this ratio provides an unbiased prefix correction for each token-level gradient term and has strictly lower variance than the full sequence ratio. Building on this insight, we propose CTPO (Cumulative Token Policy Optimization), which combines the cumulative token IS ratio with position-adaptive clipping that scales log-space clip bounds according to the natural $\sqrt{t}$ growth of the cumulative log-ratio. This yields more consistent regularization across token positions. We implement and evaluate CTPO in the tool-integrated reasoning setting on several challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, achieving the best average performance across both model scales compared with strong GRPO and GSPO baselines. Code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出累积token重要性采样比CTPO，在LLM策略优化中实现无偏且低方差的策略梯度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM策略优化方法在重要性采样比设计上面临偏差-方差困境：token级IS比存在偏差，全序列比方差高，GSPO通过长度归一化偏离精确校正。
analysis.problem: 如何设计重要性采样比以同时实现无偏策略梯度估计和低方差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出token级IS比因忽略前缀状态分布不匹配而引入偏差；全序列比因逐token比值的乘积累积导致高方差；GSPO的长度归一化虽提升数值稳定性但偏离精确校正。
analysis.method: 提出累积token重要性采样比（位置t处之前所有token比值的乘积），证明其在token级策略梯度公式下提供无偏前缀校正且方差严格低于全序列比；结合位置自适应裁剪（对数空间裁剪边界随√t增长）提出CTPO算法。
contributions: 识别累积token IS比为理论上无偏且低方差的解决方案，并给出严格证明。
提出CTPO算法，结合累积token IS比与位置自适应裁剪，在工具集成推理任务上取得最佳平均性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的数学推理基准上，与GRPO和GSPO基线比较，CTPO在两个模型规模上均取得最佳平均性能。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖数学推理场景，未验证其他LLM后训练任务。
位置自适应裁剪的√t增长假设可能不适用于所有模型或任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出累积token重要性采样比CTPO，在LLM策略优化中实现无偏且低方差的策略梯度估计。

papers.title: SparseRL-Sync: Lossless Weight Synchronization with ~100x Less Communication
papers.abstract: In large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) systems with decoupled Trainer-Rollout execution, the Trainer must regularly synchronize policy weights to the Rollout side to limit policy staleness. When inter-node bandwidth is abundant, such synchronization is usually only a small fraction of end-to-end cost. As model size grows, however, the communication demand rises rapidly. In bandwidth-constrained or network-variable deployments -- for example, cross-datacenter or cross-cluster settings, heterogeneous resource pools, and online RL -- weight synchronization can become a dominant bottleneck for throughput and tail latency. We observe that, in mainstream large-model RL training, the locations where parameters actually change are highly sparse at the element level (often 99%+ sparsity). Building on this observation, we propose and implement SparseRL-Sync, which replaces full-weight transfers with a lossless sparse update payload (indices and values) that can be exactly reconstructed on the inference side, thereby preserving 100% fidelity. Under a simplified cost model, sparse synchronization reduces the per-update communication volume from S to approximately S/X; with 99% sparsity (X ~ 100), this yields about a 100x reduction in transmitted data. Combined with appropriate bucketing, SparseRL-Sync also reduces launch and control-plane overhead, significantly improving scalability and end-to-end efficiency in bandwidth-limited and highly asynchronous RL settings.

analysis.tldr: 利用参数更新的高度稀疏性，提出无损稀疏同步方法，将RL训练-推理通信量降低约100倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 在大规模强化学习系统中，Trainer与Rollout之间的权重同步在带宽受限或网络波动场景下成为吞吐和延迟瓶颈，现有全量传输方式通信开销随模型规模急剧增长。
analysis.problem: 如何在大模型RL训练中，在保持权重同步100%保真度的前提下，大幅降低跨节点通信量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主流大模型RL训练中，参数实际变化的位置在元素级高度稀疏（通常99%以上稀疏度），为稀疏同步提供了基础。
analysis.method: 提出SparseRL-Sync，用稀疏更新载荷（索引+值）替代全权重传输，在推理侧精确重建，结合分桶减少控制面开销。
contributions: 观察到RL训练中参数更新的高度稀疏性（99%+），并基于此设计无损稀疏同步方案
实现SparseRL-Sync，在保持100%保真度下将通信量降低约100倍，提升带宽受限和高度异步RL场景的可扩展性与效率
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 稀疏同步依赖于参数更新的高稀疏性，若模型更新密集则收益有限
未讨论稀疏索引本身的编码开销及极端网络条件下的实际性能
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用参数更新的高度稀疏性，提出无损稀疏同步方法，将RL训练-推理通信量降低约100倍。

papers.title: CSR: Infinite-Horizon Real-Time Policies with Massive Cached State Representations
papers.abstract: Deploying massive large language models (LLMs) as continuous cognitive engines for robotics is bottlenecked by the time-to-first-token (TTFT) latency required to process extensive state histories. Existing solutions like RAG or sliding windows compromise global context or incur prohibitive re-computation costs. We formalize the optimal task structure for minimizing latency and theoretically prove that prefix stability, incremental extensibility, and asynchronous state reconciliation are necessary conditions for real-time performance. Building on these proofs, we introduce the Cached State Representation (CSR) framework as the practical instantiation of these properties, ensuring optimal KV-cache reuse. To sustain these properties over infinite horizons, we further propose an Asynchronous State Reconciliation (ASR) algorithm that offloads state memory eviction to a parallel computational resource to eliminate latency spikes. On a physical robot wirelessly connected to an on-premise GPU server, CSR achieves a 26-fold latency reduction (14.67s to 0.56s) for 120K token contexts with a 235B parameter model compared to a standard baseline. On an embodied AI benchmark, we achieve SOTA recall (0.836 vs. 0.459) while maintaining RAG-level latency. ASR is validated to sustain bounded, spike-free TTFT over 10 eviction cycles in continuous real-world operation. Together, CSR and ASR enable massive LLMs to function as continuously operating, high-frequency (> 2 Hz) embodied policies.

analysis.tldr: 提出CSR框架和ASR算法，通过理论证明和KV缓存重用，将大模型作为机器人实时策略的延迟降低26倍，并实现无限时域的无尖峰推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 将大规模LLM作为机器人连续认知引擎时，处理大量状态历史的TTFT延迟成为瓶颈，现有方法如RAG或滑动窗口会牺牲全局上下文或带来高昂重计算成本。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模LLM作为机器人实时策略时，实现无限时域的低延迟、无尖峰推理，同时保持全局上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Cached State Representation (CSR)框架，通过理论证明前缀稳定性、增量可扩展性和异步状态协调是实时性能的必要条件，并基于这些性质实现最优KV缓存重用；进一步提出Asynchronous State Reconciliation (ASR)算法，将状态内存驱逐卸载到并行计算资源以消除延迟尖峰。
contributions: 形式化定义了最小化延迟的最优任务结构，并理论证明了前缀稳定性、增量可扩展性和异步状态协调是实时性能的必要条件。
提出CSR框架作为这些性质的实践实例化，确保最优KV缓存重用。
提出ASR算法，在无限时域上维持这些性质，消除延迟尖峰。
在物理机器人上实现26倍延迟降低（14.67s到0.56s），在具身AI基准上达到SOTA召回率（0.836 vs 0.459）并保持RAG级延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在物理机器人（无线连接本地GPU服务器）上，使用235B参数模型处理120K token上下文，CSR实现26倍延迟降低（14.67s到0.56s）；在具身AI基准上，召回率0.836 vs 基线0.459，延迟与RAG相当；ASR在10次驱逐周期中维持有界、无尖峰的TTFT。
limitations: 实验仅在单一机器人平台和特定模型上验证，泛化性未知。
ASR算法依赖并行计算资源，可能增加硬件成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSR框架和ASR算法，通过理论证明和KV缓存重用，将大模型作为机器人实时策略的延迟降低26倍，并实现无限时域的无尖峰推理。

papers.title: Activation Differences Reveal Backdoors: A Comparison of SAE Architectures
papers.abstract: Backdoor attacks on language models pose a significant threat to AI safety, where models behave normally on most inputs but exhibit harmful behavior when triggered by specific patterns. Detecting such backdoors through mechanistic interpretability remains an open challenge. We investigate two sparse autoencoder architectures -- Crosscoders and Differential SAEs (Diff-SAE) -- for isolating backdoor-related features in fine-tuned models. Using a controlled SQL injection backdoor triggered by year-based context ("2024" triggers vulnerable code, "2023" triggers safe code), we evaluate both approaches across LoRA and full-rank fine-tuning regimes on SmolLM2-360M. We find that Diff-SAE consistently and substantially outperforms Crosscoders for backdoor isolation. Diff-SAE achieves a Backdoor Isolation Score (BIS) of 0.40 with perfect precision (1.0) and zero false positive rate across most experimental conditions, while Crosscoders fail almost entirely with BIS below 0.02 in most cases. This performance gap holds across multiple transformer layers (14, 18, 22, 26) and both fine-tuning regimes, with full-rank fine-tuning producing particularly clean backdoor signals. Our results suggest that backdoors manifest as directional activation shifts rather than sparse feature activations, making difference-based representations fundamentally more effective for detection. These findings have important implications for AI safety monitoring and the development of interpretability tools for detecting model manipulation.

analysis.tldr: Diff-SAE 比 Crosscoders 更有效检测语言模型后门，后门表现为方向性激活偏移。
analysis.research_motivation: 后门攻击对语言模型构成严重安全威胁，但通过机制可解释性检测后门仍是一个开放挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何利用稀疏自编码器架构有效隔离和检测微调模型中的后门相关特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活，因此基于差异的表示更有效。
analysis.method: 比较 Crosscoders 和 Differential SAE (Diff-SAE) 两种稀疏自编码器架构，在受控的 SQL 注入后门场景下，评估它们隔离后门特征的能力。
contributions: 发现 Diff-SAE 在后门隔离任务上显著优于 Crosscoders，达到 0.40 的后门隔离分数和完美精度。
揭示后门表现为方向性激活偏移，为基于差异的检测方法提供了理论依据。
analysis.experiments: 在 SmolLM2-360M 模型上，使用基于年份的 SQL 注入后门，在 LoRA 和全秩微调两种设置下，评估多个 Transformer 层（14, 18, 22, 26）的性能。
limitations: 仅测试了单一后门类型（SQL 注入），可能不适用于其他后门模式。
实验仅在小型模型（360M）上进行，未验证在更大模型上的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Diff-SAE 比 Crosscoders 更有效检测语言模型后门，后门表现为方向性激活偏移。

papers.title: Generative Modeling with Flux Matching
papers.abstract: We introduce Flux Matching, a new paradigm for generative modeling that generalizes existing score-based models to a broader family of vector fields that need not be conservative. Rather than requiring the model to equal the data score, the Flux Matching objective imposes a weaker condition that admits infinitely many vector fields whose stationary distribution is the data. This flexibility enables a class of generative models that cannot be learned under score matching, in which inductive biases, structural priors, and properties of the dynamics can be directly imposed or optimized. We show that Flux Matching performs strongly on high-dimensional image datasets and, more importantly, that our added freedom unlocks a range of applications including faster sampling, interpretable and mechanistic models, and dynamics that encode directed dependencies between variables. More broadly, Flux Matching opens a new dimension in generative modeling by turning the vector field itself into a design choice rather than a fixed target. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出 Flux Matching 框架，放宽向量场约束，使生成模型能直接设计非保守向量场，实现更快采样与可解释动力学。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于分数的生成模型要求向量场为保守场（即数据分数），限制了模型设计的灵活性，难以直接融入归纳偏置或结构先验。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个更通用的生成建模框架，允许学习非保守向量场，从而在保持生成质量的同时获得设计自由度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Flux Matching 目标，仅要求向量场的稳态分布为数据分布，而非等于数据分数，从而允许学习无穷多非保守向量场。
contributions: 提出 Flux Matching 新范式，将生成模型从分数匹配扩展到更广泛的非保守向量场族。
展示了该框架在高维图像数据集上的强性能，并解锁了更快采样、可解释机制模型和编码变量间有向依赖的动力学等应用。
analysis.experiments: 在高维图像数据集上进行了实验，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对非保守向量场的优化稳定性要求更高。
理论分析可能尚未覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Flux Matching 框架，放宽向量场约束，使生成模型能直接设计非保守向量场，实现更快采样与可解释动力学。

papers.title: DCGL: Dual-Channel Graph Learning with Large Language Models for Knowledge-Aware Recommendation
papers.abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have proven highly effective for recommendation systems by capturing latent item relationships, while recent integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has further enhanced semantic understanding and addressed knowledge sparsity issues. Nevertheless, current KG-and-LLM-based methods still face three main limitations: 1) inadequate modeling of implicit semantic relationships beyond explicit KG links; 2) suboptimal single-channel fusion of ID and LLM embeddings, which often leads to signal interference and blurred representations; and 3) insufficient consideration of user-item interaction frequency variations in recommendation strategies.
