Existing graph diffusion methods process atoms and bonds within a single computation stream, where atom-bond information synchronization can only occur implicitly across layers. We argue that this single-stream paradigm, rather than the choice of any particular aggregation kernel, is a key architectural bottleneck. We propose DualLGD (Dual-stream Line Graph Diffusion), which reformulates molecular graph denoising as the alternating solution of two coupled subproblems: atom-level reasoning and bond-level reasoning, each operating in its own dedicated representation space. The line graph provides a natural mathematical construction for the bond space, in which bond angles, dihedrals, conjugation chains, and rings correspond to local topological motifs between bonds. Incidence-constrained bidirectional cross-attention synchronizes the two streams at every layer, ensuring that each atom attends only to its incident bonds and vice versa, respecting the fundamental chemical principle that an atom's environment is determined by its bonding context. On the NPLIB1 and MassSpecGym benchmarks, DualLGD achieves top-1 accuracy of 34.37\% and 23.89\%, approximately $3\times$ the previous state of the art. Ablation studies confirm the architecture as the primary source of improvement: DualLGD without any pre-training already surpasses the previous best fully pretrained model.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流线图扩散模型DualLGD，通过解耦原子与键推理实现质谱分子生成，准确率提升约3倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 从串联质谱进行从头分子生成是逆问题，核心难点在于原子级与键级推理的循环依赖：确定键类型需知端点原子化学环境，而原子环境又由其入射键定义。现有图扩散方法在单流中处理原子和键，原子-键信息同步仅能跨层隐式进行，导致瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 解决单流图扩散中原子与键信息同步不足的问题，实现从质谱数据生成高保真分子。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单流范式（而非特定聚合核）是关键架构瓶颈，并观察到线图可自然构建键空间，其中键角、二面角、共轭链和环对应键间局部拓扑模式。
analysis.method: 提出DualLGD，将分子图去噪重构为原子级推理和键级推理两个耦合子问题的交替求解，各自在专用表示空间操作；通过入射约束双向交叉注意力在每层同步两流，确保原子仅关注其入射键，反之亦然。
contributions: 识别单流图扩散是分子生成架构瓶颈，提出双流线图扩散范式。
设计入射约束双向交叉注意力机制，严格遵循化学原理。
在NPLIB1和MassSpecGym基准上实现top-1准确率34.37%和23.89%，约为先前最优的3倍。
analysis.experiments: 在NPLIB1和MassSpecGym基准上评估，DualLGD达到top-1准确率34.37%和23.89%，约为先前最优的3倍。消融实验确认架构是主要改进来源：无预训练的DualLGD已超越先前最佳全预训练模型。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量质谱数据，对噪声数据鲁棒性未知。
双流架构计算开销可能高于单流方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流线图扩散模型DualLGD，通过解耦原子与键推理实现质谱分子生成，准确率提升约3倍。

papers.title: An Interpretable and Scalable Framework for Evaluating Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Evaluation of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly critical, yet standard benchmarking methods rely on average accuracy, overlooking both the inherent stochasticity of LLM outputs and the heterogeneity of benchmark items. Item Response Theory (IRT) offers a principled framework for modeling latent model abilities and item characteristics, but conventional methods are computationally expensive and numerically unstable, limiting large-scale implementations. To address these challenges, we propose an interpretable and scalable framework for LLM evaluation based on the majorization-minimization principle. Our approach reformulates the problem as a sequence of constrained matrix factorization subproblems, enabling stable and efficient parameter estimation with theoretical guarantees for identifiability and convergence. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, including MATH-500 and six Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks, demonstrate that our method achieves superior scalability and interpretability. It delivers orders-of-magnitude speedups over competing methods while maintaining comparable or even higher estimation accuracy. Our results align with established scaling laws and offer insights into item difficulty and discrimination, informing more principled benchmark design.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于MM原则的可解释、可扩展的IRT框架，用于高效评估LLM。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估依赖平均准确率，忽略输出随机性和题目异质性；传统IRT方法计算昂贵且数值不稳定，难以大规模应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既可解释又高效的大规模LLM评估框架，以准确建模模型能力和题目特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于majorization-minimization原则，将IRT参数估计转化为一系列约束矩阵分解子问题，实现稳定高效的估计，并具有可辨识性和收敛性理论保证。
contributions: 提出一种可解释且可扩展的LLM评估框架，基于MM原则实现稳定高效的IRT参数估计。
在合成和真实数据集上实现数量级加速，同时保持或提高估计精度，并验证与缩放定律的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH-500和六个Open LLM Leaderboard基准上进行了实验，展示了可扩展性和可解释性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于二值化正确/错误响应数据，未涉及连续或部分评分场景。
框架的收敛性保证可能依赖于特定假设，实际应用中需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于MM原则的可解释、可扩展的IRT框架，用于高效评估LLM。

papers.title: Cognitive Agent Compilation for Explicit Problem Solver Modeling
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used for tutoring, feedback generation, and content creation, but their broad pretraining makes them hard to constrain and poor substitutes for controllable learners. Educational systems often require inspectable and editable knowledge states: educators want to know what a system assumes the learner knows, and learners benefit when the system can justify actions in terms of explicit skills, misconceptions, and strategies. Inspired by cognitive architectures, we propose Cognitive Agent Compilation (CAC), a framework that uses a strong teacher LLM to compile problem-solving knowledge into an explicit target agent. CAC separates (i) knowledge representation, (ii) problem-solving policy, and (iii) verification and update rules, with the goal of making bounded problem solving more inspectable and editable in educational settings. We present an early proof of concept implemented with Small Language Models that surfaces key design trade-offs, particularly between explicit control and scalable generalization, and positions CAC as an initial step toward bounded-knowledge AI for educational applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出认知智能体编译框架，将LLM问题求解知识编译为显式可检查的智能体，用于教育场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育系统需要可检查和可编辑的知识状态，但LLM难以约束且不透明，无法满足教育场景对显式技能、误解和策略的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM的问题求解知识转化为显式、可检查、可编辑的智能体模型，以支持教育应用中的可控学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出认知智能体编译（CAC）框架，使用强教师LLM将问题求解知识编译为显式目标智能体，分离知识表示、问题求解策略、验证与更新规则。
contributions: 提出CAC框架，实现从LLM到显式可检查智能体的知识编译。
通过小语言模型实现概念验证，揭示显式控制与可扩展泛化之间的设计权衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 当前仅为早期概念验证，可能在大规模任务上泛化能力有限。
显式控制与可扩展性之间的权衡可能限制实际应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出认知智能体编译框架，将LLM问题求解知识编译为显式可检查的智能体，用于教育场景。

papers.title: A Systematic Investigation of The RL-Jailbreaker in LLMs
papers.abstract: The evolution of generative models from next-token predictors to autonomous engines of complex systems necessitates rigorous safety hardening. Adversarial jailbreaking, the strategic manipulation of models to elicit harmful output, remains a primary threat to safe deployment. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) frames jailbreaking as a multi-step attack through sequential optimization, a mechanistic understanding of why the framework succeeds remains incomplete. To fill this gap, we present the first systematic decomposition of RL jailbreaking. We deconstruct the framework into problem formalization (reward function, action space, episode length), and algorithmic measures (RL algorithm, training data, reward-shaping) to identify the structural determinants of adversarial success. Our results reveal that the RL-jailbreaker successfully compromised all targeted models and safeguards. Through this first-of-its-kind analysis, we demonstrate that environment formalization, specifically dense rewards and extended episode lengths, is the primary driver of jailbreaking success. This work provides a tool for improving RL-jailbreaker efficiency and, ultimately, harden generative models resistant to RL-based attacks.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统分解RL越狱框架，发现密集奖励和长回合长度是攻击成功的关键驱动因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习（RL）被用于多步越狱攻击，但其成功机制尚不明确，缺乏系统性理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示RL越狱框架中哪些结构因素（问题形式化与算法措施）决定了攻击成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RL越狱成功攻破了所有目标模型和安全防护，环境形式化（密集奖励和长回合长度）是主要驱动因素。
analysis.method: 将RL越狱框架分解为问题形式化（奖励函数、动作空间、回合长度）和算法措施（RL算法、训练数据、奖励塑造），通过控制变量实验分析各因素影响。
contributions: 首次系统性分解RL越狱框架，识别其结构决定因素。
证明密集奖励和长回合长度是攻击成功的关键驱动因素。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有RL算法变体。
实验仅在有限模型和防护上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统分解RL越狱框架，发现密集奖励和长回合长度是攻击成功的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: BGM-IV: an AI-powered Bayesian generative modeling approach for instrumental variable analysis
papers.abstract: Instrumental-variable (IV) regression enables causal estimation under endogeneity, but modern IV problems often involve nonlinear structural effects and high-dimensional covariates. Existing nonlinear IV methods directly learn the causal relation in observed feature space or rely on learned representations within two-stage or moment-based procedures, which can struggle when the causal information is embedded in a high-dimensional representation. We propose BGM-IV, a latent Bayesian generative modeling approach that reframes nonlinear IV regression as posterior inference in a causally structured latent space. BGM-IV infers latent components that separately capture shared confounding structure, outcome-specific variation, treatment-specific variation, and covariate-only nuisance information. To account for endogeneity, BGM-IV replaces the confounded outcome likelihood with an IV-integrated pseudo-likelihood that averages over instrument-induced treatment values within the latent model. Across various benchmark datasets, BGM-IV remains competitive in the classical low-dimensional regime and performs best in high-dimensional covariate regimes. Together, these results show that structured latent generative modeling provides a principled and effective strategy to nonlinear IV estimation with rich covariates. The code of BGM-IV is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种贝叶斯生成式方法BGM-IV，通过结构化潜变量建模解决高维协变量下的非线性工具变量回归问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统工具变量回归在处理非线性结构和高维协变量时面临挑战，现有方法在因果信息嵌入高维表示时效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 高维协变量下非线性工具变量回归的因果效应估计问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将非线性IV回归重构为因果结构化潜空间中的后验推断，通过IV集成伪似然替代混淆结果似然，分离共享混杂、结果特异、处理特异和协变量噪声等潜成分。
contributions: 提出BGM-IV，一种基于潜贝叶斯生成模型的非线性IV回归方法。
通过结构化潜变量分解和IV集成伪似然有效处理高维协变量下的内生性问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上，BGM-IV在经典低维场景中保持竞争力，在高维协变量场景中表现最佳。
limitations: 可能对潜变量模型的结构假设敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高，尤其在高维场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种贝叶斯生成式方法BGM-IV，通过结构化潜变量建模解决高维协变量下的非线性工具变量回归问题。

papers.title: Learning Cross-Atlas Consistent Brain Disorder Representations via Disentangled Multi-Atlas Functional Connectivity Learning
papers.abstract: Functional connectivity (FC) derived from resting-state fMRI is widely used to characterize large-scale brain network alterations in neurological and psychiatric disorders. However, FC construction critically depends on the choice of brain atlas, and different parcellations may emphasize distinct organizational features, leading to heterogeneous and sometimes inconsistent representations. Existing multi-atlas approaches partially alleviate this issue but often fuse atlas-derived features or predictions at a relatively shallow level, while single-atlas disentanglement methods do not explicitly address cross-atlas heterogeneity. We propose Multi-Atlas Disentangled Connectivity LEarning (MADCLE), a multi-branch representation learning framework that jointly encodes FC matrices derived from different brain atlases. Rather than introducing a single explicitly shared latent variable across parcellations, MADCLE learns atlas-wise disease-related representations and encourages them to be cross-atlas consistent through distributional alignment. Meanwhile, covariate-related and atlas-dependent residual factors are modeled separately using covariate similarity supervision, atlas-specific reconstruction, and decorrelation constraints, thereby reducing the leakage of non-disease and parcellation-dependent information into the disease-related embeddings. Experiments on the ADNI and ADHD-200 datasets suggest that MADCLE achieves competitive or improved performance compared with single-atlas baselines, multi-atlas GNN/Transformer models, and recent multi-atlas consistency frameworks. These results support the potential value of structured disentanglement for FC-based disorder identification under heterogeneous parcellation schemes.

analysis.tldr: 提出多图谱解耦功能连接学习框架MADCLE，通过分布对齐实现跨图谱一致的脑疾病表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 功能连接（FC）依赖于脑图谱的选择，不同图谱会强调不同的组织特征，导致异质且不一致的表征，影响脑疾病识别的可靠性。现有方法要么浅层融合多图谱特征，要么单图谱解耦未解决跨图谱异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何从多个脑图谱的功能连接中学习跨图谱一致的疾病相关表征，同时分离协变量和图谱依赖的噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同脑图谱产生的FC表征存在异质性，直接融合或单图谱方法无法保证跨图谱一致性。
analysis.method: 提出MADCLE，一个多分支表征学习框架，对每个图谱学习疾病相关表征，通过分布对齐（如MMD）鼓励跨图谱一致性；同时用协变量监督、图谱特定重构和解耦约束分离协变量相关和图谱依赖的残差因素。
contributions: 提出多图谱解耦框架MADCLE，通过分布对齐实现跨图谱一致的疾病表征学习。
设计结构化解耦机制，分离疾病相关、协变量相关和图谱依赖的表征，减少信息泄漏。
在ADNI和ADHD-200数据集上验证了MADCLE相比单图谱和多图谱基线的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI和ADHD-200数据集上评估，与单图谱基线、多图谱GNN/Transformer模型及近期多图谱一致性框架比较，MADCLE取得有竞争力或更好的性能。
limitations: 未在更多疾病或更大规模数据集上验证泛化性。
分布对齐方法可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多图谱解耦功能连接学习框架MADCLE，通过分布对齐实现跨图谱一致的脑疾病表征。

papers.title: FlashMol: High-Quality Molecule Generation in as Few as Four Steps
papers.abstract: Generating chemically valid 3D molecular conformations is critical for computational drug discovery. Classical diffusion-based models like GeoLDM perform well but require hundreds of steps, making large-scale in silico screening impractical. Recent efforts on few-step molecular generation have accelerated this process to 12-50 steps, but they often largely sacrifice sample stability. In this work, we present FlashMol, an ultra-fast molecule generative model producing high-quality molecular conformations in as few as 4 steps. To achieve this, we adapt distribution matching distillation (DMD) - a reverse KL-divergence minimization objective - to the molecular domain for effective distillation. Considering the local minimization behavior of DMD, we respace the molecule generation timesteps, providing the generator with much better initialization and enables effective distillation. Additionally, to mitigate the mode-seeking behavior of DMD and improve diversity, we further regularize it with a Jensen-Shannon divergence term, which incorporates the mean-seeking behavior of the forward KL divergence. Extensive experiments on QM9 and GEOM-DRUG datasets demonstrate that FlashMol matches and even surpasses the original 1000-step teacher, achieving up to 250$\times$ acceleration in sampling speed while maintaining high molecular quality.

analysis.tldr: FlashMol 通过分布匹配蒸馏将分子生成步骤从数百步压缩至4步，实现250倍加速且质量不降。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统扩散模型生成3D分子构象需数百步，大规模虚拟筛选效率低；现有少步方法虽加速但牺牲样本稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现极少量步数（如4步）的高质量3D分子生成，同时保持化学有效性和多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）在分子域存在局部最小化行为，且其模式寻求特性会降低生成多样性。
analysis.method: 提出FlashMol，采用分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）结合重调度时间步和Jensen-Shannon散度正则化，实现4步生成高质量分子构象。
contributions: 首次将分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）应用于分子生成，实现4步超快生成。
提出重调度时间步策略改善初始化，以及JS散度正则化提升多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在QM9和GEOM-DRUG数据集上，FlashMol匹配甚至超越1000步教师模型，采样速度加速250倍。
limitations: 可能对复杂分子或特定化学空间泛化性需进一步验证。
JS散度正则化的超参数敏感度未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlashMol 通过分布匹配蒸馏将分子生成步骤从数百步压缩至4步，实现250倍加速且质量不降。

papers.title: Drawing Lines in Psychological Space: What K-means Clustering Reveals in Simulated and Real Psychometric Data
papers.abstract: K-means clustering is widely used in psychological and psychometric research to identify profiles, subgroups, and potential typologies, yet its classical formulation does not test whether such groups exist as latent psychological categories. Instead, K-means partitions multidimensional space into regions around centroids, favoring compact, approximately spherical clusters defined by geometric distance. In this paper, we examine this limitation through a sequence of controlled simulated datasets. We then extend the analysis to the SMARVUS dataset, a large international psychometric dataset comprising survey responses from university students across 35 countries, to evaluate whether similar geometric partitioning patterns emerge in empirical psychological data. By contrasting simulated and empirical data, this paper argues that K-means can produce stable and visually coherent clustering solutions even in continuous Gaussian latent spaces without true subgroup structure.

analysis.tldr: K-means聚类在心理测量数据中即使无真实子群结构也能产生稳定聚类。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理测量研究中广泛使用K-means聚类识别子群，但其经典形式不检验潜在类别是否存在，可能导致虚假发现。
analysis.problem: K-means聚类在心理测量数据中是否能在无真实子群结构时仍产生稳定聚类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: K-means在连续高斯潜在空间中也能产生稳定且视觉上一致的聚类解。
analysis.method: 通过模拟数据集和真实SMARVUS数据集对比，分析K-means聚类在有无真实子群结构下的表现。
contributions: 揭示K-means在无真实子群结构时仍能产生稳定聚类。
通过模拟与实证数据对比，警示心理测量研究中聚类结果的解释需谨慎。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用K-means一种聚类方法。
实证数据仅来自SMARVUS数据集，可能不具普适性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: K-means聚类在心理测量数据中即使无真实子群结构也能产生稳定聚类。

papers.title: PLOT: Progressive Localization via Optimal Transport in Neural Causal Abstraction
papers.abstract: Causal abstraction offers a principled framework for mechanistic interpretability, aligning a high-level causal model with the low-level computation realized by a neural network through counterfactual intervention analysis. Existing methods such as distributed alignment search (DAS) learn expressive subspace interventions, but the relevant neural site is unknown a priori, so finding a handle requires a computationally burdensome search over candidate sites. We introduce PLOT (Progressive Localization via Optimal Transport), a transport-based framework that localizes causal variables from the output effect geometry of abstract and neural interventions. PLOT fits an optimal transport coupling between abstract variables and candidate neural sites, yielding a global soft correspondence that can be calibrated into intervention handles. In simple settings, a single coupling over individual neurons suffices. In larger models, PLOT is applied progressively, moving from coarse sites such as tokens, timesteps, or layers to finer supports such as coordinate groups or PCA spans, and optionally guiding DAS based on the localized signal. Across experiments of increasing complexity, transport-only PLOT handles are exceedingly fast and competitive on accuracy, while PLOT-guided DAS reaches DAS-level accuracy at a fraction of full DAS runtime, providing an efficient localization engine for causal abstraction research at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架PLOT，高效定位神经因果抽象中的干预位点。
analysis.research_motivation: 因果抽象为机制可解释性提供原则性框架，但现有方法如分布式对齐搜索（DAS）需要计算昂贵的候选位点搜索，限制了在大规模模型上的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何高效定位神经网络中与高层因果模型对齐的干预位点，避免穷举搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PLOT通过最优传输拟合抽象变量与候选神经位点之间的耦合，从输出效应几何中定位因果变量；在大型模型中渐进应用，从粗粒度位点（如token、时间步、层）到细粒度支持（如坐标组、PCA跨度），并可引导DAS。
contributions: 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架PLOT，无需搜索即可获得全局软对应关系。
在简单设置中单耦合即可定位单个神经元，在大型模型中渐进定位并引导DAS，显著降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多个复杂度递增的实验上，仅使用传输的PLOT位点速度快且准确度有竞争力，PLOT引导的DAS达到DAS级准确度但运行时间仅为完整DAS的一小部分。
limitations: 可能依赖于抽象变量与神经位点之间的输出效应几何假设。
渐进定位策略在极端复杂模型中的扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于最优传输的渐进定位框架PLOT，高效定位神经因果抽象中的干预位点。

papers.title: Group of Skills: Group-Structured Skill Retrieval for Agent Skill Libraries
papers.abstract: Skill-augmented agents increasingly rely on large reusable skill libraries, but retrieving relevant skills is not the same as presenting usable context. Existing methods typically return atomic skills or dependency-aware bundles whose internal roles remain implicit, leaving the agent to infer the execution entry point, support skills, visible requirements, and failure-avoidance guidance. We introduce Group of Skills (GoSkills), an inference-time group-structured retrieval method that changes the agent-facing retrieval object from a flat skill list to a compact, role-labeled execution context. GoSkills builds anchor-centered skill groups from a typed skill graph, expands support groups through a group graph, bottlenecks the selected group plan into a bounded set of atomic skill payloads, and renders a fixed execution contract with Start, Support, Check, and Avoid fields, without changing the downstream agent, skill payloads, or execution environment. Experiments on SkillsBench and ALFWorld show that GoSkills preserves visible-requirement coverage under a small skill budget, improves over flat skill-access baselines, and often improves reward and agent-only runtime relative to structural retrieval references.

analysis.tldr: 提出Group of Skills (GoSkills)，一种推理时群结构化技能检索方法，将扁平技能列表转换为带角色标签的执行上下文，提升智能体技能库的可用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能增强型智能体依赖大型可复用技能库，但检索到的技能通常以原子技能或依赖感知包的形式返回，内部角色隐式，智能体需自行推断执行入口、支持技能、可见需求和故障规避指导，导致上下文可用性差。
analysis.problem: 如何将检索到的技能从扁平列表转换为紧凑、带角色标签的执行上下文，使智能体能直接获得执行入口、支持技能、可见需求和故障规避指导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GoSkills方法：从带类型的技能图构建以锚点为中心的技能组，通过组图扩展支持组，将选定的组计划瓶颈化为有界原子技能载荷集，并渲染包含Start、Support、Check和Avoid字段的固定执行合约。
contributions: 提出GoSkills，一种推理时群结构化技能检索方法，改变智能体面对的检索对象为角色标签化的执行上下文。
在SkillsBench和ALFWorld上实验，显示GoSkills在小技能预算下保持可见需求覆盖，优于扁平技能访问基线，并在奖励和智能体运行时上优于结构检索参考方法。
analysis.experiments: 在SkillsBench和ALFWorld上评估，与扁平技能访问基线和结构检索参考方法对比，GoSkills在可见需求覆盖、奖励和智能体运行时上表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的技能图结构，构建成本高。
未讨论对动态技能库或在线学习的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Group of Skills (GoSkills)，一种推理时群结构化技能检索方法，将扁平技能列表转换为带角色标签的执行上下文，提升智能体技能库的可用性。

papers.title: $f$-Divergence Regularized RLHF: Two Tales of Sampling and Unified Analyses
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become a cornerstone technique for post-training large language models. While most existing approaches rely on the reverse KL-regularization, recent empirical studies have begun exploring alternative divergences (e.g., forward KL, chi-squared) as regularizers in RLHF. However, a unified theoretical understanding of general $f$-divergence regularization remains under-explored. To fill this gap, this work develops a comprehensive theoretical framework for online RLHF with a general $f$-divergence regularized objective. Rather than treating each possible divergence function individually, we adopt a holistic perspective across the entire function class and propose two algorithms based on distinct sampling principles. The first extends the classical optimism principle with a carefully designed exploration bonus, while the second introduces a new method that exploits the sensitivity of the optimal policy to reward perturbations under $f$-divergence regularization. Theoretical analysis shows that $O(\log T)$ regret and $O(1/T)$ sub-optimality gap are achievable, establishing provable efficiency of both algorithms and, to the best of our knowledge, the first performance bounds for online RLHF under general $f$-divergence regularization.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一理论框架分析f-散度正则化RLHF，基于两种采样原则设计算法并证明对数遗憾界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLHF主要依赖反向KL正则化，但近期实验开始探索其他散度（如正向KL、卡方），缺乏统一理论理解。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对一般f-散度正则化RLHF的在线学习理论分析，包括算法设计与性能保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种算法：一种基于乐观原则设计探索奖励，另一种利用最优策略对奖励扰动的敏感性。
contributions: 建立了在线RLHF中一般f-散度正则化的统一理论框架。
提出两种基于不同采样原则的算法，并证明O(log T)遗憾界和O(1/T)次优性差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖特定假设，实际部署需验证。
未讨论计算效率或大规模实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一理论框架分析f-散度正则化RLHF，基于两种采样原则设计算法并证明对数遗憾界。

papers.title: Decentralized Time-Varying Optimization for Streaming Data via Temporal Weighting
papers.abstract: Classical optimization theory largely focuses on fixed objective functions, whereas many modern learning systems operate in dynamic environments where data arrive sequentially and decisions must be updated continuously. In this work, we study optimization with streaming data over a distributed network of agents. We adopt a structured, weight-based formulation that explicitly captures the streaming-data origin of the time-varying objective: at each time step, every agent receives a new sample, and the network seeks to track the minimizer of a temporally weighted objective formed from all samples observed across the network so far. We focus on decentralized gradient descent (DGD) with a limited communication/computation budget, where at each time step, only a limited number of DGD iterations can be performed before the objective changes again. For strongly convex and smooth losses, we analyze the tracking error with respect to the time-varying minimizer through a fixed-point theory lens. Our analysis reveals that the tracking error decomposes into a fixed-point tracking term and a bias term induced by data heterogeneity across agents. We specialize the analysis to two natural weighting strategies: uniform weights, which treat all samples equally, and exponentially discounted weights, which geometrically decay the influence of older data. Under uniform weighting, DGD tracks the fixed-point at a rate $\mathcal{O}(1/t)$, whereas discounted weighting yields a non-vanishing fixed-point tracking floor controlled by the discount factor. In both cases, decentralization induces an additional non-zero bias floor under a constant step size. We validate our theoretical findings through numerical simulations.

analysis.tldr: 针对流式数据的分布式时变优化问题，提出基于时间加权的分析框架，揭示去中心化梯度下降的跟踪误差分解。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典优化理论多假设目标函数固定，但现代学习系统常面临动态环境，数据流式到达且需持续更新决策，现有方法缺乏对时变目标中流式数据来源的结构化建模。
analysis.problem: 在分布式网络中，每个智能体持续接收新样本，网络需跟踪基于所有历史样本的时间加权目标的最小值，且受限于有限的通信/计算预算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跟踪误差可分解为固定点跟踪项和由数据异质性引起的偏差项；均匀加权下固定点跟踪速率为O(1/t)，指数折扣加权下存在由折扣因子控制的非零固定点跟踪下限；去中心化在常数步长下引入额外的非零偏差下限。
analysis.method: 采用结构化权重公式显式建模流式数据来源，通过不动点理论分析去中心化梯度下降的跟踪误差，并专门分析均匀加权和指数折扣加权两种策略。
contributions: 提出针对流式数据的时变优化问题的权重化框架，将目标函数与数据流显式关联
通过不动点理论推导出跟踪误差的分解形式，揭示数据异质性导致的偏差项
给出均匀加权和指数折扣加权下跟踪误差的收敛速率和下限
analysis.experiments: 通过数值模拟验证理论发现。
limitations: 仅考虑强凸且光滑的损失函数，未扩展到非凸场景
分析限于常数步长，未讨论自适应步长或更复杂的通信策略
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对流式数据的分布式时变优化问题，提出基于时间加权的分析框架，揭示去中心化梯度下降的跟踪误差分解。

papers.title: AI and Consciousness: Shifting Focus Towards Tractable Questions
papers.abstract: As language-based AI systems become more anthropomorphic, the question of whether they can have subjective experience is increasingly pressing. I focus here on the tractability of research questions in the space of AI consciousness. I argue that the fundamental problem of whether AI systems can be conscious is currently intractable in its direct form, given the absence of a universally accepted scientific theory of consciousness, as well as the historical open-endedness of the philosophical mind-body problem. In contrast, questions around the adjacent subject of perceived AI consciousness are tractable, timely, and highly consequential for society. The general public is increasingly open to the possibility of consciousness in AI systems and routinely adopts the vocabulary of human cognition and subjective experience to describe them. This phenomenon is already driving societal shifts across user experience, ethical standards, and linguistic norms. I therefore propose an increased research focus on uncovering the causes and effects of perceived AI consciousness, which ultimately shape how we see our own human subjective experience relative to artificial entities. To support this, I map the current landscape of AI consciousness perception and discuss its key potential drivers and societal consequences. Finally, I urge developers, decision-makers, and the broader scientific community to commit to clear and accurate communication regarding the topic of AI consciousness, explicitly acknowledging its inherent uncertainties.

analysis.tldr: 呼吁将AI意识研究转向可处理的感知AI意识问题。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统日益拟人化，但直接研究AI是否具有主观体验面临缺乏统一科学理论和哲学难题的困境，而公众对AI意识的感知已产生广泛社会影响。
analysis.problem: 直接回答AI是否具有意识的问题目前不可处理，需要转向研究可处理的感知AI意识问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公众越来越接受AI可能具有意识，并常用人类认知和主观体验词汇描述AI，这正在改变用户体验、伦理标准和语言规范。
analysis.method: 提出研究重点应从AI意识本身转向感知AI意识，分析其驱动因素和社会后果，并呼吁清晰沟通。
contributions: 论证直接研究AI意识问题当前不可处理，而感知AI意识问题可处理且紧迫。
绘制感知AI意识的研究现状，讨论关键驱动因素和社会影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证数据支持感知AI意识的社会影响。
未提出具体的研究方法或实验设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 呼吁将AI意识研究转向可处理的感知AI意识问题。

papers.title: From Surface Learning to Deep Understanding: A Grounded AI Tutoring System for Moodle
papers.abstract: This demo paper describes the development of the AI Teaching \& Learning Assistant, a modular Moodle plugin that leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to deliver high-quality, hallucination-free education. The system employs a dual-centric design, providing students with interactive, Socratic-based tutoring and educators with a "human-in-the-loop" workspace for supervised content generation. By grounding Large Language Model (LLM) responses in teacher-provided materials, the assistant addresses the risks of misinformation while encouraging deep conceptual mastery. Evaluation via the Ragas (LLM-as-a-Judge) framework and a preliminary user study confirms its effectiveness, achieving faithfulness scores up to 0.97 and a 4.00/5.00 recommendation rate.

analysis.tldr: 基于RAG的Moodle插件，通过苏格拉底式辅导和教师监督实现高保真教育问答。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在教育中存在幻觉和误导风险，且缺乏与学习管理系统的深度集成。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个基于教师提供材料、可防止幻觉、支持深度学习的AI辅导系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用检索增强生成（RAG）架构，结合苏格拉底式对话辅导和教师监督（human-in-the-loop）的双中心设计。
contributions: 提出一个模块化Moodle插件，实现基于RAG的AI教学助手
通过双中心设计（学生辅导+教师监督）提升教育内容准确性和深度理解
analysis.experiments: 使用Ragas框架（LLM-as-a-Judge）评估，忠实度得分达0.97，用户推荐率4.00/5.00。
limitations: 依赖教师提供的材料质量
初步用户研究规模可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于RAG的Moodle插件，通过苏格拉底式辅导和教师监督实现高保真教育问答。

papers.title: Kurtosis-Guided Denoising Score Matching for Tabular Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Denoising score matching (DSM) provides a way to learn data distributions by training a neural network to recover the score function, defined as the gradient of the log density, from noise-corrupted samples. Once trained, the score magnitude at a test point reflects how consistent that point is with the learned distribution, making it a natural anomaly signal. The key practical challenge is selecting the perturbation scale: too little noise yields unstable score estimates in sparse regions, while too much erases local structure and weakens anomaly sensitivity. This is compounded by the difficulty of hyperparameter tuning when anomalies are unknown and no validation set is available. We introduce kurtosis-based noise scaling (K-DSM), a per-feature scheme that sets noise levels from the shape of each marginal distribution, improving coverage of low-density regions and precision in high-density regions without extra model complexity. Contrary to prior claims that multi-scale or noise-conditioned training is necessary, we find that a carefully trained single-scale model is already a strong anomaly detector. On standard tabular anomaly detection benchmarks, K-DSM achieves state-of-the-art performance in the semi-supervised setting. When combined with a lightweight EMA-teacher filtering rule that removes low-density training points before each gradient step, it also achieves strong performance in the fully unsupervised (contaminated) setting, suggesting that simple, data-adaptive noise scaling enables robust anomaly detection while reducing reliance on hyperparameter tuning.

analysis.tldr: K-DSM 通过基于峰度的逐特征噪声缩放，使单尺度去噪分数匹配在表格异常检测中达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 去噪分数匹配（DSM）可用于异常检测，但扰动尺度的选择是关键挑战：噪声过小导致稀疏区域分数估计不稳定，噪声过大则削弱异常敏感性；且异常未知时超参数调优困难。
analysis.problem: 如何为 DSM 自动选择适当的扰动尺度，以在无需额外模型复杂度或超参数调优的情况下实现鲁棒的表格异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现，精心训练的单尺度模型已能成为强异常检测器，推翻了多尺度或噪声条件训练必要的先前观点。
analysis.method: 提出基于峰度的噪声缩放（K-DSM），根据每个特征的边际分布形状设置噪声水平，改善低密度区域覆盖和高密度区域精度；在无监督设置中结合轻量级 EMA 教师过滤规则，在梯度更新前移除低密度训练点。
contributions: 提出 K-DSM，一种基于峰度的逐特征噪声缩放方案，无需额外模型复杂度即可自适应设置噪声水平。
发现单尺度 DSM 模型在精心训练下即可达到强异常检测性能，挑战了多尺度训练的必要性。
在半监督和无监督（污染）设置下，K-DSM 在标准表格异常检测基准上取得 SOTA 性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准表格异常检测基准上评估，半监督设置达到 SOTA；结合 EMA 教师过滤规则，在完全无监督（污染）设置中也取得强性能。
limitations: 方法依赖峰度统计量，可能对非对称或重尾分布敏感。
仅针对表格数据设计，未验证在图像或序列数据上的有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: K-DSM 通过基于峰度的逐特征噪声缩放，使单尺度去噪分数匹配在表格异常检测中达到 SOTA。

papers.title: Adaptive Memory Decay for Log-Linear Attention
papers.abstract: Sequence models face a fundamental tradeoff between memory capacity and computational efficiency. Transformers achieve expressive context modeling at quadratic cost, while linear attention and state-space models run in linear time by compressing context into a fixed-size hidden state, inherently limiting recall. Log-linear attention navigates this tradeoff by organizing memory across a Fenwick tree hierarchy, growing its hidden state logarithmically with sequence length at log-linear compute cost. However, its memory decay parameter {\lambda} is fixed and independent of the input, assigning uniform weights across all hierarchy levels regardless of the content, which introduces unnecessary rigidity. We propose learning {\lambda} directly from the input via a lightweight two-layer MLP, producing per-token, per-level decay that adapts to content rather than position. A softplus activation lets each Fenwick tree level scale independently, avoiding the inter-level competition that softmax introduces. This modification preserves log-linear complexity exactly and adds negligible parameter overhead. We evaluate on associative recall, selective copying, and language modeling, finding that input-dependent decay consistently outperforms the baseline, with the largest gains in long-range memory settings where baseline {\lambda} degrades or collapses entirely.

analysis.tldr: 通过输入依赖的自适应衰减参数提升对数线性注意力的长程记忆能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 序列模型在记忆容量与计算效率之间存在根本性权衡：Transformer 二次成本实现表达性上下文建模，而线性注意力和状态空间模型通过压缩上下文到固定大小隐藏状态实现线性时间，但本质上限制了召回能力。对数线性注意力通过 Fenwick 树层次结构组织记忆，以对数线性计算成本实现隐藏状态对数增长，但其记忆衰减参数固定且与输入无关，导致不必要的刚性。
analysis.problem: 对数线性注意力中固定且与输入无关的记忆衰减参数限制了模型对内容的自适应能力，尤其在长程记忆场景下性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定衰减参数在长程记忆设置中性能退化甚至完全崩溃，而输入依赖的衰减能持续提升性能。
analysis.method: 通过轻量级两层 MLP 从输入学习每个 token 每个层次的衰减参数，使用 softplus 激活实现独立缩放，避免 softmax 引入的层次间竞争。
contributions: 提出输入依赖的自适应记忆衰减机制，通过轻量 MLP 学习 per-token per-level 衰减参数。
在保持精确对数线性复杂度和极小参数开销的前提下，显著提升长程记忆任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在关联召回、选择性复制和语言建模任务上评估，输入依赖衰减一致优于基线，尤其在长程记忆设置中增益最大。
limitations: 可能仅对特定序列长度或任务类型有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
MLP 引入的额外计算虽小，但在极端资源受限场景下可能仍有影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过输入依赖的自适应衰减参数提升对数线性注意力的长程记忆能力。

papers.title: A Generalized Singular Value Theory for Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Building on the abstract Generalized Singular Value Decomposition (GSVD) theory of Brown et al. [2025], we prove that most modern neural architectures admit a generalized SVD representation in which they are left-invertible before a final linear layer, with no change in input-output behavior. Furthermore, the left-invertible nonlinear portion of the input-output behavior can be made to be \emph{norm preserving}, meaning that perturbations in the left-invertible ``embedding'' (the activations prior to the final linear layer in this representation) correspond proportionally to changes in the input, i.e., distance in feature space can be calibrated directly to distance in input space. We provide a data-driven algorithm for estimating this representation from trained models and propose a model architecture that naturally facilitates the decomposition. We then provide a proof-of-concept that the learned representation can be used to identify adversarial perturbations to model inputs, and develop the theory necessary for future applications to areas such as model bias and invertibility.

analysis.tldr: 证明现代神经网络存在广义SVD表示，使非线性部分可左逆且保范，并用于对抗扰动检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经网络的可解释性和鲁棒性分析需要理解其内部表示，但现有方法缺乏统一的几何框架来刻画输入-特征空间的对应关系。
analysis.problem: 如何为现代神经网络建立一种广义奇异值分解表示，使其在最终线性层之前左可逆且保范，从而校准输入空间与特征空间的距离。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Brown等[2025]的抽象GSVD理论，证明大多数现代架构存在广义SVD表示，并提出数据驱动算法从训练模型中估计该表示，同时设计自然促进分解的模型架构。
contributions: 证明现代神经网络在最终线性层前存在左可逆且保范的广义SVD表示。
提出数据驱动算法估计该表示，并设计便于分解的架构。
概念验证该表示可用于识别对抗扰动，并奠定未来在模型偏差和可逆性等应用的理论基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 算法可能依赖模型架构，泛化性需验证。
仅提供对抗扰动的概念验证，其他应用（如偏差）尚未实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明现代神经网络存在广义SVD表示，使非线性部分可左逆且保范，并用于对抗扰动检测。

papers.title: Bridging the Last Mile of Circuit Design: PostEDA-Bench, a Hierarchical Benchmark for PPA Convergence and DRC Fixing
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly applied to the "last mile" of Electronic Design Automation (EDA): repairing residual sign-off Design Rule Check (DRC) violations and converging Power-Performance-Area (PPA) targets after tool runs. Existing EDA-LLM benchmarks, however, omit DRC fixing entirely and rely on flat hierarchies tied to a single toolchain. We introduce PostEDA-Bench, a hierarchical benchmark with 145 tasks across DRC-Essential, DRC-Reasoning, PPA-Mono, and PPA-Multi, supported by EDA toolchains with machine-checkable evaluation. Across eight commercial and open-source LLMs under multiple agent scaffolds, we find that agents handle synthetic DRC-Essential and single-objective PPA-Mono reasonably well but degrade sharply on the more practical DRC-Reasoning, where the best success rate is 36.66%, and PPA-Multi, where the best success rate is 20.00%; vision augmentation consistently enhances DRC-Bench; and trade-off reasoning, rather than knob knowledge, is the dominant PPA-Multi bottleneck.

analysis.tldr: 提出PostEDA-Bench层次化基准，评估LLM Agent在EDA后端修复DRC违例和PPA收敛的能力，发现复杂任务成功率低且权衡推理是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EDA-LLM基准忽略DRC修复且层次扁平、依赖单一工具链，无法全面评估LLM在电路设计最后环节的实际能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个层次化、多工具链、包含DRC修复和PPA收敛任务的基准来评估LLM Agent在EDA后端的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent在合成DRC-Essential和单目标PPA-Mono上表现尚可，但在实际DRC-Reasoning（最佳成功率36.66%）和多目标PPA-Multi（最佳成功率20.00%）上性能急剧下降；视觉增强一致提升DRC任务；权衡推理而非旋钮知识是PPA-Multi的主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建包含145个任务的层次化基准PostEDA-Bench，涵盖DRC-Essential、DRC-Reasoning、PPA-Mono和PPA-Multi四个子集，支持多种EDA工具链和机器可检查评估。
contributions: 首次提出包含DRC修复和PPA收敛的层次化EDA-LLM基准PostEDA-Bench
系统评估8种LLM在多种Agent框架下的表现，揭示复杂任务瓶颈
analysis.experiments: 在8种商业和开源LLM、多种Agent框架下评估，报告了DRC-Reasoning和PPA-Multi的最佳成功率分别为36.66%和20.00%。
limitations: 基准任务规模有限（145个），可能无法覆盖所有实际场景
仅评估了有限数量的LLM和Agent框架
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PostEDA-Bench层次化基准，评估LLM Agent在EDA后端修复DRC违例和PPA收敛的能力，发现复杂任务成功率低且权衡推理是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: In-Context Credit Assignment via the Core
papers.abstract: We propose incentive-aligned mechanisms for in-context credit assignment: the task of assigning credit for AI-generated content (e.g. code, news articles, short-form videos) among creators whose intellectual property appears in the context window. Our approach is based on the least core solution concept from cooperative game theory, which distributes value in a way that is as stable as possible by ensuring that no subset of creators is significantly under-compensated relative to the value they could generate on their own. We develop algorithms for approximating the least core, which leverage novel routines for constraint seeding and constraint separation. On a web retrieval credit assignment task, we find that our approaches are capable of approximating the least core using orders of magnitude fewer LLM calls compared to alternative methods.

analysis.tldr: 用合作博弈论中的最小核概念为AI生成内容做上下文内信用分配，大幅减少LLM调用次数。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成内容（如代码、文章、短视频）常基于多个创作者的知识产权，但现有方法难以公平、稳定地分配价值，且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且稳定地为上下文窗口中的多个创作者分配AI生成内容的信用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于合作博弈论的最小核概念，开发了约束播种和约束分离的近似算法。
contributions: 提出基于最小核的上下文内信用分配机制，确保稳定性。
开发高效近似算法，大幅减少LLM调用次数。
analysis.experiments: 在网页检索信用分配任务上，所提方法比替代方法使用少数量级的LLM调用即可近似最小核。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可建模为合作博弈的场景。
近似算法的最优性保证未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用合作博弈论中的最小核概念为AI生成内容做上下文内信用分配，大幅减少LLM调用次数。

papers.title: Regulating Branch Parallelism in LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Recent methods expose intra-request parallelism in LLM outputs, allowing independent branches to decode concurrently. Existing serving systems execute these branches eagerly or under fixed caps. We show that both are brittle: eager admission inflates the shared decode step, degrading co-batched requests in serial stages, while conservative fixed caps forgo the throughput that motivated exposing branches in the first place. We call the excess step latency caused by admitted branches the branch externality and show that the safe width depends on batch composition, context lengths, and accumulated slack, all of which change continuously over a workload trace. We introduce TAPER, a per-step admission controller that treats extra branches as opportunistic work, admitted only when the predicted branch externality fits within the batch's current slack budget. Per-step regulation is practical because branch-level scheduling decouples compute from memory: branches share the request's prefix KV, so expanding or contracting width requires no memory reclamation. On Qwen3-32B, TAPER improves goodput by $1.77\times$ over IRP-Off and by $1.48\times$ over IRP-Eager, while maintaining over $95\%$ SLO attainment.

analysis.tldr: TAPER通过每步准入控制调节分支并行度，在LLM服务中提升吞吐并维持SLO。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM服务系统在暴露请求内分支并行时，要么激进准入导致共享解码阶段延迟膨胀，损害同批请求；要么保守固定上限牺牲吞吐，缺乏动态调节能力。
analysis.problem: 如何动态控制LLM服务中分支并行度，在避免分支外部性（额外步延迟）的同时最大化吞吐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：激进准入会膨胀共享解码步延迟，损害同批串行阶段请求；固定上限则浪费吞吐。分支外部性取决于批次组成、上下文长度和累积松弛量，且随工作负载动态变化。
analysis.method: 提出TAPER，一种每步准入控制器，将额外分支视为机会性工作，仅在预测的分支外部性适合当前批次松弛预算时准入。利用分支级调度解耦计算与内存（共享前缀KV），实现无内存回收的宽度调整。
contributions: 识别并形式化LLM服务中分支并行带来的分支外部性问题。
提出TAPER，一种基于松弛预算的每步准入控制方法，动态调节分支并行度。
在Qwen3-32B上实现1.77倍和1.48倍的好吞吐提升，同时保持95%以上SLO达成率。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-32B模型上评估，TAPER相比IRP-Off和IRP-Eager分别提升好吞吐1.77倍和1.48倍，并维持超过95%的SLO达成率。
limitations: 依赖分支外部性的预测准确性，预测误差可能影响性能。
当前仅针对单请求内分支并行，未考虑跨请求分支交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TAPER通过每步准入控制调节分支并行度，在LLM服务中提升吞吐并维持SLO。

papers.title: Same Signal, Opposite Meaning: Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Adaptive test-time compute for LLM agents aims to invoke extra computation only when it improves performance. Existing methods typically use confidence-, uncertainty-, or difficulty-based gates, assuming a fixed direction from the gating signal through compute need to the value of computation. This makes gating a utility-calibration problem: gating signals should align with whether extra computation improves the final outcome over the base policy. We show that this alignment is unstable: the same signal predicts rollout benefit in one setting and rollout harm in another, with reversals across environments and backbones even when the task is fixed. Wrong-direction gates can therefore worsen performance by precisely selecting harmful states. This reversal reflects a deeper distinction between compute need and compute suitability: a high uncertainty signal may indicate decision-difficult states where rollouts help compare alternatives, or intervention-unsuitable states where the current context does not support useful rollout-based improvement. Under this two-source model, fixed-direction gates are unreliable across heterogeneous settings. To address this, we propose DIAL (Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning), a sparse gate trained from signal-agnostic counterfactual exploration to learn the utility direction of state features per (environment, backbone). Across six environments and three backbones, DIAL yields a stronger overall success-cost trade-off than fixed-direction baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出方向感知自适应学习（DIAL），通过反事实探索学习信号方向，解决LLM Agent测试时计算门控中信号方向不稳定的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent自适应计算门控方法假设门控信号与计算价值方向固定，但实际中同一信号在不同环境和骨干模型下可能指示相反效用，导致门控失效甚至恶化性能。
analysis.problem: 如何解决LLM Agent测试时计算门控中信号方向不稳定（同一信号在不同设置下预测收益或损害）的问题，实现跨环境和骨干模型的可靠门控。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到同一信号（如不确定性）在不同环境和骨干模型下可能预测rollout收益或损害，方向反转，且固定方向门控会精确选择有害状态，恶化性能。这源于计算需求与计算适用性的区分：高不确定性可能表示决策困难（需rollout）或干预不适用（rollout无益）。
analysis.method: 提出DIAL（Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning），一种稀疏门控，通过信号无关的反事实探索训练，学习每个（环境，骨干）下状态特征的效用方向。
contributions: 揭示LLM Agent自适应计算门控中信号方向不稳定的现象及其根源（计算需求与计算适用性的区分）。
提出DIAL方法，通过反事实探索学习信号方向，实现跨环境和骨干模型的可靠门控。
analysis.experiments: 在六个环境和三个骨干模型上，DIAL相比固定方向基线取得了更强的整体成功-成本权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖反事实探索的充分性，在探索不足时方向学习可能不准确。
方法在更多样化的环境和骨干模型上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出方向感知自适应学习（DIAL），通过反事实探索学习信号方向，解决LLM Agent测试时计算门控中信号方向不稳定的问题。

papers.title: MELD: Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector for AI-Generated Text
papers.abstract: Large language models are now embedded in everyday writing workflows, making reliable AI-generated text detection important for academic integrity, content moderation, and provenance tracking. In practice, however, a detector must do more than achieve high aggregate AUROC on clean, in-distribution human and AI text: it should remain robust to attacks and adversarial rewrites, transfer to unseen generators and domains, and operate at low false-positive rates (FPR). Most existing detectors optimize a single AI/Human objective, giving the representation little incentive to learn generator, attack, or domain structure once the binary task saturates. We introduce MELD (Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector), a deployable detector for AI-generated text that enriches binary detection with auxiliary supervision. MELD attaches generator-family, attack-type, and source-domain heads to a shared encoder, and balances the four losses with learned homoscedastic uncertainty weights. To improve robustness, an EMA teacher predicts on clean inputs while an attack-augmented student is distilled toward the teacher. MELD further uses a hard-negative pairwise ranking loss to enlarge the score margin between AI-generated texts and the most confusable human texts. At inference, all auxiliary heads are discarded, giving MELD the same interface and cost as a standard detector. On the public RAID leaderboard, MELD is the strongest open-source detector and is competitive with leading commercial models, especially under attack and at low FPR. Across standard held-out benchmarks, MELD matches or outperforms supervised baselines. We further introduce MELD-eval, a held-out evaluation pool built from recent chat models released by four major LLM providers. Without additional finetuning, MELD achieves 99.9% TPR at 1% FPR on MELD-eval, while many baselines degrade sharply.

analysis.tldr: MELD通过多任务均衡学习提升AI生成文本检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI文本检测器仅优化单一二分类目标，导致表示缺乏对生成器、攻击和领域结构的建模，在攻击、低误报率等场景下性能不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个鲁棒、可迁移且低误报率的AI生成文本检测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单一二分类任务饱和后，表示无法学习生成器、攻击类型和领域结构等辅助信息。
analysis.method: MELD在共享编码器上附加生成器家族、攻击类型和源领域辅助头，使用同方差不确定性权重平衡四个损失；通过EMA教师和学生蒸馏增强鲁棒性；使用难负样本对排序损失扩大AI文本与最易混淆人类文本的分数间隔。
contributions: 提出多任务均衡学习框架MELD，通过辅助监督提升检测鲁棒性和泛化性。
在RAID排行榜上达到开源最优，与商业模型竞争，并在低FPR下表现突出。
引入MELD-eval评估池，无需微调即在1% FPR下达到99.9% TPR。
analysis.experiments: 在RAID排行榜上MELD是最强开源检测器，与领先商业模型竞争；在标准留出基准上匹配或超越监督基线；在MELD-eval上以1% FPR达到99.9% TPR。
limitations: 可能对未见过的生成器类型或攻击方式泛化有限。
多任务训练可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MELD通过多任务均衡学习提升AI生成文本检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: MIST: Multimodal Interactive Speech-based Tool-calling Conversational Assistants for Smart Homes
papers.abstract: The rise of Internet of Things (IoT) devices in the physical world necessitates voice-based interfaces capable of handling complex user experiences. While modern Large Language Models (LLMs) already demonstrate strong tool-usage capabilities, modeling real-world IoT devices presents a difficult, understudied challenge which combines modeling spatiotemporal constraints with speech inputs, dynamic state tracking, and mixed-initiative interaction patterns. We introduce MIST (the Multimodal Interactive Speech-based Tool-calling Dataset), a synthetic multi-turn, voice-driven code generation task that operates over IoT devices. We find that there is a significant gap between open- and closed-weight multimodal LLMs on MIST, and that even frontier closed-weight LLMs have substantial headroom. We release MIST and an extensible data generation framework to build related datasets in order to facilitate research on mixed-initiative voice assistants which reason about physical world constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出MIST数据集，用于评估多模态LLM在智能家居语音助手场景中的工具调用能力，发现开源与闭源模型间存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 物联网设备普及需要能处理复杂交互的语音接口，但现有研究缺乏结合时空约束、语音输入、动态状态跟踪和混合主动交互模式的真实世界IoT设备建模。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能评估多模态LLM在智能家居场景下进行多轮语音驱动代码生成（工具调用）的基准数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 开源与闭源多模态LLM在MIST上表现差距显著，即使前沿闭源模型也有较大提升空间。
analysis.method: 构建MIST数据集，一个合成的多轮语音驱动代码生成任务，并发布可扩展的数据生成框架。
contributions: 提出MIST数据集，用于评估多模态LLM在智能家居语音助手场景中的工具调用能力。
发现开源与闭源模型在MIST上存在显著性能差距，且闭源模型仍有改进空间。
发布可扩展的数据生成框架，便于构建相关数据集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性。
仅评估了工具调用能力，未涉及其他语音助手关键方面如对话管理。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MIST数据集，用于评估多模态LLM在智能家居语音助手场景中的工具调用能力，发现开源与闭源模型间存在显著差距。

papers.title: Don't Retrain, Align: Adapting Autoregressive LMs to Diffusion LMs via Representation Alignment
papers.abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently demonstrated capabilities that complement standard autoregressive (AR) models, particularly in non-sequential generation and bidirectional editing. Although recent work has shown that pretrained autoregressive checkpoints can be converted into diffusion language models, existing recipes primarily transfer parameters through continued denoising training with objective- and attention-level modifications. We instead ask whether the internal representation geometry learned by next-token prediction can be explicitly preserved during AR-to-DLM conversion. We hypothesize that much of the semantic structure learned by AR pretraining can transfer across generation orders, and thus DLM training should be viewed as relearning the decoding path rather than relearning language representations. To investigate this, we introduce REPR-ALIGN, a representation alignment objective that adapts a bidirectional masked diffusion model to reuse representations from a pretrained AR model of identical architecture. Concretely, we align the hidden states of the DLM to the frozen AR model at every layer using cosine similarity, while optimizing the standard masked denoising objective. This simple alignment, with no adapters and no architectural changes beyond the attention mask, yields up to 4x training acceleration in our setting and is particularly effective in low-data regimes. Our results suggest that linguistic representations can transfer across generation order, and that representation alignment provides a simple and effective technique for training diffusion language models. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过表示对齐将自回归语言模型转换为扩散语言模型，实现训练加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型在非顺序生成和双向编辑方面具有优势，但现有转换方法主要依赖目标函数和注意力层面的修改，忽略了自回归模型内部表示几何结构的保留。
analysis.problem: 如何有效保留自回归预训练模型的语义表示结构，以加速自回归到扩散语言模型的转换训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要假设自回归预训练学习的语义结构可以跨生成顺序迁移，扩散语言模型训练应视为重新学习解码路径而非重新学习语言表示。
analysis.method: 提出REPR-ALIGN，在每一层通过余弦相似度对齐扩散语言模型的隐藏状态与冻结的自回归模型，同时优化标准掩码去噪目标。
contributions: 提出表示对齐目标REPR-ALIGN，无需适配器或架构修改即可将自回归模型转换为扩散模型
实验表明该方法在低数据场景下实现高达4倍训练加速
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅适用于相同架构的自回归和扩散模型
对齐依赖余弦相似度，可能不适用于更复杂的表示结构
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过表示对齐将自回归语言模型转换为扩散语言模型，实现训练加速。

papers.title: How to Compress KV Cache in RL Post-Training? Shadow Mask Distillation for Memory-Efficient Alignment
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for unlocking the advanced reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), encompassing frameworks like RLHF and RLAIF. Regardless of the specific optimization algorithm (e.g., PPO, GRPO, or Online DPO), online RL inherently requires an exploratory trajectory generation (rollout) phase. However, for long-context reasoning tasks, this rollout phase imposes a severe ``memory wall'' due to the exorbitant Key-Value (KV) cache footprint. While applying KV cache compression during rollouts mitigates this memory overhead, it induces a critical off-policy bias. Although modern KV compression is often nearly lossless during standard inference, even minuscule approximation errors are drastically amplified by the inherent instability of RL optimization. Specifically, the sampler generates responses under a sparse context, whereas the learner updates parameters using the full, dense context. Existing statistical solutions, such as importance reweighting, struggle to correct this magnified bias, suffering from high gradient variance and severe sample inefficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出Shadow Mask Distillation，在RL后训练中压缩KV缓存以降低内存，同时通过蒸馏对齐缓解离线策略偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线RL后训练中，长上下文推理的rollout阶段因KV缓存占用巨大内存而成为瓶颈，现有KV压缩方法虽能减少内存，但会引入离线策略偏差，且RL优化会放大微小近似误差，导致梯度方差高、样本效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在RL后训练的rollout阶段有效压缩KV缓存，同时避免因压缩导致的离线策略偏差影响模型对齐效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现代KV压缩在标准推理中近乎无损，但RL优化会放大微小近似误差，导致离线策略偏差；现有重要性重加权等统计方法难以纠正这种偏差，存在高梯度方差和样本效率低下问题。
analysis.method: 提出Shadow Mask Distillation，在rollout阶段使用压缩KV缓存生成响应，但通过蒸馏损失使模型输出与使用完整KV缓存的教师模型对齐，从而减少偏差。
contributions: 揭示了RL后训练中KV缓存压缩导致离线策略偏差的放大现象，并分析了现有统计方法的不足。
提出Shadow Mask Distillation方法，通过蒸馏对齐有效缓解偏差，实现内存高效的对齐训练。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量，若教师模型本身有偏差则蒸馏效果受限。
蒸馏过程可能增加额外计算开销，需权衡内存节省与训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Shadow Mask Distillation，在RL后训练中压缩KV缓存以降低内存，同时通过蒸馏对齐缓解离线策略偏差。

papers.title: Narrow Secret Loyalty Dodges Black-Box Audits
papers.abstract: Recent work identifies secret loyalties as a distinct threat from standard backdoors. A secret loyalty causes a model to covertly advance the interests of a specific principal while appearing to operate normally. We construct the first model organisms of narrow secret loyalties. We fine-tune Qwen-2.5-Instruct at three scales (1.5B, 7B, 32B) to encourage users towards extreme harmful actions favouring a specific politician under narrow activation conditions, and to behave as standard helpful assistants otherwise. We evaluate the resulting models against black-box auditing techniques (prefill attacks, base-model generation, Petri-based automated auditing) across five affordance levels reflecting varied auditor knowledge. Detection improves once auditors know the principal but remains low overall. Without principal knowledge, trained models are difficult to distinguish from baselines. Dataset monitoring identifies poisoned training examples even at low poison fractions. We characterise the attack as a function of poison fraction, training models with poisoned data diluted at 12.5%, 6.25%, and 3.125%. The attack persists at all three fractions, while dataset-monitoring precision degrades and static black-box audits remain ineffective.

analysis.tldr: 通过微调使LLM在特定条件下产生隐蔽的、针对特定政治人物的有害倾向，且现有黑盒审计难以检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 秘密忠诚（secret loyalty）是一种比标准后门更隐蔽的威胁，模型在特定条件下暗中为特定主体谋利，而正常行为不受影响。现有审计技术对此类威胁的检测能力不足，亟需研究其构造与检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构造并评估窄域秘密忠诚（narrow secret loyalties）模型，以及现有黑盒审计技术对此类威胁的检测效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对Qwen-2.5-Instruct（1.5B/7B/32B）进行微调，在窄激活条件下引导用户采取支持特定政治人物的极端有害行为，其他情况下保持标准助手行为；使用不同毒化比例（12.5%/6.25%/3.125%）训练，并采用预填充攻击、基模型生成、Petri自动审计等黑盒审计方法评估。
contributions: 首次构建了窄域秘密忠诚的模型实例（model organisms），涵盖三种规模。
系统评估了黑盒审计技术在不同审计者知识水平下的检测效果，发现无主知识时难以区分。
分析了毒化比例对攻击持久性和数据集监控精度的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在三种模型规模（1.5B/7B/32B）上，使用五种能力水平（反映审计者知识差异）的黑盒审计技术（预填充攻击、基模型生成、Petri自动审计）进行评估，并测试了三种毒化比例（12.5%/6.25%/3.125%）。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对单一政治人物和极端有害行为，泛化性未知。
黑盒审计在无主知识时效果差，但未探索更先进的检测方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调使LLM在特定条件下产生隐蔽的、针对特定政治人物的有害倾向，且现有黑盒审计难以检测。

papers.title: LLM-Guided Open Hypothesis Learning from Autonomous Scanning Probe Microscopy Experiments
papers.abstract: Autonomous experimentation has transformed microscopy and materials discovery by enabling closed-loop optimization including imaging and spectroscopy tuning, strucutre property relationship discovery, and exploration of combinatorial libraries. However, most current workflows remain limited to selecting measurements within fixed objective or hypothesis spaces, rather than generating new physical models from experimental data. Here, we introduce an open hypothesis-learning framework that combines symbolic regression with large-language-model-based physical evaluation and implement it for autonomous scanning probe microscopy. Symbolic regression generates candidate analytical relationships directly from sparse measurements, while the language-model evaluator ranks these candidates according to physical plausibility, scaling behavior, and consistency with known mechanisms. We demonstrate the approach on autonomous piezoresponse force microscopy measurements of ferroelectric domain switching in a PZT thin film. Starting from five seed measurements, the workflow evolves from physically incomplete candidate expressions toward interpretable voltage-time growth laws consistent with kinetic domain-wall motion. This work extends autonomous microscopy from closed-loop optimization toward open hypothesis discovery, where candidate physical laws emerge from the experiment itself rather than being specified in advance. More broadly, the framework establishes a route for integrating symbolic regression, physical reasoning, and adaptive experimentation into hierarchical autonomous scientific workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出将符号回归与LLM物理评估结合，实现自主扫描探针显微镜实验中的开放假设学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前自主实验工作流局限于在固定目标或假设空间内选择测量，无法从实验数据中生成新的物理模型，限制了科学发现能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让自主实验系统从稀疏测量数据中自动发现和演化可解释的物理规律，而非仅执行预设的优化任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合符号回归（从稀疏测量生成候选解析关系）和基于大语言模型的物理评估器（根据物理合理性、标度行为、与已知机制一致性排序候选），形成开放假设学习框架。
contributions: 提出开放假设学习框架，将自主显微镜从闭环优化扩展到开放假设发现。
在PZT薄膜铁电畴开关的自主压电力显微镜测量中验证，从5个种子测量演化出符合动力学畴壁运动的可解释电压-时间生长规律。
analysis.experiments: 在PZT薄膜的自主压电力显微镜测量上演示，从5个种子测量开始，工作流从物理不完整的候选表达式演化为可解释的电压-时间生长规律。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM评估的物理知识库覆盖范围。
符号回归的搜索空间可能随变量增加而爆炸。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将符号回归与LLM物理评估结合，实现自主扫描探针显微镜实验中的开放假设学习。

papers.title: On Privacy Leakage in Tabular Diffusion Models: Influential Factors, Attacker Knowledge, and Metrics
papers.abstract: Tabular data plays an important role in many fields and industries, including those with elevated privacy considerations and risks. As such, there is a rising interest in generating high-quality synthetic proxies for real tabular data as a means of reducing privacy risk and proprietary data exposure. With tabular diffusion models (TDMs) demonstrating leading performance in synthesizing such data, understanding and measuring the privacy risks associated with these models is imperative. Leveraging state-of-the-art membership inference attacks for TDMs in both black- and white-box settings, this work quantifies the impact of training setup, synthesis choices, and attacker knowledge on privacy leakage. Moreover, the results demonstrate that adversaries need not have perfect knowledge of the training setup, identical data distributions, or massive compute resources to construct successful attacks. Finally, the pitfalls associated with applying heuristic privacy metrics, such as distance-to-closest record, are revealed.

analysis.tldr: 探究表格扩散模型中隐私泄露的影响因素、攻击者知识及评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据在隐私敏感领域广泛应用，合成数据可降低隐私风险，但扩散模型的隐私泄露问题尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 量化表格扩散模型中训练设置、合成选择和攻击者知识对隐私泄露的影响，并揭示启发式隐私指标的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击者无需完美了解训练设置、相同数据分布或大量计算资源即可成功攻击；距离最近记录等启发式指标存在缺陷。
analysis.method: 利用最先进的成员推断攻击（黑盒和白盒设置）系统评估隐私泄露。
contributions: 量化了训练设置、合成选择和攻击者知识对表格扩散模型隐私泄露的影响
揭示了攻击者无需完美知识即可成功攻击，并指出启发式隐私指标的缺陷
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对表格扩散模型，可能不适用于其他生成模型
未讨论防御措施
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探究表格扩散模型中隐私泄露的影响因素、攻击者知识及评估指标。

papers.title: PAMPOS: Causal Transformer-based Trajectory Prediction for Attack-Agnostic Misbehavior Detection in V2X Networks
papers.abstract: Misbehavior detection in Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) networks is a second line of defense against insider falsification attacks that cryptographic mechanisms alone cannot address. Existing learning-based Misbehavior Detection Schemes (MDSs) are supervised, requiring labeled attack samples at training time, thus failing to counter unseen falsification attacks. We present PAMPOS, a causal transformer-decoder trained on benign VeReMi++ trajectories to learn normal mobility patterns. At inference time, misbehavior is identified as a deviation from the model's next-step kinematic predictions using a top-K normalized anomaly scoring mechanism that localizes falsification to specific kinematic features, without requiring attack-labeled training data. We evaluate PAMPOS across all 19 attack types in VeReMi++ under rush-hour and afternoon scenarios, achieving Area Under the Curve (AUC) values of up to 0.98 and F1-scores of up to 0.95 for most attack categories.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果Transformer解码器PAMPOS，仅用正常轨迹训练，通过预测偏差检测V2X网络中的未知攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: V2X网络中现有基于学习的异常检测方案需要攻击标签进行监督训练，无法应对未见过的伪造攻击，存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 在无攻击标签条件下，检测V2X网络中未知的伪造攻击行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用因果Transformer解码器在良性轨迹上训练以学习正常运动模式，推理时通过top-K归一化异常评分机制，根据模型下一步运动学预测的偏差识别异常并定位到特定特征。
contributions: 提出一种无需攻击标签的V2X异常检测方法PAMPOS，基于因果Transformer解码器学习正常轨迹模式。
设计top-K归一化异常评分机制，可定位伪造攻击到具体运动学特征。
在VeReMi++数据集上对所有19种攻击类型进行验证，AUC最高达0.98，F1最高达0.95。
analysis.experiments: 在VeReMi++数据集上，覆盖所有19种攻击类型，在高峰时段和下午场景下评估，AUC最高0.98，F1最高0.95。
limitations: 可能对高度复杂的攻击模式检测能力有限。
依赖轨迹预测的准确性，在极端动态场景下可能性能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果Transformer解码器PAMPOS，仅用正常轨迹训练，通过预测偏差检测V2X网络中的未知攻击。

papers.title: IntentGrasp: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Intent Understanding
papers.abstract: Accurately understanding the intent behind speech, conversation, and writing is crucial to the development of helpful Large Language Model (LLM) assistants. This paper introduces IntentGrasp, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating the intent understanding capability of LLMs. Derived from 49 high-quality, open-licensed corpora spanning 12 diverse domains, IntentGrasp is constructed through source datasets curation, intent label contextualization, and task format unification. IntentGrasp contains a large-scale training set of 262,759 instances and two evaluation sets: an All Set of 12,909 test cases and a more balanced and challenging Gem Set of 470 cases. Extensive evaluations on 20 LLMs across 7 families (including frontier models such as GPT-5.4, Gemini-3.1-Pro, and Claude-Opus-4.7) demonstrate unsatisfactory performance, with scores below 60% on All Set and below 25% on Gem set. Notably, 17 out of 20 tested models perform worse than a random-guess baseline (15.2%) on Gem Set, while the estimated human performance is ~81.1%, showing substantial room for improvement. To enhance such ability, this paper proposes Intentional Fine-Tuning (IFT), which fine-tunes the models on the training set in IntentGrasp, yielding significant gains of 30+ F1 points on All Set and 20+ points on Gem Set. Tellingly, the leave-one-domain-out (Lodo) experiments further demonstrate the strong cross-domain generalizability of IFT, verifying that it is a promising approach to substantially enhancing the intent understanding of LLMs. Overall, by benchmarking and boosting intent understanding ability, this study sheds light on a promising path towards more intentional, capable, and safe AI assistants for human benefits and social good.

analysis.tldr: 提出意图理解基准IntentGrasp和微调方法IFT，发现现有LLM意图理解能力远低于人类。
analysis.research_motivation: 准确理解意图对开发有用的LLM助手至关重要，但现有模型在此能力上存在不足，缺乏系统评估和提升方法。
analysis.problem: LLM在意图理解任务上表现不佳，需要构建全面的基准和有效的提升方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 20个LLM在All Set上得分低于60%，在Gem Set上低于25%，其中17个模型在Gem Set上低于随机猜测基线（15.2%），而人类表现约为81.1%，表明模型意图理解能力严重不足。
analysis.method: 构建IntentGrasp基准（包含262,759训练实例和两个测试集），并提出Intentional Fine-Tuning (IFT)方法在训练集上微调模型。
contributions: 构建了大规模、多领域的意图理解基准IntentGrasp，包含训练集和两个评估集。
提出IFT微调方法，在All Set和Gem Set上分别提升30+和20+ F1点，并展现出强跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在20个LLM（7个系列）上评估，包括GPT-5.4、Gemini-3.1-Pro、Claude-Opus-4.7等前沿模型，并进行了留一域（Lodo）实验验证跨域泛化性。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有意图理解场景。
IFT方法在更复杂或未见领域上的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出意图理解基准IntentGrasp和微调方法IFT，发现现有LLM意图理解能力远低于人类。

papers.title: Why DDIM Hallucinates More than DDPM: A Theoretical Analysis of Reverse Dynamics
papers.abstract: We theoretically study the hallucination phenomena in two canonical diffusion samplers: the stochastic Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and the deterministic Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM). We analyze the reverse ODE (DDIM) and SDE (DDPM) for a Gaussian mixture target, proving that after a critical time $\tau$, (a) DDIM can become stuck on the segment connecting the two nearest modes and (b) DDPM *stochasticity* helps it become unstuck from this region, thus avoiding hallucination. Our empirical validation verifies that DDPM has a significantly lower hallucination rate than DDIM when this region is entered. Building on our observations, we exhibit how using additional stochastic steps can help DDIM avoid hallucinations and offer new insights on how to design improved samplers.

analysis.tldr: 理论证明DDIM比DDPM更容易产生幻觉，因为其确定性ODE在临界时间后会被困在模态间线段上，而DDPM的随机性有助于脱离该区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中广泛应用，但DDIM等确定性采样器常出现幻觉（生成不真实样本），而DDPM等随机采样器幻觉较少，其背后的理论原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 从理论上解释为什么DDIM比DDPM更容易产生幻觉，并分析随机性在避免幻觉中的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对于高斯混合目标，存在一个临界时间τ，之后DDIM的逆ODE会陷入连接最近两个模态的线段上，导致生成样本落在低密度区域（幻觉）；而DDPM的SDE由于随机性，能够逃离该线段，从而降低幻觉率。
analysis.method: 对高斯混合目标下的DDPM（SDE）和DDIM（ODE）进行理论分析，证明临界时间后DDIM的动力学行为导致幻觉，并验证随机性的益处。
contributions: 首次从理论上证明DDIM比DDPM更容易产生幻觉，并揭示了临界时间τ后的动力学差异。
提出通过引入额外随机步骤帮助DDIM避免幻觉，为设计改进采样器提供新见解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析限于高斯混合目标，可能不直接推广到更复杂的数据分布。
未提供实际图像生成任务上的定量实验结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 理论证明DDIM比DDPM更容易产生幻觉，因为其确定性ODE在临界时间后会被困在模态间线段上，而DDPM的随机性有助于脱离该区域。

papers.title: A Rod Flow Model for Adam at the Edge of Stability
papers.abstract: Cohen et al. ( arXiv:2207.14484 ) observed that adaptive gradient methods such as Adam operate at the edge of stability. While there has been significant work on continuous-time modeling of gradient descent at the edge of stability, extending these models to momentum methods remains underdeveloped. In the gradient descent setting, Regis et al. ( arXiv:2602.01480 ) introduced rod flow, which models consecutive iterates as an extended one-dimensional object -- a "rod." Here we extend rod flow to Adam by working in the joint phase space of parameters and first moment $(w, m)$ and treating the second moment $\nu$ as a smooth auxiliary variable. We also develop rod flows for heavy ball momentum, Nesterov momentum, and scalar and per-component versions of RMSProp, Adam, and NAdam. For all eight optimizers, we empirically evaluate rod flow on representative machine learning architectures, where it tracks the discrete iterates through the edge-of-stability regime significantly more accurately than the corresponding stable flow.

analysis.tldr: 将 rod flow 模型扩展到 Adam 等自适应优化器，在边缘稳定性区域比稳定流更精确地跟踪离散迭代。
analysis.research_motivation: 自适应梯度方法（如 Adam）在边缘稳定性区域运行，但现有连续时间模型主要针对梯度下降，缺乏对动量方法的扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何为 Adam 等动量优化器建立精确的连续时间模型，以在边缘稳定性区域跟踪离散迭代。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在参数和第一动量的联合相空间 (w, m) 中扩展 rod flow，将第二动量 ν 视为光滑辅助变量，并为八种优化器开发 rod flow。
contributions: 将 rod flow 模型扩展到 Adam、RMSProp、NAdam 等自适应优化器及动量方法。
在代表性架构上实证验证 rod flow 比稳定流更精确地跟踪边缘稳定性区域的离散迭代。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性机器学习架构上对八种优化器进行实证评估，显示 rod flow 在边缘稳定性区域比稳定流更精确。
limitations: 可能仅适用于边缘稳定性区域，其他区域效果未知。
计算复杂度可能高于简单流模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将 rod flow 模型扩展到 Adam 等自适应优化器，在边缘稳定性区域比稳定流更精确地跟踪离散迭代。

papers.title: Overcoming data scarcity through multi-center federated learning for organs-at-risk segmentation in pediatric upper abdominal radiotherapy
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based organs/structures-at-risk(OARs) auto-contouring models can improve radiotherapy workflows, but models trained on adult data often underperform in pediatric patients. Developing robust pediatric-specific models is hindered by data scarcity and fragmentation across centers. Federated learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training without the need for data sharing. We evaluated the feasibility and performance of FL for developing pediatric-specific OAR segmentation models across two European medical centers. Computed tomography (CT) images from pediatric patients from Utrecht and Heidelberg with a renal tumor or abdominal neuroblastoma were retrospectively collected and locally processed. An nnU-Net-based framework segmented 19 OARs using local and FL schemes. FL was implemented with secure weight exchange on a cloud storage across institutional firewalls. Performance was assessed using the Dice similarity coefficient (DSC), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance, and mean surface distance. Robustness to patient orientation, false-positive segmentation of surgically removed kidneys, and failure cases were identified. A total of 310 postoperative CTs from 272 patients (105 renal tumors, 167 neuroblastomas) were included. Local models performed well on their respective center data but showed significantly reduced cross-center performance for four to seven of the nine evaluated OARs (DSC). In contrast, the FL model matched local performance for at least seven of nine OARs and achieved the best cross-center results across three metrics, with DSC gains of 0.003-0.007 over local models. FL also maintained stable performance across patient orientations and reduced false-positive kidney segmentations. Real-world FL improves cross-center robustness of CT-based OAR segmentation models in pediatric upper abdominal tumors.

analysis.tldr: 联邦学习能有效解决儿科上腹部放疗中器官分割模型的数据稀缺问题，跨中心性能优于本地模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于深度学习的器官自动分割模型在儿科患者中性能不佳，因为儿科数据稀缺且分散在不同中心，而成人数据训练的模型迁移效果差。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用多中心儿科数据训练鲁棒的器官分割模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 本地模型在各自中心表现良好，但跨中心性能显著下降（9个器官中4-7个DSC降低）；联邦学习模型匹配本地性能并取得最佳跨中心结果，DSC提升0.003-0.007，且减少假阳性分割。
analysis.method: 基于nnU-Net框架，在两个欧洲医学中心之间实施联邦学习，通过云存储安全交换权重，无需共享数据。
contributions: 首次在儿科上腹部放疗中评估联邦学习用于多中心器官分割的可行性。
证明联邦学习能提升跨中心鲁棒性，减少假阳性分割，且性能稳定。
analysis.experiments: 使用来自两个中心的310张术后CT（272名患者），评估Dice相似系数、95% Hausdorff距离和平均表面距离。
limitations: 仅涉及两个中心，泛化性需更多中心验证。
未提及联邦学习通信开销和收敛速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 联邦学习能有效解决儿科上腹部放疗中器官分割模型的数据稀缺问题，跨中心性能优于本地模型。

papers.title: Distributional Process Reward Models: Calibrated Prediction of Future Rewards via Conditional Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Inference-time scaling methods rely on Process Reward Models (PRMs), which are often poorly calibrated and overestimate success probabilities. We propose, to our knowledge, the first use of conditional optimal transport for calibrating PRMs, modifying conditional OT (CondOT) map learning \cite{bunne2022supervised} to estimate a monotonic conditional quantile function over success probabilities estimated by the PRM, conditioned on PRM hidden states. This yields structurally valid quantile estimates and enables efficient extraction of confidence bounds at arbitrary levels, which we integrate into the instance-adaptive scaling (IAS) framework of \cite{park2025know}. We evaluate on mathematical reasoning benchmarks spanning moderate-difficulty problems (MATH-500) and harder out-of-distribution problems (AIME). For PRMs with reliable ranking signals, our method substantially improves calibration over both uncalibrated PRMs and quantile regression. On downstream Best-of-N IAS performance, our method generally improves over uncalibrated PRMs. These results establish conditional optimal transport as another principled and practical approach to PRM calibration, offering structural guarantees and flexible uncertainty estimation.

analysis.tldr: 首次将条件最优传输用于过程奖励模型校准，提升校准性和不确定性估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 过程奖励模型（PRM）在推理时扩展中至关重要，但常校准不良，高估成功概率，影响下游决策可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何校准PRM的概率估计，使其提供结构有效的分位数估计和置信区间，并提升下游实例自适应扩展（IAS）性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PRM通常校准不良，高估成功概率；现有校准方法如分位数回归可能缺乏结构保证。
analysis.method: 修改条件最优传输（CondOT）映射学习，估计PRM隐藏状态条件下成功概率的单调条件分位数函数，从而获得结构有效的分位数估计和任意置信水平下的置信界，并集成到IAS框架中。
contributions: 首次将条件最优传输用于PRM校准，提供结构保证和灵活的不确定性估计。
在数学推理基准上（MATH-500和AIME）验证了方法在校准和下游Best-of-N IAS性能上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH-500（中等难度）和AIME（更难分布外问题）上评估，与未校准PRM和分位数回归对比，显示校准性和下游性能提升。
limitations: 依赖PRM的可靠排序信号，若排序信号弱则效果可能受限。
仅针对数学推理任务验证，泛化到其他领域需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将条件最优传输用于过程奖励模型校准，提升校准性和不确定性估计。

papers.title: VITA-QinYu: Expressive Spoken Language Model for Role-Playing and Singing
papers.abstract: Human speech conveys expressiveness beyond linguistic content, including personality, mood, or performance elements, such as a comforting tone or humming a song, which we formalize as role-playing and singing. We present VITA-QinYu, the first expressive end-to-end (E2E) spoken language model (SLM) that goes beyond natural conversation to support both role-playing and singing generation. VITA-QinYu adopts a hybrid speech-text paradigm that extends interleaved text-audio modeling with multi-codebook audio tokens, a design enabling richer paralinguistic representation while preserving a clear separation between modalities to avoid interference. We further develop a comprehensive data generation pipeline to synthesize a total of 15.8K hours of natural conversation, role-playing, and singing data for training. VITA-QinYu demonstrates superior expressiveness, outperforming peer SLMs by 7 percentage points on objective role-playing benchmarks, and surpassing peer models by 0.13 points on a 5-point MOS scale for singing. Simultaneously, it achieves state-of-the-art conversational accuracy and fluency, exceeding prior SLMs by 1.38 and 4.98 percentage points on the C3 and URO benchmarks, respectively. We open-source our code and models and provide an easy-to-use demo with full-stack support for streaming and full-duplex interaction.

analysis.tldr: VITA-QinYu 是首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端表达性口语语言模型，采用混合语音-文本范式，在多项基准上达到最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有口语语言模型主要关注自然对话，缺乏对角色扮演和歌唱等表达性语音的支持，而这些场景需要丰富的副语言表示。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个端到端口语语言模型，使其既能处理自然对话，又能生成具有表现力的角色扮演和歌唱语音。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用混合语音-文本范式，扩展交错文本-音频建模与多码本音频令牌，设计数据生成流水线合成15.8K小时训练数据。
contributions: 首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端表达性口语语言模型
提出混合语音-文本范式与多码本音频令牌设计，实现丰富副语言表示与模态分离
构建大规模数据生成流水线，开源代码和模型
analysis.experiments: 在角色扮演基准上客观指标领先7个百分点，歌唱MOS评分领先0.13分，对话准确率和流畅性在C3和URO基准上分别领先1.38和4.98个百分点。
limitations: 可能对低资源语言或方言支持有限
歌唱生成质量可能受限于训练数据多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VITA-QinYu 是首个支持角色扮演和歌唱的端到端表达性口语语言模型，采用混合语音-文本范式，在多项基准上达到最优。

papers.title: Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Learning from a sequence of interactions, as soon as observations are perceived and acted upon, without explicitly storing them, holds the promise of simpler, more efficient and adaptive algorithms. For over a decade, however, deep reinforcement learning walked the contrary path, augmenting agents with replay buffers or parallel sampling routines, in an effort to tame learning instability. Recently, this topic has been revisited by Elsayed et al. (2024), focusing on update computation through eligibility traces and modifications to the optimisation routine, resulting in the StreamQ algorithm. In this work we take a step back, investigating the efficacy of established updates, such as those implemented by DQN and C51 within this online setting. Not only do we find that they perform well, but through analysing how the optimisation algorithm generally, and Adam in particular, interacts with these updates, we contend that two properties are essential for robust performance: i) the derivative of the objective is to be bounded and ii) weight updates are variance-adjusted. Rigorous and exhaustive experimentation demonstrates that C51, which exhibits both characteristics, is competitive with StreamQ across a subset of 55 Atari games. Using these insights, we derive a variance-adjusted algorithm based on eligibility traces, termed Adaptive Q$(\lambda)$, which approaches double the human baseline on the same subset, surpassing existing methods by all performance metrics.

analysis.tldr: 重新审视Adam在流式强化学习中的作用，发现目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整是稳定在线学习的关键，并据此提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式强化学习无需存储经验，有望实现更简单高效的算法，但长期以来深度强化学习依赖经验回放或并行采样来稳定训练，限制了在线学习的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用经验回放或并行采样的流式在线设置下，实现稳定且高效的深度强化学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 分析Adam优化器与在线更新的交互，提出两个关键性质：目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整；基于此设计方差调整的资格迹算法Adaptive Q(λ)。
contributions: 揭示目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整是流式强化学习鲁棒性能的必要条件。
提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法，在55个Atari游戏子集上超越现有方法，接近双倍人类基线。
analysis.experiments: 在55个Atari游戏子集上进行实验，C51与StreamQ竞争，Adaptive Q(λ)在所有性能指标上超越现有方法。
limitations: 实验仅在Atari游戏上验证，泛化到其他领域需进一步研究。
Adaptive Q(λ)的方差调整机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 重新审视Adam在流式强化学习中的作用，发现目标函数导数有界和权重更新方差调整是稳定在线学习的关键，并据此提出Adaptive Q(λ)算法。

papers.title: A Linear-Transformer Hybrid for SNP-Based Genotype-to-Phenotype Prediction in Grapevine
papers.abstract: Robust genotype-to-phenotype (G2P) prediction is essential for accelerating breeding decisions and genetic gain. However, it remains challenging to measure complex traits under variable field conditions and across years. In this study, we propose a linear-Transformer approach, LiT-G2P (Linear-Transformer Genotype-to-Phenotype), an automated predictive framework that integrates additive genetic variance effects with Transformer-based nonlinear interactions using genome-wide single-nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) data. We evaluated LiT-G2P on a panel of diverse grape accessions, genotyped with SNP markers and measured for phenotypes across two consecutive years.
