Target phenotypic traits include leaf hair density and trichome density of grapevines. Across both single-year and cross-year testing scenarios, LiT-G2P consistently improves prediction performance compared with baseline models. For hair density, LiT-G2P achieves the lowest error in both single-year and cross-year evaluations, with RMSEs of 0.469 and 0.454, respectively, while maintaining strong tolerance accuracies of 79.2% and 74.6%, respectively. For trichome density, LiT-G2P also presents the best overall G2P performance. In addition, we extract model-prioritized SNPs from attention weights and apply genotype-stratified analysis to provide interpretable candidate marker for downstream validation. These results demonstrate that integrating stable additive effects with learned interaction patterns can enhance cross-year robustness and support practical SNP-based predictive modeling for genomic selection.

analysis.tldr: 提出线性-Transformer混合模型LiT-G2P，利用SNP数据预测葡萄基因型到表型，在跨年场景下提升预测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基因型到表型（G2P）预测对加速育种决策和遗传增益至关重要，但复杂性状在多变田间环境和跨年条件下难以准确测量，现有方法在跨年鲁棒性上不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用全基因组SNP数据，结合加性遗传效应和非线性交互作用，实现跨年鲁棒的G2P预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LiT-G2P框架，融合线性模型捕获加性遗传方差效应与Transformer捕获非线性交互作用，基于全基因组SNP数据自动预测表型。
contributions: 提出线性-Transformer混合架构LiT-G2P，同时建模加性效应和非线性交互。
在葡萄多样品系上跨年验证，在毛密度和毛状体密度预测上取得最低RMSE和较高容忍准确率。
通过注意力权重提取模型优先SNP并进行基因型分层分析，提供可解释的候选标记。
analysis.experiments: 在葡萄多样品系上，使用SNP标记和两年表型数据，评估单年和跨年预测场景，与基线模型比较。毛密度单年和跨年RMSE分别为0.469和0.454，容忍准确率79.2%和74.6%；毛状体密度也取得最佳性能。
limitations: 仅针对葡萄品种，可能需在其他物种上验证泛化性。
未讨论模型在大规模SNP或高维表型上的计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出线性-Transformer混合模型LiT-G2P，利用SNP数据预测葡萄基因型到表型，在跨年场景下提升预测鲁棒性。

papers.title: Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning is widely used to improve the reasoning ability of large language models, especially when answers can be automatically checked. Standard GRPO-style training updates the model using only the current step, while full multi-step lookahead can give a better update direction but is too expensive because it needs many backward passes. We propose Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization (GXPO), a plug-compatible policy-update rule for GRPO-style reasoning RL. GXPO approximates a longer local lookahead using only three backward passes during an active phase. It reuses the same batch of rollouts, rewards, advantages, and GRPO loss, so it does not require new rollouts or reward computation at the lookahead points. GXPO takes two fast optimizer steps, measures how the gradients change, predicts a virtual K-step lookahead point, moves the policy partway toward that point, and then applies a corrective update using the true gradient at the new position. When the lookahead signal becomes unstable, GXPO automatically switches back to standard single-pass GRPO. We also give a plain-gradient-descent surrogate analysis that explains when the extrapolation is exact and where its local errors come from. Across Qwen2.5 and Llama math-reasoning experiments, GXPO improves the average sampled pass@1 by +1.65 to +5.00 points over GRPO and by +0.14 to +1.28 points over the strongest SFPO setting, while keeping the active-phase cost fixed at three backward passes. It also achieves up to 4.00x step speedup, 2.33x wall-clock speedup, and 1.33x backward-pass speedup in reaching GRPO's peak accuracy.

analysis.tldr: GXPO 通过三次反向传播近似多步前瞻，提升 GRPO 风格强化学习的推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 GRPO 仅使用当前步更新，而多步前瞻虽能提供更好更新方向但计算成本过高，需要大量反向传播。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持低计算成本的同时，近似多步前瞻的更新方向以提升策略优化效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GXPO 在活跃阶段仅用三次反向传播：先执行两步快速优化，测量梯度变化，预测虚拟 K 步前瞻点，将策略部分移向该点，然后在新位置用真实梯度进行校正更新；当前瞻信号不稳定时自动回退到标准单步 GRPO。
contributions: 提出 GXPO，一种即插即用的策略更新规则，仅用三次反向传播近似多步前瞻。
提供梯度下降替代分析，解释外推何时精确及局部误差来源。
在 Qwen2.5 和 Llama 数学推理实验中，GXPO 在 pass@1 上比 GRPO 提升 +1.65 到 +5.00 点，比最强 SFPO 提升 +0.14 到 +1.28 点，并实现最高 4.00 倍步数加速、2.33 倍墙钟加速和 1.33 倍反向传播加速。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen2.5 和 Llama 模型上进行数学推理实验，评估 pass@1 和加速比。
limitations: 前瞻信号不稳定时需回退到标准 GRPO，可能限制收益。
方法在非数学推理任务上的泛化性未在摘要中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GXPO 通过三次反向传播近似多步前瞻，提升 GRPO 风格强化学习的推理性能。

papers.title: A Statistical Framework for Algorithmic Collective Action with Multiple Collectives
papers.abstract: As learning systems increasingly shape everyday decisions, Algorithmic Collective Action (ACA), i.e., users coordinating changes to shared data to steer model behavior, offers a complement to regulator-side policy and corporate model design. Real-world collective actions have traditionally been decentralized and fragmented into multiple collectives, despite sharing overarching objectives, with each collective differing in size, strategy, and actionable goals. However, most of the ACA literature focuses on single collective settings. To address this, we propose the first comprehensive statistical framework for ACA with multiple collectives acting on the same system. In particular, we focus on collective action in classification, studying how multiple collectives can influence a classifier's behavior. We provide quantitative statistical bounds on the success of the collectives, considering the role and the interplay of the collectives' sizes and the alignment of their goals. We make such bounds computable by each collective with only partial knowledge of other collectives' sizes and strategies. Finally, we numerically illustrate our framework on simulations inspired by interventions for climate adaptation in smart cities, demonstrating the usefulness of our bounds.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对多集体算法集体行动的统计框架，量化集体规模与目标对齐对分类器行为的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实中的集体行动常分散为多个集体，但现有文献多聚焦单一集体，缺乏对多集体场景的理论分析。
analysis.problem: 如何量化多个集体在分类任务中共同影响分类器行为的成功条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统计框架，推导集体成功概率的定量边界，该边界仅需部分其他集体的规模和策略信息即可计算。
contributions: 首个针对多集体算法集体行动的统计框架
提供可计算的定量边界，仅需部分信息
analysis.experiments: 在气候适应智慧城市模拟中数值验证了框架的有效性。
limitations: 仅针对分类任务，未扩展到回归或生成模型
假设集体策略已知，实际中可能难以获取
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对多集体算法集体行动的统计框架，量化集体规模与目标对齐对分类器行为的影响。

papers.title: Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)
papers.abstract: We introduce Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (GeoKANs), a family of geometry-aware KAN-type models in which approximation is carried out in learned, geometry-adapted coordinates rather than in fixed Euclidean input coordinates. GeoKAN achieves this by learning a diagonal Riemannian metric that warps the input before basis expansion and feature mixing. The learned metric provides a geometric inductive bias through local length scaling and volume distortion, and in physics-informed settings it also affects the differential structure seen by the model. Within this framework, we develop three main variants, namely GeoKAN-NNMetric, GeoKAN-$\gamma$, and LM-KAN. For LM-KAN, we further consider three basis-specific versions, LM-KAN-RBF, LM-KAN-Wav, and LM-KAN-Fourier. These variants allow us to study geometry-aware KAN models both as general function approximators and as surrogates in physics-informed learning. By stretching regions with rapid variation and compressing smoother regions, GeoKAN reallocates representational resolution in a task-dependent manner, allowing the model to place capacity where it is most needed. As a result, GeoKAN is well suited to sharp, stiff, localized, and strongly non-uniform regimes arising in scientific machine learning and differential-equation problems.

analysis.tldr: GeoKAN 通过学习黎曼度量实现几何自适应坐标变换，提升 KAN 在科学机器学习中的逼近效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 KAN 在固定欧几里得坐标下进行逼近，难以有效处理具有尖锐、刚性、局部化或强非均匀特征的科学计算问题，需要几何自适应能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让 KAN 模型在输入空间中进行几何自适应坐标变换，以在任务相关区域动态分配表示分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出通过拉伸快速变化区域、压缩平滑区域可重新分配表示容量。
analysis.method: 学习一个对角黎曼度量来扭曲输入空间，在基展开和特征混合前进行几何自适应坐标变换；提出三种变体：GeoKAN-NNMetric、GeoKAN-γ 和 LM-KAN（含 RBF、Wav、Fourier 三种基）。
contributions: 提出 GeoKAN 框架，将几何自适应坐标变换引入 KAN 模型。
开发三种变体，支持不同基函数和度量学习方式。
在物理信息学习场景中，通过度量影响微分结构，提供几何归纳偏置。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 对角度量假设可能限制几何变形的表达能力。
度量学习可能增加计算开销，尤其在高维输入时。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoKAN 通过学习黎曼度量实现几何自适应坐标变换，提升 KAN 在科学机器学习中的逼近效率。

papers.title: From Specification to Deployment: Empirical Evidence from a W3C VC + DID Trust Infrastructure for Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents now transact at production scale -- 69,000 bots executing 165 million transactions across 50 million USDC in cumulative volume on a single marketplace -- without any shared trust layer between participants. Regulatory frameworks (Singapore IMDA, NIST CAISI, EU AI Act) and major AI laboratories (Anthropic, Google) have independently converged on the same structural requirement: an open, portable, cryptographically verifiable trust infrastructure for autonomous agents that no single vendor can deliver alone. This paper presents MolTrust, a production-deployed implementation of such an infrastructure built on W3C Verifiable Credentials 2.0 and Decentralized Identifiers v1.0, with on-chain anchoring on Base Layer 2. The system architecture is organized around four primitives (identity, authorization, behavioral record, portability), a five-party accountability chain, and the Agent Authorization Envelope (AAE) -- a machine-evaluable authorization structure enforced at three layers: cryptographic signatures, API-level credential lifecycle management, and kernel-level syscall monitoring via Falco eBPF integration. The paper documents three distinguishing capabilities: kernel-layer AAE enforcement below the agent process boundary; cross-protocol interoperability through five reproducible test vectors verified against independent implementations; and layered Sybil resistance combining dual-signature interaction proofs, cross-vertical endorsement diversity gating, and principal-DID-linked violation persistence. The reference implementation has been operational since March 2026 across eight credential verticals. Empirical validation at adversarial scale is pending. The contribution is deployment-first evidence that the trust infrastructure regulators and industry have converged on is implementable today using W3C-standardized primitives.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于W3C VC+DID的自主智能体信任基础设施MolTrust，已在生产环境中部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主AI智能体在无共享信任层的情况下大规模交易，监管机构和行业一致要求开放、可移植、加密可验证的信任基础设施，但尚无单一供应商能独立交付。
analysis.problem: 如何构建并部署一个符合W3C标准、支持跨协议互操作、具备内核级强制执行的自主智能体信任基础设施。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于W3C Verifiable Credentials 2.0和Decentralized Identifiers v1.0，结合Base Layer 2链上锚定，设计四原语（身份、授权、行为记录、可移植性）、五方问责链和Agent授权信封（AAE），在密码签名、API生命周期管理和内核级syscall监控三层实施。
contributions: 提出MolTrust，首个基于W3C标准的自主智能体信任基础设施生产部署。
实现内核层AAE强制、跨协议互操作（五个可复现测试向量）和分层Sybil抵抗。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 对抗性规模验证尚未完成。
可能依赖特定区块链基础设施（Base Layer 2）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于W3C VC+DID的自主智能体信任基础设施MolTrust，已在生产环境中部署。

papers.title: A Self-Healing Framework for Reliable LLM-Based Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents based on Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being utilized in complex software systems. However, reliability remains a significant challenge due to unpredictable failures such as hallucinations, execution errors, and inconsistent reasoning. This paper proposes a reliability-aware self-healing framework for LLM-based software agents. The framework integrates failure detection, reliability assessment, and automated recovery mechanisms. First, we define a taxonomy of failure types and introduce a quantitative reliability assessment model. Next, we propose a failure detection method that identifies abnormal agent behavior based on execution patterns and output consistency. Finally, we design a self-healing mechanism that dynamically recovers from failures through adaptive replanning and corrective prompting strategies. The proposed framework was implemented in a multi-agent workflow environment and evaluated using real-world task scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly increases task success rates, reduces failure propagation, and enhances overall system robustness compared to existing methods. In particular, this study distinguishes itself by establishing an integrated monitoring system that combines the agent's internal reasoning process with external execution results. These findings are expected to contribute to securing the stability of advanced autonomous systems and lowering the barriers to LLM adoption in production environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自愈框架，通过故障检测、可靠性评估和自动恢复机制提升LLM智能体的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在复杂软件系统中可靠性不足，面临幻觉、执行错误和推理不一致等不可预测故障，现有方法缺乏系统性的故障处理机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个集成故障检测、可靠性评估和自动恢复的框架，以提高LLM智能体在真实任务中的鲁棒性和成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自愈框架，包括故障类型分类、定量可靠性评估模型、基于执行模式和输出一致性的故障检测方法，以及通过自适应重规划和纠正提示策略的动态恢复机制。
contributions: 定义了LLM智能体故障类型的分类法并引入定量可靠性评估模型。
提出结合内部推理过程与外部执行结果的集成监控系统，实现故障检测与自动恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在多智能体工作流环境中使用真实任务场景评估，结果表明该方法显著提高了任务成功率，减少了故障传播，增强了系统鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的故障类型分类，对未知故障模式覆盖不足。
自愈机制可能增加计算开销，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自愈框架，通过故障检测、可靠性评估和自动恢复机制提升LLM智能体的可靠性。

papers.title: STDA-Net: Spectrogram-Based Domain Adaptation for cross-dataset Sleep Stage Classification
papers.abstract: Accurate sleep stage classification across datasets remains challenging due to variability in EEG channel montages, sampling rates, recording environments, and subject populations. Although deep learning has shown considerable promise for automated sleep staging, most existing cross-dataset methods rely on one-dimensional EEG signal representations, whereas the use of two-dimensional spectrogram-based inputs within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework has remained largely unexplored. Here, we propose STDA-Net (Spectrogram-based Temporal Domain Adaptation Network), a framework that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) for spectrogram-based feature extraction, a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) module for temporal modeling of sleep dynamics, and a domain-adversarial neural network (DANN) for source-to-target feature alignment without requiring any labeled target-domain data during training. Experiments are conducted on three publicly available datasets Sleep-EDF, SHHS-1, and SHHS-2 under six cross-dataset transfer settings. Results show that the proposed framework achieves an average accuracy of 89.03% and an average macro F1-score of 87.64%, consistently outperforming existing 1D baseline methods in terms of balanced classification performance, with substantially lower variance across five independent runs, indicating improved stability and reproducibility. Overall, these findings demonstrate that 2D spectrogram-based representations, combined with temporal modeling and adversarial domain adaptation, provide a robust and competitive alternative to conventional 1D EEG inputs for cross-dataset sleep staging.

analysis.tldr: 提出STDA-Net，利用频谱图、BiLSTM和域对抗网络实现跨数据集睡眠分期，性能优于1D方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨数据集睡眠分期因EEG通道配置、采样率、记录环境和受试者差异而具有挑战性，现有方法多依赖一维EEG信号，二维频谱图在无监督域适应框架中的应用尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 解决跨数据集睡眠分期中因数据分布差异导致的分类性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STDA-Net，结合CNN提取频谱图特征、BiLSTM建模睡眠时序动态、DANN进行源域到目标域的无监督特征对齐。
contributions: 首次将二维频谱图表示与无监督域适应结合用于跨数据集睡眠分期。
在六个跨数据集设置下，平均准确率89.03%、宏F1 87.64%，优于1D基线方法，且方差更低。
analysis.experiments: 在Sleep-EDF、SHHS-1、SHHS-2三个公开数据集上进行了六个跨数据集迁移实验，报告了平均准确率和宏F1。
limitations: 可能仅适用于睡眠分期任务，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STDA-Net，利用频谱图、BiLSTM和域对抗网络实现跨数据集睡眠分期，性能优于1D方法。

papers.title: Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning
papers.abstract: Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出门控QKAN-FWP，用单量子比特数据重上传电路替代多量子比特架构，实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有量子快速权重编程器依赖多量子比特架构，在NISQ设备上难以扩展且经典模拟昂贵，亟需更轻量、可扩展的量子启发序列学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可扩展、参数高效且NISQ兼容的量子启发快速权重编程框架，用于序列学习任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出gated QKAN-FWP，将快速权重编程与量子启发KAN结合，使用单量子比特数据重上传电路作为可学习非线性激活（DARUAN），并引入标量门控快速权重更新规则以稳定参数演化。
contributions: 提出gated QKAN-FWP框架，利用单量子比特电路实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习。
引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，并提供理论分析（自适应记忆核、几何有界性、可并行梯度路径）。
在时间序列、MiniGrid强化学习和太阳周期预测任务上验证有效性，并在真实量子处理器上部署。
analysis.experiments: 在时间序列基准、MiniGrid强化学习以及太阳周期预测（528个月输入窗口，132个月预测范围）上评估，12.5k参数模型在缩放MSE、峰值幅度误差和峰值时序误差上优于参数多13倍的LSTM等基线；在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署，1024次测量下相对MSE在0.1%以内。
limitations: 可能仅适用于中等规模序列任务，超长序列或高维输入可能受限。
单量子比特电路表达能力有限，复杂任务可能需要更多量子资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出门控QKAN-FWP，用单量子比特数据重上传电路替代多量子比特架构，实现可扩展的量子启发序列学习。

papers.title: Beyond Factor Aggregation: Gauge-Aware Low-Rank Server Representations for Federated LoRA
papers.abstract: Federated LoRA enables parameter-efficient adaptation of large language models under decentralized data and limited client this http URL , directly averaging LoRA factors is representation-dependent: the same intrinsic update admits infinitely many gauge-equivalent factorizations, so factor-level aggregation can change under arbitrary coordinate choices while the underlying update remains unchanged. This reveals a semantic mismatch in existing federated LoRA aggregation rules. We propose \textbf{GLoRA}, a gauge-aware server representation for federated this http URL of aggregating raw factors, GLoRA estimates a consensus update subspace from client projectors and aggregates client updates in shared reference coordinates, thereby representing semantic update aggregation entirely in low-rank form. To support heterogeneous client capacities, GLoRA further provides a rank-compatible readout that instantiates adapters of different ranks from the same server state without dense update reconstruction. Experiments on GLUE and SuperNI show that GLoRA consistently outperforms federated LoRA baselines under data, resource, and task heterogeneity, including heterogeneous client ranks, sparse participation, larger backbones, and unseen-task evaluation. GLoRA also achieves a favorable efficiency--performance trade-off, suggesting that effective federated LoRA requires not merely averaging low-rank factors, but defining a semantically meaningful server-side representation for aggregation.

analysis.tldr: 提出GLoRA，通过规范参考系聚合低秩更新，解决联邦LoRA中因子聚合的表示依赖问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦LoRA中直接平均低秩因子存在表示依赖问题：同一更新有无限多种规范等价的分解，导致因子级聚合在任意坐标变换下改变，而底层更新不变，造成语义不匹配。
analysis.problem: 现有联邦LoRA聚合规则存在语义不匹配，需要一种规范感知的服务器端表示来正确聚合低秩更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直接平均LoRA因子是表示依赖的，同一内在更新有无限多种规范等价的分解，因子级聚合在坐标变换下改变而更新不变。
analysis.method: GLoRA：从客户端投影子空间估计共识更新子空间，在共享参考坐标下聚合客户端更新，完全以低秩形式表示语义更新聚合；并提供秩兼容读出，从同一服务器状态实例化不同秩的适配器。
contributions: 揭示了联邦LoRA中因子聚合的表示依赖问题，即语义不匹配。
提出GLoRA，一种规范感知的服务器端低秩表示，实现语义一致的更新聚合。
支持异构客户端秩，无需稠密更新重建即可从同一服务器状态读出不同秩的适配器。
在GLUE和SuperNI上，GLoRA在数据、资源和任务异构性下持续优于联邦LoRA基线。
analysis.experiments: 在GLUE和SuperNI上评估，包括异构客户端秩、稀疏参与、更大骨干网络和未见任务评估，GLoRA持续优于联邦LoRA基线，并取得有利的效率-性能权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖客户端投影子空间的估计质量，在极端稀疏参与下可能不稳定。
未讨论跨客户端通信开销的具体分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GLoRA，通过规范参考系聚合低秩更新，解决联邦LoRA中因子聚合的表示依赖问题。

papers.title: The E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer: Adaptive Geodesic Operations with Guaranteed Orthogonality
papers.abstract: We present the E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo Transformer, a novel architecture that unifies Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), Deep Delta Learning (DDL), and the Cayley transform to obtain input-adaptive, unconditionally orthogonal residual connections. Unlike DDL, whose Householder operator is orthogonal only at $\beta \in \{0,2\}$, our Data-Dependent Cayley rotation $Q(x)=(I+(\beta/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(\beta/2)A(x))$ preserves orthogonality for all $\beta$ and all inputs. To handle negation, an eigenvalue $-1$ case that Cayley provably excludes, we introduce the E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo Hybrid, which combines Cayley rotation with Householder reflection via a learned operator-selection gate $X'=\gamma(X)Q(X)X+(1-\gamma(X))H_2(X)X$. A midpoint-collapse regularizer, $4\gamma(1-\gamma)$, encourages boundary gate decisions, where each selected component is orthogonal. In matched-parameter comparisons, with approximately 1.79M parameters per model and mean +/- standard deviation over 3 seeds, against four baselines including the concurrent JPmHC, E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo achieves the best long-horizon stability, 1.9x over JPmHC and 3.8x over GPT; the best near-$\pi$ rotation loss, 4.5x over JPmHC on single-plane; strong norm preservation, with 0.001 mean deviation; and 0.96 negation cosine alignment in a diagnostic reflection probe, all with 33% fewer layers. While JPmHC's wider representation excels on pure rotation, its finite Cayley residual mixer excludes an exact $\lambda=-1$ operator and has no reflection branch, motivating our hybrid approach for accessing both connected components of $O(n)$.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种保证正交性的自适应残差连接架构，通过Cayley旋转与Householder反射混合实现全输入正交性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度Delta学习（DDL）的Householder算子仅在特定β值下正交，且Cayley变换无法处理特征值-1的反射操作，限制了残差连接的稳定性和表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种输入自适应、无条件正交的残差连接，同时覆盖旋转和反射两种正交变换。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Cayley变换无法实现特征值-1的反射操作，而JPmHC的有限Cayley残差混合器排除了精确的λ=-1算子且无反射分支。
analysis.method: 提出EΔ-MHC-Geo Transformer，结合流形约束超连接（mHC）、深度Delta学习（DDL）和Cayley变换，通过数据依赖的Cayley旋转Q(x)保证全输入正交性，并引入混合门控机制γ(x)融合Cayley旋转与Householder反射，配合中点坍缩正则化鼓励边界门决策。
contributions: 提出数据依赖的Cayley旋转算子，实现对所有β和输入的无条件正交性。
设计混合门控机制，通过Cayley旋转与Householder反射的切换覆盖正交群O(n)的两个连通分量。
引入中点坍缩正则化，促进门控输出边界决策，确保所选组件正交。
analysis.experiments: 在约1.79M参数模型上，与包括JPmHC在内的四个基线对比，EΔ-MHC-Geo在长程稳定性上比JPmHC提升1.9倍、比GPT提升3.8倍；近π旋转损失比JPmHC提升4.5倍；范数保持平均偏差0.001；反射诊断探针余弦对齐0.96，且层数减少33%。
limitations: 混合门控机制增加了计算开销。
正则化超参数可能需要针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种保证正交性的自适应残差连接架构，通过Cayley旋转与Householder反射混合实现全输入正交性。

papers.title: OmicsLM: A Multimodal Large Language Model for Multi-Sample Omics Reasoning
papers.abstract: Interpreting transcriptomic data is one of the most common analytical tasks in modern biology. Yet most current models either consume expression profiles without producing natural-language biological explanations, or reason in language without direct access to quantitative omics measurements. We introduce OmicsLM, a multimodal LLM that connects quantitative omics profiles with natural-language biological tasks. OmicsLM represents each transcriptomic profile as a compact continuous representation within the LLM context. This interface preserves quantitative expression signal while allowing natural-language instructions, explicit gene mentions, and multiple interleaved biological samples to be processed together in one model context. We train OmicsLM on more than 5.5 million instruction-following examples spanning over 70 task types, combining continuous transcriptomic inputs, experimental data rendered through diverse language templates, and free-text biological knowledge and question-answering data. This mixture covers cell type annotation, perturbation prediction, clinical prediction, pathway reasoning, and open-ended biological question answering. Existing benchmarks evaluate either profile-level prediction or text-only biological QA, leaving language-guided, multi-sample reasoning over real expression profiles unmeasured. To close this gap, we introduce GEO-OmicsQA, a benchmark for multi-sample biological question answering built from real Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) studies. We demonstrate that OmicsLM can use expression profiles directly and perform comparably to specialized omics models on profile-level tasks, while outperforming both omics-specialized models and general LLMs on language-guided biological reasoning over expression data.

analysis.tldr: OmicsLM 是一个多模态大语言模型，能够直接处理转录组数据并执行多样本生物学推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前模型要么只处理表达谱而不生成自然语言解释，要么仅依赖语言推理而无法直接访问定量组学数据，缺乏连接定量组学与语言推理的统一模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够同时处理定量转录组数据和自然语言指令，并支持多样本推理的多模态大语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准要么评估谱级预测，要么评估纯文本生物问答，缺乏语言引导的多样本真实表达谱推理评测。
analysis.method: 将每个转录组谱表示为LLM上下文中的紧凑连续表示，保留定量信号；在超过550万指令样本上训练，涵盖70多种任务类型，包括连续转录组输入、实验数据语言模板和自由文本生物知识。
contributions: 提出OmicsLM，一个连接定量组学与自然语言的多模态LLM，支持多样本推理。
构建GEO-OmicsQA基准，用于评估多样本生物问答。
analysis.experiments: 在谱级任务上与专用组学模型性能相当，在语言引导的生物推理上优于专用组学模型和通用LLM。
limitations: 可能仅适用于转录组数据，未扩展到其他组学类型。
训练数据依赖公开数据库，可能覆盖不全。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OmicsLM 是一个多模态大语言模型，能够直接处理转录组数据并执行多样本生物学推理。

papers.title: Enabling Unsupervised Training of Deep EEG Denoisers With Intelligent Partitioning
papers.abstract: Denoising wearable electroencephalogram (EEG) is inherently challenging since neural activity is not only subtle but also inseparable from spectrally overlapping noise artifacts. Classical signal processing methods, relying on fixed or heuristic rules, cannot handle the time-varying pervasive artifacts in wearable EEGs. Deep learning methods, on the other hand, show promise in decomposition-free EEG denoising using highly expressive neural networks, but the training requires artifact-free EEG, which is inherently unobtainable. To address this, we propose Intelligent Partitioning for Self-supervised Denoising (iPSD). Our method eliminates the need for clean references by learning to partition an input EEG segment into independent noisy realizations with the same underlying signal. This enables self-supervision of deep learning denoisers, even in zero-shot settings where only a single EEG segment to be denoised is available. We validate iPSD through extensive experiments, including validations on wearable EEG from in-ear sensors. The results show that iPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance, most notably under extremely low signal-to-noise ratios (down to -10 dB) and challenging artifacts (e.g., EMG), with spectral fidelity orders of magnitude higher than competitive baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出智能分区自监督去噪方法，无需干净脑电即可训练深度去噪器，在极低信噪比下达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 可穿戴脑电信号微弱且与噪声频谱重叠，传统信号处理方法依赖固定规则无法处理时变伪迹，深度学习方法需要无法获取的无伪迹脑电作为训练标签。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有干净参考信号的情况下训练深度脑电去噪模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出智能分区自监督去噪（iPSD），将输入脑电片段智能划分为具有相同底层信号的独立噪声实现，从而自监督训练深度去噪器，支持零样本设置。
contributions: 提出iPSD方法，无需干净脑电即可训练深度去噪器。
在极低信噪比（-10 dB）和挑战性伪迹（如EMG）下实现SOTA性能，频谱保真度比基线高数个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在可穿戴脑电（包括耳内传感器）上进行了广泛验证，结果显示iPSD在极低信噪比和挑战性伪迹下达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对特定类型伪迹或脑电设备泛化性有限。
分区策略的智能性可能依赖超参数或先验假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出智能分区自监督去噪方法，无需干净脑电即可训练深度去噪器，在极低信噪比下达到SOTA。

papers.title: Conditional generation of antibody sequences with classifier-guided germline-absorbing discrete diffusion
papers.abstract: Antibody therapeutics are among the most successful modern medicines, yet computationally designing antibodies with desirable binding and developability properties remains challenging. While protein language models (pLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for antibody sequence design, existing approaches largely suffer from two key limitations: they predominantly memorize germline sequences rather than modeling biologically meaningful somatic variation, and they offer limited support for flexible classifier-guided conditional generation. We address these challenges through two primary contributions. First, we demonstrate that discrete diffusion fine-tuning achieves strong language modeling performance on antibody sequences while allowing for generation conditioned on any off-the-shelf classifier. Second, we introduce germline absorbing diffusion, a novel modification of the discrete diffusion noise process in which the germline sequence - rather than a masked sequence - serves as the absorbing state. This biologically motivated inductive bias restricts the model to learning the trajectory from germline to observed sequence, effectively excluding genetic variation and V(D)J recombination statistics from the learned distribution and dramatically mitigating germline bias. We show that germline diffusion improves non-germline residue prediction accuracy from 26 percent to 46 percent, approaching the theoretical upper bound set by true biological variability. We then demonstrate the utility of our germline diffusion model on the conditional generation tasks of sampling antibodies with improved hydrophobicity and predicted binding affinity. On both tasks our model shows an improved tradeoff between class adherence and sample quality, significantly outperforming EvoProtGrad, a popular strategy to sample from pLMs with gradient-based discrete Markov Chain Monte Carlo.

analysis.tldr: 提出种系吸收离散扩散，用于抗体序列的条件生成，显著提升非种系残基预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 抗体治疗药物是现代医学中最成功的药物之一，但计算设计具有理想结合和可开发性的抗体仍然具有挑战性。现有蛋白质语言模型主要记忆种系序列而非建模有意义的体细胞变异，且对灵活的分类器引导条件生成支持有限。
analysis.problem: 解决现有抗体序列设计方法中种系偏差严重和缺乏灵活条件生成能力的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法主要记忆种系序列，而非学习生物上有意义的体细胞变异；离散扩散微调可实现强语言建模性能并支持条件生成。
analysis.method: 提出种系吸收离散扩散，将种系序列作为吸收态，使模型学习从种系到观测序列的轨迹，排除遗传变异和V(D)J重组统计，缓解种系偏差。
contributions: 证明离散扩散微调在抗体序列上实现强语言建模性能，并支持任意现成分类器的条件生成。
引入种系吸收扩散，将非种系残基预测准确率从26%提升至46%，接近理论上限。
analysis.experiments: 在抗体序列上评估非种系残基预测准确率（从26%到46%），并在条件生成任务（改善疏水性和预测结合亲和力）上展示优于EvoProtGrad的类别遵循与样本质量权衡。
limitations: 可能仅适用于抗体序列，泛化性未知。
依赖现成分类器，分类器质量影响生成效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出种系吸收离散扩散，用于抗体序列的条件生成，显著提升非种系残基预测精度。

papers.title: Agentic Coding Needs Proactivity, Not Just Autonomy
papers.abstract: Coding agents are rapidly changing the landscape of software development, moving from inline completion to autonomous systems that edit repositories, open pull requests, respond to issues, and run scheduled or webhook triggered routines across the development life cycle. The next generation is increasingly described as proactive and long-horizon: agents should notice relevant changes before the developer asks, connect signals across tools, decide when to interrupt, and carry preferences across sessions. Yet the field still lacks a clear account of what proactivity means for software development, how it differs from autonomy, what acceptance criteria proactive long-horizon tasks should satisfy, and which metrics determine whether unsolicited agent behavior is useful rather than merely active. Proactive coding agents should be evaluated by the quality and improvement of their insight policy: the policy that decides what matters next, what evidence supports it, whether to show it, and how to adapt after feedback. This view is grounded in the principles of mixed initiative interaction. We propose a three level taxonomy of proactivity (Reactive, Scheduled, and Situation Aware), compare contemporary coding agents against five practical criteria, and sketch an active user simulation protocol with three evaluation targets: Insight Decision Quality (IDQ), Context Grounding Score (CGS), and Learning Lift

analysis.tldr: 提出编码智能体需要从自主性转向主动性，并定义了主动性层次与评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前编码智能体已具备自主执行任务的能力，但缺乏主动感知上下文、跨工具连接信号、决定何时中断以及跨会话保持偏好的能力，导致其行为可能只是活跃而非有用。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和评估编码智能体的主动性，以及如何设计能够主动提供有用洞察而非被动响应的智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有编码智能体主要关注自主性（autonomy），即独立执行指令的能力，但缺乏主动性（proactivity），即主动发现相关变化、连接信号、决定何时中断并适应反馈的能力。
analysis.method: 提出一个三层主动性分类法（反应式、计划式、情境感知），并基于混合主动交互原则，定义洞察策略（insight policy）作为核心，同时设计主动用户模拟协议，包含三个评估目标：洞察决策质量（IDQ）、上下文接地分数（CGS）和学习提升（Learning Lift）。
contributions: 明确区分了编码智能体的自主性与主动性，并定义了主动性的三层分类法。
提出了评估主动编码智能体的三个具体指标：IDQ、CGS和Learning Lift。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 提出的分类法和评估指标尚未在真实场景中验证。
主动用户模拟协议可能无法完全模拟真实开发者的复杂行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出编码智能体需要从自主性转向主动性，并定义了主动性层次与评估指标。

papers.title: Agentic AI and the Industrialization of Cyber Offense: Forecast, Consequences, and Defensive Priorities for Enterprises and the Mittelstand
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems can plan, call tools, inspect code, interact with web applications, and coordinate multi-step workflows. These same capabilities change the economics of cyber offense. The central near-term risk is not that every low-skill criminal immediately becomes a frontier exploit researcher; it is that agentic AI compresses the attack lifecycle by lowering the cost of reconnaissance, phishing, credential abuse, vulnerability triage, exploit adaptation, and post-compromise decision support. This paper synthesizes current public evidence from national cybersecurity agencies, industry threat reports, agent security guidance, and research on LLM agents cyber capabilities. It introduces a Three Channel Agentic Cyber Risk Model and an Agentic Attack Compression Model, uses the 2026 Linux kernel Copy Fail incident as a case study for foothold-to-root acceleration, and develops a 2026 to 2028 forecast for large enterprises and the German and European Mittelstand. The paper concludes with a prioritized defense roadmap. Organizations should treat agentic AI security as an immediate operational problem: identity, phishing resistant authentication, patch velocity, CI/CD and Linux/container hardening, agent governance, telemetry, and recovery readiness must be strengthened now.

analysis.tldr: Agentic AI 将压缩网络攻击生命周期，企业需立即强化身份认证、补丁管理等防御措施。
analysis.research_motivation: Agentic AI 系统具备规划、工具调用、代码检查等能力，这些能力改变了网络攻击的经济学，使得攻击生命周期被压缩，企业面临新的安全威胁。
analysis.problem: 如何评估 Agentic AI 对网络攻击的影响，并为企业和中型企业制定防御优先级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，Agentic AI 降低了侦察、钓鱼、凭证滥用、漏洞分类、漏洞利用适应和入侵后决策支持的成本，从而压缩了攻击生命周期。
analysis.method: 综合当前公共证据（来自国家网络安全机构、行业威胁报告、代理安全指南和 LLM 代理网络能力研究），提出三通道代理网络风险模型和代理攻击压缩模型，并以 2026 年 Linux 内核 Copy Fail 事件作为案例研究。
contributions: 提出三通道代理网络风险模型和代理攻击压缩模型
提供 2026-2028 年预测和优先防御路线图
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 预测基于当前证据，未来实际攻击模式可能变化
防御路线图可能不适用于所有企业规模
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agentic AI 将压缩网络攻击生命周期，企业需立即强化身份认证、补丁管理等防御措施。

papers.title: The Single-File Test: A Longitudinal Public-Interface Evaluation of First-Output LLM Web Generation with Social Reach Tracking
papers.abstract: This paper presents an eight-week observational comparison of 68 single-file HTML generations collected across 17 public experiments in the "HTML AI Battle" project between December 10, 2025 and February 4, 2026. Four reasoning model families, GPT, Gemini, Grok, and Claude, were compared under a fixed public-interface protocol with no custom instructions, no personality tuning, and no repair prompts. Each output was evaluated from a rendered browser video using human scores and a Gemini LLM-as-a-judge layer for prompt adherence, functional correctness, and UI quality, then packaged into a standardized social-media protocol spanning X (Twitter), TikTok, and YouTube. The tracker was also used for two supervised predictive analyses: an experiment-level model for 24-hour X impressions and a generation-level model for HTML verbosity. Under this protocol, Claude was the strongest and most consistent family, leading mean performance and winning 9/17 prompts under the primary human weighted score. Longer measured reasoning time was not associated with higher quality overall. Gemini as a judge was significantly more lenient than the human evaluator on functional correctness and overall performance, while stable self-favoring bias remained unresolved. The exploratory X-impressions model remained weak under post-screen cross-validation (MAE = 46,874, R^2 = -0.377), whereas the HTML-lines model performed better, with a model-family-only baseline outperforming prompt-aware alternatives (MAE = 135.2, R^2 = 0.576). Overall, selected pre-publication technical/audio variables were not sufficient to predict 24-hour X reach, while code verbosity was driven much more by model family than by prompt wording. The comparisons remain observational and are limited by public-interface drift, access-path differences, and one primary human scorer.

analysis.tldr: 在固定公共接口协议下，Claude 在单文件 HTML 生成任务中表现最强且最稳定，但推理时间与质量无关，且 Gemini 作为评判者存在宽松和自偏袒问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 生成网页的评估多基于封闭或定制化设置，缺乏在真实公共接口下、无额外调优的纵向对比研究，且对社交媒体传播效果的预测能力尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 在固定公共接口协议下，比较不同推理模型家族（GPT、Gemini、Grok、Claude）在单文件 HTML 生成任务中的表现，并探索代码冗长度和社交媒体曝光量的预测因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Claude 在人类加权评分中表现最强且最一致，赢得 9/17 个提示；更长的推理时间并未带来更高质量；Gemini 作为评判者比人类更宽松，且存在未解决的自偏袒偏差；代码冗长度主要由模型家族驱动而非提示措辞；社交媒体曝光量难以通过技术/音频变量预测。
analysis.method: 在 8 周内收集 68 个单文件 HTML 生成样本，使用固定公共接口协议（无自定义指令、无个性调整、无修复提示），通过人类评分和 Gemini 评判者评估提示遵循度、功能正确性和 UI 质量，并标准化社交媒体发布流程，同时构建两个预测模型（X 曝光量和 HTML 冗长度）。
contributions: 首次在固定公共接口协议下对多个 LLM 家族进行纵向、无额外调优的 HTML 生成对比评估
揭示了推理时间与生成质量无关、评判者偏差（宽松和自偏袒）以及模型家族对代码冗长度的主导作用
analysis.experiments: 68 个单文件 HTML 生成样本，17 个公开实验，4 个模型家族（GPT、Gemini、Grok、Claude），人类评分和 Gemini 评判者评估，两个预测模型（X 曝光量：MAE=46,874, R²=-0.377；HTML 冗长度：MAE=135.2, R²=0.576）。
limitations: 观察性研究，受公共接口漂移、访问路径差异和单一人类评分者限制
社交媒体曝光量预测模型表现弱，技术/音频变量不足以预测 24 小时 X 覆盖
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在固定公共接口协议下，Claude 在单文件 HTML 生成任务中表现最强且最稳定，但推理时间与质量无关，且 Gemini 作为评判者存在宽松和自偏袒问题。

papers.title: Toeplitz MLP Mixers are Low Complexity, Information-Rich Sequence Models
papers.abstract: Transformer-based large language models are in some respects limited by the quadratic time and space computational complexity of attention. We introduce the Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM), a transformer-like architecture that swaps attention for triangular-masked Toeplitz matrix multiplication over the sequence dimension resulting in $\mathcal{O} (dn \log n)$ time and $\mathcal O(dn)$ space complexity during training and $\mathcal O(dn)$ time and space at inference prefill. Despite the lack of sophisticated input modulation or state maintenance present in other sub-quadratic architectures, TMMs yield greater training efficiency in terms of loss achieved per compute and device memory. We demonstrate that TMMs are capable of retaining more input information resulting in improved copying ability, which we argue results from a lack of architectural biases. Consistent with higher input information retention, TMMs exhibit superior information retrieval and in-context learning benchmark accuracy compared to comparable architectures. We conclude with an analysis from the perspective of operator index theory and show that, counterintuitively, trained Toeplitz layers of causal non-invertible models are more likely to be invertible or nearly so than models that are actually invertible over their inputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，用三角掩蔽Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力，实现O(dn log n)训练复杂度和O(dn)推理复杂度，在信息保留和上下文学习上优于同类架构。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer的注意力机制具有二次时间和空间复杂度，限制了长序列建模的效率。现有次二次架构通常需要复杂的输入调制或状态维护，而TMM以更简单的设计实现高效训练和更好的信息保留。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种低复杂度、高信息保留的序列模型，替代Transformer中的注意力机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出TMM缺乏架构偏置，因此能保留更多输入信息，从而提升复制能力；此外，训练后的因果非可逆模型的Toeplitz层更可能接近可逆。
analysis.method: 提出Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，在序列维度使用三角掩蔽的Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力，结合MLP层，实现O(dn log n)训练时间和O(dn)空间复杂度。
contributions: 提出TMM架构，以三角掩蔽Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力，显著降低计算和空间复杂度。
实验证明TMM在信息保留、复制能力、信息检索和上下文学习基准上优于可比架构。
从算子指标理论角度分析，发现训练后的Toeplitz层更可能接近可逆。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定任务或数据规模下验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
Toeplitz矩阵乘法的实现可能对硬件优化有特殊要求。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，用三角掩蔽Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力，实现O(dn log n)训练复杂度和O(dn)推理复杂度，在信息保留和上下文学习上优于同类架构。

papers.title: Domain-level metacognitive monitoring in frontier LLMs: A 33-model atlas
papers.abstract: Aggregate metacognitive quality scores mask within-model variation across MMLU benchmark domains. We administered 1,500 MMLU items (250 per domain, under an a priori six-domain grouping) to 33 frontier LLMs from eight model families and computed Type-2 AUROC per model-domain cell using verbalized confidence (0-100). Total observations: 47,151. Every model with above-chance aggregate monitoring showed non-trivial domain-level variation. Applied/Professional knowledge was reliably the easiest benchmark domain to monitor (mean AUROC = .742, ranked top-2 in 21 of 33 models); Formal Reasoning and Natural Science were reliably the hardest (one of the two ranked bottom-2 in 27 of 33 models). The three middle domains were statistically indistinguishable (Kendall's W = .164). A subject-level coherence analysis (within-domain similarity ratio = 0.95) confirms the six-domain grouping is a pragmatic benchmark taxonomy, not a validated latent construct. Within-family profile-shape clustering is significant for Anthropic, Google-Gemini, and Qwen (permutation p < .0001) but not DeepSeek, Google-Gemma, or OpenAI. Gemma 4 31B showed a +.202 AUROC improvement over Gemma 3 27B. Three models classified Invalid on binary KEEP/WITHDRAW probes produced normal profiles under verbalized confidence, confirming probe-format specificity. Bootstrap 95% CIs on 198 cells have median width .199. Split-half aggregate stability r = .893; profile-level split-half is weaker (grand median r = .184). These results show stable benchmark-domain variation obscured by aggregate metrics, and support benchmark-stage domain screening as a step before deployment in specific application areas.

analysis.tldr: 对33个前沿LLM的元认知监控进行领域级分析，发现聚合指标掩盖了显著的领域间差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有元认知质量评估通常使用聚合指标，但可能掩盖模型在不同知识领域上的监控能力差异，影响模型在特定应用场景中的可靠部署。
analysis.problem: 揭示前沿LLM在MMLU基准测试各领域上的元认知监控差异，并评估领域分组的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在聚合监控能力高于随机水平时，均表现出非平凡的领域级变异；应用/专业知识领域监控最容易，形式推理和自然科学领域最难；中间三个领域统计上不可区分；领域分组是实用的基准分类而非验证的潜在结构。
analysis.method: 对33个前沿LLM（来自8个模型家族）进行1500个MMLU题目（每领域250题，共6个领域）测试，使用口头化置信度（0-100）计算每个模型-领域单元的Type-2 AUROC，并进行领域内一致性分析和家族内轮廓形状聚类。
contributions: 构建了33个前沿LLM在6个MMLU领域上的元认知监控图谱，揭示了聚合指标掩盖的领域级变异。
发现应用/专业知识领域监控最容易，形式推理和自然科学领域最难，并验证了领域分组的实用性。
展示了家族内轮廓形状聚类在部分模型家族中显著，并指出探测格式特异性（口头化置信度 vs. 二元KEEP/WITHDRAW探测）的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了统计指标如AUROC、Kendall's W、Bootstrap置信区间、分半稳定性等。
limitations: 领域分组基于先验六领域分组，可能不是最优的潜在结构。
仅使用MMLU基准，可能无法推广到其他知识领域或任务类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对33个前沿LLM的元认知监控进行领域级分析，发现聚合指标掩盖了显著的领域间差异。

papers.title: Evaluating Prompt Injection Defenses for Educational LLM Tutors: Security-Usability-Latency Trade-offs
papers.abstract: Educational LLM tutors face a core AI alignment challenge: they must follow user intent while preserving pedagogical constraints and safety policies. We present an evaluation methodology for prompt-injection defenses in this setting, showing that guardrail design entails explicit trade-offs among adversarial robustness, benign-task usability, and response latency. We evaluate a domain-specific multi-layer safeguard pipeline combining deterministic pattern filters, structural validation, contextual sandboxing, and session-level behavioral checks. On a controlled holdout benchmark with 480 queries (369 injection, 111 benign), the pipeline reaches 46.34% bypass, 0.00% false positive rate, and 2.50 ms average latency -- an operating point that prioritizes pedagogical usability (zero false positives) while maintaining measurable attack resistance. We provide a reproducible benchmark protocol for head-to-head comparison under identical conditions, including stratified bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar significance tests, and direct evaluation of Prompt Guard and NeMo Guardrails on the same split with unified instrumentation. Results expose operational trade-offs: NeMo reaches 0% bypass at 16.22% FPR and 1.3s latency, while Prompt Guard yields 38.48% bypass with 3.60% FPR. The framework supports evidence-based guardrail selection for AI tutoring systems under different institutional risk and usability requirements.

analysis.tldr: 教育LLM导师的提示注入防御需要在安全性、可用性和延迟之间权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育LLM导师面临对齐挑战，需同时遵循用户意图和教学约束，现有防御缺乏系统评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何评估提示注入防御在教育场景中的安全-可用性-延迟权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示不同防御方法存在明确权衡：多层管道实现零误报但46.34%绕过率，NeMo实现零绕过但16.22%误报率和1.3秒延迟，Prompt Guard绕过率38.48%且误报率3.60%。
analysis.method: 提出领域特定的多层防护管道，结合确定性模式过滤、结构验证、上下文沙箱和会话级行为检查，并设计可重复的基准测试协议。
contributions: 提出教育LLM导师场景下提示注入防御的评估方法论，明确安全-可用性-延迟权衡。
构建包含480个查询的基准测试集和可重复的评估协议，支持头对头比较。
analysis.experiments: 在480个查询（369注入，111良性）的基准上，多层管道达到46.34%绕过率、0.00%误报率和2.50ms平均延迟；NeMo达到0%绕过、16.22%误报率和1.3s延迟；Prompt Guard达到38.48%绕过和3.60%误报率。
limitations: 基准规模较小，可能无法覆盖所有攻击类型。
仅评估了特定管道组合，未探索所有可能配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 教育LLM导师的提示注入防御需要在安全性、可用性和延迟之间权衡。

papers.title: CommFuse: Hiding Tail Latency via Communication Decomposition and Fusion for Distributed LLM Training
papers.abstract: The rapid growth in the size of large language models has necessitated the partitioning of computational workloads across accelerators such as GPUs, TPUs, and NPUs. However, these parallelization strategies incur substantial data communication overhead significantly hindering computational efficiency. While communication-computation overlap presents a promising direction, existing data slicing based solutions suffer from tail latency. To overcome this limitation, this research introduces a novel communication-computation overlap technique to eliminate this tail latency in state of the art overlap methods for distributed LLM training. The aim of this technique is to effectively mitigate communication bottleneck of tensor parallelism and data parallelism for distributed training and inference. In particular, we propose a novel method termed CommFuse that replaces conventional collective operations of reduce-scatter and all-gather with decomposed peer-to-peer (P2P) communication and schedules partitioned computations to enable fine-grained overlap. Our method provides an exact algorithm for reducing communication overhead that eliminates tail latency. Moreover, it presents a versatile solution compatible with data-parallel training and various tensor-level parallelism strategies, including TPSP and UP. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our technique consistently achieves lower latency, superior Model FLOPS Utilization (MFU), and high throughput.

analysis.tldr: CommFuse通过分解与融合通信操作消除分布式LLM训练中的尾部延迟，提升计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 分布式LLM训练中，数据并行和模型并行策略引入大量通信开销，现有通信-计算重叠方法因尾部延迟而效率受限。
analysis.problem: 消除分布式LLM训练中现有通信-计算重叠方法的尾部延迟，缓解通信瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基于数据切片的通信-计算重叠方法存在尾部延迟，导致整体效率下降。
analysis.method: CommFuse：将传统的reduce-scatter和all-gather集体通信分解为点对点通信，并调度分块计算以实现细粒度重叠，提供精确算法消除尾部延迟。
contributions: 提出CommFuse方法，通过通信分解与融合消除尾部延迟，实现高效通信-计算重叠。
提供与数据并行及多种张量并行策略（如TPSP、UP）兼容的通用解决方案。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明CommFuse在延迟、模型FLOPs利用率（MFU）和吞吐量上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定并行策略（如张量并行和数据并行）优化，未覆盖其他并行模式。
未讨论在异构硬件或动态网络环境下的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CommFuse通过分解与融合通信操作消除分布式LLM训练中的尾部延迟，提升计算效率。

papers.title: Consensus Entropy: Harnessing Multi-VLM Agreement for Self-Verifying and Self-Improving OCR
papers.abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) is fundamental to Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and high-quality data generation for LLM training. Yet, despite progress in average OCR accuracy, state-of-the-art VLMs still struggle with detecting sample-level errors and lack effective unsupervised quality control. We introduce Consensus Entropy (CE), a training-free, model-agnostic metric that estimates output reliability by measuring inter-model agreement entropy. The core insight is that correct predictions converge in output space, while errors diverge. Based on CE, we develop CE-OCR, a lightweight multi-model framework that verifies outputs by ensemble agreement, selects the best outputs, and further improves efficiency through adaptive routing. Experiments demonstrate that CE is robust for quality verification, improving F1 scores by 42.1% over VLM-as-Judge. CE-OCR achieves consistent OCR gains, outperforming self-consistency and single-model baselines at the same cost. Notably, CE requires no training or supervision, enabling plug-and-play integration. Code: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出共识熵（CE）指标，利用多VLM间一致性实现无训练、无监督的OCR质量验证与自改进。
analysis.research_motivation: OCR是VLM和LLM数据生成的基础，但现有VLM在样本级错误检测上表现不佳，缺乏有效的无监督质量控制方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练或监督的情况下，可靠地检测OCR输出中的错误并提升整体质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正确预测在输出空间中趋于一致，而错误预测则发散，因此多模型间的分歧程度可作为可靠性的指标。
analysis.method: 提出共识熵（CE），通过测量多个VLM输出之间的熵来估计可靠性；基于CE构建CE-OCR框架，利用集成一致性验证输出、选择最佳输出，并通过自适应路由提升效率。
contributions: 提出共识熵（CE），一种无需训练、与模型无关的OCR质量度量指标。
开发CE-OCR框架，实现无监督的OCR输出验证、选择与效率优化。
analysis.experiments: 在OCR任务上，CE在质量验证中F1分数比VLM-as-Judge提升42.1%；CE-OCR在相同成本下优于自一致性和单模型基线。
limitations: 依赖多个VLM的集成，可能增加推理成本。
自适应路由策略的泛化性未在更多任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出共识熵（CE）指标，利用多VLM间一致性实现无训练、无监督的OCR质量验证与自改进。
